In the proposition player II’s strategy \(y\) is fixed, but it holds similarly when player I’s strategy is fixed. Fixing strategies is important here, because the set of equilibria is in general not convex.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下命题指出，在两人博弈中，具有一个参与者相同策略的两个混合均衡可以通过凸组合(convex combination)相结合，以得到更多的均衡，就像上述例子中的情况一样。在该命题中，参与者 II 的策略 \(y\) 是固定的，但当参与者 I 的策略固定时，情况类似。在这里固定策略很重要，因为均衡集一般不是凸集。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 6.9. Consider a bimatrix game(A, B)with mixed-strategy sets \(X\) and \(Y\) as in (6.6). Let(x, y)and \(\left( {\widehat{x},y}\right)\) be equilibria of the game, where \(x,\widehat{x} \in  X\) and \(y \in  Y\) . Then \(\left( {x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{x}p}\right) ,y)\) is also an equilibrium of the game, for any \(p \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题6.9。考虑一个双矩阵博弈(A, B)，其混合策略集为 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) ，如(6.6)所示。设(x, y)和 \(\left( {\widehat{x},y}\right)\) 是该博弈的均衡，其中 \(x,\widehat{x} \in  X\) 且 \(y \in  Y\) 。那么对于任意 \(p \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) ， \(\left( {x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{x}p}\right) ,y)\) 也是该博弈的一个均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(\bar{x} = x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{x}p\) . Clearly, \(\bar{x} \in  X\) because \({\bar{x}}_{i} \geq  0\) for all pure strategies \(i\) of player I, and

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(\bar{x} = x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{x}p\) 。显然， \(\bar{x} \in  X\) ，因为对于参与者I的所有纯策略 \(i\) ，都有 \({\bar{x}}_{i} \geq  0\) ，并且
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }\bar{x} = {\mathbf{1}}^{\top }\left( {x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{x}p}\right)  = {\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x\left( {1 - p}\right)  + {\mathbf{1}}^{\top }\widehat{x}p = \left( {1 - p}\right)  + p = 1. \tag{6.23}
\]

The pair \(\left( {\bar{x},y}\right)\) is an equilibrium if \(\bar{x}\) is a best response to \(y\) and vice versa. For any mixed strategy \(\widetilde{x}\) of player \(\mathrm{I}\) , we have \({x}^{\top }{Ay} \geq  {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay}\) and \({\widehat{x}}^{\top }{Ay} \geq  {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay}\) , and consequently

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \(\bar{x}\) 是对 \(y\) 的最优反应，反之亦然，那么 \(\left( {\bar{x},y}\right)\) 这一对就是一个均衡。对于参与者 \(\mathrm{I}\) 的任何混合策略 \(\widetilde{x}\) ，我们有 \({x}^{\top }{Ay} \geq  {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay}\) 和 \({\widehat{x}}^{\top }{Ay} \geq  {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay}\) ，因此
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{\bar{x}}^{\top }{Ay} = \left( {1 - p}\right) {x}^{\top }{Ay} + p{\widehat{x}}^{\top }{Ay} \geq  \left( {1 - p}\right) {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay} + p{\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay} = {\widetilde{x}}^{\top }{Ay},
\]

which shows that \(\bar{x}\) is a best response to \(y\) . In other words, these inequalities hold because they are preserved under convex combinations. Similarly, \(y\) is a best response to \(x\) and \(\widehat{x}\) , that is, for any \(\widetilde{y} \in  Y\) we have \({x}^{\top }{By} \geq  {x}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) and \({\widehat{x}}^{\top }{By} \geq  {\widehat{x}}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) . Again, taking convex combinations shows \({\bar{x}}^{\top }{By} \geq  {\bar{x}}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) . Hence, \(\left( {\bar{x},y}\right)\) is an equilibrium, as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
这表明 \(\bar{x}\) 是对 \(y\) 的最优反应。换句话说，这些不等式成立是因为它们在凸组合下保持不变。类似地， \(y\) 是对 \(x\) 和 \(\widehat{x}\) 的最优反应，即对于任何 \(\widetilde{y} \in  Y\) ，我们有 \({x}^{\top }{By} \geq  {x}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) 和 \({\widehat{x}}^{\top }{By} \geq  {\widehat{x}}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) 。再次，取凸组合表明 \({\bar{x}}^{\top }{By} \geq  {\bar{x}}^{\top }B\widetilde{y}\) 。因此，如所声称的， \(\left( {\bar{x},y}\right)\) 是一个均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

We come back to the example of Figure 6.12 to illustrate Proposition 6.9: This game has two equilibria(x, y)and \(\left( {x,\widehat{y}}\right)\) where \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) , and \(\widehat{y} = \left( {\frac{2}{3},0,\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) , so this is the situation of Proposition 6.9, except that the two equilibria have the same mixed strategy of player I rather than of player II. Consequently, \(\left( {x,\bar{y}}\right)\) is an equilibrium for any convex combination \(\bar{y}\) of \(y\) and \(\widehat{y}\) . The equilibria (x, y)and \(\left( {x,\widehat{y}}\right)\) are "extreme" in the sense that \(y\) and \(\widehat{y}\) have as many zero probabilities as possible, which means that \(y\) and \(\widehat{y}\) are the endpoints of a line segment of equilibrium strategies \(\bar{y} = y\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{y}p\) (that is, \(\left( {x,\bar{y}}\right)\) is an equilibrium).

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们回到图6.12的例子来说明命题6.9:这个博弈有两个均衡(x, y)和 \(\left( {x,\widehat{y}}\right)\) ，其中 \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 且 \(\widehat{y} = \left( {\frac{2}{3},0,\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) ，所以这就是命题6.9的情况，只是这两个均衡中参与者I的混合策略相同，而不是参与者II的。因此，对于 \(y\) 和 \(\widehat{y}\) 的任何凸组合 \(\bar{y}\) ， \(\left( {x,\bar{y}}\right)\) 都是一个均衡。均衡(x, y)和 \(\left( {x,\widehat{y}}\right)\) 是“极端的”，因为 \(y\) 和 \(\widehat{y}\) 的概率尽可能多地为零，这意味着 \(y\) 和 \(\widehat{y}\) 是均衡策略线段 \(\bar{y} = y\left( {1 - p}\right)  + \widehat{y}p\) 的端点(即 \(\left( {x,\bar{y}}\right)\) 是一个均衡)。
\end{tcolorbox}

\(\Rightarrow\) Express the set of equilibria for the Threat game in Figure 6.11 with the help of Proposition 6.9.

\begin{tcolorbox}
\(\Rightarrow\) 借助命题6.9，求出图6.11中威胁博弈的均衡集。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{6.9 Further Reading}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{6.9 进一步阅读}
\end{tcolorbox}

In Section 6.2, the Inspection game is used to motivate mixed strategies. Inspection games are an applied area of game theory; see, for example, Avenhaus and Canty (1996).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在6.2节中，监管博弈被用于引入混合策略。监管博弈是博弈论的一个应用领域；例如，可参见Avenhaus和Canty(1996)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The seminal paper by Nash (1951) defined "equilibrium points" in finite games and proved their existence. As mentioned, the best-response condition is stated as "trivial" by Nash (1951, p. 287), but it is central for finding mixed equilibria. Nash's "equilibrium point" is now universally called "Nash equilibrium", which is the equilibrium concept considered throughout this book, except for the generalization of correlated equilibrium in Chapter 12. For textbook treatments of mixed-strategy equilibria see Osborne (2004, Chapter 4) or Maschler, Solan, and Zamir (2013, Chapter 5).

\begin{tcolorbox}
纳什(1951)的开创性论文定义了有限博弈中的“均衡点”并证明了它们的存在性。如前所述，纳什(1951，第287页)称最优反应条件为“显而易见的”，但它对于寻找混合均衡至关重要。纳什的“均衡点”现在被普遍称为“纳什均衡”，这是本书通篇所考虑的均衡概念，第12章中相关均衡的推广情况除外。关于混合策略均衡的教科书式处理，可参阅奥斯本(2004，第4章)或马斯勒、索兰和扎米尔(2013，第5章)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The use of the upper envelope seems to be folklore, and is at any rate straightforward. For Definition 6.7 see van Damme (1987, p. 52), and for a detailed comparison of conditions of degeneracy for two-player games (which are all equivalent to this definition) see von Stengel (2021).

\begin{tcolorbox}
上包络的使用似乎是业内常识，而且无论如何都很直接。关于定义6.7，可参阅范·达默(1987，第52页)；关于两人博弈退化条件的详细比较(所有这些条件都与此定义等价)，可参阅冯·施滕格尔(2021)。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{6.10 Exercises for Chapter 6}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{6.10 第6章练习}
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 6.1. Let \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{m}\) and \(y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n}\) and remember that all vectors are column vectors. If \(m = n\) , what is the difference between \({x}^{\top }y\) and \(x{y}^{\top }\) ? What if \(m \neq  n\) ?

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习6.1。设 \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{m}\) 和 \(y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n}\) ，并记住所有向量都是列向量。如果 \(m = n\) ， \({x}^{\top }y\) 和 \(x{y}^{\top }\) 之间的差异是什么？如果 \(m \neq  n\) 呢？
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 6.2. Find all mixed equilibria (which always includes any pure equilibria) of this \(3 \times  2\) game.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习6.2。找出这个 \(3 \times  2\) 博弈的所有混合均衡(这总是包括任何纯策略均衡)。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.2\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_178_1100_442_353_488_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Exercise 6.3. Consider the three-player game tree in Exercise 4.5. Recall that some or all of the strategies in a mixed equilibrium may be pure strategies.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习6.3。考虑练习4.5中的三人博弈树。回想一下，混合均衡中的部分或所有策略可能是纯策略。
\end{tcolorbox}

(a) Is the following statement true or false? It is easiest to argue directly with the game tree.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 以下陈述是对还是错？直接用博弈树来论证是最容易的。
\end{tcolorbox}

For each of the players I, II, or III, the game has a mixed equilibrium in which that player plays a mixed strategy that is not a pure strategy.

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于玩家I、II或III中的每一个，该博弈都有一个混合均衡，其中该玩家采用的混合策略不是纯策略。
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) Is the following statement true or false? Explain.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 以下陈述是对还是错？请解释。
\end{tcolorbox}

In every mixed equilibrium of the game, at least one player I, II, or III plays a pure strategy.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在该博弈的每个混合均衡中，玩家I、II或III中至少有一个采用纯策略。
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 6.4. In this \(2 \times  2\) game, \(A,B,C,D\) are the payoffs to player I, which are real numbers, no two of which are equal. Similarly, \(a,b,c,d\) are the payoffs to player II, which are real numbers, also no two of which are equal.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习6.4。在这个 \(2 \times  2\) 博弈中， \(A,B,C,D\) 是玩家I的收益，它们是实数，且任意两个都不相等。类似地， \(a,b,c,d\) 是玩家II的收益，它们也是实数，且任意两个也不相等。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_178_1038_1481_415_356_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

(a) Under which conditions does this game have a mixed equilibrium which is not a pure-strategy equilibrium?

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 在什么条件下，这个博弈有一个不是纯策略均衡的混合均衡？
\end{tcolorbox}

[Hint: Consider the possible patterns of best responses and resulting possible dominance relations, and express this by comparing the payoffs, as, for example, \(A > C\) .]

\begin{tcolorbox}
[提示:考虑最优反应的可能模式以及由此产生的可能的占优关系，并通过比较收益来表达，例如 \(A > C\) 。]
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) Under which conditions in (a) is this the only equilibrium of the game?

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 在(a)中的什么条件下，这是该博弈的唯一均衡？
\end{tcolorbox}

(c) Consider one of the situations in (b) and compute the probabilities \(1 - p\) and \(p\) for playing Top and Bottom, respectively, and \(1 - q\) and \(q\) for playing left and right, respectively, that hold in equilibrium.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(c) 考虑(b)中的一种情况，分别计算在均衡状态下选择“上”和“下”的概率 \(1 - p\) 和 \(p\) ，以及选择“左”和“右”的概率 \(1 - q\) 和 \(q\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

(d) For the solution in (c), give a simple formula for the quotients \(\left( {1 - p}\right) /p\) and \(\left( {1 - q}\right) /q\) in terms of the payoff parameters. Try to write this formula such that the denominator and numerator are both positive.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(d) 对于(c)中的解，用收益参数给出商 \(\left( {1 - p}\right) /p\) 和 \(\left( {1 - q}\right) /q\) 的简单公式。尽量使该公式的分母和分子均为正数。
\end{tcolorbox}

(e) Show that the mixed equilibrium strategies do not change if player I's payoffs \(A\) and \(C\) are replaced by \(A + E\) and \(C + E\) , respectively, for some constant \(E\) , and similarly if player II’s payoffs \(a\) and \(b\) are replaced by \(a + e\) and \(b + e\) , respectively, for some constant \(e\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(e) 证明:若玩家I的收益 \(A\) 和 \(C\) 分别被替换为 \(A + E\) 和 \(C + E\) (其中 \(E\) 为某个常数)，且若玩家II的收益 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 分别被替换为 \(a + e\) 和 \(b + e\) (其中 \(e\) 为某个常数)，则混合均衡(mixed equilibrium)策略不会改变。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{Brouwer's Fixed-Point Theorem}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{布劳威尔不动点定理}
\end{tcolorbox}

As we showed in Section 6.5, Nash (1951) proved the existence of a mixed equilibrium in a finite game with the help of Brouwer's fixed-point Theorem 6.4. Fixed-point theorems are powerful tools for proving the existence of many equilibrium concepts in economics. Brouwer's theorem is the first and most important of these.

\begin{tcolorbox}
正如我们在6.5节中所展示的，纳什(1951年)借助布劳威尔不动点定理6.4证明了有限博弈中混合均衡的存在性。不动点定理是证明经济学中许多均衡概念存在性的有力工具。布劳威尔定理是其中第一个也是最重要的一个。
\end{tcolorbox}

This chapter is about proving Brouwer's fixed-point theorem. We present a standard elementary proof (the most complex proof in this book), without the machinery of algebraic topology, along the following route:

\begin{tcolorbox}
本章将证明布劳威尔不动点定理。我们将沿着以下思路给出一个标准的初等证明(本书中最复杂的证明)，不使用代数拓扑的工具:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item The compact convex domain of the considered continuous function is first assumed to be the unit simplex \(\Delta\) . In a simplex, every point is the unique convex combination of the vertices of the simplex, which for \(\Delta\) are the unit vectors.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 首先假设所考虑的连续函数的紧致凸域是单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 。在单纯形中，每个点都是该单纯形顶点的唯一凸组合，对于 \(\Delta\) 来说，其顶点就是单位向量。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item A finite number of "grid points" of \(\Delta\) is considered, which are the vertices in a so-called simplicial subdivision or triangulation of \(\Delta\) . Although such triangulations have a clear intuition in low dimensions, we carefully prove all required properties about them.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 考虑 \(\Delta\) 的有限个“网格点”，它们是 \(\Delta\) 的所谓单纯剖分或三角剖分中的顶点。尽管这种三角剖分在低维度下有清晰的直观理解，但我们会仔细证明关于它们的所有必要性质。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item Suitable labels identify "completely labeled sub-simplices" of the triangulation as approximate fixed points. Sperner's lemma (Theorem 7.10) states that a completely labeled sub-simplex exists.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 合适的标签将三角剖分中的“完全标记子单纯形”识别为近似不动点。斯佩纳引理(定理7.10)表明存在完全标记子单纯形。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item The KKM lemma (Theorem 7.12) of Knaster, Kuratowski, and Mazurkiewicz (1929) is proved via a limit process from Sperner's lemma and implies the existence of a fixed point of a continuous function on \(\Delta\) .
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 克纳斯特、库拉托夫斯基和马祖尔克维奇(1929年)的KKM引理(定理7.12)通过对斯佩纳引理进行极限过程得到证明，并由此推出 \(\Delta\) 上连续函数不动点的存在性。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item The nontrivial part of this limit process is to find finer and finer triangulations, for which we present (at the end of the chapter) the "Freudenthal" triangulation.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 这个极限过程的非平凡部分是找到越来越精细的三角剖分，为此我们在本章末尾介绍“弗罗伊登塔尔”三角剖分。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item A general compact convex set \(C\) is "embedded" into the unit simplex in order to prove the fixed-point theorem for a continuous function on \(C\) .
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 为了证明 \(C\) 上连续函数的不动点定理，将一般的紧致凸集 \(C\) “嵌入”到单位单纯形中。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

The main step is Sperner's lemma. In an ingenious induction proof, Sperner (1928) counted the completely labeled sub-simplices in order to show that their number is odd, and therefore not zero. At its core, Sperner's argument is due to a Background material: Undirected graphs

\begin{tcolorbox}
主要步骤是斯佩纳引理。斯佩纳(1928年)在一个巧妙的归纳证明中，对完全标记子单纯形进行计数，以表明它们的数量是奇数，因此不为零。斯佩纳论证的核心基于一个背景材料:无向图
\end{tcolorbox}

A graph \(G\) is given by a finite set of nodes and a set of edges. Every edge is an unordered pair \(\{ u,v\}\) of nodes \(u\) and \(v\) , which are called the endpoints of the edge, where \(u \neq  v\) . The degree of a node \(u\) is the number of its neighbors in \(G\) , that is, the number of nodes \(v\) so that \(\{ u,v\}\) is an edge. A path in \(G\) of length \(m \geq  0\) is a sequence of nodes \({u}_{0},{u}_{1},\ldots ,{u}_{m}\) so that \(\left\{  {{u}_{k},{u}_{k + 1}}\right\}\) is an edge for \(0 \leq  k < m\) . The end nodes of the path are \({u}_{0}\) and \({u}_{m}\) . If \({u}_{0} = {u}_{m}\) then the path is called a cycle. simple observation from graph theory (see the background material on graphs), namely that the number of odd-degree nodes in a graph is even. This parity argument holds because the sum of the degrees of all nodes is twice the number of edges (and hence an even number), because each edge contributes to the degree of both its endpoints.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 \(G\) 由有限个节点集和边集给出。每条边是节点 \(u\) 和 \(v\) 的无序对 \(\{ u,v\}\) ， \(u\) 和 \(v\) 称为该边的端点，其中 \(u \neq  v\) 。节点 \(u\) 的度是它在 \(G\) 中的邻居数量，即满足 \(\{ u,v\}\) 是边的节点 \(v\) 的数量。 \(G\) 中长度为 \(m \geq  0\) 的路径是节点序列 \({u}_{0},{u}_{1},\ldots ,{u}_{m}\) ，使得对于 \(0 \leq  k < m\) ， \(\left\{  {{u}_{k},{u}_{k + 1}}\right\}\) 是边。路径的端点是 \({u}_{0}\) 和 \({u}_{m}\) 。如果 \({u}_{0} = {u}_{m}\) ，则该路径称为一个环。这是图论中的一个简单观察(见关于图的背景材料)，即图中奇数度节点的数量是偶数。这个奇偶性论证成立是因为所有节点度的总和是边数量的两倍(因此是偶数)，因为每条边对其两个端点的度都有贡献。
\end{tcolorbox}

In addition to the parity-counting by Sperner (1928), we give a clean constructive proof of Sperner's lemma. This alternative step in the proof combines the graphs across different dimensions in such a way that there is a single path from a vertex of the simplex to a completely labeled sub-simplex (see Figure 7.10). The dimension of the sub-simplices that define the path may go up and down multiple times along the path.

\begin{tcolorbox}
除了斯佩纳(1928年)的奇偶性计数方法外，我们还给出了斯佩纳引理的一个简洁构造性证明。证明中的这个替代步骤以一种特殊方式将不同维度的图组合起来，使得从单纯形的一个顶点到一个完全标记子单纯形存在一条单一路径(见图7.10)。定义该路径的子单纯形的维度可能会沿着路径多次上升和下降。
\end{tcolorbox}

Section 7.2 introduces the concept of a label of a point in the unit simplex, and illustrates its use for the fixed-point theorem when the simplex is an interval. Simplices and triangulations are introduced in Section 7.3. Section 7.4 proves Sperner's lemma. The KKM lemma is presented in Section 7.5.

\begin{tcolorbox}
7.2节介绍单位单纯形中一个点的标签概念，并说明当单纯形是一个区间时它在不动点定理中的应用。7.3节介绍单纯形和三角剖分。7.4节证明斯佩纳引理。7.5节介绍KKM引理。
\end{tcolorbox}

In Section 7.6, we prove Brouwer's fixed-point theorem on a general compact convex set \(C\) by first "embedding" \(C\) with an injection into the unit simplex \(\Delta\) so that we can replace \(C\) by its image \(D\) , which is now a subset of \(\Delta\) . Secondly, we extend the given continuous function \(f\) on \(D\) to a function on \(\Delta\) whose fixed points are exactly the fixed points of \(f\) . For points \(x\) in \(\Delta\) but not in \(D\) , the new function simply chooses the point \(p\left( x\right)\) in \(D\) that is closest to \(x\) . We carefully prove that this "projection" function \(p\) is continuous, in fact "contractive" (see Theorem 7.18), and emphasize the underlying geometric intuition. Even though these considerations are simple, they produce, in passing, important results from convex analysis such as the theorem of the "separating hyperplane" (Corollary 7.16 and Figure 7.13).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在7.6节中，我们通过首先用一个单射将一般紧凸集 \(C\) “嵌入”到单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 中，来证明布劳威尔不动点定理，这样我们就可以用 \(C\) 的像 \(D\) 来代替 \(C\) ，而 \(D\) 现在是 \(\Delta\) 的一个子集。其次，我们将给定的在 \(D\) 上的连续函数 \(f\) 扩展为在 \(\Delta\) 上的一个函数，其不动点恰好就是 \(f\) 的不动点。对于 \(\Delta\) 中但不在 \(D\) 中的点 \(x\) ，新函数简单地选择 \(D\) 中离 \(x\) 最近的点 \(p\left( x\right)\) 。我们仔细证明了这个“投影”函数 \(p\) 是连续的，实际上是“压缩的”(见定理7.18)，并强调了其背后的几何直觉。尽管这些考虑很简单，但它们顺带产生了凸分析中的重要结果，比如“分离超平面”定理(推论7.16和图7.13)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Section 7.7 treats in detail the nontrivial problem of finding finer and finer triangulations of a simplex in arbitrary dimension, which has been postponed in the proof. We present the elegant triangulation due to Freudenthal (1942), which has two components: the subdivision of the unit cube into small "cubelets", which works well in any dimension \(d\) , and the subdivision of the cube and each cubelet into \(d\) ! simplices obtained from the possible "monotone paths" on the cube.

\begin{tcolorbox}
7.7节详细处理了在任意维度下寻找单纯形越来越精细的三角剖分这一非平凡问题，该问题在证明中被推迟了。我们介绍了弗赖登塔尔(1942年)提出的优雅的三角剖分方法，它有两个部分:将单位立方体细分为小的“子立方体”，这在任何维度 \(d\) 下都适用；以及将立方体和每个子立方体细分为 \(d\) ! 个单纯形，这些单纯形是从立方体上可能的“单调路径”得到的。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.1 Prerequisites and Learning Outcomes}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.1 先决条件和学习成果}
\end{tcolorbox}

This chapter continues from Section 6.5, where we demonstrated Brouwer's fixed-point theorem on an interval and the necessity of its assumptions. The main geometric tool is convexity, with line segments defined in Figure 5.4 and convex combinations defined in Section 6.5. We assume basics of linear algebra when explaining affine combinations, for example in Lemma 7.2.

\begin{tcolorbox}
本章从6.5节继续展开，在6.5节中我们证明了布劳威尔不动点定理在区间上的情况以及其假设的必要性。主要的几何工具是凸性，其中线段在图5.4中定义，凸组合在6.5节中定义。在解释仿射组合时，例如在引理7.2中，我们会假设一些线性代数的基础知识。
\end{tcolorbox}

We also assume familiarity with continuity of functions in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , with the notions of closed and compact sets, and that a continuous real-valued function on a compact domain assumes its minimum and maximum. We will recall as background material the Euclidean norm and distance, and the Bolzano-Weierstrass theorem on the existence of converging subsequences.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们还假设熟悉 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中函数的连续性、闭集和紧集的概念，以及在紧域上的连续实值函数能取到其最小值和最大值。我们将回顾欧几里得范数与距离以及关于收敛子列存在性的波尔查诺 - 魏尔施特拉斯定理作为背景材料。
\end{tcolorbox}

After studying this chapter, you should be able to:

\begin{tcolorbox}
学习完本章后，你应该能够:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item understand affine and convex combinations, simplices, and triangulations;
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 理解仿射组合和凸组合、单纯形和三角剖分；
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item define the dimension of a convex set, and the faces of a simplex;
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 定义凸集的维度和单纯形的面；
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item state the main theorems of this chapter: Sperner's lemma, the KKM lemma, Brouwer's fixed-point theorem both on the unit simplex and on a general compact convex set, and explain the difference between these domains;
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 陈述本章的主要定理:斯佩纳引理、KKM引理、单位单纯形和一般紧凸集上的布劳威尔不动点定理，并解释这些定义域之间的区别；
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item understand the significance of graphs with maximum node degree two in the proof of Sperner's lemma, and their connection to Lemma 7.6;
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 理解在斯佩纳引理的证明中最大节点度为2的图的重要性，以及它们与引理7.6的联系；
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item explain the role of the projection onto a closed convex set and why it is contractive and therefore continuous (Theorem 7.18);
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 解释投影到闭凸集上的作用，以及为什么它是压缩的，因此是连续的(定理7.18)；
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item explain the Freudenthal triangulation.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 解释弗赖登塔尔三角剖分。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.2 Labels}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.2 标签}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this chapter we give a proof of Brouwer's fixed-point Theorem 6.4 for a continuous function \(f\) on a compact and convex set \(C\) . The main effort will be to prove the theorem when \(C\) is the unit simplex \(\Delta\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) defined by

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本章中，我们将证明对于紧凸集 \(C\) 上的连续函数 \(f\) 的布劳威尔不动点定理(定理6.4)。主要的工作将是证明当 \(C\) 是由下式定义的 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 时的定理。
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\Delta  = \left\{  {x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  x \geq  \mathbf{0},{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x = 1}\right\}  . \tag{7.1}
\]

The mixed strategy sets \(X\) and \(Y\) in (6.6) are unit simplices, as shown in Figure 6.5. (However, \(X \times  Y\) is not a unit simplex.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
(6.6)中的混合策略集 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 是单位单纯形，如图6.5所示。(然而， \(X \times  Y\) 不是单位单纯形。)
\end{tcolorbox}

Recall that the \(i\) th unit vector \({e}_{i}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) has its \(i\) th component equal to one and all other components equal to zero. The unit vectors are the vertices (extreme points or "corners") of the unit simplex \(\Delta\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
回想一下， \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的第 \(i\) 个单位向量 \({e}_{i}\) 的第 \(i\) 个分量等于1，其他所有分量都等于0。单位向量是单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 的顶点(极点或“角点”)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Let \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) and \(x \in  \Delta\) , and write \(f\left( x\right)  = {\left( {f}_{1}\left( x\right) ,\ldots ,{f}_{d}\left( x\right) \right) }^{\top }\) . For a point in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , a label is an element of \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) , and depending on \(f\) we assign a set of labels

\begin{tcolorbox}
设 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 和 \(x \in  \Delta\) ，并记 \(f\left( x\right)  = {\left( {f}_{1}\left( x\right) ,\ldots ,{f}_{d}\left( x\right) \right) }^{\top }\) 。对于 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的一个点，一个标签是 \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 中的一个元素，并且根据 \(f\) 我们为每个点分配一组标签
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.6\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_183_331_209_851_619_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.1 Illustration of (7.2). The dashed lines show points \(\;\left( {{z}_{1},{z}_{2},{z}_{3}}\right)\) where \({z}_{i} = {x}_{i}\) . Here \(x\) has labels 1 and 2 because \({x}_{1} \geq  {f}_{1}\left( x\right)\) and \({x}_{2} \geq  {f}_{2}\left( x\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.1 对 (7.2) 的说明。虚线表示 \(\;\left( {{z}_{1},{z}_{2},{z}_{3}}\right)\) 点，其中 \({z}_{i} = {x}_{i}\) 。这里 \(x\) 有标签 1 和 2，因为 \({x}_{1} \geq  {f}_{1}\left( x\right)\) 且 \({x}_{2} \geq  {f}_{2}\left( x\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

to each \(x \in  \Delta\) , according to

\begin{tcolorbox}
根据以下规则为每个 \(x \in  \Delta\) 分配
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
x\text{ has label }i \Leftrightarrow  {x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right) \;\left( {1 \leq  i \leq  d}\right) \text{ . } \tag{7.2}
\]

Any label \(i\) of \(x = \left( {{x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{d}}\right)\) identifies a component \({x}_{i}\) of \(x\) that in \(f\left( x\right)\) is not increased (increased means being moved closer to the vertex \({e}_{i}\) of \(\Delta\) ); see Figure 7.1.

\begin{tcolorbox}
\(x = \left( {{x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{d}}\right)\) 的任何标签 \(i\) 都标识了 \(x\) 的一个分量 \({x}_{i}\) ，在 \(f\left( x\right)\) 中该分量不会增加(增加意味着向 \(\Delta\) 的顶点 \({e}_{i}\) 移动)；见图 7.1。
\end{tcolorbox}

A point \(x \in  \Delta\) is completely labeled if \(x\) has every label \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) . This condition characterizes the fixed points of \(f\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \(x\) 拥有每个标签 \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) ，则点 \(x \in  \Delta\) 是完全标记的。这个条件刻画了 \(f\) 的不动点。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.1. Let \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) and \(x \in  \Delta\) . Then \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) if and only if \(x\) is completely labeled.

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 7.1。设 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 和 \(x \in  \Delta\) 。那么 \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) 当且仅当 \(x\) 是完全标记的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. If \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) then \({f}_{i}\left( x\right)  = {x}_{i}\) for all \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) and \(x\) is therefore completely labeled. Conversely, suppose \(x\) is completely labeled, \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) for all \(i\) . If \({x}_{i} > {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) for some \(i\) then \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{x}_{k} > \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{f}_{k}\left( x\right)  = 1\) , which contradicts \(x \in  \Delta\) . Hence, \({x}_{i} = {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) for all \(i\) , that is, \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) , as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。如果 \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) ，那么对于所有 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) 有 \({f}_{i}\left( x\right)  = {x}_{i}\) ，因此 \(x\) 是完全标记的。反之，假设 \(x\) 是完全标记的，对于所有 \(i\) 有 \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) 。如果对于某个 \(i\) 有 \({x}_{i} > {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) ，那么 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{x}_{k} > \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{f}_{k}\left( x\right)  = 1\) ，这与 \(x \in  \Delta\) 矛盾。因此，对于所有 \(i\) 有 \({x}_{i} = {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) ，即 \(f\left( x\right)  = x\) ，得证。
\end{tcolorbox}

Our strategy for proving Brouwer's fixed-point theorem is as follows:

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们证明布劳威尔不动点定理的策略如下:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item Discretize \(\Delta\) with finitely many points on some kind of "grid".
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 在某种“网格”上用有限个点对 \(\Delta\) 进行离散化。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item For simplicity, assign to each gridpoint a single label rather than a set of labels as in (7.2), so that in (7.2)," \(\Leftrightarrow\) " is replaced by " \(\Rightarrow\) ".
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 为简单起见，为每个网格点分配一个单一的标签，而不是像 (7.2) 中那样分配一组标签，这样在 (7.2) 中，“ \(\Leftrightarrow\) ”被替换为“ \(\Rightarrow\) ”。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item Show the existence of a set of "neighboring gridpoints" that together have all labels, which will locate an "approximate fixed point".
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 证明存在一组“相邻网格点”，它们共同拥有所有标签，这将定位一个“近似不动点”。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item By choosing a finer and finer grid, a suitable limit of such approximate fixed points defines a fixed point of the considered function.
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 通过选择越来越精细的网格，这种近似不动点的合适极限定义了所考虑函数的一个不动点。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

We explain this strategy for the example in Figure 6.6 where \(f\) is defined on \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) . The interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) corresponds to \(\Delta\) in (7.1) for \(d = 2\) , which is the line segment that connects the two points(1,0)and(0,1)in \({\mathbb{R}}^{2}\) , because the elements \(\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) of \(\Delta\) are uniquely given by \(\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) for \({x}_{2} \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) . Similarly, we can identify a function \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) with its second component \({f}_{2}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) because \({f}_{1}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)  = 1 - {f}_{2}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) . Then \(\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) has label 1 if \({x}_{1} \geq  {f}_{1}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) or equivalently \({x}_{2} \leq  {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) , and label 2 if \({x}_{2} \geq  {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) . Furthermore, we can assume

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们以图6.6中的例子来说明这一策略，其中 \(f\) 定义在 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 上。区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 对应于(7.1)中 \(d = 2\) 时的 \(\Delta\) ，它是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{2}\) 中连接两点 (1,0) 和 (0,1) 的线段，因为 \(\Delta\) 中的元素 \(\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 由 \(\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 唯一给出，其中 \({x}_{2} \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 。类似地，我们可以将函数 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 与其第二个分量 \({f}_{2}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 等同起来，因为 \({f}_{1}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)  = 1 - {f}_{2}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 。那么，如果 \({x}_{1} \geq  {f}_{1}\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 或者等价地 \({x}_{2} \leq  {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) ，则 \(\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 的标签为1；如果 \({x}_{2} \geq  {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) ，则标签为2。此外，我们可以假设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( {1,0}\right) \text{ has label }1,\;\left( {0,1}\right) \text{ has label 2 . } \tag{7.3}
\]

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_184_241_202_1190_447_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.2 Two examples of a labeled subdivision of \(\Delta\) for \(d = 2\) . A completely labeled sub-segment contains a fixed point of \(f\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.2 \(d = 2\) 时 \(\Delta\) 的标记剖分的两个例子。一个完全标记的子线段包含 \(f\) 的一个不动点。
\end{tcolorbox}

The left diagram in Figure 7.2 shows the example from Figure 6.6 with the line segment \(\Delta\) shown as the interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) that contains \({x}_{2}\) . A number of "gridpoints" in \(\Delta\) are shown as white dots. Each is given a label according to the sign of \({x}_{2} - {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) . These points subdivide \(\Delta\) into sub-segments, each of which has a labeled endpoint. A sub-segment that has two endpoints with both labels 1 and 2 is called \({completelylabeled}\) . Such a sub-segment contains a fixed point \(z\) of \(f\) because the sign of \({x}_{2} - {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) changes when \({x}_{2}\) is in that sub-interval. In Figure 7.2, condition (7.3) holds automatically because(1,0)has only label 1 and (0,1)has only label 2. In general,(7.3) implies that there is at least one completely labeled sub-segment because when changing \({x}_{2}\) from 0 to 1, the label of a gridpoint \(\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) changes at some point from 1 to 2 .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.2的左图展示了图6.6中的例子，线段 \(\Delta\) 表示为包含 \({x}_{2}\) 的区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 。 \(\Delta\) 中的一些“格点”用白点表示。每个格点根据 \({x}_{2} - {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 的符号被赋予一个标签。这些点将 \(\Delta\) 细分为子线段，每个子线段都有一个标记的端点。一个子线段的两个端点分别带有标签1和2，则称其为 \({completelylabeled}\) 。这样的子线段包含 \(f\) 的一个不动点 \(z\) ，因为当 \({x}_{2}\) 处于该子区间时， \({x}_{2} - {f}_{2}\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 的符号会发生变化。在图7.2中，条件(7.3)自动成立，因为 (1,0) 只有标签1，而 (0,1) 只有标签2。一般来说，(7.3)意味着至少存在一个完全标记的子线段，因为当 \({x}_{2}\) 从0变化到1时，某个格点 \(\left( {1 - {x}_{2},{x}_{2}}\right)\) 的标签会在某一点从1变为2。
\end{tcolorbox}

In the right diagram in Figure 7.2, the function \(f\) has three fixed points, which are again identified by the completely labeled sub-segments. In both diagrams, the fixed points would be located more accurately with a "finer" grid.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在图7.2的右图中，函数 \(f\) 有三个不动点，同样由完全标记的子线段确定。在两个图中，使用“更精细”的网格可以更精确地定位不动点。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.3 Simplices and Triangulations}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.3 单纯形与三角剖分}
\end{tcolorbox}

In Figure 7.2, the unit simplex \(\Delta\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) is a line segment which is subdivided into smaller sub-segments. The generalization of this, for general \(d\) , is a subdivision of \(\Delta\) into smaller sub-simplices, called a simplicial subdivision or triangulation, which will take the role of the indicated "grid".

\begin{tcolorbox}
在图7.2中， \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 是一个线段，它被细分为更小的子线段。对于一般的 \(d\) ，这种情况的推广是将 \(\Delta\) 细分为更小的子单纯形，称为单纯剖分或三角剖分，它将起到所指示的“网格”的作用。
\end{tcolorbox}

The basic operation from geometry that we need is drawing a line through two points \(x\) and \(y\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , as shown in Figure 5.4, and iterating that process (where a third point not on that line together with any point on the line creates a plane, and so on). The points on the line through \(x\) and \(y\) are the special linear combinations \(x\left( {1 - \lambda }\right)  + {y\lambda }\) for \(\lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\) called affine combinations. In general, an affine combination of points \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) is of the form \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{v}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) where \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) are reals with \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{\lambda }_{i} = 1\) . It is called a convex combination if \({\lambda }_{i} \geq  0\) for \(1 \leq  i \leq  n\) . A set of points is convex if it is closed under forming convex combinations. The convex hull conv \(V\) of a set of points \(V\) is the (with respect to set inclusion) smallest convex set \(C\) so that \(V \subseteq  C\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们需要的几何学基本操作是，在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中过两点 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 画一条直线，如图5.4所示，并重复这个过程(不在该直线上的第三点与直线上的任意一点可确定一个平面，依此类推)。过 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 的直线上的点是形如 \(x\left( {1 - \lambda }\right)  + {y\lambda }\) (其中 \(\lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\) )的特殊线性组合，称为仿射组合(affine combination)。一般地， \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中各点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 的仿射组合形式为 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{v}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) ，其中 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) 为实数且满足 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{\lambda }_{i} = 1\) 。若对于 \(1 \leq  i \leq  n\) 有 \({\lambda }_{i} \geq  0\) ，则称其为凸组合(convex combination)。如果一个点集在形成凸组合时是封闭的，那么该点集就是凸集(convex set)。点集 \(V\) 的凸包(convex hull)conv \(V\) 是(关于集合包含关系)包含 \(V\) 的最小凸集 \(C\) ，即 \(V \subseteq  C\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Given points are affinely independent if none of these points is an affine combination of the others. This has an easy equivalent characterization in terms of linear independence in one higher dimension.

\begin{tcolorbox}
若给定的点集中没有一个点是其他点的仿射组合，则这些点是仿射无关的。这可以通过高一维的线性无关性给出一个简单的等价刻画。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.2. The vectors \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) are affinely independent if and only if the

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.2. \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的向量 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 仿射无关当且仅当
\end{tcolorbox}

vectors

\begin{tcolorbox}
向量
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{array}\right) ,\ldots ,\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{n} \end{matrix}\right)  \tag{7.4}
\]

in \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + d}\) are linearly independent.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + d}\) 中线性无关。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Suppose \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) are not affinely independent. That is, some vector, say \({v}^{1}\) , is an affine combination of the others, with reals \({\lambda }_{2},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) so that

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明. 假设 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 不是仿射无关的。也就是说，某个向量，比如 \({v}^{1}\) ，是其他向量的仿射组合，存在实数 \({\lambda }_{2},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) 使得
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
1 = {\lambda }_{2} + \cdots  + {\lambda }_{n}
\]

\[
{v}^{1} = {v}^{2}{\lambda }_{2} + \cdots  + {v}^{n}{\lambda }_{n}.
\]

This is equivalent to

\begin{tcolorbox}
这等价于
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{matrix}\right) \left( {-1}\right)  + \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{2} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{2} + \cdots  + \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{n} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{n} = \left( \begin{array}{l} 0 \\  \mathbf{0} \end{array}\right)  \tag{7.5}
\]

which shows that the vectors in (7.4) are not linearly independent. Conversely, if they are not linearly independent, with

\begin{tcolorbox}
这表明(7.4)中的向量不是线性无关的。反之，如果它们不是线性无关的，即
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{1} + \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{2} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{2} + \cdots  + \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{n} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{n} = \left( \begin{array}{l} 0 \\  \mathbf{0} \end{array}\right)  \tag{7.6}
\]

where \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) are not all zero, say \({\lambda }_{1} \neq  0\) , then multiplication of (7.6) with \(- 1/{\lambda }_{1}\) gives (7.5) and therefore the affine dependence of \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) . (The additional first row with entries 1 in (7.4) is needed for linear independence, for example if some \({v}^{i}\) is the zero vector, which has no special role in affine combinations.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{n}\) 不全为零，不妨设 \({\lambda }_{1} \neq  0\) ，那么用 \(- 1/{\lambda }_{1}\) 乘以(7.6)式就得到(7.5)式，从而说明 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 是仿射相关的。((7.4)中额外的第一行元素都为1是为了保证线性无关性，例如当某个 \({v}^{i}\) 是零向量时，零向量在仿射组合中没有特殊作用。)
\end{tcolorbox}

A convex set has dimension \(n\) if and only if it has \(n + 1\) , but no more, affinely independent points. A polytope is the convex hull of a finite set of points in some Euclidean space \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . If these points are affinely independent, then the polytope is called a simplex.

\begin{tcolorbox}
一个凸集的维度(dimension)为 \(n\) 当且仅当它有 \(n + 1\) 个但不会更多的仿射无关点。有界多面体(polytope)是某个欧几里得空间 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中有限点集的凸包。如果这些点是仿射无关的，那么这个有界多面体就称为单纯形(simplex)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1) is the convex hull of the unit vectors \({e}_{1},\ldots ,{e}_{d}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . They are affinely independent, so the unit simplex has dimension \(d - 1\) , and for that reason is sometimes denoted by \({\Delta }_{d - 1}\) . For example (see Figure 7.1), \({\Delta }_{2}\) is the convex hull of the three unit vectors in \({\mathbb{R}}^{3}\) and a triangle, which has dimension two (even though it is a subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{3}\) , because all \({\left( {x}_{1},{x}_{2},{x}_{3}\right) }^{\top }\) in \({\Delta }_{2}\) fulfill the equation \(\left. {{x}_{1} + {x}_{2} + {x}_{3} = 1}\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
式(7.1)中的单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中单位向量 \({e}_{1},\ldots ,{e}_{d}\) 的凸包。它们仿射无关，因此单位单纯形的维度为 \(d - 1\) ，出于这个原因，它有时用 \({\Delta }_{d - 1}\) 表示。例如(见图7.1)， \({\Delta }_{2}\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{3}\) 中三个单位向量的凸包，是一个三角形，其维度为2(尽管它是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{3}\) 的子集，因为 \({\Delta }_{2}\) 中的所有 \({\left( {x}_{1},{x}_{2},{x}_{3}\right) }^{\top }\) 都满足方程 \(\left. {{x}_{1} + {x}_{2} + {x}_{3} = 1}\right)\) )。
\end{tcolorbox}

In agreement with the definition of dimension, the empty set has dimension -1. A set of dimension zero is any singleton. A simplex of dimension one is the convex hull of two distinct points and therefore a line segment. A simplex of dimension two is a triangle. A simplex of dimension three is a tetrahedron. Every simplex of a given dimension (in any Euclidean space of possibly much larger dimension) is in an affine (and hence continuous) bijection with the unit simplex of the same dimension, as follows.

\begin{tcolorbox}
根据维度的定义，空集的维度为 -1。维度为零的集合是任何单元素集。一维单纯形是两个不同点的凸包，因此是一条线段。二维单纯形是一个三角形。三维单纯形是一个四面体。给定维度的每个单纯形(在任何可能维度大得多的欧几里得空间中)都与相同维度的单位单纯形存在仿射(因此是连续的)双射，如下所示。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.3. Let \(S\) be a simplex of dimension \(d - 1\) given as the convex hull of the affinely independent points \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) in some \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) . Then there is a linear map \({\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) that restricted to \(\Delta\) in (7.1) is a bijection \(\Delta  \rightarrow  S\) . Its inverse \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) is the restriction of an affine map \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.3。设 \(S\) 是一个维度为 \(d - 1\) 的单纯形，它是某个 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) 中仿射无关点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的凸包。那么存在一个线性映射 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) ，其在式(7.1)中的 \(\Delta\) 上的限制是一个双射 \(\Delta  \rightarrow  S\) 。其逆 \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) 是一个仿射映射 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的限制。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. If \(x \in  S\) , then there are nonnegative reals \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) such that

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。如果 \(x \in  S\) ，那么存在非负实数 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) 使得
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  x \end{array}\right)  = \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{1} + \cdots  + \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{d} \end{matrix}\right) {\lambda }_{d} \tag{7.7}
\]

By affine independence and Lemma 7.2, the vector \(\lambda  = {\left( {\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\right) }^{\top }\) of coefficients in (7.7) is unique, and different coefficient vectors define different points \(x \in  S\) . These coefficient vectors \(\lambda\) belong to the unit simplex \(\Delta\) , which is therefore in a bijection \(\Delta  \rightarrow  S\) via the linear map \(\lambda  \mapsto  x\) in (7.7).

\begin{tcolorbox}
由仿射无关性和引理7.2可知，式(7.7)中的系数向量 \(\lambda  = {\left( {\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\right) }^{\top }\) 是唯一的，不同的系数向量定义不同的点 \(x \in  S\) 。这些系数向量 \(\lambda\) 属于单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) ，因此通过式(7.7)中的线性映射 \(\lambda  \mapsto  x\) 与 \(\Delta  \rightarrow  S\) 存在双射。
\end{tcolorbox}

The inverse of this bijection is seen to be the restriction of an affine map \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) as follows. We first construct a linear map \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , which is uniquely defined by its (arbitrary) images on a basis of \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + k}\) . For this purpose, extend \(\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{matrix}\right) ,\ldots ,\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{d} \end{matrix}\right)\) to such a basis, map \(\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{i} \end{matrix}\right)\) to the unit vector \({e}_{i}\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) for \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) , and each remaining basis vector to0. Because this is a linear map, it can be written as \(\left( \begin{array}{l} \alpha \\  x \end{array}\right)  \mapsto  \lambda  = A\left( \begin{array}{l} \alpha \\  x \end{array}\right)\) for \(\alpha  \in  \mathbb{R}\) and \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) for some \(d \times  \left( {1 + k}\right)\) matrix \(A\) . By (7.7), \(\lambda  \in  \Delta\) if \(\alpha  = 1\) and \(x \in  S\) . For \(\alpha  = 1\) we obtain an affine map \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , \(x \mapsto  \lambda  = A\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  x \end{array}\right)\) . The restriction of this map to \(S\) is the desired affine bijection \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) . (If \(x \notin  S\) then \(A\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  x \end{array}\right)\) depends on the choice of the additional basis vectors, so \(A\) itself is not unique, but this is irrelevant here; the restriction \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) is unique.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
可以看出，这个双射的逆是如下仿射映射 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的限制。我们首先构造一个线性映射 \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) ，它由其在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + k}\) 的一组基上的(任意)像唯一确定。为此，将 \(\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{1} \end{matrix}\right) ,\ldots ,\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{d} \end{matrix}\right)\) 扩充为这样一组基，对于 \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) ，将 \(\left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{i} \end{matrix}\right)\) 映射到 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的单位向量 \({e}_{i}\) ，并将其余每个基向量映射到 0。因为这是一个线性映射，所以对于某个 \(d \times  \left( {1 + k}\right)\) 矩阵 \(A\) ，它可以写成 \(\left( \begin{array}{l} \alpha \\  x \end{array}\right)  \mapsto  \lambda  = A\left( \begin{array}{l} \alpha \\  x \end{array}\right)\) (其中 \(\alpha  \in  \mathbb{R}\) 且 \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) )。根据 (7.7)，若 \(\alpha  = 1\) 且 \(x \in  S\) ，则 \(\lambda  \in  \Delta\) 。对于 \(\alpha  = 1\) ，我们得到一个仿射映射 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k} \rightarrow  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) ，即 \(x \mapsto  \lambda  = A\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  x \end{array}\right)\) 。这个映射在 \(S\) 上的限制就是所需的仿射双射 \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) 。(若 \(x \notin  S\) ，则 \(A\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  x \end{array}\right)\) 依赖于额外基向量的选取，所以 \(A\) 本身不是唯一的，但这在这里无关紧要；限制映射 \(J : S \rightarrow  \Delta\) 是唯一的。)
\end{tcolorbox}

In (7.7), the unique coefficients \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) are called the barycentric coordinates of \(x\) in \(S\) (which depend on the chosen order of the points \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) that define the simplex \(S\) ). The reason for the name "barycentric" is that \(x\) is the center of weight (barycenter) of the weights \({\lambda }_{i}\) placed at the points \({v}^{i}\) for \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在 (7.7) 中，唯一的系数 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) 被称为 \(x\) 在 \(S\) 中的重心坐标(它依赖于定义单纯形 \(S\) 的点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的选取顺序)。“重心”这个名称的由来是，对于 \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) ， \(x\) 是放置在点 \({v}^{i}\) 处权重为 \({\lambda }_{i}\) 的加权重心(重心)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Consider a simplex \(S\) of dimension \(d - 1\) given as the convex hull of the \(d\) affinely independent points \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) . Then any subset of these points (including the empty set) is also affinely independent, and its convex hull is also a simplex. Each such simplex is a called a face of \(S\) . Any singleton face \(\left\{  {v}^{i}\right\}\) , or \({v}^{i}\) itself, is called a vertex of \(S\) . A face of dimension 1 is called an edge. A face of dimension \(d - 2\) of \(S\) is called a facet of \(S\) . A vertex \(v\) of a general polytope \(P\) is an extreme point of \(P\) , that is, \(v \in  P\) and \(v\) is not a convex combination of other points of \(P\) . Exercise 7.2 shows that each vertex of a simplex is indeed such an extreme point.

\begin{tcolorbox}
考虑一个维度为 \(d - 1\) 的单纯形 \(S\) ，它是 \(d\) 个仿射无关点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的凸包。那么这些点的任何子集(包括空集)也是仿射无关的，并且其凸包也是一个单纯形。每个这样的单纯形都称为 \(S\) 的一个面。任何单元素面 \(\left\{  {v}^{i}\right\}\) 或 \({v}^{i}\) 本身都称为 \(S\) 的一个顶点。维度为 1 的面称为一条边。 \(S\) 中维度为 \(d - 2\) 的面称为 \(S\) 的一个极面。一般有界多面体 \(P\) 的一个顶点 \(v\) 是 \(P\) 的一个极点，即 \(v \in  P\) 且 \(v\) 不是 \(P\) 中其他点的凸组合。练习 7.2 表明，单纯形的每个顶点确实是这样一个极点。
\end{tcolorbox}

Definition 7.4. Let \(P\) be a polytope. A triangulation or simplicial subdivision of \(P\) is a finite set \(\sum  = \left\{  {{S}_{1},\ldots ,{S}_{N}}\right\}\) of simplices (called sub-simplices) \({S}_{i}\) for \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) so that (a) \(P = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{N}{S}_{i}\) ,(b) no sub-simplex is a subset of another, and (c) the intersection of any two sub-simplices is a face of both. A vertex in \(\sum\) is any vertex of any sub-simplex in \(\sum\) . A sub-facet in \(\sum\) is any facet of any sub-simplex in \(\sum\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定义7.4。设 \(P\) 为一个有界多面体(polytope)。 \(P\) 的一个三角剖分(triangulation)或单纯剖分(simplicial subdivision)是一个由单纯形(simplex，称为子单纯形，sub - simplex) \({S}_{i}\) 组成的有限集合 \(\sum  = \left\{  {{S}_{1},\ldots ,{S}_{N}}\right\}\) ，其中 \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) 满足:(a) \(P = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{N}{S}_{i}\) ；(b) 没有一个子单纯形是另一个子单纯形的子集；(c) 任意两个子单纯形的交集是这两个子单纯形的一个面(face)。 \(\sum\) 中的一个顶点(vertex)是 \(\sum\) 中任意一个子单纯形的任意一个顶点。 \(\sum\) 中的一个子极面(sub - facet)是 \(\sum\) 中任意一个子单纯形的任意一个极面(facet)。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_187_340_1381_1248_325_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.3 Left: \(\left\{  {{S}_{1},{S}_{2},{S}_{3}}\right\}\) is not a triangulation of the triangle because \({S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{3}\) is not a face of \({S}_{3}\) . Center and right: triangulations of the triangle.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.3 左图: \(\left\{  {{S}_{1},{S}_{2},{S}_{3}}\right\}\) 不是该三角形的一个三角剖分，因为 \({S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{3}\) 不是 \({S}_{3}\) 的一个面。中图和右图:该三角形的三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

In Definition 7.4(c), the intersection of two sub-simplices may be the empty set, which is a face of any polytope. Figure 7.3 illustrates the concept of simplicial subdivisions of a triangle. The left picture fulfills conditions (a) and (b) of Definition 7.4 but not (c), which does hold in the middle picture. The right picture shows that the sub-simplices in a triangulation may vary in shape and size.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在定义7.4(c)中，两个子单纯形的交集可能是空集，空集是任意有界多面体的一个面。图7.3展示了三角形的单纯剖分的概念。左图满足定义7.4的条件(a)和(b)，但不满足条件(c)，而中图满足条件(c)。右图表明，三角剖分中的子单纯形的形状和大小可以不同。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following lemmas state some, rather intuitive, properties of triangulations.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下引理陈述了三角剖分的一些相当直观的性质。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.5. Let \(S\) be a simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) and let \(\sum\) be a triangulation of \(S\) . Then all sub-simplices \({S}_{i}\) in \(\sum\) have the same dimension \(d - 1\) as \(S\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.5。设 \(S\) 是一个顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的单纯形， \(\sum\) 是 \(S\) 的一个三角剖分。那么 \(\sum\) 中的所有子单纯形 \({S}_{i}\) 与 \(S\) 具有相同的维度(dimension) \(d - 1\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. The vertices of any sub-simplex belong to \(S\) , which has dimension \(d - 1\) , so no sub-simplex can have higher dimension. Suppose one sub-simplex, call it \({S}_{1}\) , has lower dimension, with vertices \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) and \(k < d\) . Let \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{k}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{k}\) be the barycenter of \({S}_{1}\) . At least one vertex \({v}^{i}\) of \(S\) is not an affine combination of \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) . For \(\varepsilon  \in  \mathbb{R}\) , let

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。任意子单纯形的顶点都属于 \(S\) ， \(S\) 的维度为 \(d - 1\) ，所以没有子单纯形的维度可以更高。假设一个子单纯形，称它为 \({S}_{1}\) ，维度更低，其顶点为 \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) 和 \(k < d\) 。设 \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{k}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{k}\) 是 \({S}_{1}\) 的重心(barycenter)。 \(S\) 中至少有一个顶点 \({v}^{i}\) 不是 \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) 的仿射组合(affine combination)。对于 \(\varepsilon  \in  \mathbb{R}\) ，设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
z\left( \varepsilon \right)  = x\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right)  + {v}^{i}\varepsilon . \tag{7.8}
\]

Geometrically, the points \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)\) lie on the line through \(x\) and \({v}^{i}\) , see Figure 7.4.

\begin{tcolorbox}
从几何角度看，点 \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)\) 位于过 \(x\) 和 \({v}^{i}\) 的直线上，见图7.4。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.4\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_188_204_724_609_595_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.4 Illustration of (7.8) for \(d = 4,k = 3\) , and \(i = 2\) in (7.9).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.4 展示了(7.8)式对于 \(d = 4,k = 3\) 以及(7.9)式中 \(i = 2\) 的情况。
\end{tcolorbox}

Then for \(\varepsilon  \neq  0\) we have \({v}^{i} = z\left( \varepsilon \right) \frac{1}{\varepsilon } + x\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\varepsilon }}\right)\) , which shows that \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)\) is not an affine combination of \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) because otherwise \({v}^{i}\) would be. That is,

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么对于 \(\varepsilon  \neq  0\) ，我们有 \({v}^{i} = z\left( \varepsilon \right) \frac{1}{\varepsilon } + x\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\varepsilon }}\right)\) ，这表明 \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)\) 不是 \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) 的仿射组合，因为否则 \({v}^{i}\) 也会是。也就是说，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
z\left( \varepsilon \right)  \notin  {S}_{1}\;\left( {\varepsilon  \neq  0}\right) . \tag{7.9}
\]

Consider a decreasing sequence \({\varepsilon }_{1},{\varepsilon }_{2},\ldots\) in \((0,1\rbrack\) that tends to 0, for example \({\varepsilon }_{n} = \frac{1}{n}\) , where \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)  \in  S\) by (7.8) because \(S\) is convex. Because \(S\) is the union of the sub-simplices in \(\sum\) , there is for each \(n\) some sub-simplex that contains \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) . Because \(\sum\) is finite, one sub-simplex, call it \({S}_{2}\) , contains infinitely many of the points \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) (and in fact all points in between in that sequence because they are on a line segment and \({S}_{2}\) is convex). Because \({\varepsilon }_{n} \rightarrow  0\) as \(n \rightarrow  \infty\) , the points \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) converge to \(x\) , which implies \(x \in  {S}_{2}\) because \({S}_{2}\) is closed. Hence, \(x \in  {S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) . By condition (c) in Definition 7.4, the intersection \({S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) is a face of both \({S}_{1}\) and \({S}_{2}\) , which includes all vertices \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) of \({S}_{1}\) because they are used with positive weight \(\frac{1}{k}\) in the representation \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{k}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{k}\) . Hence, \({S}_{1} = {S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) , that is, \({S}_{1} \subseteq  {S}_{2}\) . Moreover, \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)  \in  {S}_{2} - {S}_{1}\) for some \(\varepsilon  > 0\) , which implies \({S}_{1} \neq  {S}_{2}\) . This contradicts Definition 7.4(b). Hence, all sub-simplices have the same dimension \(d - 1\) as \(S\) , as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
考虑在 \((0,1\rbrack\) 中的一个递减序列 \({\varepsilon }_{1},{\varepsilon }_{2},\ldots\) ，它趋于 0，例如 \({\varepsilon }_{n} = \frac{1}{n}\) ，根据 (7.8) 式，因为 \(S\) 是凸集，所以 \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)  \in  S\) 。由于 \(S\) 是 \(\sum\) 中子单纯形(sub - simplex)的并集，对于每个 \(n\) ，存在某个子单纯形包含 \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) 。因为 \(\sum\) 是有限的，所以有一个子单纯形，记为 \({S}_{2}\) ，包含序列中无限多个点 \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) (实际上，该序列中介于这些点之间的所有点也在其中，因为它们在一条线段(line segment)上，且 \({S}_{2}\) 是凸集)。由于当 \(n \rightarrow  \infty\) 时 \({\varepsilon }_{n} \rightarrow  0\) ，点 \(z\left( {\varepsilon }_{n}\right)\) 收敛于 \(x\) ，这意味着 \(x \in  {S}_{2}\) ，因为 \({S}_{2}\) 是闭集。因此， \(x \in  {S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) 。根据定义 7.4 中的条件 (c)，交集 \({S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) 是 \({S}_{1}\) 和 \({S}_{2}\) 的一个面(face)，它包含 \({S}_{1}\) 的所有顶点(vertex) \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{k}\) ，因为在表示式 \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{k}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{k}\) 中它们的权重 \(\frac{1}{k}\) 为正。因此， \({S}_{1} = {S}_{1} \cap  {S}_{2}\) ，即 \({S}_{1} \subseteq  {S}_{2}\) 。此外，对于某个 \(\varepsilon  > 0\) 有 \(z\left( \varepsilon \right)  \in  {S}_{2} - {S}_{1}\) ，这意味着 \({S}_{1} \neq  {S}_{2}\) 。这与定义 7.4(b) 矛盾。因此，如所声称的，所有子单纯形的维度(dimension) \(d - 1\) 都与 \(S\) 相同。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.6. Let \(S\) be a simplex, let \(\sum\) be a triangulation of \(S\) , and let \(F\) be a sub-facet in \(\sum\) . Then exactly one of the following two cases occurs:

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 7.6。设 \(S\) 为一个单纯形(simplex)， \(\sum\) 为 \(S\) 的一个三角剖分(triangulation)， \(F\) 为 \(\sum\) 中的一个子极面(sub - facet)。则以下两种情况恰好发生其一:
\end{tcolorbox}

(a) \(F\) is a subset of a facet of \(S\) , and \(F\) is the facet of exactly one sub-simplex in \(\sum\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) \(F\) 是 \(S\) 的一个极面(facet)的子集，且 \(F\) 是 \(\sum\) 中恰好一个子单纯形的极面。
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) \(F\) is not a subset of a facet of \(S\) , and \(F\) is the facet of exactly two sub-simplices in \(\sum\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) \(F\) 不是 \(S\) 的一个极面的子集，且 \(F\) 是 \(\sum\) 中恰好两个子单纯形的极面。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(S\) have dimension \(d - 1\) and vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) . By Lemma 7.5, every sub-simplex also has dimension \(d - 1\) . Let \(F\) be a facet of some sub-simplex \(T\) in \(\sum\) and let \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d - 1}\) be the vertices of \(F\) . Let \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{d - 1}\) be the barycenter of \(F\) , and let \({w}^{d}\) be the remaining vertex of \(T\) . Consider the line through \(x\) and \({w}^{d}\) given by the points

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(S\) 的维度为 \(d - 1\) ，顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 。根据引理 7.5，每个子单纯形的维度也为 \(d - 1\) 。设 \(F\) 是 \(\sum\) 中某个子单纯形 \(T\) 的一个极面， \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d - 1}\) 是 \(F\) 的顶点。设 \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{d - 1}\) 是 \(F\) 的重心(barycenter)， \({w}^{d}\) 是 \(T\) 剩下的那个顶点。考虑过 \(x\) 和 \({w}^{d}\) 的直线，该直线上的点为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
y\left( \varepsilon \right)  = x\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right)  + {w}^{d}\varepsilon
\]

for \(\varepsilon  \in  \mathbb{R}\) , which for \(\varepsilon  \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) belong to \(T\) . Suppose \(F\) is the facet of another sub-simplex \({T}^{\prime }\) , which has another \(d\) th vertex \({w}_{0}\) , different from \({w}_{d}\) . The \(d\) vertices \({w}^{0},{w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d - 1}\) of \({T}^{\prime }\) are affinely independent. Hence, there are unique \({\lambda }_{0},{\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d - 1}\) with \({w}^{d} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 0}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) , where \({\lambda }_{0} \neq  0\) because \({w}^{d} \notin  F\) . We claim that \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) , that is, \({w}_{0}\) and \({w}_{d}\) are on opposite sides of the facet \(F\) . Namely,

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(\varepsilon  \in  \mathbb{R}\) ，其中对于 \(\varepsilon  \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 属于 \(T\) 。假设 \(F\) 是另一个子单纯形 \({T}^{\prime }\) 的极面，该子单纯形有另一个第 \(d\) 个顶点 \({w}_{0}\) ，不同于 \({w}_{d}\) 。 \({T}^{\prime }\) 的 \(d\) 个顶点 \({w}^{0},{w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d - 1}\) 仿射无关。因此，存在唯一的 \({\lambda }_{0},{\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d - 1}\) 满足 \({w}^{d} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 0}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) ，其中 \({\lambda }_{0} \neq  0\) 是因为 \({w}^{d} \notin  F\) 。我们断言 \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) ，即 \({w}_{0}\) 和 \({w}_{d}\) 在极面 \(F\) 的两侧。即
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
y\left( \varepsilon \right)  = x\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right)  + \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 0}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\varepsilon
\]

\[
= {w}^{0}{\lambda }_{0}\varepsilon  + \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}\left( {\frac{1}{d - 1}\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right)  + {\lambda }_{i}\varepsilon }\right)
\]

\[
= {w}^{0}{\lambda }_{0}\varepsilon  + \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{{d - 1}}{w}^{i}\left( {\frac{1}{d - 1} + \left( {{\lambda }_{i} - \frac{1}{d - 1}}\right) \varepsilon }\right) . \tag{7.10}
\]

If \({\lambda }_{0} > 0\) , this would imply \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)  \in  \left( {T \cap  {T}^{\prime }}\right)  - F\) for sufficiently small positive \(\varepsilon\) , which is not possible because \(T\) and \({T}^{\prime }\) intersect in a common facet which can only be \(F\) . Hence, \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \({\lambda }_{0} > 0\) ，对于足够小的正 \(\varepsilon\) ，这将意味着 \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)  \in  \left( {T \cap  {T}^{\prime }}\right)  - F\) ，但这是不可能的，因为 \(T\) 和 \({T}^{\prime }\) 在一个公共极面相交，而这个公共极面只能是 \(F\) 。因此，如所断言的 \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

The two cases (a) and (b) are shown as follows. If \(F\) is a subset of a facet of \(S\) , then \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)  \notin  S\) for all \(\varepsilon  < 0\) : Otherwise, for \(\varepsilon  < 0\) so that \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) and \(y\left( {-\varepsilon }\right)\) are in \(S\) , we have \(x = y\left( \varepsilon \right) \frac{1}{2} + y\left( {-\varepsilon }\right) \frac{1}{2} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}{v}^{i}{\mu }_{i}\) where \({\mu }_{i} > 0\) for all \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) , that is, \(x\) is in the interior of \(S\) instead of on a facet of \(S\) . This implies that there is no second sub-simplex \({T}^{\prime }\) with facet \(F\) as considered above, because \({T}^{\prime }\) (and hence \(S\) ) would contain such \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) with \(\varepsilon  < 0\) and \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) by (7.10). So the sub-simplex \(T\) is unique as stated in (a).

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下展示了情况 (a) 和 (b)。如果 \(F\) 是 \(S\) 的一个极面的子集，那么对于所有 \(\varepsilon  < 0\) 有 \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)  \notin  S\) :否则，对于 \(\varepsilon  < 0\) 使得 \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) 和 \(y\left( {-\varepsilon }\right)\) 在 \(S\) 中，我们有 \(x = y\left( \varepsilon \right) \frac{1}{2} + y\left( {-\varepsilon }\right) \frac{1}{2} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}{v}^{i}{\mu }_{i}\) ，其中对于所有 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) 有 \({\mu }_{i} > 0\) ，即 \(x\) 在 \(S\) 的内部而不是在 \(S\) 的一个极面上。这意味着不存在如上述所考虑的以 \(F\) 为极面的第二个子单纯形 \({T}^{\prime }\) ，因为 \({T}^{\prime }\) (进而 \(S\) )会包含这样的 \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) ，其中有 \(\varepsilon  < 0\) 和 \({\lambda }_{0} < 0\) (根据 (7.10))。所以如 (a) 中所述，子单纯形 \(T\) 是唯一的。
\end{tcolorbox}

On the other hand, if \(F\) is not a subset of a facet of \(S\) , then \(x\) is in the interior of \(S\) , and there are \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) in \(S\) for \(\varepsilon  < 0\) and therefore there is a second sub-simplex \({T}^{\prime }\) with facet \(F\) . By the same reasoning as applied to \(T\) , there is no other sub-simplex with a vertex on the same side of \(F\) as the vertex \({w}^{0}\) of \({T}^{\prime }\) . This shows case (b), and obviously exactly one of the two cases (a) or (b) applies.

\begin{tcolorbox}
另一方面，如果 \(F\) 不是 \(S\) 的一个极面的子集，那么 \(x\) 在 \(S\) 的内部，并且对于 \(\varepsilon  < 0\) 存在 \(y\left( \varepsilon \right)\) 在 \(S\) 中，因此存在以 \(F\) 为极面的第二个子单纯形 \({T}^{\prime }\) 。通过对 \(T\) 应用的相同推理，不存在其他子单纯形，其顶点与 \({T}^{\prime }\) 的顶点 \({w}^{0}\) 在 \(F\) 的同一侧。这展示了情况 (b)，并且显然情况 (a) 或 (b) 中恰好有一种情况成立。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following lemma will be used in an inductive proof in the next section.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下引理将用于下一节的归纳证明。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.7. Let \(n \geq  2\) , let \(S\) be a simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) , let \(F\) be the facet of \(S\) with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n - 1}\) , let \(\sum\) be a triangulation of \(S\) , and let \({\sum }^{\prime }\) be the set of sub-facets in \(\sum\) that are subsets of \(F\) . Then \({\sum }^{\prime }\) is a triangulation of \(F\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.7。设 \(n \geq  2\) ，设 \(S\) 为一个顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 的单纯形，设 \(F\) 为 \(S\) 中顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n - 1}\) 的极面，设 \(\sum\) 为 \(S\) 的一个三角剖分，设 \({\sum }^{\prime }\) 为 \(\sum\) 中作为 \(F\) 子集的子极面的集合。那么 \({\sum }^{\prime }\) 是 \(F\) 的一个三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \({\sum }_{1} = \{ T \cap  F \mid  T \in  \sum \}\) . Then \(F = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{{T}^{\prime } \in  {\sum }_{1}}}{T}^{\prime }\) because every \(x\) in \(F\) (as an element of \(S\) ) belongs to some sub-simplex \(T\) in \(\sum\) . For every \(T \in  \sum\) , we claim that \(T \cap  F\) is a face of \(T\) . Namely, every vertex \(v\) of \(T\) is a unique convex combination \(v = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{v}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) of the vertices \({v}^{i}\) of \(S\) , where \(v \in  F\) if and only if \({\lambda }_{n} = 0\) . Then \(T \cap  F\) is the convex hull of these vertices \(v\) that belong to \(F\) . Therefore, \(T \cap  F\) is a face of \(T\) as claimed, and is a simplex of dimension at most \(n - 2\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \({\sum }_{1} = \{ T \cap  F \mid  T \in  \sum \}\) 。那么 \(F = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{{T}^{\prime } \in  {\sum }_{1}}}{T}^{\prime }\) ，因为 \(F\) 中的每个 \(x\) (作为 \(S\) 的一个元素)都属于 \(\sum\) 中的某个子单纯形 \(T\) 。对于每个 \(T \in  \sum\) ，我们断言 \(T \cap  F\) 是 \(T\) 的一个面。即， \(T\) 的每个顶点 \(v\) 都是 \(S\) 的顶点 \({v}^{i}\) 的唯一凸组合 \(v = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{v}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) ，其中当且仅当 \({\lambda }_{n} = 0\) 时 \(v \in  F\) 。那么 \(T \cap  F\) 是这些属于 \(F\) 的顶点 \(v\) 的凸包。因此，如所断言， \(T \cap  F\) 是 \(T\) 的一个面，并且是一个维度至多为 \(n - 2\) 的单纯形。
\end{tcolorbox}

Let \({\sum }_{2}\) be the set of those simplices in \({\sum }_{1}\) that have dimension \(n - 2\) . Because all simplices in \(\sum\) have dimension \(n - 1\) by Lemma 7.5, \({\sum }_{2} = {\sum }^{\prime }\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
设 \({\sum }_{2}\) 为 \({\sum }_{1}\) 中维度为 \(n - 2\) 的那些单纯形的集合。根据引理7.5，由于 \(\sum\) 中的所有单纯形的维度都是 \(n - 1\) ，所以 \({\sum }_{2} = {\sum }^{\prime }\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

We show that every \(x \in  F\) belongs to some simplex \({T}^{\prime }\) in \({\sum }^{\prime }\) , that is, in \({\sum }_{2}\) . Suppose there is some \(x \in  F\) where that is not the case. Then \(x \in  {S}_{1}\) for some simplex \({S}_{1} \in  {\sum }_{1}\) where \({S}_{1}\) has dimension less than \(n - 2\) . Let \({S}_{1}\) be the simplex in \({\sum }_{1}\) of largest dimension (by assumption at most \(n - 3\) ) that contains \(x\) . By the same argument as used in the proof of Lemma 7.5 with \(d = n - 1\) , there is some \({S}_{2} \in  {\sum }_{1}\) which is a superset of \({S}_{1}\) and has at least one further vertex and higher dimension than \({S}_{1}\) , a contradiction. This shows that \(F = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{{T}^{\prime } \in  {\sum }^{\prime }}}{T}^{\prime }\) as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们证明每个 \(x \in  F\) 都属于 \({\sum }^{\prime }\) 中的某个单纯形 \({T}^{\prime }\) ，即属于 \({\sum }_{2}\) 。假设存在某个 \(x \in  F\) 不满足该情况。那么对于某个单纯形 \({S}_{1} \in  {\sum }_{1}\) 有 \(x \in  {S}_{1}\) ，其中 \({S}_{1}\) 的维度小于 \(n - 2\) 。设 \({S}_{1}\) 为 \({\sum }_{1}\) 中包含 \(x\) 的最大维度(根据假设至多为 \(n - 3\) )的单纯形。通过与引理7.5证明中使用 \(d = n - 1\) 时相同的论证，存在某个 \({S}_{2} \in  {\sum }_{1}\) 是 \({S}_{1}\) 的超集，且比 \({S}_{1}\) 至少多一个顶点且维度更高，这产生矛盾。这表明如所断言 \(F = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{{T}^{\prime } \in  {\sum }^{\prime }}}{T}^{\prime }\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

For no two sub-facets in \({\sum }^{\prime }\) is one a subset of the other because they have the same dimension but different sets of vertices. Moreover, the intersection of two such sub-facets is determined by the intersection of their vertices, and hence a face of both these sub-facets. This shows that \({\sum }^{\prime }\) is a triangulation of \(F\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在 \({\sum }^{\prime }\) 中没有两个子极面使得一个是另一个的子集，因为它们具有相同的维度但顶点集不同。此外，两个这样的子极面的交集由它们顶点的交集确定，因此是这两个子极面的一个面。这表明 \({\sum }^{\prime }\) 是 \(F\) 的一个三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.4\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_190_197_1414_614_542_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.5 Triangulation of a regular triangle into small similar triangles.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.5 正三角形划分为小的相似三角形的三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

The triangulation of a simplex \(S\) takes the role of the "grid" mentioned earlier, with its vertices as gridpoints. The goal is to be able to create for any \(\varepsilon  > 0\) an " \(\varepsilon\) -fine grid" where the vertices in every sub-simplex are no more than \(\varepsilon\) apart. Figure 7.5 shows a good way to do this when \(S\) is a triangle. However, triangulating a higher-dimensional simplex to achieve this is not as easy. For example, consider a regular tetrahedron where each of its facets, which are triangles, is subdivided into four regular triangles obtained by joining the midpoints of each edge of the tetrahedron. Then "chopping off" the small tetrahedron at each corner leaves a central polytope that is not a tetrahedron but an octahedron. This octahedron has to be subdivided further into tetrahedra in some new way. In addition, it is not clear how such a construction would extend to higher dimensions. For the moment, we assume that in any dimension we can find a sufficiently "fine" triangulation of a simplex. A specific construction that achieves this is described in Section 7.7.

\begin{tcolorbox}
单纯形 \(S\) 的三角剖分起到了前面提到的“网格”的作用，其顶点即为网格点。目标是能够为任意 \(\varepsilon  > 0\) 创建一个“ \(\varepsilon\) -精细网格”，使得每个子单纯形中的顶点之间的距离不超过 \(\varepsilon\) 。图7.5展示了当 \(S\) 为三角形时实现这一目标的一种好方法。然而，对高维单纯形进行三角剖分以达到这一要求并非易事。例如，考虑一个正四面体，它的每个极面(即三角形)被细分为四个正三角形，这些正三角形是通过连接四面体每条边的中点得到的。然后，“切掉”每个角上的小四面体后，会留下一个中心有界多面体，它不是四面体，而是八面体。这个八面体必须以某种新的方式进一步细分为四面体。此外，目前尚不清楚这种构造如何扩展到更高维度。目前，我们假设在任何维度下，我们都能找到单纯形的足够“精细”的三角剖分。实现这一目标的具体构造方法将在7.7节中介绍。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.4 Sperner's Lemma}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.4 斯佩纳引理}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this section, we prove Sperner's lemma, which is often called a combinatorial version of Brouwer's fixed-point theorem, and which is a crucial step in its proof. Sperner’s lemma applies to a simplex \(S\) with \(d\) vertices and triangulation \(\sum\) of \(S\) , where each vertex in \(\sum\) is given a label in \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) , which fulfills the following condition.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本节中，我们将证明斯佩纳引理，它常被称为布劳威尔不动点定理的组合版本，并且是证明该定理的关键一步。斯佩纳引理适用于具有 \(d\) 个顶点的单纯形 \(S\) 以及 \(S\) 的三角剖分 \(\sum\) ，其中 \(\sum\) 中的每个顶点都被赋予了 \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 中的一个标签，且满足以下条件。
\end{tcolorbox}

Definition 7.8 (Sperner labeling). Let \(S\) be a simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) , let \(\sum\) be a triangulation of \(S\) , and let \(V\) be the set of vertices in \(\sum\) . Then a function \(V \rightarrow  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) that assigns to each \(x\) in \(V\) a label is said to fulfill the Sperner condition, and is called a Sperner labeling, if whenever \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{v}^{k}{\lambda }_{k}\) and \(x\) has label \(i\) , then \({\lambda }_{i} > 0\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定义7.8(斯佩纳标号)。设 \(S\) 是一个顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的单纯形， \(\sum\) 是 \(S\) 的三角剖分， \(V\) 是 \(\sum\) 中的顶点集。那么，一个为 \(V\) 中的每个 \(x\) 分配标签的函数 \(V \rightarrow  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) ，若满足每当 \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{k = 1}}^{d}{v}^{k}{\lambda }_{k}\) 且 \(x\) 的标签为 \(i\) 时，有 \({\lambda }_{i} > 0\) ，则称该函数满足斯佩纳条件，并称其为斯佩纳标号。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_191_334_1446_746_724_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.6 A triangulation of the triangle \(S\) with a Sperner labeling. The vertices \({v}^{1},{v}^{2},{v}^{3}\) of \(S\) are uniquely identified by their respective labels 1, 2, 3.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.6 带有斯佩纳标号的三角形 \(S\) 的三角剖分。 \(S\) 的顶点 \({v}^{1},{v}^{2},{v}^{3}\) 通过它们各自的标签1、2、3唯一标识。
\end{tcolorbox}

Note that in Definition 7.8, every point \(x\) in the simplex \(S\) has the unique barycentric coordinates \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) as in (7.7). The Sperner condition implies that each vertex \({v}^{i}\) of \(S\) has label \(i\) (and therefore every vertex has a different label). In general, the Sperner condition states that if \(x\) is on a face \(F\) of \(S\) (and no smaller face), then \(x\) is only allowed to have one of the labels of the vertices of \(F\) . For example, if \(x\) is on the edge that connects \({v}^{1}\) and \({v}^{2}\) , then \(x\) can only have labels 1 or 2 . For \(d = 2\) the Sperner condition is stated in (7.3). For \(d = 3\) the simplex \(S\) is a triangle, with an example of a triangulation with a Sperner labeling shown in Figure 7.6.

\begin{tcolorbox}
请注意，在定义7.8中，单纯形 \(S\) 中的每个点 \(x\) 都具有如(7.7)所示的唯一重心坐标 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) 。斯佩纳条件意味着 \(S\) 的每个顶点 \({v}^{i}\) 都有标签 \(i\) (因此每个顶点都有不同的标签)。一般来说，斯佩纳条件规定，如果 \(x\) 位于 \(S\) 的一个面 \(F\) 上(而不是更小的面上)，那么 \(x\) 只能具有 \(F\) 的顶点的标签之一。例如，如果 \(x\) 位于连接 \({v}^{1}\) 和 \({v}^{2}\) 的边上，那么 \(x\) 只能有标签1或2。对于 \(d = 2\) ，斯佩纳条件在(7.3)中给出。对于 \(d = 3\) ，单纯形 \(S\) 是一个三角形，图7.6展示了一个带有斯佩纳标号的三角剖分示例。
\end{tcolorbox}

For a function \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) on the unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1) and \(x \in  \Delta\) , one of the labels of \(x\) defined in (7.2) can always be chosen to fulfill the Sperner condition.

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 (7.1) 中单位单纯形 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 上的函数 \(\Delta\) 以及 \(x \in  \Delta\) ，(7.2) 中定义的 \(x\) 的标签之一总能被选来满足斯佩纳条件。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.9. Consider the(d - 1)-dimensional unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1) and a function \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) . Then every point \(x \in  \Delta\) can be given a label \(i\) so that \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) and the Sperner condition holds.

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 7.9。考虑 (7.1) 中 (d - 1) 维单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 以及函数 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 。那么每个点 \(x \in  \Delta\) 都可以被赋予一个标签 \(i\) ，使得 \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) 且斯佩纳条件成立。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Because \(\Delta\) is the convex hull of the unit vectors \({e}_{1},\ldots ,{e}_{d}\) , the barycentric coordinates of \(x \in  \Delta\) are just \({x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{d}\) . Let \(I = \left\{  {i \mid  {x}_{i} > 0}\right\}\) . If \({f}_{i}\left( x\right)  > {x}_{i}\) for all \(i \in  I\) , then

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。因为 \(\Delta\) 是单位向量 \({e}_{1},\ldots ,{e}_{d}\) 的凸包， \(x \in  \Delta\) 的重心坐标就是 \({x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{d}\) 。设 \(I = \left\{  {i \mid  {x}_{i} > 0}\right\}\) 。如果对于所有 \(i \in  I\) 都有 \({f}_{i}\left( x\right)  > {x}_{i}\) ，那么
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{f}_{i}\left( x\right)  \geq  \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{f}_{i}\left( x\right)  > \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{x}_{i} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{x}_{i} = 1,
\]

which contradicts \(f\left( x\right)  \in  \Delta\) . So there is at least one \(i \in  I\) with \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) , that is, \({x}_{i} > 0\) and \(x\) has label \(i\) , as required.

\begin{tcolorbox}
这与 \(f\left( x\right)  \in  \Delta\) 矛盾。所以至少存在一个 \(i \in  I\) 使得 \({x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right)\) ，即 \({x}_{i} > 0\) 且 \(x\) 具有标签 \(i\) ，符合要求。
\end{tcolorbox}

Sperner's lemma asserts that a triangulation of a simplex with a Sperner labeling has at least one completely labeled sub-simplex. A suitable induction proof shows the stronger statement that the number of completely labeled sub-simplices is odd. Figure 7.7 shows this for the subdivided triangle considered earlier.

\begin{tcolorbox}
斯佩纳引理断言，带有斯佩纳标号的单纯形的三角剖分至少有一个完全标记的子单纯形。一个合适的归纳证明可以得出更强的结论，即完全标记的子单纯形的数量是奇数。图 7.7 展示了前面所考虑的细分三角形的这种情况。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.10 (Sperner’s lemma). Let \(S\) be a simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) , let \(\sum\) be a triangulation of \(S\) , and consider a Sperner labeling of the vertices in \(V\) . Then \(\sum\) has an odd number of sub-simplices \(T\) that are completely labeled (that is, every label in \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) is the label of some vertex of \(T\) ).

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理 7.10(斯佩纳引理)。设 \(S\) 是一个顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的单纯形，设 \(\sum\) 是 \(S\) 的一个三角剖分，并考虑 \(V\) 中顶点的斯佩纳标号。那么 \(\sum\) 有奇数个完全标记的子单纯形 \(T\) (即， \(\{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 中的每个标签都是 \(T\) 的某个顶点的标签)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. In the statement of the theorem, the vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) of \(S\) can be elements of some space \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) for any \(k \geq  d - 1\) . Consider the following statement:

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。在定理的陈述中， \(S\) 的顶点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 可以是任意 \(k \geq  d - 1\) 时某个空间 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) 的元素。考虑以下陈述:
\end{tcolorbox}

(i) Let \(1 \leq  n \leq  d\) , let \({F}_{n}\) be the simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) , and let \({\sum }_{n} = \{ F \mid  F\) is a face of dimension \(n - 1\) of some \(\left. {T \in  \sum \text{ and }F \subseteq  {F}_{n}}\right\}\) . Then \({\sum }_{n}\) is a triangulation of \({F}_{n}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(i) 设 \(1 \leq  n \leq  d\) ，设 \({F}_{n}\) 是顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{n}\) 的单纯形，且设 \({\sum }_{n} = \{ F \mid  F\) 是某个 \(\left. {T \in  \sum \text{ and }F \subseteq  {F}_{n}}\right\}\) 的 \(n - 1\) 维面。那么 \({\sum }_{n}\) 是 \({F}_{n}\) 的一个三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

By assumption,(i) is true for \(n = d\) . If (i) holds for some \(n > 1\) , then Lemma 7.7 (with \(d = n\) ) implies that \({\sum }_{n - 1}\) is a triangulation of \({F}_{n - 1}\) . Hence, by induction,(i) is true for \(n = d,d - 1,\ldots ,1\) , as claimed. We now prove by induction:

\begin{tcolorbox}
根据假设，(i) 对于 \(n = d\) 成立。如果 (i) 对于某个 \(n > 1\) 成立，那么引理 7.7(对于 \(d = n\) )意味着 \({\sum }_{n - 1}\) 是 \({F}_{n - 1}\) 的一个三角剖分。因此，通过归纳法，(i) 对于 \(n = d,d - 1,\ldots ,1\) 成立，如所声称的。我们现在通过归纳法证明:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_193_335_202_744_721_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.7 Illustration of Sperner's lemma (Theorem 7.10). The black (full) dots mark completely labeled sub-simplices, and the white (hollow) dots mark completely labeled sub-facets, as used in the induction proof of Theorem 7.10. Both white and black dots are odd in number.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.7 斯佩纳引理(定理 7.10)的图示。黑色(实心)点标记完全标记的子单纯形，白色(空心)点标记完全标记的子极面，如定理 7.10 的归纳证明中所使用的。白色和黑色点的数量都是奇数。
\end{tcolorbox}

(ii) For \(n = 1,2,\ldots ,d\) , let \({\sum }_{n}\) be the triangulation of \({F}_{n}\) as defined in (i). Call \(T \in  {\sum }_{n}\) completely labeled if the vertices of \(T\) have all labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) . Then \({\sum }_{n}\) has an odd number of completely labeled simplices \(T\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(ii) 对于 \(n = 1,2,\ldots ,d\) ，设 \({\sum }_{n}\) 为 (i) 中所定义的 \({F}_{n}\) 的三角剖分。若 \(T\) 的顶点具有所有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) ，则称 \(T \in  {\sum }_{n}\) 为完全标记的。那么 \({\sum }_{n}\) 有奇数个完全标记的单纯形 \(T\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Statement (ii) is trivial for \(n = 1\) where \({F}_{1} = \left\{  {v}_{1}\right\}\) . To prove the induction step, assume (ii) holds for some \(n \geq  1\) where \(n < d\) , and we want to prove (ii) for \(n + 1\) . For any face \(F\) of a simplex \(T\) in \(\sum\) , let

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(n = 1\) (其中 \({F}_{1} = \left\{  {v}_{1}\right\}\) )，命题 (ii) 是显然的。为了证明归纳步骤，假设 (ii) 对于某个 \(n \geq  1\) (其中 \(n < d\) )成立，我们要证明 (ii) 对于 \(n + 1\) 也成立。对于 \(\sum\) 中单纯形 \(T\) 的任意面 \(F\) ，设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
L\left( F\right)  = \{ i \mid  i\text{ is a label of some vertex of }F\} .
\]

Consider the following sets:

\begin{tcolorbox}
考虑以下集合:
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
C = \left\{  {F \in  {\sum }_{n} \mid  L\left( F\right)  = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\} }\right\}  ,
\]

\[
{C}^{\prime } = \left\{  {F \mid  F\text{ is a facet of some }T \in  {\sum }_{n + 1},L\left( F\right)  = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\} ,F \notin  {\sum }_{n}}\right\}  , \tag{7.11}
\]

\[
D = \left\{  {T \in  {\sum }_{n + 1} \mid  L\left( T\right)  = \{ 1,\ldots ,n + 1\} }\right\}  ,
\]

\[
A = \left\{  {T \in  {\sum }_{n + 1} \mid  L\left( T\right)  = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\} }\right\}  .
\]

The case \(n = 2\) is shown in Figures 7.7 and 7.8. The set \({F}_{3} = {F}_{n + 1}\) is the triangle considered earlier, with a triangulation \({\sum }_{3}\) of \({F}_{3}\) into triangles; the vertices in \({\sum }_{3}\) may have labels 1,2, and 3 . The completely labeled elements of \({\sum }_{3}\) define the set \(D\) and are marked with black dots. The set \({F}_{2} = {F}_{n}\) is the bottom facet of the triangle \({F}_{3}\) , with a triangulation \({\sum }_{2}\) of \({F}_{2}\) into line segments; the vertices in \({\sum }_{2}\) may have labels 1 and 2 . The completely labeled elements of \({\sum }_{2}\) define the set \(C\) and are marked with white dots. By inductive assumption, \(\left| C\right|\) is odd.

\begin{tcolorbox}
情况 \(n = 2\) 如图 7.7 和 7.8 所示。集合 \({F}_{3} = {F}_{n + 1}\) 是前面考虑的三角形，它有一个将 \({F}_{3}\) 三角剖分成三角形的三角剖分 \({\sum }_{3}\) ； \({\sum }_{3}\) 中的顶点可能具有标签 1、2 和 3。 \({\sum }_{3}\) 中完全标记的元素定义了集合 \(D\) ，并用黑点标记。集合 \({F}_{2} = {F}_{n}\) 是三角形 \({F}_{3}\) 的底部极面，它有一个将 \({F}_{2}\) 三角剖分成线段的三角剖分 \({\sum }_{2}\) ； \({\sum }_{2}\) 中的顶点可能具有标签 1 和 2。 \({\sum }_{2}\) 中完全标记的元素定义了集合 \(C\) ，并用白点标记。根据归纳假设， \(\left| C\right|\) 是奇数。
\end{tcolorbox}

The set \({C}^{\prime }\) is the set of sub-facets \(F\) whose \(n\) vertices have all labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) and which are not in \({\sum }_{n}\) ; in Figure 7.8 they are also marked with white dots. (We use the terminology when \(n + 1 = d\) and call the elements of \({\sum }_{n + 1}\) "sub-simplices" and any facet of a sub-simplex a "sub-facet", which includes the elements of \({\sum }_{n}\) .) The set \(A\) is the set of almost completely labeled sub-simplices where for any \(T \in  A\) the \(n + 1\) vertices of \(T\) have all labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) but not label \(n + 1\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
集合 \({C}^{\prime }\) 是子极面 \(F\) 的集合，其 \(n\) 个顶点具有所有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 且不在 \({\sum }_{n}\) 中；在图 7.8 中，它们也用白点标记。(当 \(n + 1 = d\) 时，我们使用这样的术语，称 \({\sum }_{n + 1}\) 的元素为“子单纯形”，子单纯形的任何极面为“子极面”，这包括 \({\sum }_{n}\) 的元素。)集合 \(A\) 是几乎完全标记的子单纯形的集合，对于任意 \(T \in  A\) ， \(T\) 的 \(n + 1\) 个顶点具有所有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 但不具有标签 \(n + 1\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_194_199_200_741_726_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.8 The sets defined in (7.11) for \(n = 2\) .
