The elements of \(C\) (white dots) are in \({\sum }_{2}\) with labels 1,2, and the elements of \(D\) (black dots) are sub-simplices in \({\sum }_{3}\) with labels1,2,3. They are connected by paths with further nodes in \({C}^{\prime }\) (white dots, sub-facets inside the triangle with labels 1, 2), which define the graph \({G}_{3}\) . Hence, \(\left| {C \cup  D}\right|\) is even, and thus \(\left| D\right|\) is odd because \(\left| C\right|\) is odd.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.8 为 \(n = 2\) 定义的集合 (7.11)。 \(C\) 的元素(白点)在 \({\sum }_{2}\) 中，标签为 1、2， \(D\) 的元素(黑点)是 \({\sum }_{3}\) 中的子单纯形，标签为 1、2、3。它们通过路径相连，路径上还有 \({C}^{\prime }\) 中的其他节点(白点，三角形内标签为 1、2 的子极面)，这些定义了图 \({G}_{3}\) 。因此， \(\left| {C \cup  D}\right|\) 是偶数，由于 \(\left| C\right|\) 是奇数，所以 \(\left| D\right|\) 是奇数。
\end{tcolorbox}

We now define a new graph \({G}_{n + 1}\) with node set \(C \cup  {C}^{\prime } \cup  D\) , where any two nodes are joined by an edge if they are subsets of the same sub-simplex, which belongs to \(A\) or \(D\) . Figure 7.8 shows the nodes of the graph \({G}_{3}\) as white or black dots, and its edges as thick gray lines. The following cases can occur for such an edge of \({G}_{n + 1}\) :

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们现在定义一个新的图 \({G}_{n + 1}\) ，其节点集为 \(C \cup  {C}^{\prime } \cup  D\) ，如果任意两个节点是同一个子单纯形的子集，且该子单纯形属于 \(A\) 或 \(D\) ，则这两个节点由一条边相连。图 7.8 中，图 \({G}_{3}\) 的节点用白点或黑点表示，其边用粗灰线表示。对于 \({G}_{n + 1}\) 的这样一条边，可能出现以下情况:
\end{tcolorbox}

Case A. One endpoint of the edge is a sub-facet \(F \in  C\) , so that \(F\) is a subset of the facet \({F}_{n}\) of \({F}_{n + 1}\) . Hence, by Lemma 7.6(a), \(F\) is the face of exactly one sub-simplex \(T\) in \(D \cup  A\) . Then:

\begin{tcolorbox}
情况A。该边的一个端点是子极面 \(F \in  C\) ，使得 \(F\) 是 \({F}_{n + 1}\) 的极面 \({F}_{n}\) 的子集。因此，根据引理7.6(a)， \(F\) 是 \(D \cup  A\) 中恰好一个子单纯形 \(T\) 的面。那么:
\end{tcolorbox}

(a) If \(T \in  D\) , then \(T\) is completely labeled, and has exactly one facet with labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , which is \(F\) . The edge of the graph is \(\{ F,T\}\) , and both \(F\) and \(T\) have degree one. The edge itself defines a path of length one in the graph. An example of such a single-edge path is shown in Figure 7.8 at the bottom in the fourth triangle from the left.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 如果 \(T \in  D\) ，则 \(T\) 是完全标记的，并且恰好有一个带有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的极面，即 \(F\) 。该图的边是 \(\{ F,T\}\) ，并且 \(F\) 和 \(T\) 的度均为1。该边本身在图中定义了一条长度为1的路径。图7.8中左侧起第四个三角形底部展示了这样一条单边路径的示例。
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) If \(T \in  A\) , then \(T\) has \(n + 1\) vertices that together have labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , so one of these labels occurs twice. Hence, \(T\) has exactly two sub-facets that have labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , one of which is \(F\) and the second, say \({F}^{\prime }\) , belongs to \({C}^{\prime }\) . The edge of the graph is \(\left\{  {F,{F}^{\prime }}\right\}\) , with \({F}^{\prime }\) as the only neighbor of \(F\) , so \(F\) again has degree one. In Figure 7.8, these are all the other cases where \(F \in  {\sum }_{2}\) (that is, \(F\) is a white dot at the bottom of the triangle), where \(T\) (which represents in effect the edge of the graph) has either labels1,2,1or1,2,2.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 如果 \(T \in  A\) ，则 \(T\) 有 \(n + 1\) 个顶点，这些顶点一起具有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) ，因此这些标签中有一个出现了两次。因此， \(T\) 恰好有两个具有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的子极面，其中一个是 \(F\) ，另一个，设为 \({F}^{\prime }\) ，属于 \({C}^{\prime }\) 。该图的边是 \(\left\{  {F,{F}^{\prime }}\right\}\) ， \({F}^{\prime }\) 是 \(F\) 的唯一邻居，因此 \(F\) 的度再次为1。在图7.8中，这些都是 \(F \in  {\sum }_{2}\) 的所有其他情况(即 \(F\) 是三角形底部的一个白点)，其中 \(T\) (实际上代表图的边)的标签为1,2,1或1,2,2。
\end{tcolorbox}

Case B. One endpoint of the edge of the graph is a sub-facet \(F \in  {C}^{\prime }\) . Then \(F \notin  {\sum }_{n}\) by definition of \({C}^{\prime }\) , and \(F\) is therefore not a subset of any facet of \({F}_{n + 1}\) because of the Sperner condition: the vertices of \(F\) have the labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , and every facet of \({F}_{n + 1}\) other than \({F}_{n}\) is missing one of these labels. Hence, by Lemma 7.6(b), such a sub-facet \(F\) in \({C}^{\prime }\) is the facet of exactly two sub-simplices in \(D \cup  A\) . In the graph, \(F\) has degree two. For each of the two sub-simplices \(T \in  D \cup  A\) that have \(F\) as a facet, either (a) or (b) applies as before: (a) if \(T \in  D\) , then \(F\) is the unique neighbor of \(T\) , the edge of the graph is \(\{ F,T\}\) , and \(T\) has degree one in the graph; (b) if \(T \in  A\) , then \(A\) has exactly one other facet \({F}^{\prime }\) with labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , where \({F}^{\prime } \in  C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) , and the edge of the graph is \(\left\{  {F,{F}^{\prime }}\right\}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
情况B。该图的边的一个端点是子极面 \(F \in  {C}^{\prime }\) 。那么根据 \({C}^{\prime }\) 的定义有 \(F \notin  {\sum }_{n}\) ，并且由于斯佩纳条件， \(F\) 因此不是 \({F}_{n + 1}\) 的任何极面的子集: \(F\) 的顶点具有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) ，并且 \({F}_{n + 1}\) 除 \({F}_{n}\) 之外的每个极面都缺少这些标签中的一个。因此，根据引理7.6(b)， \({C}^{\prime }\) 中的这样一个子极面 \(F\) 是 \(D \cup  A\) 中恰好两个子单纯形的极面。在图中， \(F\) 的度为2。对于以 \(F\) 为极面的两个子单纯形 \(T \in  D \cup  A\) 中的每一个，如前所述，要么适用情况(a)，要么适用情况(b):(a) 如果 \(T \in  D\) ，则 \(F\) 是 \(T\) 的唯一邻居，该图的边是 \(\{ F,T\}\) ，并且 \(T\) 在图中的度为1；(b) 如果 \(T \in  A\) ，则 \(A\) 恰好有另一个带有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的极面 \({F}^{\prime }\) ，其中 \({F}^{\prime } \in  C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) ，并且该图的边是 \(\left\{  {F,{F}^{\prime }}\right\}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Case C. One endpoint of the edge of the graph is a completely labeled sub-simplex \(T \in  D\) . This case has been covered before: \(T\) has a unique facet \(F\) with labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) , which is the unique neighbor of \(T\) , so that \(T\) has degree one in the graph, and \(F \in  C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) ; the edge of the graph is \(\{ T,F\}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
情况C。该图的边的一个端点是完全标记的子单纯形 \(T \in  D\) 。这种情况之前已经讨论过: \(T\) 有一个唯一的带有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的极面 \(F\) ，它是 \(T\) 的唯一邻居，因此 \(T\) 在图中的度为1，并且 \(F \in  C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) ；该图的边是 \(\{ T,F\}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

In summary, the graph \({G}_{n + 1}\) has nodes in \(C\) and \(D\) which have degree one, and nodes in \({C}^{\prime }\) that have degree two, and no other nodes. Clearly, such a graph is a set of paths and cycles (as can be seen in Figure 7.8; note the cycle of length four on the left). The end nodes of the paths are exactly the degree-one nodes, which are the elements of \(C \cup  D\) (the cycles have no end nodes). Because every path has two end nodes, the number \(\left| C\right|  + \left| D\right|\) of these end nodes is even. (Alternatively, as stated at the beginning of this chapter, every graph has an even number of odd-degree nodes, which are here the nodes of degree one.) Because \(\left| C\right|\) is odd, this implies that \(\left| D\right|\) is also odd, which completes the induction proof for (ii). For \(n = d\) ,(ii) states the theorem.

\begin{tcolorbox}
总之，图 \({G}_{n + 1}\) 在 \(C\) 和 \(D\) 中有度数为一的节点，在 \({C}^{\prime }\) 中有度数为二的节点，没有其他节点。显然，这样的图是一组路径和环(如图 7.8 所示；注意左边长度为四的环)。路径的端点恰好是度数为一的节点，即 \(C \cup  D\) 的元素(环没有端点)。因为每条路径有两个端点，所以这些端点的数量 \(\left| C\right|  + \left| D\right|\) 是偶数。(或者，正如本章开头所述，每个图的奇数度节点数量为偶数，这里度数为一的节点就是奇数度节点。)因为 \(\left| C\right|\) 是奇数，这意味着 \(\left| D\right|\) 也是奇数，这就完成了对 (ii) 的归纳证明。对于 \(n = d\) ，(ii) 表述了该定理。
\end{tcolorbox}

The fact that the number of end nodes of paths is even is called a parity argument. The original proof in Sperner (1928), and very similarly in Knaster, Kuratowski, and Mazurkiewicz (1929), uses also a parity argument without the graphs \({G}_{n}\) , namely the following equation:

\begin{tcolorbox}
路径端点数量为偶数这一事实被称为奇偶性论证。施佩纳(Sperner，1928 年)的原始证明，以及非常类似地，克纳斯特(Knaster)、库拉托夫斯基(Kuratowski)和马祖尔克维奇(Mazurkiewicz，1929 年)的证明，也使用了奇偶性论证，但没有用到图 \({G}_{n}\) ，即以下等式:
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left| D\right|  + 2\left| A\right|  = \left| C\right|  + 2\left| {C}^{\prime }\right| . \tag{7.12}
\]

On the left-hand side in (7.12), each completely labeled sub-facet in \(C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) is counted as either the unique facet of a sub-simplex \(T\) in \(D\) , or as one of the two facets of a sub-simplex \(T\) in \(A\) ; that is, we look at all the sub-simplices in \(D \cup  A\) and count for each one its (one or two) sub-facets that have the labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) . On the right-hand side of (7.12), the sub-facet is either an element of \(C\) and then the facet of exactly one sub-simplex in \(D \cup  A\) , or an element of \({C}^{\prime }\) , and then it is counted twice because it belongs to two sub-simplices in \(D \cup  A\) ; here we have used Lemma 7.6. Clearly,(7.12) implies \(\left| D\right|  = \left| C\right|  + 2\left| {C}^{\prime }\right|  - 2\left| A\right|\) , and therefore that \(\left| D\right|\) is odd because \(\left| C\right|\) is odd, which again completes the induction step for (ii).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在 (7.12) 的左边， \(C \cup  {C}^{\prime }\) 中的每个完全标记的子极面要么被计为 \(D\) 中子单纯形 \(T\) 的唯一极面，要么被计为 \(A\) 中子单纯形 \(T\) 的两个极面之一；也就是说，我们查看 \(D \cup  A\) 中的所有子单纯形，并为每个子单纯形计算其具有标签 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的(一个或两个)子极面。在 (7.12) 的右边，子极面要么是 \(C\) 的元素，此时它是 \(D \cup  A\) 中恰好一个子单纯形的极面，要么是 \({C}^{\prime }\) 的元素，此时它被计为两次，因为它属于 \(D \cup  A\) 中的两个子单纯形；这里我们使用了引理 7.6。显然，(7.12) 意味着 \(\left| D\right|  = \left| C\right|  + 2\left| {C}^{\prime }\right|  - 2\left| A\right|\) ，因此 \(\left| D\right|\) 是奇数，因为 \(\left| C\right|\) 是奇数，这再次完成了对 (ii) 的归纳步骤。
\end{tcolorbox}

We use the graphs \({G}_{n}\) for \(n = 2,\ldots ,d\) because the picture in Figure 7.8 shows the parity argument immediately via the end nodes of paths, compared to the more abstract equation (7.12) (although the reason is the same). Moreover, the graphs lead to a constructive proof of Theorem 7.10, as we show next.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们为 \(n = 2,\ldots ,d\) 使用图 \({G}_{n}\) ，是因为图 7.8 中的图示通过路径的端点能立即展示奇偶性论证，与更抽象的等式 (7.12) 相比(尽管原理相同)。此外，正如我们接下来要展示的，这些图能为定理 7.10 提供一个构造性证明。
\end{tcolorbox}

We have completed the proof of Sperner's lemma in two ways, where the second way based on (7.12) seems much shorter. In the remainder of this section on Sperner’s lemma, we combine the graphs \({G}_{2},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) to show that they can actually be used to find a completely labeled sub-simplex in the given triangulation.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们用两种方法完成了施佩纳引理的证明，其中基于 (7.12) 的第二种方法似乎要短得多。在关于施佩纳引理这一节的剩余部分，我们将结合图 \({G}_{2},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) 来展示它们实际上可用于在给定的三角剖分中找到一个完全标记的子单纯形。
\end{tcolorbox}

At first sight, the use of these graphs does not seem constructive, and only proves the induction step of claim (ii) in the proof. For example, consider the triangulation \({\sum }_{2}\) of the bottom edge of the triangle in Figure 7.8. The first completely labeled line segment on the left starts a path that ends at another such line segment, not at a completely labeled triangle. It is easy to continue along the edge (which is just a sequence of line segments) until finding a path that ends at a black dot inside the triangle (there are three such paths in the figure). However, the triangle may just be the next face \({F}_{3}\) in a larger simplex, for example a tetrahedron, and some other black dots (for example near the top right) may be needed to find a completely labeled sub-simplex in the next triangulation \({\sum }_{4}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
乍一看，使用这些图似乎不是构造性的，只是证明了证明中命题 (ii) 的归纳步骤。例如，考虑图 7.8 中三角形底边的三角剖分 \({\sum }_{2}\) 。左边第一个完全标记的线段开启了一条路径，该路径终止于另一个这样的线段，而不是一个完全标记的三角形。很容易沿着边(它只是一系列线段)继续，直到找到一条终止于三角形内部黑点的路径(图中有三条这样的路径)。然而，这个三角形可能只是一个更大单纯形(例如四面体)中的下一个面 \({F}_{3}\) ，可能需要其他一些黑点(例如右上角附近的)来在下一步三角剖分 \({\sum }_{4}\) 中找到一个完全标记的子单纯形。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.6\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_196_384_1023_870_409_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.9 Triangulation of \({F}_{2}\) , which is the bottom edge of the triangle in Figures 7.6-7.8, with line segments as sub-simplices, and the vertices in \({\sum }_{2}\) , marked by small dots, as sub-facets. The Sperner labeling is (a), analogous to Figure 7.6. The completely labeled sub-simplices of \({\sum }_{2}\) are marked with white dots in (b), analogous to the black dots in Figure 7.7; the completely labeled sub-facet is the leftmost vertex marked in gray, analogous to any white dot in Figure 7.7. The graph \({G}_{2}\) is shown in (c), analogous to Figure 7.8, and the graph alone in (d), which in this dimension is only a set of paths.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.9 \({F}_{2}\) 的三角剖分， \({F}_{2}\) 是图7.6 - 7.8中三角形的底边，以线段作为子单纯形， \({\sum }_{2}\) 中的顶点(用小点标记)作为子极面。斯佩纳标号如(a)所示，与图7.6类似。 \({\sum }_{2}\) 的完全标记子单纯形在(b)中用白点标记，类似于图7.7中的黑点；完全标记的子极面是最左边用灰色标记的顶点，类似于图7.7中的任何一个白点。图 \({G}_{2}\) 如(c)所示，类似于图7.8，(d)中单独展示了该图，在这个维度中它只是一组路径。
\end{tcolorbox}

A more systematic approach is needed, for which we consider the first induction step from \(n = 1\) to \(n = 2\) of claim (ii) in the proof, shown in Figure 7.9. The facet \({F}_{1}\) consists only of a single vertex \({v}^{1}\) , marked as a gray node on the left. This defines the graph \({G}_{1}\) , which has no edges, but one node (and hence an odd number of nodes) given by \({v}^{1}\) , which is also the single sub-simplex of \({\sum }_{1}\) and completely labeled; the graph \({G}_{1}\) is the only graph which does not consist of paths and cycles. In \({\sum }_{2}\) , the sub-simplices are line segments, and their sub-facets are single vertices. The set \({C}^{\prime }\) in (7.12) consists of those vertices that have label 1, marked in gray in Figure 7.9, in addition to the leftmost gray node as the unique element of \(C\) . This is one of the end nodes of the paths in \({G}_{2}\) . All other end nodes are the completely labeled sub-simplices in \({\sum }_{2}\) , marked as before with white dots. (There are no cycles because \({F}_{2}\) is just a line segment.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
需要一种更系统的方法，为此我们考虑证明中命题(ii)从 \(n = 1\) 到 \(n = 2\) 的第一步归纳，如图7.9所示。极面 \({F}_{1}\) 仅由单个顶点 \({v}^{1}\) 组成，在左边标记为灰色节点。这定义了图 \({G}_{1}\) ，它没有边，但有一个由 \({v}^{1}\) 给出的节点(因此节点数为奇数)， \({v}^{1}\) 也是 \({\sum }_{1}\) 的唯一子单纯形且是完全标记的；图 \({G}_{1}\) 是唯一不由路径和环组成的图。在 \({\sum }_{2}\) 中，子单纯形是线段，它们的子极面是单个顶点。(7.12)中的集合 \({C}^{\prime }\) 由那些标签为1的顶点组成，在图7.9中用灰色标记，此外最左边的灰色节点是 \(C\) 的唯一元素。这是 \({G}_{2}\) 中路径的一个端点。所有其他端点是 \({\sum }_{2}\) 中完全标记的子单纯形，如之前一样用白点标记。(因为 \({F}_{2}\) 只是一条线段，所以没有环。)
\end{tcolorbox}

We now state our constructive version of Sperner's lemma, obtained by just taking the union of the considered graphs, which concatenates their paths.

\begin{tcolorbox}
现在我们陈述斯佩纳引理的构造性版本，它是通过取所考虑图的并集得到的，该并集将它们的路径连接起来。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 7.11. Consider a triangulation \(\sum\) of a simplex \(S\) with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) and a Sperner labeling as in Theorem 7.10, \(d \geq  2\) . Let \({G}_{1},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) be the graphs defined in the proof of the theorem, and define the graph \(G\) by

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题7.11。考虑单纯形 \(S\) 的三角剖分 \(\sum\) ，其顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) ，并采用如定理7.10中的斯佩纳标号 \(d \geq  2\) 。设 \({G}_{1},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) 是定理证明中定义的图，并按如下方式定义图 \(G\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
G = {G}_{1} \cup  \cdots  \cup  {G}_{d} \tag{7.13}
\]

where the union is taken separately for the sets of nodes and edges, respectively. Then every node in \(G\) has degree one or two, so that \(G\) consists of paths and cycles. The end nodes of the paths are given by \({v}^{1}\) and the completely labeled sub-simplices of \(\sum\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中并集分别对节点集和边集取。那么 \(G\) 中的每个节点的度数为1或2，因此 \(G\) 由路径和环组成。路径的端点由 \({v}^{1}\) 和 \(\sum\) 的完全标记子单纯形给出。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(1 \leq  n < d\) . According to the construction in (7.12), the common nodes of \({G}_{n}\) and \({G}_{n + 1}\) are the sub-simplices in \({\sum }_{n}\) with \(n\) vertices that have all labels \(1,\ldots ,n\) . For \(n > 1\) , these nodes have degree one in both \({G}_{n}\) and \({G}_{n + 1}\) , and therefore degree two in \({G}_{n} \cup  {G}_{n + 1}\) and in \(G\) . Hence, the degree-one nodes in \(G\) are given by \({v}^{1}\) (which is the only node in \({G}_{1}\) , where it has degree zero, and which has degree one in \({G}_{2}\) ), and the completely labeled sub-simplices in \({G}_{d}\) , as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(1 \leq  n < d\) 。根据(7.12)中的构造， \({G}_{n}\) 和 \({G}_{n + 1}\) 的公共节点是 \({\sum }_{n}\) 中具有 \(n\) 个顶点且所有顶点标签为 \(1,\ldots ,n\) 的子单纯形。对于 \(n > 1\) ，这些节点在 \({G}_{n}\) 和 \({G}_{n + 1}\) 中的度数均为1，因此在 \({G}_{n} \cup  {G}_{n + 1}\) 和 \(G\) 中的度数为2。因此，如所声称的， \(G\) 中度数为1的节点由 \({v}^{1}\) (它是 \({G}_{1}\) 中的唯一节点，在其中度数为0，在 \({G}_{2}\) 中度数为1)和 \({G}_{d}\) 中完全标记的子单纯形给出。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.6\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_197_524_1329_865_382_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.10 Example of \(G\) in (7.13) for \(d = 4\) . The graph \({G}_{2}\) is from Figure 7.9. The graph \({G}_{3}\) from Figure 7.8 is drawn as a "layer" between the completely labeled elements of \({\sum }_{2}\) and \({\sum }_{3}\) , and the graph \({G}_{4}\) as another such layer. The triangles indicate sub-facets in \({\sum }_{4}\) with labels1,2,3(apart from the black dots, which also belong to \({G}_{3}\) ), and the squares are sub-simplices in \({\sum }_{4}\) with all labels1,2,3,4.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.10 (7.13)中 \(G\) 在 \(d = 4\) 情况下的示例。图 \({G}_{2}\) 取自图7.9。图7.8中的图 \({G}_{3}\) 被绘制为 \({\sum }_{2}\) 和 \({\sum }_{3}\) 的完全标记元素之间的一个“层”，图 \({G}_{4}\) 则作为另一个这样的层。三角形表示 \({\sum }_{4}\) 中标签为1、2、3的子极面(除黑点外，黑点也属于 \({G}_{3}\) )，正方形表示 \({\sum }_{4}\) 中标签为1、2、3、4的子单纯形。
\end{tcolorbox}

An example of \(G\) is shown in Figure 7.10, for a triangulated tetrahedron which has \({F}_{3}\) in Figure 7.8 as its bottom facet. The concatenated paths from \({G}_{2},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) may result in new cycles, as on the bottom right. The path that starts at \({v}^{1}\) ends at a completely labeled sub-simplex in \(\sum\) , which is therefore found by following the path. The example shows that the path may move up and down through the different dimensions, such as visiting a triangle in \({G}_{4}\) and coming back to a single vertex in \({G}_{2}\) . The construction of \(G\) in (7.13) is very clean because it does not need any further addition to the triangulation \(\sum\) and its labeled vertices.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.10展示了 \(G\) 的一个示例，针对一个三角剖分的四面体，其底面极面是图7.8中的 \({F}_{3}\) 。来自 \({G}_{2},\ldots ,{G}_{d}\) 的拼接路径可能会形成新的循环，如右下角所示。从 \({v}^{1}\) 开始的路径终止于 \(\sum\) 中的一个完全标记子单纯形，因此通过沿着该路径可以找到它。该示例表明，路径可能会在不同维度间上下移动，例如访问 \({G}_{4}\) 中的一个三角形，然后回到 \({G}_{2}\) 中的一个顶点。(7.13)中 \(G\) 的构造非常简洁，因为它不需要对三角剖分 \(\sum\) 及其标记顶点进行任何进一步的添加。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.5 The Knaster-Kuratowski-Mazurkiewicz Lemma}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.5 克纳斯特 - 库拉托夫斯基 - 马祖尔克维奇引理}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this section, we use Sperner's lemma to prove a theorem due to Knaster, Kuratowski, and Mazurkiewicz (1929) known as the "KKM lemma" after the initials of the authors. The KKM lemma considers a simplex \(S\) with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) and closed sets \({A}_{1},\ldots ,{A}_{d}\) . The assumption, which is closely related to the Sperner condition, is that for any set of vertices, the face of \(S\) with these vertices \({v}^{i}\) is covered by the corresponding closed sets \({A}_{i}\) , as illustrated in Figure 7.11. The conclusion is that then these sets have a common point. In some contexts, such closed sets can be defined more naturally than a function for which one tries to find a fixed point, so that the KKM lemma is a useful tool in its own right. At any rate, it leads almost immediately to a proof of Brouwer's fixed-point theorem on the unit simplex (Theorem 7.13). As background material, we recall the concept of Euclidean norm and distance, and the classic theorem of Bolzano-Weierstrass on the existence of converging subsequences, which is used in the proof of the KKM lemma.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本节中，我们使用斯佩纳引理来证明一个由克纳斯特(Knaster)、库拉托夫斯基(Kuratowski)和马祖尔克维奇(Mazurkiewicz)(1929年)提出的定理，该定理以作者姓氏首字母命名为“KKM引理”。KKM引理考虑一个单纯形 \(S\) ，其顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) ，以及闭集 \({A}_{1},\ldots ,{A}_{d}\) 。与斯佩纳条件密切相关的假设是，对于任意顶点集， \(S\) 中以这些顶点 \({v}^{i}\) 构成的面被相应的闭集 \({A}_{i}\) 覆盖，如图7.11所示。结论是这些集合有一个公共点。在某些情况下，这样的闭集比试图寻找不动点的函数更自然地被定义，因此KKM引理本身就是一个有用的工具。无论如何，它几乎可以立即导出单位单纯形上布劳威尔不动点定理的证明(定理7.13)。作为背景材料，我们回顾欧几里得范数与距离的概念，以及关于收敛子列存在性的经典波尔查诺 - 魏尔斯特拉斯定理，该定理用于KKM引理的证明。
\end{tcolorbox}

Background material: Euclidean norm and distance

\begin{tcolorbox}
背景材料:欧几里得范数与距离
\end{tcolorbox}

For \(a = {\left( {a}_{1},\ldots ,{a}_{d}\right) }^{\top } \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , the Euclidean norm \(\parallel a\parallel\) of \(a\) is defined as

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(a = {\left( {a}_{1},\ldots ,{a}_{d}\right) }^{\top } \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) ， \(a\) 的欧几里得范数 \(\parallel a\parallel\) 定义为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\parallel a\parallel  = \sqrt{{a}^{\top }a} = \sqrt{{a}_{1}^{2} + \cdots  + {a}_{d}^{2}}.
\]

The Euclidean distance between two points \(a,b \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) is defined as \(\parallel a - b\parallel\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
两点 \(a,b \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 之间的欧几里得距离定义为 \(\parallel a - b\parallel\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.12 (The KKM lemma). Let \(S\) be a simplex with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) , and let \({A}_{1},\ldots ,{A}_{d}\) be closed sets such that for all \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) the face \({F}_{I} = \operatorname{conv}\left\{  {{v}^{i} \mid  i \in  I}\right\}\) of \(S\) is a subset of \(\mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) . Then \(\mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i} \neq  \varnothing\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.12(KKM引理)。设 \(S\) 是一个顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的单纯形，设 \({A}_{1},\ldots ,{A}_{d}\) 是闭集，使得对于所有 \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) ， \(S\) 中以这些顶点构成的面 \({F}_{I} = \operatorname{conv}\left\{  {{v}^{i} \mid  i \in  I}\right\}\) 是相应闭集 \(\mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) 的子集。那么 \(\mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i} \neq  \varnothing\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(\varepsilon  > 0\) , and consider a triangulation \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) of \(S\) so that for any sub-simplex \(T\) in \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) and any \(x,y \in  T\) we have \(\parallel x - y\parallel  \leq  \varepsilon\) ; we will show in Section 7.7 that such an \(\varepsilon\) -fine triangulation exists for any \(\varepsilon  > 0\) . For any vertex \(x\) in \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) , let \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) be inclusion-minimal so that \(x \in  {F}_{I}\) . By assumption, \({F}_{I} \subseteq  \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) and therefore \(x \in  {A}_{i}\) for some \(i \in  I\) , where we choose \(i\) as a label of \(x\) . By construction, this is a Sperner labeling. According to Sperner's lemma (Theorem 7.10), there is a completely labeled sub-simplex in \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) with vertices \({w}_{\varepsilon }^{1},\ldots ,{w}_{\varepsilon }^{d}\) so that \({w}_{\varepsilon }^{i}\) has label \(i\) and therefore belongs to \({A}_{i}\) for \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(\varepsilon  > 0\) ，并考虑 \(S\) 的一个三角剖分 \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) ，使得对于 \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) 中的任何子单纯形 \(T\) 和任何 \(x,y \in  T\) ，我们有 \(\parallel x - y\parallel  \leq  \varepsilon\) ；我们将在 7.7 节中证明，对于任何 \(\varepsilon  > 0\) ，这样的 \(\varepsilon\) - 精细三角剖分是存在的。对于 \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) 中的任何顶点 \(x\) ，设 \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 是包含关系下的极小元，使得 \(x \in  {F}_{I}\) 。根据假设， \({F}_{I} \subseteq  \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) ，因此对于某个 \(i \in  I\) ，有 \(x \in  {A}_{i}\) ，我们选择 \(i\) 作为 \(x\) 的标签。根据构造，这是一个斯佩纳标号。根据斯佩纳引理(定理 7.10)， \({\sum }_{\varepsilon }\) 中存在一个完全标记的子单纯形，其顶点为 \({w}_{\varepsilon }^{1},\ldots ,{w}_{\varepsilon }^{d}\) ，使得 \({w}_{\varepsilon }^{i}\) 具有标签 \(i\) ，因此对于 \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) ，它属于 \({A}_{i}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Background material: Every bounded sequence has a converging subsequence

\begin{tcolorbox}
背景材料:每个有界序列都有一个收敛子序列
\end{tcolorbox}

The theorem of Bolzano-Weierstrass states: Let \({x}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) be a bounded sequence of points in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , that is, there is some \(M\) so that \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x}^{\left( n\right) }\end{Vmatrix} \leq  M\) for all \(n\) . Then this sequence has a converging subsequence.

\begin{tcolorbox}
波尔查诺 - 魏尔斯特拉斯定理指出:设 \({x}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的一个有界点列，即存在某个 \(M\) ，使得对于所有的 \(n\) ，都有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x}^{\left( n\right) }\end{Vmatrix} \leq  M\) 。那么这个序列有一个收敛子序列。
\end{tcolorbox}

This important theorem has a nice proof that we recall here. We first consider a bounded sequence of real numbers \({y}^{\left( 1\right) },{y}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) where \(\left| {y}^{\left( n\right) }\right|  \leq  M\) for all \(n\) . We show that this sequence has a monotonic subsequence \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },\ldots\) , that is, either \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \geq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \geq  \cdots\) or \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  \cdots\) holds. Imagine the real numbers \({y}^{\left( 1\right) },{y}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) as the heights of "hotels at the seaside". From the top of each hotel with height \({y}^{\left( k\right) }\) you can look beyond the subsequent hotels with heights \({y}^{\left( k + 1\right) },{y}^{\left( k + 2\right) },\ldots\) as long as they have lower height, and see the sea at infinity if these are all lower. In other words, a hotel has "seaview" if it belongs to the set \(K = \left\{  {k \mid  {y}^{\left( k\right) } > {y}^{\left( j\right) }\text{ for all }j > k}\right\}\) (presumably, these are very expensive hotels). If \(K\) is infinite, then we take the elements of \(K\) in ascending order as the superscripts \({k}_{1},{k}_{2},{k}_{3},\ldots\) that give our subsequence \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) },\ldots\) , which is clearly decreasing. If, however, \(K\) is finite with maximal element \(m\) (take \(m = 0\) if \(K\) is empty), then for each \(k > m\) we have \(k \notin  K\) and hence there exists some \(j > k\) with \({y}^{\left( k\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( j\right) }\) . Starting with \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) }\) for \({k}_{1} = m + 1\) we let \({k}_{2} > {k}_{1}\) with \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) }\) . Then find another \({k}_{3} > {k}_{2}\) so that \({y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) }\) , and so on, which gives a weakly increasing subsequence \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) } \leq  \cdots\) . In either case, the original sequence has a monotonic subsequence.

\begin{tcolorbox}
这个重要的定理有一个很好的证明，我们在此回顾一下。我们首先考虑一个有界的实数序列 \({y}^{\left( 1\right) },{y}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) ，其中对于所有的 \(n\) 都有 \(\left| {y}^{\left( n\right) }\right|  \leq  M\) 。我们证明这个序列有一个单调子序列 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },\ldots\) ，即要么 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \geq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \geq  \cdots\) 成立，要么 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  \cdots\) 成立。把实数 \({y}^{\left( 1\right) },{y}^{\left( 2\right) },\ldots\) 想象成“海边酒店”的高度。从每个高度为 \({y}^{\left( k\right) }\) 的酒店顶部，只要后续高度为 \({y}^{\left( k + 1\right) },{y}^{\left( k + 2\right) },\ldots\) 的酒店高度更低，你就可以看到它们之外的景色，如果这些酒店的高度都更低，你还能看到无穷远处的大海。换句话说，如果一家酒店属于集合 \(K = \left\{  {k \mid  {y}^{\left( k\right) } > {y}^{\left( j\right) }\text{ for all }j > k}\right\}\) ，那么它就有“海景”(想必，这些都是非常昂贵的酒店)。如果 \(K\) 是无限集，那么我们按升序取 \(K\) 中的元素作为下标 \({k}_{1},{k}_{2},{k}_{3},\ldots\) ，从而得到我们的子序列 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) },\ldots\) ，它显然是递减的。然而，如果 \(K\) 是有限集，其最大元素为 \(m\) (如果 \(K\) 为空集，则取 \(m = 0\) )，那么对于每个 \(k > m\) ，我们有 \(k \notin  K\) ，因此存在某个 \(j > k\) 使得 \({y}^{\left( k\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( j\right) }\) 。从 \({k}_{1} = m + 1\) 对应的 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) }\) 开始，我们令 \({k}_{2} > {k}_{1}\) 且 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) }\) 。然后找到另一个 \({k}_{3} > {k}_{2}\) 使得 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) }\) ，依此类推，这样就得到一个弱递增子序列 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) } \leq  {y}^{\left( {k}_{3}\right) } \leq  \cdots\) 。无论哪种情况，原序列都有一个单调子序列。
\end{tcolorbox}

This monotonic subsequence \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },\ldots\) is bounded because the original sequence is bounded. It is easy to show that the subsequence converges to the infimum of its members if it is decreasing, or to the supremum if it is weakly increasing. This shows the Bolzano-Weierstrass theorem for a sequence of real numbers in \({\mathbb{R}}^{1}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这个单调子序列 \({y}^{\left( {k}_{1}\right) },{y}^{\left( {k}_{2}\right) },\ldots\) 是有界的，因为原序列是有界的。很容易证明，如果该子序列是递减的，它收敛于其元素的下确界；如果它是弱递增的，则收敛于其上确界。这就证明了实数序列在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{1}\) 中的波尔查诺 - 魏尔施特拉斯定理(Bolzano - Weierstrass theorem)。
\end{tcolorbox}

To show the theorem for a sequence of points \({x}^{\left( n\right) } = \left( {{x}_{1}^{\left( n\right) },\ldots ,{x}_{d}^{\left( n\right) }}\right)\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) for \(n = 1,2,3,\ldots\) , note that the components \({x}_{i}^{\left( n\right) }\) for \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) of these points are bounded because \(\left| {x}_{i}^{\left( n\right) }\right|  \leq  \begin{Vmatrix}{x}^{\left( n\right) }\end{Vmatrix} \leq  M\) . First, find a converging subsequence of the first components \({x}_{1}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}_{1}^{\left( 2\right) },{x}_{1}^{\left( 3\right) },\ldots\) with limit \({z}_{1}\) , say. For ease of notation, replace the original sequence of points with this subsequence, which now converges in its first component. Second, find a subsequence so that the second components \({x}_{2}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}_{2}^{\left( 2\right) },{x}_{2}^{\left( 3\right) },\ldots\) have limit \({z}_{2}\) , so that now both the first and second components converge. By continuing in this manner, we obtain a subsequence with limit \(\left( {{z}_{1},{z}_{2},\ldots ,{z}_{d}}\right)\) , which completes the proof.

\begin{tcolorbox}
为了证明该定理对于 \(n = 1,2,3,\ldots\) 时 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的点列 \({x}^{\left( n\right) } = \left( {{x}_{1}^{\left( n\right) },\ldots ,{x}_{d}^{\left( n\right) }}\right)\) 成立，注意到这些点的 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) 对应的分量 \({x}_{i}^{\left( n\right) }\) 是有界的，因为 \(\left| {x}_{i}^{\left( n\right) }\right|  \leq  \begin{Vmatrix}{x}^{\left( n\right) }\end{Vmatrix} \leq  M\) 。首先，找出第一个分量 \({x}_{1}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}_{1}^{\left( 2\right) },{x}_{1}^{\left( 3\right) },\ldots\) 的一个收敛子列，设其极限为 \({z}_{1}\) 。为了方便表示，用这个子列替换原来的点列，此时该子列的第一个分量收敛。其次，找出一个子列，使得第二个分量 \({x}_{2}^{\left( 1\right) },{x}_{2}^{\left( 2\right) },{x}_{2}^{\left( 3\right) },\ldots\) 有极限 \({z}_{2}\) ，这样一来，第一个和第二个分量都收敛。按照这种方式继续下去，我们得到一个极限为 \(\left( {{z}_{1},{z}_{2},\ldots ,{z}_{d}}\right)\) 的子列，从而完成了证明。
\end{tcolorbox}

Consider a sequence of positive reals \(\varepsilon \left( 1\right) ,\varepsilon \left( 2\right) ,\ldots\) that tends to 0 (for example, \(\varepsilon \left( n\right)  = \frac{1}{n}\) ), an \(\varepsilon \left( n\right)\) -fine triangulation \({\sum }_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }\) of \(S\) , and the corresponding sequence of points \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( 1\right) }^{1},{w}_{\varepsilon \left( 2\right) }^{1},\ldots\) in the simplex \(S\) that have label 1 considered earlier. Because

\begin{tcolorbox}
考虑一个趋于 0 的正实数序列 \(\varepsilon \left( 1\right) ,\varepsilon \left( 2\right) ,\ldots\) (例如， \(\varepsilon \left( n\right)  = \frac{1}{n}\) )， \(S\) 的一个 \(\varepsilon \left( n\right)\) - 精细三角剖分 \({\sum }_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }\) ，以及前面所考虑的单纯形 \(S\) 中标签为 1 的对应点列 \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( 1\right) }^{1},{w}_{\varepsilon \left( 2\right) }^{1},\ldots\) 。因为
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_200_198_208_1251_980_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.11 Illustration of the assumptions of the KKM lemma for \(d = 3\) , for the sets \(I = \{ 1,2\} ,\{ 1,3\} ,\{ 2,3\}\) , and \(\{ 1,2,3\}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.11 展示了对于 \(d = 3\) 、集合 \(I = \{ 1,2\} ,\{ 1,3\} ,\{ 2,3\}\) 和 \(\{ 1,2,3\}\) 的 KKM 引理的假设。
\end{tcolorbox}

\(S\) is bounded and closed, this sequence of points has a converging subsequence with limit \(z\) in \(S\) . For all \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) , we have \(\begin{Vmatrix}{{w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{1} - {w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i}}\end{Vmatrix} \leq  \varepsilon \left( n\right)\) , so that the points \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i}\) in that subsequence with label \(i\) also converge to \(z\) as \(n \rightarrow  \infty\) , where \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i} \in  {A}_{i}\) . Because \({A}_{i}\) is closed, \(z \in  {A}_{i}\) . Therefore, the intersection \(\mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i}\) contains \(z\) and is not empty, as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
由于 \(S\) 是有界闭集，这个点列有一个收敛子列，其极限 \(z\) 属于 \(S\) 。对于所有的 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) ，我们有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{{w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{1} - {w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i}}\end{Vmatrix} \leq  \varepsilon \left( n\right)\) ，使得该子列中标签为 \(i\) 的点 \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i}\) 当 \(n \rightarrow  \infty\) 时也收敛到 \(z\) ，其中 \({w}_{\varepsilon \left( n\right) }^{i} \in  {A}_{i}\) 。因为 \({A}_{i}\) 是闭集，所以 \(z \in  {A}_{i}\) 。因此，交集 \(\mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i}\) 包含 \(z\) 且非空，正如所声称的那样。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following theorem is an immediate consequence of the KKM lemma, applied to the unit simplex \(\Delta\) . The closed sets \({A}_{i}\) are those points \(x\) in \(\Delta\) that have label \(i\) according to our original definition (7.2).

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下定理是将 KKM 引理应用于单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 的直接结果。闭集 \({A}_{i}\) 是根据我们最初的定义(7.2)在 \(\Delta\) 中标签为 \(i\) 的那些点 \(x\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.13 (Brouwer's fixed-theorem on the unit simplex). A continuous function \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) on the(d - 1)-dimensional unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1) has a fixed point.

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.13(单位单纯形上的布劳威尔不动点定理)。式(7.1)中 (d - 1) 维度的单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 上的连续函数 \(f : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 有一个不动点。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. For \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) , let \({A}_{i} = \left\{  {x \in  \Delta  \mid  {x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right) }\right\}\) . Then \({A}_{i}\) is a closed set because \(f\) and hence \({f}_{i}\) is continuous. Let \(x \in  \Delta\) and \(I = \left\{  {i \mid  {x}_{i} > 0}\right\}\) . Because the vertices of \(\Delta\) are the unit vectors, the face \({F}_{I}\) in Theorem 7.12 is the smallest facet of \(\Delta\) that contains \(x\) . As shown in Lemma 7.9, there is some \(i\) so that \({x}_{i} > 0\) and \(x \in  {A}_{i}\) . Because \(x\) is arbitrary, this shows \({F}_{I} \subseteq  \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) for any \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) . By Theorem 7.12, there is some \(z \in  \mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i}\) , where \(f\left( z\right)  = z\) by Lemma 7.1.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。对于 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) ，设 \({A}_{i} = \left\{  {x \in  \Delta  \mid  {x}_{i} \geq  {f}_{i}\left( x\right) }\right\}\) 。那么 \({A}_{i}\) 是一个闭集，因为 \(f\) ，因此 \({f}_{i}\) 是连续的。设 \(x \in  \Delta\) 且 \(I = \left\{  {i \mid  {x}_{i} > 0}\right\}\) 。因为 \(\Delta\) 的顶点是单位向量，定理7.12中的面 \({F}_{I}\) 是 \(\Delta\) 中包含 \(x\) 的最小极面。如引理7.9所示，存在某个 \(i\) 使得 \({x}_{i} > 0\) 且 \(x \in  {A}_{i}\) 。由于 \(x\) 是任意的，这表明对于任意 \(I \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 有 \({F}_{I} \subseteq  \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i \in  I}}{A}_{i}\) 。根据定理7.12，存在某个 \(z \in  \mathop{\bigcap }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{A}_{i}\) ，根据引理7.1有 \(f\left( z\right)  = z\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.6 Brouwer's Fixed-Point Theorem on a General Compact Convex Set}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.6 一般紧致凸集上的布劳威尔不动点定理}
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.13 states that a continuous function on the unit simplex \(\Delta\) has a fixed point. In this section, we prove this for a continuous function \(f\) on a compact convex set \(C\) that is a subset of some \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) , which is the general form of Brouwer’s fixed-point theorem. The first step is to embed \(C\) into \(\Delta\) with a bijective linear map. Assuming that \(C\) is a subset of \(\Delta\) , the second step is to construct a continuous function \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  C\) so that \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) for \(x \in  C\) . Then the continuous function \(h : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) defined by \(h\left( x\right)  = f\left( {p\left( x\right) }\right)\) for \(x \in  \Delta\) has a fixed point, which is easily seen to be a fixed point of the given function \(f : C \rightarrow  C\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.13表明单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 上的连续函数有一个不动点。在本节中，我们证明对于某个 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) 的子集——紧致凸集 \(C\) 上的连续函数 \(f\) 也成立，这是布劳威尔不动点定理的一般形式。第一步是通过一个双射线性映射将 \(C\) 嵌入到 \(\Delta\) 中。假设 \(C\) 是 \(\Delta\) 的一个子集，第二步是构造一个连续函数 \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  C\) 使得对于 \(x \in  C\) 有 \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) 。那么由对于 \(x \in  \Delta\) 定义为 \(h\left( x\right)  = f\left( {p\left( x\right) }\right)\) 的连续函数 \(h : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta\) 有一个不动点，容易看出这个不动点也是给定函数 \(f : C \rightarrow  C\) 的不动点。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following lemma is about the embedding of \(C\) into \(\Delta\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下引理是关于将 \(C\) 嵌入到 \(\Delta\) 中的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.14. Let \(C \subset  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) and let \(C\) be a compact and convex set of dimension \(d - 1\) . Then there is an injective affine map \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) from \(C\) to the(d - 1)-dimensional unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1).

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.14。设 \(C \subset  {\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) ，且设 \(C\) 是一个维度为 \(d - 1\) 的紧致凸集。那么存在一个从 \(C\) 到式(7.1)中 (d - 1) 维度单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 的单射仿射映射 \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Because \(C\) has dimension \(d - 1\) , it has \(d\) , but no more, affinely independent points \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d}\) . If \(d = 1\) then \(C\) is just a point, so we can assume \(d > 1\) . By Lemma 7.2, each point \(x \in  C\) is the affine combination \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) where this equation and the equation \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{\lambda }_{i} = 1\) uniquely determine the coefficients \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) . Hence, these coefficients are defined by a linear map from \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) (which contains \(C\) ) to \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and therefore depend continuously on \(x\) . Their minimum \(\mathop{\min }\limits_{{1 \leq  i \leq  d}}{\lambda }_{i}\) is a continuous function of \(x\) and therefore assumes its minimum \(M\) on the compact set \(C\) , that is,

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。因为 \(C\) 的维度为 \(d - 1\) ，所以它有 \(d\) 个(但不会更多)仿射无关的点 \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d}\) 。如果 \(d = 1\) ，那么 \(C\) 只是一个点，因此我们可以假设 \(d > 1\) 。根据引理7.2，每个点 \(x \in  C\) 都是仿射组合 \(x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i}\) ，其中这个方程以及方程 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{\lambda }_{i} = 1\) 唯一地确定了系数 \({\lambda }_{1},\ldots ,{\lambda }_{d}\) 。因此，这些系数由一个从 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) (包含 \(C\) )到 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的线性映射定义，所以它们连续依赖于 \(x\) 。它们的最小值 \(\mathop{\min }\limits_{{1 \leq  i \leq  d}}{\lambda }_{i}\) 是 \(x\) 的连续函数，因此在紧集 \(C\) 上取得其最小值 \(M\) ，即
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i},\;\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{\lambda }_{i} = 1\; \Rightarrow  \;{\lambda }_{i} \geq  M\;\left( {x \in  C,1 \leq  i \leq  d}\right) . \tag{7.14}
\]

For \(x = {w}^{2}\) we have \({\lambda }_{1} = 0\) , so \(M \leq  0\) . Let \(w = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{d}\) be the barycenter of the points \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d}\) . Our aim is to "stretch" the points \({w}^{i}\) to new points \({v}^{i}\) (typically outside of \(C\) ) "away from \({w}^{\prime \prime }\) so that every \(x \in  C\) is a convex and not just affine combination of \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) . For some yet to be determined \(\alpha  > 0\) , let

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(x = {w}^{2}\) ，我们有 \({\lambda }_{1} = 0\) ，所以 \(M \leq  0\) 。设 \(w = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}\frac{1}{d}\) 为点 \({w}^{1},\ldots ,{w}^{d}\) 的重心。我们的目标是将点 \({w}^{i}\) “拉伸” 为新的点 \({v}^{i}\) (通常在 \(C\) 之外)，“远离 \({w}^{\prime \prime }\) ”，使得每个 \(x \in  C\) 是 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的凸组合，而不仅仅是仿射组合。对于某个有待确定的 \(\alpha  > 0\) ，设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{v}^{i} = w + \left( {{w}^{i} - w}\right) \alpha \;\left( {1 \leq  i \leq  d}\right)
\]

and therefore

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{w}^{i} = w + \left( {{v}^{i} - w}\right) \frac{1}{\alpha } = w\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {v}^{i}\frac{1}{\alpha }.
\]

Then \(w\) is also the barycenter of the points \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) because

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么 \(w\) 也是点 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的重心，因为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{v}^{i}\frac{1}{d} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}\left( {w + \left( {{w}^{i} - w}\right) \alpha }\right) \frac{1}{d} = w.
\]

Hence, for \(x \in  C\) we have

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，对于 \(x \in  C\) ，我们有
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
x = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{w}^{i}{\lambda }_{i} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}\left( {w\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {v}^{i}\frac{1}{\alpha }}\right) {\lambda }_{i} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}{v}_{i}\left( {\frac{1}{d}\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {\lambda }_{i}\frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  \tag{7.15}
\]

where we want to achieve that for \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) ,

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中我们希望对于 \(1 \leq  i \leq  d\) 能满足
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\frac{1}{d}\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {\lambda }_{i}\frac{1}{\alpha } \geq  0 \tag{7.16}
\]

which holds if \({\lambda }_{i} \geq  \frac{1 - \alpha }{d}\) and therefore if \(M \geq  \frac{1 - \alpha }{d}\) because of (7.14). For this purpose, it suffices to choose \(\alpha  = 1 - {Md}\) (note that \(M \leq  0\) ). In addition, \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}\left( {\frac{1}{d}\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {\lambda }_{i}\frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  = 1\) , so (7.16) and (7.15) imply that \(C\) is a subset of the simplex \(T\) with vertices \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) . By Lemma 7.3, there is an affine bijection \(T \rightarrow  \Delta\) , which restricted to \(C\) gives the desired affine injection \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \({\lambda }_{i} \geq  \frac{1 - \alpha }{d}\) 成立，那么该式成立，并且由于(7.14)，如果 \(M \geq  \frac{1 - \alpha }{d}\) 成立则该式也成立。为此，选择 \(\alpha  = 1 - {Md}\) 就足够了(注意 \(M \leq  0\) )。此外， \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{d}\left( {\frac{1}{d}\left( {1 - \frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  + {\lambda }_{i}\frac{1}{\alpha }}\right)  = 1\) ，所以(7.16)和(7.15)意味着 \(C\) 是顶点为 \({v}^{1},\ldots ,{v}^{d}\) 的单纯形 \(T\) 的子集。根据引理7.3，存在一个仿射双射 \(T \rightarrow  \Delta\) ，它在 \(C\) 上的限制给出了所需的仿射单射 \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Let \(C\) be a compact convex set and let \(D = J\left( C\right)\) be the image of \(C\) under the affine injection \(J\) in Lemma 7.14. The set \(D\) is a closed convex subset of \(\Delta\) . Next, we construct a continuous function \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  D\) that restricted to \(D\) is the identity, that is, \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) for \(x \in  D\) . The following function \(p\) is easiest to use.

\begin{tcolorbox}
设 \(C\) 是一个紧凸集，设 \(D = J\left( C\right)\) 是 \(C\) 在引理7.14中的仿射单射 \(J\) 下的像。集合 \(D\) 是 \(\Delta\) 的一个闭凸子集。接下来，我们构造一个连续函数 \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  D\) ，它在 \(D\) 上的限制是恒等映射，即对于 \(x \in  D\) 有 \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) 。下面的函数 \(p\) 是最容易使用的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Let \(D\) be any nonempty closed convex subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . The projection onto \(D\) is the function \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) defined for \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) by

\begin{tcolorbox}
设 \(D\) 为 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的任意非空闭凸子集。到 \(D\) 上的投影是为 \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 定义的函数 \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) ，其定义如下
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
p\left( x\right)  = \arg \mathop{\min }\limits_{{z \in  D}}\parallel x - z\parallel . \tag{7.17}
\]

Condition (7.17) means that \(p\left( x\right)\) is the point \(z\) in \(D\) that is closest in Euclidean distance to \(x\) , where clearly \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) if \(x \in  D\) . Because \(D\) is nonempty and closed and the distance is bounded from below by zero, such a closest point in \(D\) exists. We will shortly see that this point is also unique, so that \(p\left( x\right)\) is well defined. We will then show that \(p\) is a continuous function. We first need some properties of the Euclidean norm.

\begin{tcolorbox}
条件 (7.17) 意味着 \(p\left( x\right)\) 是 \(D\) 中与 \(x\) 的欧几里得距离 (Euclidean distance) 最近的点 \(z\) ，显然，如果 \(x \in  D\) ，则 \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) 。因为 \(D\) 是非空且闭的，并且距离有下界零，所以 \(D\) 中存在这样一个最近的点。我们很快会看到这个点也是唯一的，因此 \(p\left( x\right)\) 是良定义的。然后我们将证明 \(p\) 是一个连续函数。我们首先需要一些欧几里得范数 (Euclidean norm) 的性质。
\end{tcolorbox}

General vectors \(a,b \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) are called orthogonal if \({a}^{\top }b = 0\) . (This includes the case that \(a\) or \(b\) is the zero vector, which is always covered in the following observations, typically in some trivial way.) Then the triangle with corners \(a,\mathbf{0},b\) has a right angle at0, and the theorem of Pythagoras applies,

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \({a}^{\top }b = 0\) ，则称一般向量 \(a,b \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 是正交的 (orthogonal)。(这包括 \(a\) 或 \(b\) 是零向量的情况，在以下的讨论中通常会以某种平凡的方式涵盖这种情况。)那么，以 \(a,\mathbf{0},b\) 为顶点的三角形在 0 处有一个直角，勾股定理适用
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{a}^{\top }b = 0\; \Leftrightarrow  \;\parallel a - b{\parallel }^{2} = \parallel a{\parallel }^{2} + \parallel b{\parallel }^{2},
\]

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.2\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_202_1161_1754_270_162_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

which holds because for any \(a,b\) we have \({b}^{\top }a = {a}^{\top }b \in  \mathbb{R}\) and

\begin{tcolorbox}
这是因为对于任意 \(a,b\) ，我们有 \({b}^{\top }a = {a}^{\top }b \in  \mathbb{R}\) 且
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\parallel a - b{\parallel }^{2} = {\left( a - b\right) }^{\top }\left( {a - b}\right)  = {a}^{\top }a - {a}^{\top }b - {b}^{\top }a + {b}^{\top }b = \parallel a{\parallel }^{2} - 2{a}^{\top }b + \parallel b{\parallel }^{2}. \tag{7.18}
\]

Hence,

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{a}^{\top }b = 0\; \Rightarrow  \;\parallel a - b\parallel  \geq  \parallel a\parallel ,\;\parallel a - b\parallel  \geq  \parallel b\parallel . \tag{7.19}
\]

The following lemma is concerned with the distance of a point \(x\) to the points on a ray (or halfline) with endpoint \(c\) through some other point \(b\) , given by the set \(\{ c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda  \mid  \lambda  \geq  0\}\) . As shown in Figure 7.12, this depends on the sign of \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)\) , which indicates the angle between the vectors \(x - c\) and \(b - c\) ; the angle is acute if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) , obtuse if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  < 0\) , and a right angle if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) . Exactly in the latter two cases the closest point to \(x\) on the ray is its endpoint \(c\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下引理涉及点 \(x\) 到由端点 \(c\) 经过另一点 \(b\) 所确定的射线 (ray 或 halfline) 上的点的距离，该射线由集合 \(\{ c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda  \mid  \lambda  \geq  0\}\) 给出。如图 7.12 所示，这取决于 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)\) 的符号，它表示向量 \(x - c\) 和 \(b - c\) 之间的角 (angle)；如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) ，则该角为锐角；如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  < 0\) ，则为钝角；如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) ，则为直角。恰好在后两种情况下，射线上距离 \(x\) 最近的点是其端点 \(c\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_203_342_703_1252_270_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.12 Illustration of Lemma 7.15 (a) (left) and (b) (center and right).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.12 引理 7.15 (a)(左)和 (b)(中、右)的图示。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.15. Let \(x,b,c \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) with \(b \neq  c\) , and \({z}_{\lambda } = c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda\) for \(\lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\) . Then

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 7.15。设 \(x,b,c \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 满足 \(b \neq  c\) ，且对于 \(\lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\) 有 \({z}_{\lambda } = c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda\) 。则
\end{tcolorbox}

(a) \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0 \Leftrightarrow  \begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} < \parallel x - c\parallel\) for all sufficiently small

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 对于所有足够小的
\end{tcolorbox}

positive \(\lambda\) ,

\begin{tcolorbox}
正的 \(\lambda\) ，
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0 \Leftrightarrow  \begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) for all \(\lambda  > 0\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 对于所有 \(\lambda  > 0\) ，有 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0 \Leftrightarrow  \begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. By (7.18),

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。由 (7.18)，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{\begin{Vmatrix}x - {z}_{\lambda }\end{Vmatrix}}^{2} = {\left( x - {z}_{\lambda }\right) }^{\top }\left( {x - {z}_{\lambda }}\right)
\]

\[
= {\left( x - c - \left( b - c\right) \lambda \right) }^{\top }\left( {x - c - \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda }\right)
\]

\[
= \parallel x - c{\parallel }^{2} - 2{\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right) \lambda  + \parallel b - c{\parallel }^{2}{\lambda }^{2}
\]

\[
= \parallel x - c{\parallel }^{2} - \left( {2{\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  - \parallel b - c{\parallel }^{2}\lambda }\right) \lambda .
\]

Hence, if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) , then \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} < \parallel x - c\parallel\) for sufficiently small positive \(\lambda\) , and if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) , then \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) for all \(\lambda  > 0\) . This shows " \(\Rightarrow\) " in (a) and (b). To show the converse implication " \(\Leftarrow\) " in (a), \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} < \parallel x - c\parallel\) for some \(\lambda  > 0\) and \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) would contradict " \(\Rightarrow\) " in (b). Similarly, " \(\Leftarrow\) " in (b) holds because \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) for some sufficiently small \(\lambda  > 0\) and \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) contradicts " \(\Rightarrow\) " in (a).

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) ，那么对于足够小的正 \(\lambda\) 有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} < \parallel x - c\parallel\) ；如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) ，那么对于所有 \(\lambda  > 0\) 有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) 。这表明了 (a) 和 (b) 中的 “ \(\Rightarrow\) ”。为了证明 (a) 中的反向蕴含关系 “ \(\Leftarrow\) ”，对于某个 \(\lambda  > 0\) 有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} < \parallel x - c\parallel\) 且 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) 会与 (b) 中的 “ \(\Rightarrow\) ” 矛盾。类似地，(b) 中的 “ \(\Leftarrow\) ” 成立，因为对于某个足够小的 \(\lambda  > 0\) 有 \(\begin{Vmatrix}{x - {z}_{\lambda }}\end{Vmatrix} > \parallel x - c\parallel\) 且 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) 与 (a) 中的 “ \(\Rightarrow\) ” 矛盾。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 7.15 implies that for a nonempty closed convex set \(D\) , the point \(c\) in \(D\) that is closest to \(x\) is unique, so that \(p\left( x\right)  = c\) in (7.17) is well defined: Namely, if \(b\) is any other point in \(D\) and \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) , then by Lemma 7.15(a) there is a point \({z}_{\lambda }\) that is closer to \(x\) than \(c\) , where for \(0 < \lambda  \leq  1\) this point belongs to \(D\) because \(D\) is convex, so \(c\) is not the closest point to \(x\) in \(D\) , a contradiction; and if \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) , then Lemma 7.15(b) with \(\lambda  = 1\) (and thus \({z}_{\lambda } = b\) ) shows that \(b\) has greater distance \(\parallel x - b\parallel\) from \(x\) than \(c\) . Moreover, we have shown the following.

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 7.15 表明，对于非空闭凸集 \(D\) ， \(D\) 中距离 \(x\) 最近的点 \(c\) 是唯一的，因此 (7.17) 中的 \(p\left( x\right)  = c\) 是良定义的:即，如果 \(b\) 是 \(D\) 中的任意其他点且 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) ，那么根据引理 7.15(a) ，存在一个点 \({z}_{\lambda }\) ，它比 \(c\) 更接近 \(x\) ，其中对于 \(0 < \lambda  \leq  1\) ，这个点属于 \(D\) ，因为 \(D\) 是凸集，所以 \(c\) 不是 \(D\) 中距离 \(x\) 最近的点，这是一个矛盾；如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) ，那么结合 \(\lambda  = 1\) (从而 \({z}_{\lambda } = b\) )应用引理 7.15(b) 表明， \(b\) 到 \(x\) 的距离 \(\parallel x - b\parallel\) 比 \(c\) 到 \(x\) 的距离更大。此外，我们已经证明了以下内容。
\end{tcolorbox}

Corollary 7.16. Let \(D\) be a nonempty closed convex subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and let \(c = p\left( x\right)\) be the projection of \(x\) onto \(D\) . Then \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) for all \(b \in  D\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
推论 7.16。设 \(D\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的非空闭凸子集， \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) ，并且设 \(c = p\left( x\right)\) 是 \(x\) 在 \(D\) 上的投影。那么对于所有 \(b \in  D\) 有 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_204_204_604_741_382_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.13 For \(x \notin  D\) in Corollary 7.16, the hyperplane \(H\) with normal vector \(v = x - c\) and \(\alpha  = {\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }c\) separates \(x\) from \(D\) . (The set \(D\) can be unbounded.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 7.13 对于推论 7.16 中的 \(x \notin  D\) ，具有法向量 \(v = x - c\) 且 \(\alpha  = {\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }c\) 的超平面 \(H\) 将 \(x\) 与 \(D\) 分隔开。(集合 \(D\) 可以是无界的。)
\end{tcolorbox}

Corollary 7.16 is also known as the theorem of the separating hyperplane. A hyperplane \(H\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) is defined as \(H = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z = \alpha }\right\}\) for a nonzero normal vector \(v\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and a real number \(\alpha\) . The corresponding halfspace is defined as \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha }\right\}\) . Suppose that in Corollary 7.16 we have \(x \notin  D\) and therefore \(x \neq  c\) and \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {x - c}\right)  = \parallel x - c{\parallel }^{2} > 0\) . With \(v = x - c\) and \(\alpha  = {\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }c\) the corollary states that \(D\) is a subset of the halfspace defined by \(H\) , whereas \(x\) is clearly not in the halfspace and therefore "separated" from \(D\) by \(H\) . See also Figure 7.13. The separating hyperplane theorem is a very useful tool, but one has to ensure that its assumptions hold, in particular that the set \(D\) is closed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
推论7.16也被称为分离超平面定理。在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的一个超平面 \(H\) 定义为 \(H = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z = \alpha }\right\}\) ，其中 \(v\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的非零法向量， \(\alpha\) 是实数。相应的半空间定义为 \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha }\right\}\) 。假设在推论7.16中我们有 \(x \notin  D\) ，因此 \(x \neq  c\) 和 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {x - c}\right)  = \parallel x - c{\parallel }^{2} > 0\) 。对于 \(v = x - c\) 和 \(\alpha  = {\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }c\) ，该推论表明 \(D\) 是由 \(H\) 定义的半空间的一个子集，而 \(x\) 显然不在这个半空间中，因此被 \(H\) 从 \(D\) 中“分离”出来。另见 图7.13。分离超平面定理是一个非常有用的工具，但必须确保其假设成立，特别是集合 \(D\) 是闭集。
\end{tcolorbox}

A second easy consequence of Lemma 7.15 is that the shortest connecting line segment of a point \(x\) to a line \(L\) is orthogonal to that line.

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.15的第二个简单推论是，点 \(x\) 到直线 \(L\) 的最短连接线段与该直线正交。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_204_1067_1486_385_202_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Lemma 7.17. Let \(L\) be a line in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , that is, the set of affine combinations of two points in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , let \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , and let \(c = p\left( x\right)\) be the projection of \(x\) onto \(L\) . Then \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) for all \(b \in  L\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理7.17。设 \(L\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的一条直线，即 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中两个点的仿射组合的集合，设 \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) ，并设 \(c = p\left( x\right)\) 是 \(x\) 在 \(L\) 上的投影。那么对于所有 \(b \in  L\) 有 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(b\) be any point on \(L\) other than \(c\) . Then \(L = \{ c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda  \mid  \lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\}\) . If \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) , then \(c\) is not the closest point to \(x\) by Lemma 7.15(a). If \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  < 0\) , let \({b}^{\prime } = c + \left( {b - c}\right) \left( {-1}\right)\) so that \({b}^{\prime } - c =  - \left( {b - c}\right)\) and replace \(b\) by \({b}^{\prime }\) to observe the same, again by Lemma 7.15(a). Hence, \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(b\) 是 \(L\) 上除 \(c\) 之外的任意一点。那么 \(L = \{ c + \left( {b - c}\right) \lambda  \mid  \lambda  \in  \mathbb{R}\}\) 。如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  > 0\) ，那么根据引理7.15(a)， \(c\) 不是到 \(x\) 的最近点。如果 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  < 0\) ，设 \({b}^{\prime } = c + \left( {b - c}\right) \left( {-1}\right)\) 使得 \({b}^{\prime } - c =  - \left( {b - c}\right)\) ，并将 \(b\) 替换为 \({b}^{\prime }\) 来观察同样的情况，同样根据引理7.15(a)。因此，如所声称的那样有 \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  = 0\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Our goal is to show that the projection map \(p\) in (7.17) is continuous. This is a consequence of the following theorem.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们的目标是证明(7.17)中的投影映射 \(p\) 是连续的。这是以下定理的一个推论。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.18. Let \(D\) be a nonempty closed convex subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , and let \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) be the projection onto \(D\) defined in (7.17). Then for all \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\)

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.18。设 \(D\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的一个非空闭凸子集，并设 \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) 是(7.17)中定义的到 \(D\) 上的投影。那么对于所有 \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\parallel p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) \parallel  \leq  \parallel x - y\parallel . \tag{7.20}
\]

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_205_346_450_714_380_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.14 Projections \(r\left( x\right)\) and \(r\left( y\right)\) onto a line \(L\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.14 到直线 \(L\) 上的投影 \(r\left( x\right)\) 和 \(r\left( y\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . We first show the claim when \(D\) is a line \(L\) , that is,

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 。我们首先证明当 \(D\) 是一条直线 \(L\) 时的结论，即
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel  \leq  \parallel x - y\parallel  \tag{7.21}
\]

where \(r\left( x\right)\) and \(r\left( y\right)\) denote the projections of \(x\) and \(y\) onto \(L\) . The claim is apparent from Figure 7.14, where we consider the point \(z = r\left( x\right)  + y - r\left( y\right)\) , so that the points \(z,y,r\left( y\right) ,r\left( x\right)\) form a rectangle where \(\parallel z - y\parallel  = \parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel\) , and the points \(x,z,y\) are three corners of a rectangle whose side length \(\parallel z - y\parallel\) is not longer than the diagonal length \(\parallel x - y\parallel\) . Formally,

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中 \(r\left( x\right)\) 和 \(r\left( y\right)\) 分别表示 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 在 \(L\) 上的投影。这一结论从图7.14中显而易见，在图中我们考虑点 \(z = r\left( x\right)  + y - r\left( y\right)\) ，使得点 \(z,y,r\left( y\right) ,r\left( x\right)\) 构成一个矩形，其中 \(\parallel z - y\parallel  = \parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel\) ，并且点 \(x,z,y\) 是一个矩形的三个顶点，其边长 \(\parallel z - y\parallel\) 不大于对角线长度 \(\parallel x - y\parallel\) 。形式上，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{\left( x - z\right) }^{\top }\left( {y - z}\right)
\]

\[
= {\left( x - r\left( x\right)  - y + r\left( y\right) \right) }^{\top }\left( {r\left( y\right)  - r\left( x\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= {\left( x - r\left( x\right) \right) }^{\top }\left( {r\left( y\right)  - r\left( x\right) }\right)  - {\left( y - r\left( y\right) \right) }^{\top }\left( {r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= 0 - 0
\]

where we use Lemma 7.17 twice, with \(r\left( x\right)\) as the closest point to \(x\) on \(L\) and \(r\left( y\right)\) as the closest point to \(y\) on \(L\) . Then (7.19) implies \(\parallel x - y\parallel  = \parallel x - z - \left( {y - z}\right) \parallel  \geq\)  \(\parallel y - z\parallel  = \parallel y - \left( {r\left( x\right)  + y - r\left( y\right) }\right) \parallel  = \parallel r\left( y\right)  - r\left( x\right) \parallel  = \parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel\) , which shows (7.21).

\begin{tcolorbox}
这里我们两次使用引理7.17，其中 \(r\left( x\right)\) 是 \(L\) 上距离 \(x\) 最近的点， \(r\left( y\right)\) 是 \(L\) 上距离 \(y\) 最近的点。那么(7.19)式意味着 \(\parallel x - y\parallel  = \parallel x - z - \left( {y - z}\right) \parallel  \geq\)  \(\parallel y - z\parallel  = \parallel y - \left( {r\left( x\right)  + y - r\left( y\right) }\right) \parallel  = \parallel r\left( y\right)  - r\left( x\right) \parallel  = \parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel\) ，这就证明了(7.21)式。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_205_343_1754_685_359_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.15 Projections \(p\left( x\right)\) and \(p\left( y\right)\) of \(x\) and \(y\) onto a convex set \(D\) , with the line \(L\) through \(p\left( x\right)\) and \(p\left( y\right)\) . The angle between \(x,p\left( x\right)\) , and \(p\left( y\right)\) cannot be acute, so \(r\left( x\right)\) is to the left of (or equal to) \(p\left( x\right)\) . Similarly, \(r\left( y\right)\) is to the right of (or equal to) \(p\left( y\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.15 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 在凸集 \(D\) 上的投影 \(p\left( x\right)\) 和 \(p\left( y\right)\) ，以及过 \(p\left( x\right)\) 和 \(p\left( y\right)\) 的直线 \(L\) 。 \(x,p\left( x\right)\) 与 \(p\left( y\right)\) 之间的角不可能是锐角，所以 \(r\left( x\right)\) 在 \(p\left( x\right)\) 的左侧(或与之重合)。类似地， \(r\left( y\right)\) 在 \(p\left( y\right)\) 的右侧(或与之重合)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Secondly, consider now a general nonempty closed convex set \(D\) , shown in Figure 7.15 for an example in dimension two. Let \(p\left( x\right)\) and \(p\left( y\right)\) be the projections of \(x\) and \(y\) onto \(D\) , where we can assume \(p\left( x\right)  \neq  p\left( y\right)\) because otherwise (7.20) holds trivially. Let \(L\) be the line through \(p\left( x\right)\) and \(p\left( y\right)\) , and let \(r\left( x\right)\) and \(r\left( y\right)\) be the projections of \(x\) and \(y\) onto \(L\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
其次，现在考虑一个一般的非空闭凸集 \(D\) ，图7.15给出了二维情形下的一个示例。设 \(p\left( x\right)\) 和 \(p\left( y\right)\) 分别是 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 在 \(D\) 上的投影，这里我们可以假设 \(p\left( x\right)  \neq  p\left( y\right)\) ，因为否则(7.20)式显然成立。设 \(L\) 是过 \(p\left( x\right)\) 和 \(p\left( y\right)\) 的直线，设 \(r\left( x\right)\) 和 \(r\left( y\right)\) 分别是 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 在 \(L\) 上的投影。
\end{tcolorbox}

The line segment that connects \(p\left( x\right)\) and \(p\left( y\right)\) is a subset of \(D\) because \(D\) is convex. We show that it is a subset of the line segment that connects \(r\left( x\right)\) and \(r\left( y\right)\) , and therefore at most as long. Let \(c = p\left( x\right)\) and \(b = p\left( y\right)\) . By Corollary 7.16, \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) , that is, the angle at \(c\) shown in Figure 7.15 is a right or obtuse angle. Let \(r\left( x\right)  = p\left( x\right)  + \left( {p\left( y\right)  - p\left( x\right) }\right) \lambda  = {z}_{\lambda }\) . Then \(\lambda  \leq  0\) , because if \(\lambda  > 0\) then Lemma 7.15(b) would imply \(\parallel x - r\left( x\right) \parallel  > \parallel x - p\left( x\right) \parallel\) , which is a contradiction because \(p\left( x\right)  \in  L\) and \(r\left( x\right)\) is the closest point to \(x\) on \(L\) . Similarly, \(r\left( y\right)  = p\left( y\right)  + \left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \mu\) where \(\mu  \leq  0\) . Then

\begin{tcolorbox}
连接 \(p\left( x\right)\) 和 \(p\left( y\right)\) 的线段(line segment)是 \(D\) 的子集，因为 \(D\) 是凸集。我们证明它是连接 \(r\left( x\right)\) 和 \(r\left( y\right)\) 的线段的子集，因此长度至多相同。设 \(c = p\left( x\right)\) 且 \(b = p\left( y\right)\) 。根据推论7.16， \({\left( x - c\right) }^{\top }\left( {b - c}\right)  \leq  0\) ，即图7.15中 \(c\) 处的角(angle)是直角或钝角。设 \(r\left( x\right)  = p\left( x\right)  + \left( {p\left( y\right)  - p\left( x\right) }\right) \lambda  = {z}_{\lambda }\) 。那么 \(\lambda  \leq  0\) ，因为如果 \(\lambda  > 0\) ，则引理7.15(b)将意味着 \(\parallel x - r\left( x\right) \parallel  > \parallel x - p\left( x\right) \parallel\) ，这是矛盾的，因为 \(p\left( x\right)  \in  L\) 且 \(r\left( x\right)\) 是 \(L\) 上距离 \(x\) 最近的点。类似地， \(r\left( y\right)  = p\left( y\right)  + \left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \mu\) ，其中 \(\mu  \leq  0\) 。那么
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\parallel r\left( x\right)  - r\left( y\right) \parallel  = \parallel p\left( x\right)  + \left( {p\left( y\right)  - p\left( x\right) }\right) \lambda  - p\left( y\right)  - \left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \mu \parallel
\]

\[
= \parallel \left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \left( {1 - \lambda  - \mu }\right) \parallel
\]

\[
= \begin{Vmatrix}\left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \end{Vmatrix}\left( {1 - \lambda  - \mu }\right)
\]

\[
\geq  \parallel \left( {p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) }\right) \parallel
\]

because \(\lambda  \leq  0\) and \(\mu  \leq  0\) , which with (7.21) implies (7.20).

\begin{tcolorbox}
因为 \(\lambda  \leq  0\) 和 \(\mu  \leq  0\) ，结合(7.21)可推出(7.20)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.18 states that the projection \(p\) onto \(D\) is "contractive", and therefore indeed continuous:

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.18表明，到 \(p\) 上的投影 \(D\) 是“压缩的”，因此确实是连续的:
\end{tcolorbox}

Corollary 7.19. Let \(D\) be a nonempty closed convex subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . Then the projection map \(p\) of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) onto \(D\) in (7.17) is continuous.

\begin{tcolorbox}
推论7.19。设 \(D\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的一个非空闭凸子集。那么，(7.17) 中从 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 到 \(D\) 的投影映射 \(p\) 是连续的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Continuity of \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) means that for all \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\)

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。 \(p : {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \rightarrow  D\) 的连续性意味着对于所有 \(x,y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\forall \varepsilon  > 0\exists \delta  > 0 : \parallel x - y\parallel  < \delta  \Rightarrow  \parallel p\left( x\right)  - p\left( y\right) \parallel  < \varepsilon .
\]

By Theorem 7.18, it suffices to take \(\delta  = \varepsilon\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
根据定理7.18，取 \(\delta  = \varepsilon\) 就足够了。
\end{tcolorbox}

The convexity of the set \(D\) in Corollary 7.19 is essential. For example, if \(D\) is just a set of two distinct points \(a\) and \(b\) , then the projection \(p\) onto \(D\) is not well defined for points that are equidistant to \(a\) and \(b\) , and at any rate "jumps" from \(a\) to \(b\) near these points. Moreover, the function \(D \rightarrow  D\) that exchanges \(a\) and \(b\) is trivially continuous but has no fixed points, which it would have if \(p\) was continuous, according to the proof of the following theorem. This theorem is Brouwer's fixed-point theorem in full generality.

\begin{tcolorbox}
推论7.19中集合 \(D\) 的凸性是至关重要的。例如，如果 \(D\) 只是由两个不同的点 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 组成的集合，那么对于与 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 等距的点，到 \(D\) 上的投影 \(p\) 是没有明确定义的，并且无论如何，在这些点附近会从 \(a\) “跳跃”到 \(b\) 。此外，交换 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 的函数 \(D \rightarrow  D\) 显然是连续的，但没有不动点。根据以下定理的证明，如果 \(p\) 是连续的，它应该有不动点。这个定理就是一般形式的布劳威尔不动点定理。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 7.20. Let \(C\) be a nonempty compact and convex subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) , and let \(f : C \rightarrow  C\) be continuous. Then \(f\) has a fixed point \(z \in  C\) , that is, \(f\left( z\right)  = z\) . Proof. Suppose \(C\) has dimension \(d - 1\) . By Lemma 7.14, there is an affine injective map \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) with image \(D = J\left( C\right)  = \{ J\left( z\right)  \mid  z \in  C\}  \subseteq  \Delta\) , and its inverse function \({J}^{-1} : D \rightarrow  C\) is a linear bijection. The set \(D\) is compact, and convex because \(J\) preserves convex combinations. Define the function \(g : D \rightarrow  D\) by

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理7.20。设 \(C\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{k}\) 的一个非空紧致凸子集，并且 \(f : C \rightarrow  C\) 是连续的。那么 \(f\) 有一个不动点 \(z \in  C\) ，即 \(f\left( z\right)  = z\) 。证明。假设 \(C\) 的维度为 \(d - 1\) 。根据引理7.14，存在一个仿射单射 \(J : C \rightarrow  \Delta\) ，其像为 \(D = J\left( C\right)  = \{ J\left( z\right)  \mid  z \in  C\}  \subseteq  \Delta\) ，并且它的反函数 \({J}^{-1} : D \rightarrow  C\) 是一个线性双射。集合 \(D\) 是紧致的，并且是凸的，因为 \(J\) 保持凸组合。定义函数 \(g : D \rightarrow  D\) 为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
g\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right)  = J\left( {f\left( z\right) }\right) , \tag{7.22}
\]

which is unambiguous because \(J\) is injective, and which defines \(g\) on all of \(D\) because \(D = J\left( C\right)\) . Then for all \(z \in  C\)

\begin{tcolorbox}
这是明确的，因为 \(J\) 是单射，并且由于 \(D = J\left( C\right)\) ，它在整个 \(D\) 上定义了 \(g\) 。那么对于所有 \(z \in  C\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
f\left( z\right)  = z\; \Leftrightarrow  \;g\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right)  = J\left( z\right)  \tag{7.23}
\]

where " \(\Rightarrow\) " is immediate from (7.22), and " \(\Leftarrow\) " holds because \(g\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right)  = J\left( z\right)\) implies

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中“ \(\Rightarrow\) ” 直接由 (7.22) 得出，而 “ \(\Leftarrow\) ” 成立是因为 \(g\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right)  = J\left( z\right)\) 意味着
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
f\left( z\right)  = {J}^{-1}\left( {J\left( {f\left( z\right) }\right) }\right)  = {J}^{-1}\left( {g\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right) }\right)  = {J}^{-1}\left( {J\left( z\right) }\right)  = z.
\]

Condition (7.23) states that the fixed points of \(f\) are in one-to-one correspondence with the fixed points of \(g\) via the bijection \(J\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
条件 (7.23) 表明， \(f\) 的不动点通过双射 \(J\) 与 \(g\) 的不动点一一对应。
\end{tcolorbox}

Let \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  D\) be the projection map onto \(D\) as defined in (7.17), which is continuous by Corollary 7.19 and fulfills \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) for all \(x \in  D\) . Define the function

\begin{tcolorbox}
设 \(p : \Delta  \rightarrow  D\) 是如 (7.17) 中所定义的到 \(D\) 上的投影映射，根据推论7.19，它是连续的，并且对于所有 \(x \in  D\) 满足 \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) 。定义函数
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
h : \Delta  \rightarrow  \Delta ,\;h\left( x\right)  = g\left( {p\left( x\right) }\right) \;\left( {x \in  \Delta }\right) ,
\]

which is a continuous function on the unit simplex \(\Delta\) because \(p\) and \(g\) are continuous. By Theorem 7.13, \(h\) has a fixed point \(x \in  \Delta\) , that is, \(h\left( x\right)  = g\left( {p\left( x\right) }\right)  = x\) , where \(h\left( x\right)  \in  D\) because \(g\) takes only values in \(D\) , and therefore \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) , which implies \(g\left( x\right)  = x\) . That is, the fixed points of \(h\) are exactly the fixed points of \(g\) . By (7.23), the desired fixed point of \(f\) is given by \(z = {J}^{-1}\left( x\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这是单位单纯形 \(\Delta\) 上的一个连续函数，因为 \(p\) 和 \(g\) 是连续的。根据定理7.13， \(h\) 有一个不动点 \(x \in  \Delta\) ，即 \(h\left( x\right)  = g\left( {p\left( x\right) }\right)  = x\) ，其中 \(h\left( x\right)  \in  D\) 是因为 \(g\) 只在 \(D\) 中取值，因此 \(p\left( x\right)  = x\) ，这意味着 \(g\left( x\right)  = x\) 。也就是说， \(h\) 的不动点恰好是 \(g\) 的不动点。根据 (7.23)， \(f\) 的所需不动点由 \(z = {J}^{-1}\left( x\right)\) 给出。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{7.7 The Freudenthal Triangulation}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{7.7 弗赖登塔尔三角剖分(Freudenthal Triangulation)}
\end{tcolorbox}

This section provides the missing piece in the proof of Brouwer's fixed-point theorem, namely an arbitrarily fine triangulation of a simplex, which is used to prove the KKM lemma (Theorem 7.12). As mentioned at the end of Section 7.3, this is only obvious when the simplex has dimension one or two. In the following we describe an elegant triangulation, due to Freudenthal (1942), that works in any dimension. Its construction rests on two main ideas:

\begin{tcolorbox}
本节补充了布劳威尔不动点定理证明中缺失的部分，即单纯形(simplex)的任意精细三角剖分(triangulation)，该三角剖分用于证明KKM引理(定理7.12)。如7.3节末尾所述，仅当单纯形的维度(dimension)为一维或二维时，这一点才显而易见。下面我们将介绍一种由弗赖登塔尔(Freudenthal，1942)提出的精妙三角剖分方法，该方法适用于任意维度。其构造基于两个主要思想:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item The \(d\) -dimensional unit cube
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item \(d\) 维单位立方体(unit cube)
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{C}_{d} = {\left\lbrack  0,1\right\rbrack  }^{d} = \left\{  {x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  0 \leq  {x}_{i} \leq  1,1 \leq  i \leq  d}\right\}
\]

can be easily subdivided into small "cubelets".

\begin{tcolorbox}
可以很容易地细分为小“立方体块”。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{itemize}
\item The cube \({C}_{d}\) has a canonical triangulation into \(d\) ! simplices that can in the same way be applied to the cubelets, which gives then a triangulation of one of the simplices in the triangulation of \({C}_{d}\) .
\end{itemize}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\begin{itemize}
\item 立方体 \({C}_{d}\) 有一个规范的三角剖分，可将其划分为 \(d\) ! 个单纯形，同样的方法也可应用于这些立方体块，从而得到 \({C}_{d}\) 三角剖分中某个单纯形的三角剖分。
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}

We continue to use \(d\) has the dimension of the space \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) of the points that we consider. The unit simplex \(\Delta\) in (7.1) is a subset of \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) but has dimension \(d - 1\) . For the Freudenthal triangulation, we use a less symmetric simplex \({T}_{d}\) than \(\Delta\) , which does not matter because any two simplices of a given dimension are in an affine bijection via their barycentric coordinates by Lemma 7.3. The simplex \({T}_{d}\) has \(d + 1\) vertices in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and has therefore dimension \(d\) , which by Lemma 7.2 is maximal. (A polytope with this property is also called full-dimensional.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们继续用 \(d\) 表示所考虑点所在空间 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的维度。式(7.1)中的单位单纯形(unit simplex) \(\Delta\) 是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 的一个子集，但其维度为 \(d - 1\) 。对于弗赖登塔尔三角剖分(Freudenthal triangulation)，我们使用一个比 \(\Delta\) 对称性更低的单纯形 \({T}_{d}\) ，这并不影响结果，因为根据引理7.3，给定维度的任意两个单纯形通过它们的重心坐标(barycentric coordinates)存在仿射双射。单纯形 \({T}_{d}\) 在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中有 \(d + 1\) 个顶点，因此其维度为 \(d\) ，根据引理7.2，这是最大维度。(具有此性质的有界多面体(polytope)也称为满维(full-dimensional)多面体。)
\end{tcolorbox}

The simplex \({T}_{d}\) is the convex hull of certain vertices of the unit cube \({C}_{d}\) . For example, if \(d = 3\) , then \({T}_{d}\) is the convex hull of the vectors

\begin{tcolorbox}
单纯形 \({T}_{d}\) 是单位立方体 \({C}_{d}\) 某些顶点的凸包(convex hull)。例如，如果 \(d = 3\) ，那么 \({T}_{d}\) 是向量的凸包
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( \begin{array}{l} 0 \\  0 \\  0 \end{array}\right) ,\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  0 \\  0 \end{array}\right) ,\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  1 \\  0 \end{array}\right) ,\left( \begin{array}{l} 1 \\  1 \\  1 \end{array}\right)  \tag{7.24}
\]

The first of these vectors is0in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) , and the next vector is always obtained by changing one component from 0 to 1, where the last vector is the all-one vector1 in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) . We then generalize \({T}_{d}\) in two ways:

\begin{tcolorbox}
这些向量中的第一个是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的0向量，后续向量总是通过将一个分量从0变为1得到，最后一个向量是 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的全1向量1。然后我们从两个方面对 \({T}_{d}\) 进行推广:
\end{tcolorbox}

(a) The different orders in which the components are changed from 0 to 1 generate \(d\) ! different simplices, which together define a triangulation of the unit cube.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 分量从0变为1的不同顺序会生成 \(d\) ! 个不同的单纯形，它们共同构成了单位立方体的一个三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) In a scaled-up version of \({T}_{d}\) which we call \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) , each entry 1 in (7.24) is replaced by a positive integer \(k\) . We then consider all points with integer coordinates in \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) , and shifted unit cubes with these integer points as vertices. The subdivision of each such cube into simplices as described in (a), as far as they are subsets of \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) , then creates the desired triangulation of \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 在 \({T}_{d}\) 的放大版本(我们称之为 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) )中，式(7.24)中的每个1都被一个正整数 \(k\) 取代。然后我们考虑 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 中所有具有整数坐标的点，并以这些整数点为顶点构造平移后的单位立方体。如(a)中所述，将每个这样的立方体细分为单纯形，只要它们是 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 的子集，就可以得到 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 所需的三角剖分。
\end{tcolorbox}

The construction in (b) exploits the fact that a cube with edge length \(k\) is easily subdivided into cubes of side length 1, which in turn are then subdivided into sub-simplices as in (a). Relative to the scaled-up simplex \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) , the distances of any two points in a sub-simplex are \(\frac{1}{k}\) of the distances in \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) , so that by shrinking \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) back to \({T}_{d}\) one obtains an arbitrarily fine triangulation of \({T}_{d}\) by choosing \(k\) large enough. (It is easier to deal with integer coordinates than with multiples of \(\left. {\frac{1}{k}\text{ . }}\right)\)

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b)中的构造利用了这样一个事实:边长为 \(k\) 的立方体很容易细分为边长为1的立方体，然后这些小立方体又可以像(a)中那样细分为子单纯形(sub - simplex)。相对于放大后的单纯形 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) ，子单纯形中任意两点之间的距离是 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 中对应距离的 \(\frac{1}{k}\) ，因此通过将 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 缩小回 \({T}_{d}\) ，只要选择足够大的 \(k\) ，就可以得到 \({T}_{d}\) 的任意精细三角剖分。(处理整数坐标比处理 \(\left. {\frac{1}{k}\text{ . }}\right)\) 的倍数更容易。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 7.16 shows this construction for a triangle \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) where \(d = 2\) and \(k = 8\) , which is essentially a "shifted" triangulation of the symmetric triangulation in Figure 7.5.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.16展示了三角形 \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) 的这种构造，其中 \(d = 2\) 且 \(k = 8\) ，这本质上是图7.5中对称三角剖分的“平移”版本。
\end{tcolorbox}

The general construction of the Freudenthal triangulation is as follows. Fix a dimension \(d\) . Let \(k\) be a positive integer. Consider the \(d + 1\) vectors in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\)

\begin{tcolorbox}
弗赖登塔尔三角剖分(Freudenthal triangulation)的一般构造如下。固定一个维度 \(d\) 。设 \(k\) 为正整数。考虑 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的 \(d + 1\) 个向量
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{v}^{0}\left( k\right)  = \left( \begin{matrix} 0 \\  0 \\  0 \\  \vdots \\  0 \end{matrix}\right) ,{v}^{1}\left( k\right)  = \left( \begin{matrix} k \\  0 \\  0 \\  \vdots \\  0 \end{matrix}\right) ,{v}^{2}\left( k\right)  = \left( \begin{matrix} k \\  k \\  0 \\  \vdots \\  0 \end{matrix}\right) ,\cdots ,{v}^{d}\left( k\right)  = \left( \begin{matrix} k \\  k \\  k \\  \vdots \\  k \end{matrix}\right) . \tag{7.25}
\]

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.5\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_209_338_199_648_658_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 7.16 The Freudenthal triangulation of the two-dimensional simplex \({T}_{2}\left( k\right)\) with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {k,0}\right)\) and(k, k) for \(k = 8\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图7.16 二维单纯形(simplex) \({T}_{2}\left( k\right)\) 的弗赖登塔尔三角剖分(Freudenthal triangulation)，其顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {k,0}\right)\) 和 (k, k)，其中 \(k = 8\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

These are affinely independent because the corresponding vectors \({z}^{i} = \left( \begin{matrix} 1 \\  {v}^{i}\left( k\right)  \end{matrix}\right)\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{1 + d}\) as considered in (7.4) are linearly independent because \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 0}}^{d}{z}^{i}{\lambda }_{i} = \mathbf{0}\) implies \({\lambda }_{d} = 0\) , then \({\lambda }_{d - 1} = 0\) , and so on until \({\lambda }_{0} = 0\) . Their convex hull therefore defines a simplex, which we call \({T}_{d}\left( k\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
