Because every node(x, y)in the LH graph has degree one or two, the graph is a collection of paths and cycles. The end nodes of paths are the degree-one nodes, whose number is even. One of these end nodes is the artificial equilibrium(0,0), and every other end node is an equilibrium of the game. This completes the parity argument. We summarize it as a theorem (whose complete proof requires proving the above bullet points).

\begin{tcolorbox}
因为 LH 图中的每个节点 (x, y) 的度为 1 或 2，所以该图是由路径和环组成的集合。路径的端点是度为 1 的节点，其数量为偶数。这些端点之一是人工均衡 (0, 0)，其他每个端点都是该博弈的一个均衡。至此奇偶性论证完成。我们将其总结为一个定理(其完整证明需要证明上述要点)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 9.4. A nondegenerate bimatrix game has an odd number of equilibria.

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理 9.4. 一个非退化的双矩阵博弈有奇数个均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.8\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_245_395_630_1140_1184_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

A way to remember the parity argument is the story of a castle whose rooms create a maze (which is not really a maze because one cannot make a mistake when entering it), shown in Figure 9.6. Every room in the castle has only one or two doors in it. Only one door leads outside, every other door leads to another room. Every room that has only one door has a bone in it. A hungry dog arrives at the castle, and easily finds a bone, as follows. The dog enters the castle from the outside door and enters a room that either has a bone in it, or is a room with two doors, in which case the dog goes through the other door of that room, and continues in that manner. In that way the dog passes through a number of rooms in the castle, but cannot enter a room again, because that room would have needed a third door to enter it. The dog can also not get out of the castle because it has only one door to the outside, which is the one the dog entered. So the sequence of rooms (the castle has only a finite number of rooms) must end somewhere, which can only be a room with only one door that contains a bone. In this analogy, a room in a castle is a node of the LH graph, and a door that connects two rooms is an edge of the LH graph. The outside of the castle is the artificial equilibrium. Every room with only one door (and a bone in it) is an equilibrium. Moreover, by Theorem 9.4, the number of bones is odd, because starting from a bone either leads to the outside or to another bone. In addition, there may be cycles of rooms that all have two doors, like at the bottom left in Figure 9.6.

\begin{tcolorbox}
一种记住奇偶性论证的方法是通过一个城堡的故事，城堡里的房间构成了一个迷宫(实际上这并不是真正的迷宫，因为进入时不会走错路)，如图9.6所示。城堡里的每个房间只有一扇或两扇门。只有一扇门通向外面，其他每扇门都通向另一个房间。每个只有一扇门的房间里都有一根骨头。一只饥饿的狗来到城堡，很容易就找到了一根骨头，过程如下。狗从外面的门进入城堡，进入一个要么有骨头，要么有两扇门的房间。如果是有两扇门的房间，狗就穿过那扇门继续走。这样，狗穿过了城堡里的一些房间，但不会再次进入同一个房间，因为要再次进入那个房间就需要第三扇门。狗也无法走出城堡，因为只有一扇门通向外面，而那扇门就是它进来的门。所以房间序列(城堡里的房间数量是有限的)必然会在某个地方结束，而这个地方只能是一个只有一扇门且有骨头的房间。在这个类比中，城堡里的一个房间是LH图的一个节点，连接两个房间的一扇门是LH图的一条边。城堡外面是人工均衡。每个只有一扇门(且里面有骨头)的房间是一个均衡。此外，根据定理9.4，骨头的数量是奇数，因为从一根骨头出发要么通向外面，要么通向另一根骨头。此外，可能存在所有房间都有两扇门的循环，如图9.6左下角所示。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{9.4 Using Best-Response Diagrams}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{9.4 使用最优反应示意图}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this section, we describe the use of best-response diagrams for \(3 \times  3\) games. For \(2 \times  2\) games, it is possible to draw all mixed strategy pairs simultaneously in a square that represents \(X \times  Y\) , like in Figures 6.4 and 6.8, so that an equilibrium is identified as a single point in the square. In a \(3 \times  3\) game, the best-response diagram is given by two triangles that represent \(X\) and \(Y\) , and each equilibrium has to be identified by a separate symbol that identifies the equilibrium strategies in \(X\) and \(Y\) , like for the \(3 \times  2\) game (9.1) in Figure 9.4. However, \(3 \times  3\) games have a lot more variety than \(2 \times  2\) games. It is therefore useful that they can be analyzed with the help of two-dimensional diagrams.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本节中，我们描述最优反应示意图在 \(3 \times  3\) 博弈中的应用。对于 \(2 \times  2\) 博弈，可以在一个表示 \(X \times  Y\) 的正方形中同时绘制所有混合策略对，如图6.4和6.8所示，这样均衡就可以被识别为正方形中的一个点。在一个 \(3 \times  3\) 博弈中，最优反应示意图由两个表示 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的三角形给出，每个均衡必须用一个单独的符号来识别，该符号标识了 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 中的均衡策略，如图9.4中的 \(3 \times  2\) 博弈(9.1)。然而， \(3 \times  3\) 博弈比 \(2 \times  2\) 博弈有更多的变化。因此，借助二维图来分析它们是很有用的。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_246_190_1442_1265_379_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.7 The \(3 \times  3\) coordination game(A, B)and its best-response diagram. Every point in \(X\) with three labels together with the same point in \(Y\) is an equilibrium, so the game has seven equilibria.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.7 \(3 \times  3\) 协调博弈(A, B)及其最优反应示意图。 \(X\) 中每个带有三个标签的点与 \(Y\) 中的同一点一起构成一个均衡，因此该博弈有七个均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

In a \(3 \times  3\) game, the rows (strategies of player I) have labels1,2,3, and the columns (strategies of player II) have labels4,5,6. Each strategy set \(X\) and \(Y\) is a triangle, with (up to) three best-response regions.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在一个 \(3 \times  3\) 博弈中，行(玩家I的策略)的标签为1、2、3，列(玩家II的策略)的标签为4、5、6。每个策略集 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 是一个三角形，最多有三个最优反应区域。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.7 shows the game(A, B)where \(A\) and \(B\) are the identity matrix. This coordination game is a symmetric game where both players get payoff one if they choose the same row and column, and zero otherwise. In addition to the pure strategy equilibria \(\left( {{e}_{1},{e}_{1}}\right) ,\left( {{e}_{2},{e}_{2}}\right)\) , and \(\left( {{e}_{3},{e}_{3}}\right)\) , the game has many mixed equilibria, because any subset of pure strategies, chosen equally on both sides, with a uniformly at random chosen strategy from that subset, defines a mixed equilibrium(x, y). Here, these are the mixed equilibrium strategies \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,\left( {0,\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) , and the completely mixed equilibrium where \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) . These are seven equilibria in total, as can be seen from the labels in Figure 9.7. The best-response regions have all the same shape; for example, \(X\left( 4\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2},{x}_{3}}\right)  \in  X \mid  {x}_{1} \geq  {x}_{2},{x}_{1} \geq  {x}_{3}}\right\}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.7展示了博弈(A, B)，其中 \(A\) 和 \(B\) 为单位矩阵(identity matrix)。这个协调博弈(coordination game)是一个对称博弈(symmetric game)，如果两个参与者选择相同的行和列，他们都能获得收益1，否则收益为0。除了纯策略均衡(pure equilibrium) \(\left( {{e}_{1},{e}_{1}}\right) ,\left( {{e}_{2},{e}_{2}}\right)\) 和 \(\left( {{e}_{3},{e}_{3}}\right)\) 之外，该博弈还有许多混合均衡(mixed equilibrium)，因为任何纯策略的子集，只要双方选择的概率相等，并且从该子集中随机均匀选择一个策略，就可以定义一个混合均衡(x, y)。这里，这些是混合均衡策略 \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,\left( {0,\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) ，以及完全混合均衡，其中 \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) 。从图9.7中的标签可以看出，总共有七个均衡。最优反应(best response)区域的形状都相同；例如， \(X\left( 4\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{x}_{1},{x}_{2},{x}_{3}}\right)  \in  X \mid  {x}_{1} \geq  {x}_{2},{x}_{1} \geq  {x}_{3}}\right\}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_247_336_756_1258_377_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.8 A game(A, B)with a full cycle(9.9)of pure best responses. Its only equilibrium is completely mixed, marked by a black square.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.8 一个博弈(A, B)，具有纯最优反应的完整循环(9.9)。它唯一的均衡是完全混合均衡，用黑色方块标记。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.8 shows a game(A, B)where \(A\) is the identity matrix and \(B\) is the identity matrix with permuted columns. The best-response regions in \(X\) therefore have the same shape but different labels. As the best-response diagram and the payoff matrices show, there is a full cycle of pure best responses

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.8展示了一个博弈(A, B)，其中 \(A\) 是单位矩阵， \(B\) 是列经过置换的单位矩阵。因此， \(X\) 中的最优反应区域形状相同但标签不同。正如最优反应示意图(best-response diagram)和收益矩阵所示，在这个博弈中存在一个纯最优反应的完整循环
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\text{ ① } \rightarrow  \text{ ⑤ } \rightarrow  \text{ ② } \rightarrow  \text{ ⑥ } \rightarrow  \text{ ③ } \rightarrow  \text{ ④ } \rightarrow  \text{ ① } \tag{9.9}
\]

in this game. There is no completely labeled pair of mixed strategies(x, y)except for the completely mixed equilibrium where \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) . This can be seen from the best-response diagram because there is clearly no pure equilibrium by (9.9), and the point \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) in \(X\) with labels3,5,6requires some \(y\) with labels 1,2,4to be part of an equilibrium, but no point in \(Y\) has labels 1 and 4 ; similarly, labels1,4,6in \(X\) require labels2,3,5in \(Y\) but no point in \(Y\) has labels 2 and 5, and labels2,4,5in \(X\) require labels1,3,6in \(Y\) but no point in \(Y\) has labels 3 and 6 .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在这个博弈中，除了完全混合均衡(其中 \(x = y = \left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) )之外，没有完全标记(completely labeled)的混合策略对(x, y)。从最优反应示意图可以看出这一点，因为根据(9.9)显然不存在纯均衡，并且 \(X\) 中标签为3、5、6的点 \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 需要 \(y\) 中标签为1、2、4的点成为均衡的一部分，但 \(Y\) 中没有点同时具有标签1和4；类似地， \(X\) 中标签为1、4、6的点需要 \(Y\) 中标签为2、3、5的点，但 \(Y\) 中没有点同时具有标签2和5， \(X\) 中标签为2、4、5的点需要 \(Y\) 中标签为1、3、6的点，但 \(Y\) 中没有点同时具有标签3和6。
\end{tcolorbox}

This raises the general question if the cycle (9.9) of pure best responses (for a nondegenerate game) implies that the game has a unique mixed equilibrium (which is true for \(2 \times  2\) games). That question is easily answered with the help of the best-response diagrams. The pure best responses in the corners of the triangle are determined by (9.9). We start with Figure 9.9, where we first keep \(A\) and therefore the best-response regions \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right)\) , and \(Y\left( 3\right)\) fixed. Can \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) in \(Y\) with labels1,2,6be part of an equilibrium(x, y)? This requires \(x\) to have labels3,4,5, which is indeed possible if, along the bottom edge of \(X\) with label 3, label 4 appears between labels 5 and 6 . In the resulting best-response diagram, \(x = \left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right)\) has these labels3,4,5, and the equilibrium strategies \(x\) and \(y\) are marked with a black square. The best-response diagram shows that this is the only equilibrium. Hence, the game has indeed only one equilibrium, although it is not completely mixed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
这就引出了一个普遍问题:对于一个非退化博弈(nondegenerate game)，纯最优反应(pure best responses)的循环(9.9)是否意味着该博弈有唯一的混合均衡(mixed equilibrium)(这对于 \(2 \times  2\) 博弈是成立的)。借助最优反应示意图(best - response diagram)可以轻松回答这个问题。三角形角上的纯最优反应由(9.9)确定。我们从图9.9开始，首先固定 \(A\) ，因此最优反应区域 \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right)\) 和 \(Y\left( 3\right)\) 也固定。 \(Y\) 中带有标签1、2、6的 \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 能否成为均衡(x，y)的一部分呢？这要求 \(x\) 带有标签3、4、5，如果在带有标签3的 \(X\) 的底边，标签4出现在标签5和6之间，这确实是可能的。在得到的最优反应示意图中， \(x = \left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right)\) 带有这些标签3、4、5，均衡策略 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 用黑色方块标记。最优反应示意图表明这是唯一的均衡。因此，该博弈确实只有一个均衡，尽管它不是完全混合的。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_248_193_564_1263_378_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.9 Best-response diagram for a game with a full cycle (9.9) of pure best responses and a unique equilibrium(x, y)for \(x = \left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right)\) and \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) . The payoff matrix \(B\) is constructed in Figure 9.10.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.9 一个具有纯最优反应的完整循环(9.9)且对于 \(x = \left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right)\) 和 \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 有唯一均衡(x，y)的博弈的最优反应示意图。收益矩阵 \(B\) 在图9.10中构建。
\end{tcolorbox}

We have drawn the best-response diagram first. The construction of a payoff matrix \(B\) to get this subdivision of \(X\) into best-response regions is shown in Figure 9.10.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们先绘制了最优反应示意图。图9.10展示了构建一个收益矩阵 \(B\) 以使 \(X\) 划分为最优反应区域的过程。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.7\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_248_192_1287_926_422_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

\[
B = \left( \begin{array}{lll} 2 & 3 & 0 \\  2 & 0 & 3 \\  2 & 0 & 0 \end{array}\right)
\]

Figure 9.10 Construction of the game matrix \(B\) from the best-response diagram on the left via the upper envelope of suitable payoffs. The first column 4 defines a horizontal plane of constant payoffs 2, and the second and third columns 5 and 6 have higher payoff 3 in the corners \({e}_{1}\) and \({e}_{2}\) , respectively, and 0 otherwise.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.10 通过合适收益的上包络(upper envelope)从左侧的最优反应示意图构建博弈矩阵 \(B\) 。第一列4定义了一个常数收益为2的水平面，第二列和第三列5和6分别在角 \({e}_{1}\) 和 \({e}_{2}\) 处有更高的收益3，其他地方为0。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.11 shows a game where the best-response regions \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) , and the payoff matrix \(A\) , are also changed compared to Figure 9.10. The game still has the full cycle (9.9) of pure best responses, but it has three equilibria. Hence, condition (9.9) does not imply a unique equilibrium. The counterexample was easy to construct with the help of the best-response diagrams.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.11展示了一个博弈，与图9.10相比，其最优反应区域 \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) 和收益矩阵 \(A\) 也发生了变化。该博弈仍然有纯最优反应的完整循环(9.9)，但它有三个均衡。因此，条件(9.9)并不意味着有唯一的均衡。借助最优反应示意图很容易构造出这个反例。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_249_332_211_1263_378_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.11 A game with a full cycle (9.9) of pure best responses and multiple equilibria.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.11 一个具有纯最优反应的完整循环(9.9)和多个均衡的博弈。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.12 shows best-response regions where the subdivision of \(X\) is qualitatively at the transition between Figures 9.8 and 9.9. According to Lemma 9.3, this is a degenerate game because \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) has three pure best responses and four labels3,4,5,6. Consequently, only the two labels 1 and 2 of a point \(y\) are needed for an equilibrium(x, y). These two labels define \(Y\left( 1\right)  \cap  Y\left( 2\right)\) , which is the line segment with endpoints \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) and \(\left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) in \(Y\) . Any \(y\) in that line segment is part of an equilibrium(x, y), so this game has an infinite set of equilibria.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.12展示了最优反应区域，其中 \(X\) 的划分在性质上处于图9.8和图9.9之间的过渡状态。根据引理9.3，这是一个退化博弈(degenerate game)，因为 \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 有三个纯最优反应和四个标签3、4、5、6。因此，对于均衡(x，y)，一个点 \(y\) 只需要两个标签1和2。这两个标签定义了 \(Y\left( 1\right)  \cap  Y\left( 2\right)\) ，它是 \(Y\) 中端点为 \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 和 \(\left( {\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right)\) 的线段(line segment)。该线段中的任何 \(y\) 都是均衡(x，y)的一部分，所以这个博弈有无限个均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_249_335_1128_1257_379_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.12 A degenerate game with a line segment of multiple equilibria.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.12 一个具有多个均衡线段的退化博弈。
\end{tcolorbox}

For a nondegenerate game, Proposition 6.8 states that the equilibrium strategies in an equilibrium(x, y)mix the same number of pure strategies. In terms of the best-response diagram, this means that the smallest face of \(X\) that contains \(x\) has the same dimension as the smallest face of \(Y\) that contains \(y\) . This face is either a vertex if(x, y)is a pure-strategy equilibrium, an edge if \(x\) and \(y\) mix only two pure strategies, or a triangle if they mix three strategies (and a face of higher dimension for larger games). This is the case in the diagrams seen so far, but fails for the degenerate game in Figure 9.12 where the equilibrium strategy \(x = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) on the lower edge of \(X\) and any point \(y = \left( {\alpha ,\frac{1}{2} - \frac{\alpha }{2},\frac{1}{2} - \frac{\alpha }{2}}\right)\) for \(0 < \alpha  \leq  \frac{1}{3}\) in the interior of the triangle \(Y\) form an equilibrium(x, y).

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于非退化博弈，命题6.8指出，均衡 \textbackslash ((x, y) \textbackslash )中的均衡策略所混合的纯策略数量相同。就最优反应示意图而言，这意味着包含 \textbackslash (\( X  \textbackslash )\)的最小面与包含 \textbackslash (\( x  \textbackslash )\)的最小面具有相同的维度。如果 \textbackslash ((x, y) \textbackslash )是纯策略均衡，这个面就是一个顶点；如果 \textbackslash (\( x  \textbackslash )\)和 \textbackslash (\( y  \textbackslash )\)仅混合两种纯策略，这个面就是一条边；如果它们混合三种策略，这个面就是一个三角形(对于更大的博弈，这个面的维度更高)。到目前为止所看到的示意图都是这种情况，但图9.12中的退化博弈并非如此，在该图中， \textbackslash (\( X  \textbackslash )\)下边缘的均衡策略 \textbackslash (\( x =  \textbackslash left( \{ \textbackslash frac\{1\}\{2\}, \textbackslash frac\{1\}\{2\},0\} \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)与三角形 \textbackslash (\( Y  \textbackslash )\)内部 \textbackslash (\( 0 <  \textbackslash alpha   \textbackslash leq   \textbackslash frac\{1\}\{3\}  \textbackslash )\)的任意点 \textbackslash (\( y =  \textbackslash left( \{ \textbackslash alpha , \textbackslash frac\{1\}\{2\} -  \textbackslash frac\{ \textbackslash alpha \}\{2\}, \textbackslash frac\{1\}\{2\} -  \textbackslash frac\{ \textbackslash alpha \}\{2\}\} \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)构成一个均衡 \textbackslash ((x, y) \textbackslash )。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{9.5 Strategic Equivalence}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{9.5 策略等价}
\end{tcolorbox}

When constructing the best-response diagram of a game, it is often simpler to consider another game that has the same diagram. Two such games are called strategically equivalent, which we define for \(N\) -player games in general.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在构建一个博弈的最优反应示意图时，考虑另一个具有相同示意图的博弈通常会更简单。这样的两个博弈被称为策略等价，我们将对一般的 \textbackslash (\( N  \textbackslash )\)人博弈进行定义。
\end{tcolorbox}

Definition 9.5. Consider an \(N\) -player game \(G\) in strategic form with finite strategy set \({S}_{i}\) for player \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) , payoff \({u}_{i}\left( s\right)\) for each strategy profile \(s\) , mixed strategies \({\sigma }_{i} \in  {X}_{i} = \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) , and partial profiles of mixed strategies \({\sigma }_{-i} \in  {X}_{-i} = \mathop{X}\limits_{{k \neq  i}}{X}_{k}\) . Let \(\widehat{G}\) be another game with the same strategy sets, and payoff function \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) for each player \(i\) . Then \(G\) and \(\widehat{G}\) are called strategically equivalent if for all \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) and all \({\sigma }_{-i} \in  {X}_{-i}\) , any strategy \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) is a best response to \({\sigma }_{-i}\) in \(G\) if and only if \({s}_{i}\) is a best response to \({\sigma }_{-i}\) in \(\widehat{G}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定义9.5。考虑一个处于策略形式的 \textbackslash (\( N  \textbackslash )\)人博弈 \textbackslash (\( G  \textbackslash )\)，其中玩家 \textbackslash (\( i = 1, \textbackslash ldots, N  \textbackslash )\)的有限策略集为 \textbackslash (\( \{S\}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash )\)，每个策略组合 \textbackslash (\( s  \textbackslash )\)的收益为 \textbackslash (\( \{u\}\_\{i\} \textbackslash left( s \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)，混合策略为 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash sigma \}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash in  \{X\}\_\{i\} =  \textbackslash Delta  \textbackslash left( \{S\}\_\{i\} \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)，混合策略的部分组合为 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash sigma \}\_\{-i\}  \textbackslash in  \{X\}\_\{-i\} =  \textbackslash mathop\{X\} \textbackslash limits\_\{\{k  \textbackslash neq  i\}\}\{X\}\_\{k\}  \textbackslash )\)。设 \textbackslash (\(  \textbackslash widehat\{G\}  \textbackslash )\)是另一个具有相同策略集的博弈，每个玩家 \textbackslash (\( i  \textbackslash )\)的收益函数为 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash widehat\{u\}\}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash )\)。那么，如果对于所有的 \textbackslash (\( i = 1, \textbackslash ldots, N  \textbackslash )\)和所有的 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash sigma \}\_\{-i\}  \textbackslash in  \{X\}\_\{-i\}  \textbackslash )\)，在 \textbackslash (\( G  \textbackslash )\)中，任何策略 \textbackslash (\( \{s\}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash in  \{S\}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash )\)是对 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash sigma \}\_\{-i\}  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应，当且仅当在 \textbackslash (\(  \textbackslash widehat\{G\}  \textbackslash )\)中， \textbackslash (\( \{s\}\_\{i\}  \textbackslash )\)是对 \textbackslash (\( \{ \textbackslash sigma \}\_\{-i\}  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应，则称 \textbackslash (\( G  \textbackslash )\)和 \textbackslash (\(  \textbackslash widehat\{G\}  \textbackslash )\)是策略等价的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Hence, strategic equivalence of two \(m \times  n\) bimatrix games means that any row \(i\) is a best response to a mixed strategy \(y\) of player II in one game whenever it is a best response to \(y\) in the other game, and similarly any column \(j\) is a best response to a mixed strategy \(x\) of player I in one game whenever it is in the other game. This is equivalent to saying that the two games have the same best-response regions \(Y\left( i\right)\) and \(X\left( j\right)\) in (9.3), that is, the same best-response diagram.

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，两个 \textbackslash (\( m  \textbackslash times  n  \textbackslash )\)双矩阵博弈的策略等价意味着，在一个博弈中，任何行 \textbackslash (\( i  \textbackslash )\)是对玩家II的混合策略 \textbackslash (\( y  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应，当且仅当在另一个博弈中它也是对 \textbackslash (\( y  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应；类似地，在一个博弈中，任何列 \textbackslash (\( j  \textbackslash )\)是对玩家I的混合策略 \textbackslash (\( x  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应，当且仅当在另一个博弈中它也是对 \textbackslash (\( x  \textbackslash )\)的最优反应。这等价于说，这两个博弈在(9.3)中具有相同的最优反应区域 \textbackslash (\( Y \textbackslash left( i \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)和 \textbackslash (\( X \textbackslash left( j \textbackslash right)  \textbackslash )\)，即具有相同的最优反应示意图。
\end{tcolorbox}

As Figures 6.10 and 9.1 show, the game on the right in Figure 6.7 and in Figure 9.1 are strategically equivalent. The two games have the same payoff matrix \(B\) for player II, and the payoff matrix \(A\) in the second game is obtained from the first by adding the constant 1 to each entry in the first column of \(A\) . This is generally a way to obtain a strategically equivalent game. Consider a bimatrix game(A, B), and add a constant \(\alpha\) to each entry in column \(j\) of \(A\) . Then if player II plays the mixed strategy \(y\) , with probability \({y}_{j}\) for column \(j\) , then the expected payoff in row \(i\) is changed from \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i}\) to \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i} + \alpha {y}_{j}\) . That is, all these expected payoffs change by the same amount \(\alpha {y}_{j}\) . Although this depends on \(y\) , it does not change which rows \(i\) have maximal payoff, and therefore it does not change player I’s best responses to \(y\) . We call such a payoff change of adding a constant to some column of the row player's payoffs a column shift of the game.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如图6.10和图9.1所示，图6.7右侧的博弈与图9.1中的博弈在策略上是等价的。这两个博弈对于玩家II而言具有相同的收益矩阵 \(B\) ，且第二个博弈中的收益矩阵 \(A\) 是通过给 \(A\) 第一列的每个元素加上常数1从第一个博弈的收益矩阵得到的。这通常是一种获得策略等价博弈的方法。考虑一个双矩阵博弈(A，B)，给 \(A\) 的第 \(j\) 列的每个元素加上一个常数 \(\alpha\) 。然后，如果玩家II采用混合策略 \(y\) ，即第 \(j\) 列的概率为 \({y}_{j}\) ，那么第 \(i\) 行的期望效用就从 \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i}\) 变为 \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i} + \alpha {y}_{j}\) 。也就是说，所有这些期望效用都改变了相同的量 \(\alpha {y}_{j}\) 。尽管这依赖于 \(y\) ，但它并不会改变哪些行 \(i\) 具有最大收益，因此也不会改变玩家I对 \(y\) 的最优反应。我们将这种给行玩家收益的某一列加上一个常数的收益变化称为博弈的列移位。
\end{tcolorbox}

We use "column shift" as a general term in an \(N\) -player game, by assuming that the pure strategies of the player under consideration are temporarily arranged as rows, so that any partial profile of strategies of the other \(N - 1\) players is given by a column. For example, the three-player game in Exercise 3.2 has as rows the strategies of player I and as columns the partial pure strategy profiles of players II and III. However, one should remember that therefore in a bimatrix game(A, B), a "column shift" for player II means adding a constant to some row of player II's payoff matrix \(B\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在一个 \(N\) 人博弈中，我们将“列移位”作为一个通用术语，假设所考虑玩家的纯策略暂时被排列为行，这样其他 \(N - 1\) 个玩家的任何部分策略组合就由一列表示。例如，练习3.2中的三人博弈将玩家I的策略作为行，将玩家II和玩家III的部分纯策略组合作为列。然而，应该记住，因此在双矩阵博弈(A，B)中，玩家II的“列移位”意味着给玩家II的收益矩阵 \(B\) 的某一行加上一个常数。
\end{tcolorbox}

Definition 9.6. Consider an \(N\) -player game \(G\) as in Definition 9.5. Let \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) be a player, let \({a}_{i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)  \in  \mathbb{R}\) be a separate constant for each partial profile \({s}_{-i}\) of pure strategies of the other \(N - 1\) players, and let

\begin{tcolorbox}
定义9.6。考虑如定义9.5中的一个 \(N\) 人博弈 \(G\) 。设 \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) 为一个玩家，设 \({a}_{i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)  \in  \mathbb{R}\) 为其他 \(N - 1\) 个玩家的每个纯策略部分组合 \({s}_{-i}\) 的一个独立常数，并且设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{\widehat{u}}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right)  = {u}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right)  + {a}_{i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)
\]

be a new utility function \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) for player \(i\) . This is called a column shift for player \(i\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
是玩家 \(i\) 的一个新的效用函数 \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) 。这被称为玩家 \(i\) 的列移位。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 9.7. Consider an \(N\) -player game \(G\) as in Definition 9.6, with a new utility function \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) for player \(i\) obtained by a column shift for player \(i\) . Then the game \(\widehat{G}\) with \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) instead of \({u}_{i}\) is strategically equivalent to \(G\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题9.7。考虑如定义9.6中的一个 \(N\) 人博弈 \(G\) ，玩家 \(i\) 通过列移位获得了一个新的效用函数 \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) 。那么用 \({\widehat{u}}_{i}\) 替代 \({u}_{i}\) 后的博弈 \(\widehat{G}\) 与 \(G\) 在策略上是等价的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. With the notation in Definition 9.6, let \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) be a strategy of player \(i\) and let \({\sigma }_{-i}\) be a partial profile of mixed strategies of the other players. Then the expected payoff to player \(i\) is \({U}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)\) in \(G\) , and \({U}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)  + {a}_{i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right) \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{k = 1,k \neq  i}}^{N}{\sigma }_{k}\left( {s}_{k}\right)\) in \(\widehat{G}\) . The added term does not depend on \({s}_{i}\) . Hence, the maximum over \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) for determining the best response of player \(i\) to \({\sigma }_{-i}\) is not affected by the column shift. That is, the best responses in \(G\) and \(\widehat{G}\) to \({\sigma }_{-i}\) are the same, as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。采用定义9.6中的符号，设 \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) 是玩家 \(i\) 的一个策略，设 \({\sigma }_{-i}\) 是其他玩家的一个混合策略部分组合。那么在 \(G\) 中玩家 \(i\) 的期望效用是 \({U}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)\) ，在 \(\widehat{G}\) 中是 \({U}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)  + {a}_{i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right) \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{k = 1,k \neq  i}}^{N}{\sigma }_{k}\left( {s}_{k}\right)\) 。所加的项不依赖于 \({s}_{i}\) 。因此，为确定玩家 \(i\) 对 \({\sigma }_{-i}\) 的最优反应而对 \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) 取最大值不受列移位的影响。也就是说，如所声称的， \(G\) 和 \(\widehat{G}\) 中对 \({\sigma }_{-i}\) 的最优反应是相同的。
\end{tcolorbox}

A column shift may mean adding the same constant to all "columns" and hence to all payoffs. This just changes the origin of the utility function of the player and always represents the same preference. In addition, the player's payoffs may be scaled by multiplying them with a positive constant (which cannot be varied with the column), which trivially creates a strategically equivalent game. However, two games may be strategically equivalent even if one game cannot be obtained from the other by scaling and column shifts. Consider the \(3 \times  2\) games(A, B)and \(\left( {\widehat{A},B}\right)\) with

\begin{tcolorbox}
列移位(column shift)可能意味着给所有“列”加上相同的常数，从而给所有收益加上相同的常数。这仅仅改变了参与者效用函数的原点，并且始终代表相同的偏好。此外，参与者的收益可以通过乘以一个正常数(该常数不能随列变化)来进行缩放，这显然会产生一个策略等价(strategic equivalence)的博弈。然而，即使一个博弈不能通过缩放和列移位从另一个博弈得到，两个博弈也可能是策略等价的。考虑 \(3 \times  2\) 博弈 (A, B) 和 \(\left( {\widehat{A},B}\right)\) ，其中
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
A = \left( \begin{array}{ll} 2 & 0 \\  1 & 2 \\  0 & 3 \end{array}\right) ,\;\widehat{A} = \left( \begin{array}{ll} 2 & 0 \\  1 & 2 \\  \frac{1}{2} & \frac{5}{2} \end{array}\right)  \tag{9.10}
\]

and any \(B\) , for example as in (9.1). The upper envelope diagrams for the two games in Figure 9.13 show that the two games are strategically equivalent because they have the same best-response regions \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) , in particular the indifference between the two rows 2 and 3, which are both best responses when \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) . However, \(\widehat{A}\) is not obtained from \(A\) by scaling and column shifts: The first two entries of the first column of \(A\) and \(\widehat{A}\) are the same, 2 and 1, and fix the "utility scale" for the payoffs in the first column, so that no scaling or additive shift can be applied to that column, but the third entry in that column is different for \(A\) and \(\widehat{A}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
以及任何 \(B\) ，例如如 (9.1) 中所示。图 9.13 中两个博弈的上包络(upper envelope)图表明，这两个博弈是策略等价的，因为它们具有相同的最优反应(best response)区域 \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) ，特别是第 2 行和第 3 行之间的无差异(indifference)，当 \(y = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) 时，这两行都是最优反应。然而， \(\widehat{A}\) 不能通过缩放和列移位从 \(A\) 得到: \(A\) 和 \(\widehat{A}\) 第一列的前两个元素是相同的，即 2 和 1，这确定了第一列收益的“效用尺度(utility scale)”，因此不能对该列应用任何缩放或加法移位，但该列的第三个元素对于 \(A\) 和 \(\widehat{A}\) 是不同的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Note that we have defined strategic equivalence only in terms of best responses, which are relevant for determining an equilibrium. The rows 1 and 3 for \(A\) and \(\widehat{A}\) in (9.10) do not have the same point of indifference, which occurs for \(y = \left( {\frac{3}{5},\frac{2}{5}}\right)\) with \(A\) when both rows have payoff \(\frac{6}{5}\) , and for \(y = \left( {\frac{5}{8},\frac{3}{8}}\right)\) with \(\widehat{A}\) when both rows have payoff \(\frac{5}{4}\) . However, in both cases rows 1 and 3 are not on the upper envelope because row 2 has a higher payoff, as Figure 9.13 shows.

\begin{tcolorbox}
请注意，我们仅根据最优反应来定义策略等价，而最优反应与确定均衡(equilibrium)相关。(9.10) 中 \(A\) 和 \(\widehat{A}\) 的第 1 行和第 3 行没有相同的无差异点，对于 \(A\) ，当 \(y = \left( {\frac{3}{5},\frac{2}{5}}\right)\) 时，这两行的收益为 \(\frac{6}{5}\) ；对于 \(\widehat{A}\) ，当 \(y = \left( {\frac{5}{8},\frac{3}{8}}\right)\) 时，这两行的收益为 \(\frac{5}{4}\) 。然而，如图 9.13 所示，在这两种情况下，第 1 行和第 3 行都不在上包络上，因为第 2 行的收益更高。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_252_220_215_1214_528_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.13 Upper envelopes of expected payoffs to player I against \(\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2}}\right)\) for the payoff matrices \(A\) and \(\widehat{A}\) in (9.10), which define strategically equivalent but not strongly strategically equivalent games(A, B)and \(\left( {\widehat{A},B}\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.13 针对 (9.10) 中收益矩阵 \(A\) 和 \(\widehat{A}\) ，参与者 I 相对于 \(\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2}}\right)\) 的期望效用(expected payoff)的上包络图，这些矩阵定义了策略等价但不是强策略等价(strong strategic equivalence)的博弈 (A, B) 和 \(\left( {\widehat{A},B}\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

A stronger definition (with the notation in Definition 9.5) is to say that \(G\) and \(\widehat{G}\) are strongly strategically equivalent if for all players \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) , all \({\sigma }_{-i} \in  {X}_{-i}\) , and any two strategies \({s}_{i}\) and \({s}_{i}^{\prime }\) in \({S}_{i}\) we have

\begin{tcolorbox}
一个更强的定义(采用定义 9.5 中的符号)是，如果对于所有参与者 \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) 、所有 \({\sigma }_{-i} \in  {X}_{-i}\) 以及 \({S}_{i}\) 中的任意两个策略 \({s}_{i}\) 和 \({s}_{i}^{\prime }\) ，我们有
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{u}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)  \geq  {u}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i}^{\prime },{\sigma }_{-i}}\right) \; \Leftrightarrow  \;{\widehat{u}}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{\sigma }_{-i}}\right)  \geq  {\widehat{u}}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i}^{\prime },{\sigma }_{-i}}\right) . \tag{9.11}
\]

Clearly, strong strategic equivalence implies strategic equivalence, and is implied by any column shift because the proof of Proposition 9.6 still applies. However, the converse does not hold, as the example (9.10) shows, because (9.11) is violated for \(i\) as the row player, \({\sigma }_{-i} = y = \left( {{0.61},{0.39}}\right)\) , and rows 1 and 3 for \({s}_{i}\) and \({s}_{i}^{\prime }\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
显然，强策略等价意味着策略等价，并且任何列移位都意味着强策略等价，因为命题 9.6 的证明仍然适用。然而，反之则不成立，如示例 (9.10) 所示，因为当 \(i\) 为行参与者、 \({\sigma }_{-i} = y = \left( {{0.61},{0.39}}\right)\) 以及 \({s}_{i}\) 和 \({s}_{i}^{\prime }\) 的第 1 行和第 3 行时，(9.11) 不成立。
\end{tcolorbox}

As an example of using column shifts to simplify the drawing of best-response diagrams, we consider the \(3 \times  3\) game(A, B)with

\begin{tcolorbox}
作为使用列移位来简化最优反应示意图(best - response diagram)绘制的一个例子，我们考虑 \(3 \times  3\) 博弈 (A, B)，其中
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
A = \left( \begin{array}{rrr} 0 & 3 & 0 \\  1 & 0 & 1 \\   - 3 & 4 & 5 \end{array}\right) ,\;B = \left( \begin{array}{rrr} 0 & 1 &  - 2 \\  2 & 0 & 3 \\  2 & 1 & 0 \end{array}\right) . \tag{9.12}
\]

We add the constant 3 to the first and third column of \(A\) , and the constant 2 to the first row of \(B\) . This produces a new game \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\) that is strategically equivalent to (A, B)by Proposition 9.7,

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们给 \(A\) 的第一列和第三列加上常数 3，给 \(B\) 的第一行加上常数 2。根据命题 9.7，这产生了一个与 (A, B) 策略等价的新博弈 \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\widehat{A} = \left( \begin{array}{lll} 3 & 3 & 3 \\  4 & 0 & 4 \\  0 & 4 & 8 \end{array}\right) ,\;\widehat{B} = \left( \begin{array}{lll} 2 & 3 & 0 \\  2 & 0 & 3 \\  2 & 1 & 0 \end{array}\right) . \tag{9.13}
\]

The game \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\) , and hence the game(A, B), has the best-response diagram shown in Figure 9.14. These diagrams can be relatively easily visualized via an upper envelope of three planes of expected payoffs, spanned across three goalposts on the corners of each triangle, because the plane for the first strategy has goalposts at equal heights and is therefore horizontal. This has been shown in Figure 9.10, which produces almost the same subdivision of \(X\) because the matrix \(B\) there is almost the same as \(\widehat{B}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
博弈 \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\) ，进而博弈 (A, B) ，具有如图 9.14 所示的最优反应示意图。这些示意图可以通过期望效用的三个平面的上包络相对容易地可视化，这些平面跨越每个三角形角落的三个基准点，因为第一个策略的平面在相同高度处有基准点，因此是水平的。这已在图 9.10 中展示，该图对 \(X\) 进行的细分几乎相同，因为那里的矩阵 \(B\) 与 \(\widehat{B}\) 几乎相同。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.8\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_253_418_419_1091_422_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.14 Best-response diagram for the games in (9.12) and (9.13). The games have the same three equilibria, namely \(\left( {\left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right) ,\left( {\frac{3}{4},\frac{1}{4},0}\right) }\right)\) (black square), \(\left( {\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4},0}\right) }\right)\) (white square), and \(\left( {\left( {0,\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) }\right)\) (white circle).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.14 博弈 (9.12) 和 (9.13) 的最优反应示意图。这些博弈有相同的三个均衡，即 \(\left( {\left( {\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3},0}\right) ,\left( {\frac{3}{4},\frac{1}{4},0}\right) }\right)\) (黑色方块)、 \(\left( {\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4},0}\right) }\right)\) (白色方块)和 \(\left( {\left( {0,\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) }\right)\) (白色圆圈)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The subdivision of \(Y\) into its best-response regions \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) can be obtained similarly to Figure 9.10 by considering an upper envelope of three planes of expected payoffs. We also describe another method that can be applied directly to the triangle \(Y\) , without considering a third dimension. For the original game (A, B), the best-response regions are defined by comparing the expected payoffs in each row:

\begin{tcolorbox}
将 \(Y\) 细分为其最优反应区域 \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right) ,Y\left( 3\right)\) 可以类似于图 9.10 ，通过考虑期望效用的三个平面的上包络来获得。我们还描述了另一种可以直接应用于三角形 \(Y\) 的方法，而无需考虑第三个维度。对于原始博弈 (A, B) ，最优反应区域是通过比较每行的期望效用定义的:
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
Y\left( 1\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid  3{y}_{2} \geq  {y}_{1} + {y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
\left. {3{y}_{2} \geq   - 3{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{2} + 5{y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
Y\left( 2\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid  {y}_{1} + {y}_{3} \geq  3{y}_{2}}\right\}   \tag{9.14}
\]

\[
\left. {{y}_{1} + {y}_{3} \geq   - 3{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{2} + 5{y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
Y\left( 3\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid   - 3{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{2} + 5{y}_{3} \geq  3{y}_{2}}\right\}
\]

\[
\left. {-3{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{2} + 5{y}_{3} \geq  {y}_{1} + {y}_{3}}\right\}  \text{ . }
\]

For the game \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\) , these conditions are

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于博弈 \(\left( {\widehat{A},\widehat{B}}\right)\) ，这些条件是
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
Y\left( 1\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid  3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{2} + 3{y}_{3} \geq  4{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{3},}\right.
\]

\[
\left. {3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{2} + 3{y}_{3} \geq  4{y}_{2} + 8{y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
Y\left( 2\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid  4{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{3} \geq  3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{2} + 3{y}_{3}}\right\}   \tag{9.15}
\]

\[
\left. {4{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{3} \geq  4{y}_{2} + 8{y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
Y\left( 3\right)  = \left\{  {\left( {{y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}}\right)  \in  Y \mid  4{y}_{2} + 8{y}_{3} \geq  3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{2} + 3{y}_{3}}\right\}
\]

\[
\left. {4{y}_{2} + 8{y}_{3} \geq  4{y}_{1} + 4{y}_{3}}\right\}  \text{ . }
\]

In agreement with Proposition 9.7, these two sets of conditions are completely equivalent, because the term \(3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{3}\) is added on both sides of each inequality; this corresponds to the column shift of adding the constant 3 to the first and third column of \(A\) to obtain \(\widehat{A}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
与命题 9.7 一致，这两组条件是完全等价的，因为项 \(3{y}_{1} + 3{y}_{3}\) 被加到每个不等式的两边；这对应于通过给 \(A\) 的第一列和第三列加上常数 3 以得到 \(\widehat{A}\) 的列移位。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_254_257_201_420_418_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.15 Construction of the subdivision of \(Y\) in the plane, without an upper envelope in three dimensions.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.15 在平面中对 \(Y\) 进行细分的构建，无需三维上包络。
\end{tcolorbox}

We now consider the indifferences between each pair of rows, and write them as follows:

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们现在考虑每两行之间的无差异，并将它们写成如下形式:
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\text{ ① } \sim  \text{ ②: }\;3{y}_{2} = {y}_{1} + {y}_{3}\text{ , }
\]

\[
\text{ ① } \sim  \text{ ③: }\;3{y}_{1} = {y}_{2} + 5{y}_{3}\text{ , } \tag{9.16}
\]

\[
\text{ ② } \sim  \text{ ③ } : 4{y}_{2} + 4{y}_{3} = 4{y}_{1}\text{ . }
\]

The equations in (9.16) are obtained by converting an inequality in (9.14) or (9.15) into an equality and then sorting the coefficients of \({y}_{1},{y}_{2}\) , and \({y}_{3}\) so that each variable appears only on one side of the equation with a positive coefficient (or not at all, if the variable has the same coefficient on both sides, which is not the case here). This has already been done in (9.4) for the game (9.1), where it conveniently identified the common line segment of the two best-response regions \(X\left( 4\right)\) and \(X\left( 5\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
式 (9.16) 中的方程是通过将式 (9.14) 或 (9.15) 中的不等式转换为等式，然后对 \({y}_{1},{y}_{2}\) 和 \({y}_{3}\) 的系数进行排序得到的，使得每个变量仅以正系数出现在方程的一侧(或者根本不出现，如果该变量在两边的系数相同，但这里不是这种情况)。对于博弈 (9.1) ，在式 (9.4) 中已经进行了这样的处理，在那里它方便地确定了两个最优反应区域 \(X\left( 4\right)\) 和 \(X\left( 5\right)\) 的公共线段。
\end{tcolorbox}

In the present case, the three best-response regions \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right)\) , and \(Y\left( 3\right)\) can be found by extending that approach, which is illustrated in Figure 9.15. The first equation in (9.16) shows where rows 1 and 2 have the same expected payoff. All three variables \({y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}\) appear in this equation, with \({y}_{1}\) on the left-hand side and \({y}_{2}\) and \({y}_{3}\) on the right-hand side. Setting \({y}_{3} = 0\) then gives the solution \(y = \left( {\frac{3}{4},\frac{1}{4},0}\right)\) , which is shown with a black square in Figure 9.15, and setting \({y}_{1} = 0\) gives another solution \(y = \left( {0,\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4}}\right)\) , shown as point \(a\) in the figure. The line segment that connects these two points separates \(Y\left( 1\right)\) and \(Y\left( 2\right)\) . In order to decide on which side of this line segment the labels 1 and 2 should be drawn, it is useful to identify the best responses to the pure strategies of player II, which are row 2 against \({e}_{1}\) and row 3 against both \({e}_{2}\) and \({e}_{3}\) , shown by the labels in the corner of the triangle.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在当前情况下，可以通过扩展该方法找到三个最优反应区域 \(Y\left( 1\right) ,Y\left( 2\right)\) 和 \(Y\left( 3\right)\) ，如图9.15所示。(9.16)中的第一个方程表明了行1和行2具有相同期望效用(expected payoff)的位置。该方程中出现了所有三个变量 \({y}_{1},{y}_{2},{y}_{3}\) ，其中 \({y}_{1}\) 在左侧， \({y}_{2}\) 和 \({y}_{3}\) 在右侧。令 \({y}_{3} = 0\) ，则得到解 \(y = \left( {\frac{3}{4},\frac{1}{4},0}\right)\) ，在图9.15中用黑色方块表示；令 \({y}_{1} = 0\) ，则得到另一个解 \(y = \left( {0,\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4}}\right)\) ，在图中表示为点 \(a\) 。连接这两个点的线段(line segment)将 \(Y\left( 1\right)\) 和 \(Y\left( 2\right)\) 分开。为了确定在这条线段的哪一侧应绘制标签1和2，识别对玩家II的纯策略的最优反应是有用的，即针对 \({e}_{1}\) 的最优反应是行2，针对 \({e}_{2}\) 和 \({e}_{3}\) 的最优反应是行3，这由三角形角落的标签表示。
\end{tcolorbox}

Similarly, the "extreme" solutions to the second equation in (9.16) are \(y =\)  \(\left( {\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4},0}\right)\) when \({y}_{3} = 0\) , shown as a white square in Figure 9.15, and \(b = \left( {\frac{5}{8},0,\frac{3}{8}}\right)\) when \({y}_{2} = 0\) . For the third equation in (9.16), they are \(c = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) and \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) , shown as a white circle (which shows that \({y}_{1} = \frac{1}{2}\) in any solution to this equation). The three best-response regions have a common point in the interior of \(Y\) , which can be computed (although its precise location is not relevant for the qualitative shape of the best-response diagram) as \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{4},\frac{1}{4}}\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
类似地，(9.16)中第二个方程的“极端”解是:当 \({y}_{3} = 0\) 时为 \(y =\)  \(\left( {\frac{1}{4},\frac{3}{4},0}\right)\) ，在图9.15中用白色方块表示；当 \({y}_{2} = 0\) 时为 \(b = \left( {\frac{5}{8},0,\frac{3}{8}}\right)\) 。对于(9.16)中的第三个方程，其解为 \(c = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},0}\right)\) 和 \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) ，用白色圆圈表示(这表明在该方程的任何解中 \({y}_{1} = \frac{1}{2}\) )。三个最优反应区域在 \(Y\) 的内部有一个公共点，该点可以计算得出(尽管其精确位置与最优反应示意图(best-response diagram)的定性形状无关)，计算结果为 \(\left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{4},\frac{1}{4}}\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

In order to identify the equilibria of the game (9.12), the best-response diagram in Figure 9.14 need not necessarily be constructed with full precision, only to show where the best-response regions meet in each triangle to identify the points that have three labels. The three equilibria are shown with symbols as before.

\begin{tcolorbox}
为了确定博弈(9.12)的均衡，图9.14中的最优反应示意图不必精确构建，只需显示每个三角形中最优反应区域的交汇位置，以确定具有三个标签的点。三个均衡如前所示用符号表示。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.8\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_255_418_591_1090_627_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.16 Lemke-Howson paths for the game (9.12), shown in (9.17) and (9.18), for missing label 1.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.16 博弈(9.12)中缺失标签1的莱姆基 - 豪森路径(Lemke-Howson path)，如(9.17)和(9.18)所示。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.16 shows the Lemke-Howson paths for missing label 1 for the game (9.12) using the best-response diagram in Figure 9.14. As before, the graphs \(\widetilde{X}\) and \(\widetilde{Y}\) are created by adding the point0to \(X\) and \(Y\) , which is connected to the vertices of \(X\) and \(Y\) , respectively, by an edge. The paths are as follows, where we only identify the pairs(x, y)in \(\widetilde{X} \times  \widetilde{Y}\) by their sets of labels, and equilibria by their symbols, so as not to clutter the diagram:

\begin{tcolorbox}
图9.16使用图9.14中的最优反应示意图展示了博弈(9.12)中缺失标签1的莱姆基 - 豪森路径。如前所述，图(graph) \(\widetilde{X}\) 和 \(\widetilde{Y}\) 是通过将点0分别添加到 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 中创建的，点0分别通过一条边(edge)与 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的顶点相连。路径如下，为避免图表杂乱，我们仅通过 \(\widetilde{X} \times  \widetilde{Y}\) 中的点集的标签来识别对(x, y)，并通过符号来识别均衡:
\end{tcolorbox}

(9.17) (9.18)

\begin{center}

}
\end{center}

\cline{1-3}

\end{tcolorbox}

It is a useful exercise to find the Lemke-Howson paths in Figure 9.16 for each missing label. For example, the equilibrium \(\left( {\left( {0,\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) }\right)\) marked with a white circle is found from the artificial equilibrium(0,0)for missing label 3, so this is different from the equilibrium found for missing label 1 . The LH path that starts at the white circle for missing label 1 again is shown in (9.18) and finds the third equilibrium. By considering all possible missing labels, one can construct a "network" of LH paths that can be traversed back and forth. However, this network may be disconnected, so that not all equilibria are found when starting from the artificial equilibrium; see Exercise 9.1.

\begin{tcolorbox}
针对每个缺失标签，找出图9.16中的莱姆基 - 豪森路径是一项有益的练习。例如，用白色圆圈标记的均衡 \(\left( {\left( {0,\frac{2}{3},\frac{1}{3}}\right) ,\left( {\frac{1}{2},0,\frac{1}{2}}\right) }\right)\) 是从人工均衡(0,0)出发，针对缺失标签3找到的，因此这与针对缺失标签1找到的均衡不同。针对缺失标签1，再次从白色圆圈开始的莱姆基 - 豪森路径如(9.18)所示，并能找到第三个均衡。通过考虑所有可能的缺失标签，可以构建一个能够来回遍历的莱姆基 - 豪森路径“网络”。然而，这个网络可能是不连通的，因此从人工均衡出发时，并非所有的均衡都能被找到；参见练习9.1。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{9.6 Best-Response Polyhedra and Polytopes}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{9.6 最优反应多面体和有界多面体}
\end{tcolorbox}

As shown in the previous two sections, best-response diagrams help visualize the structure of equilibria in \(3 \times  3\) games. They are also a good basis for general algorithms to find equilibria in larger bimatrix games. These algorithms, including the Lemke-Howson algorithm, are based on the upper envelope diagram, which has a general definition in terms of suitable "best-response polyhedra", as we explain in this section.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如前两节所示，最优反应示意图有助于直观呈现双矩阵博弈( \(3 \times  3\) )中均衡的结构。它们也是在更大的双矩阵博弈中寻找均衡的通用算法的良好基础。包括莱姆基 - 豪森算法在内的这些算法，都基于上包络图，我们将在本节中说明，该图依据合适的“最优反应多面体”有一个通用定义。
\end{tcolorbox}

As mentioned earlier, a hyperplane \(H\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) is a set \(H = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z = \alpha }\right\}\) for a nonzero normal vector \(v\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and a real number \(\alpha\) . The corresponding halfspace is defined as \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha }\right\}\) . A polyhedron is the intersection of a finite number of halfspaces. If the polyhedron \(S\) is the intersection of \(n\) halfspaces \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {c}_{i}^{\top }z \leq  {q}_{i}}\right\}\) with \({c}_{i} \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) and \({q}_{i} \in  \mathbb{R}\) for \(i = 1,\ldots ,n\) , then it can be written as

\begin{tcolorbox}
如前所述， \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的超平面 \(H\) 是一个集合 \(H = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z = \alpha }\right\}\) ，其中 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中的非零法向量为 \(v\) ，实数为 \(\alpha\) 。相应的半空间定义为 \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha }\right\}\) 。多面体是有限个半空间的交集。如果多面体 \(S\) 是 \(n\) 个半空间 \(\left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {c}_{i}^{\top }z \leq  {q}_{i}}\right\}\) 的交集，其中 \({c}_{i} \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 且 \({q}_{i} \in  \mathbb{R}\) ，对于 \(i = 1,\ldots ,n\) ，那么它可以写成
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
S = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  {Cz} \leq  q}\right\}   \tag{9.19}
\]

for the \(n \times  d\) matrix \(C\) and \(q \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n}\) where \({C}^{\top } = \left\lbrack  {{c}_{1}\cdots {c}_{n}}\right\rbrack\) , that is, \({c}_{i}^{\top }\) is the \(i\) th row of \(C\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(n \times  d\) 矩阵 \(C\) 和 \(q \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n}\) ，其中 \({C}^{\top } = \left\lbrack  {{c}_{1}\cdots {c}_{n}}\right\rbrack\) ，即 \({c}_{i}^{\top }\) 是 \(C\) 的第 \(i\) 行。
\end{tcolorbox}

If \(z \in  S\) and \({c}_{i}^{\top }z = {q}_{i}\) , then we say that the \(i\) th inequality \({c}_{i}^{\top }z \leq  {q}_{i}\) in (9.19) is tight for \(z\) (that is, holds as an equality). A face \(F\) of \(S\) is obtained by requiring some of the \(n\) inequalities in (9.19) to be tight (as a result, \(F\) may be the empty set). That is, \(F = \left\{  {z \in  S \mid  {c}_{i}^{\top }z = {q}_{i}}\right.\) for \(\left. {i \in  T}\right\}\) for some set \(T \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) . There are \({2}^{n}\) ways of choosing \(T\) (some of which may define the same face \(F\) ), so the number of faces is finite. If the face consists of a single point, this is called a vertex of the polyhedron. A bounded polyhedron is called a polytope. It can be shown that every polytope is the convex hull of its vertices, which agrees with our earlier definition of a polytope as the convex hull of a finite set of points in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \(z \in  S\) 且 \({c}_{i}^{\top }z = {q}_{i}\) ，那么我们称 (9.19) 中的第 \(i\) 个不等式 \({c}_{i}^{\top }z \leq  {q}_{i}\) 对于 \(z\) 是紧的(即，取等号成立)。通过要求 (9.19) 中的某些 \(n\) 不等式为紧不等式(结果是， \(F\) 可能为空集)，可以得到 \(S\) 的一个面 \(F\) 。也就是说，对于某个集合 \(T \subseteq  \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) 中的 \(\left. {i \in  T}\right\}\) ，有 \(F = \left\{  {z \in  S \mid  {c}_{i}^{\top }z = {q}_{i}}\right.\) 。选择 \(T\) 有 \({2}^{n}\) 种方式(其中一些可能定义相同的面 \(F\) )，因此面的数量是有限的。如果这个面由单个点组成，那么这个点被称为多面体的顶点。有界多面体称为有界多面体(polytope)。可以证明，每个有界多面体都是其顶点的凸包，这与我们之前将有界多面体定义为 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中有限点集的凸包是一致的。
\end{tcolorbox}

The mixed-strategy sets \(X\) and \(Y\left( {6.6}\right)\) are polytopes, because they are clearly bounded, and defined by a number of linear inequalities and one linear equation (any equation \({v}^{\top }z = \alpha\) can be written as two inequalities \({v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha\) and \(- {v}^{\top }z \leq   - \alpha\) ).

\begin{tcolorbox}
混合策略集 \(X\) 和 \(Y\left( {6.6}\right)\) 是有界多面体，因为它们显然是有界的，并且由多个线性不等式和一个线性方程定义(任何方程 \({v}^{\top }z = \alpha\) 都可以写成两个不等式 \({v}^{\top }z \leq  \alpha\) 和 \(- {v}^{\top }z \leq   - \alpha\) )。
\end{tcolorbox}

As a central concept of this section, we consider the following best-response polyhedra \(\bar{P}\) for player \(\mathrm{I}\) and \(\bar{Q}\) for player \(\mathrm{{II}}\) , for an \(m \times  n\) bimatrix game(A, B):

\begin{tcolorbox}
作为本节的核心概念，对于一个 \(m \times  n\) 双矩阵博弈 (A, B)，我们考虑玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 的以下最优反应多面体 \(\bar{P}\) 和玩家 \(\mathrm{{II}}\) 的 \(\bar{Q}\) :
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\bar{P} = \left\{  {\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  X \times  \mathbb{R} \mid  {B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v}\right\}  , \tag{9.20}
\]

\[
\bar{Q} = \{ \left( {y,u}\right)  \in  Y \times  \mathbb{R} \mid  {Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}u\} .
\]

For the game (9.1), the inequalities \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) that (in addition to \(x \in  X\) ) define \(\bar{P}\) are

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于博弈 (9.1)，(除 \(x \in  X\) 之外)定义 \(\bar{P}\) 的不等式 \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) 为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
2{x}_{1}\; + 4{x}_{3} \leq  v \tag{9.21}
\]

\[
{x}_{2} + {x}_{3} \leq  v
\]

and the inequalities \({Ay} \leq  {1u}\) that (in addition to \(y \in  Y\) ) define \(\bar{Q}\) are

\begin{tcolorbox}
并且，(除 \(y \in  Y\) 之外)定义 \(\bar{Q}\) 的不等式 \({Ay} \leq  {1u}\) 为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
2{y}_{1}\; \leq  u,
\]

\[
{y}_{1} + 2{y}_{2} \leq  u \tag{9.22}
\]

\[
3{y}_{2} \leq  u\text{ . }
\]

They are displayed in the upper envelope diagrams in Figures 9.2 and 9.1 where \(v\) and \(u\) are at least the payoff to player II and player I, respectively. (Because \(v\) and \(u\) have no upper bound, \(\bar{P}\) and \(\bar{Q}\) are polyhedra but not polytopes.) As soon as at least one of the inequalities in (9.21) and (9.22) is tight, \(v\) and \(u\) are equal to the best-response payoff because they cannot take a lower value. That is, for given \(x \in  X\) and \(y \in  Y\) ,

\begin{tcolorbox}
它们显示在图 9.2 和图 9.1 的上包络图中，其中 \(v\) 和 \(u\) 分别至少是玩家 II 和玩家 I 的收益。(因为 \(v\) 和 \(u\) 没有上界，所以 \(\bar{P}\) 和 \(\bar{Q}\) 是多面体但不是有界多面体。)一旦 (9.21) 和 (9.22) 中的至少一个不等式是紧的， \(v\) 和 \(u\) 就等于最优反应收益，因为它们不能取更低的值。也就是说，对于给定的 \(x \in  X\) 和 \(y \in  Y\) ，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\min \{ v \mid  \left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\}  = \max \left\{  {{\left( {B}^{\top }x\right) }_{j} \mid  1 \leq  j \leq  n}\right\}  ,
\]

\[
\min \{ u \mid  \left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\}  = \max \left\{  {{\left( Ay\right) }_{i} \mid  1 \leq  i \leq  m}\right\}  ,
\]

which is just the familiar definition of the upper envelope of expected payoffs. Assuming that at least one of the inequalities in \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) is tight (which defines \(v\) as the best-response payoff to \(x\) ), the tight inequalities in \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) correspond to the pure best responses to \(x\) . Similarly, the tight inequalities in \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}u\) (if at least one is tight) correspond to the pure best responses to \(y\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这正是我们熟悉的期望效用上包络的定义。假设 \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) 中的至少一个不等式是紧的(这将 \(v\) 定义为对 \(x\) 的最优反应收益)， \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) 中的紧不等式对应于对 \(x\) 的纯最优反应。类似地， \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}u\) 中的紧不等式(如果至少有一个是紧的)对应于对 \(y\) 的纯最优反应。
\end{tcolorbox}

Hence, we can identify the labels that denote the pure strategies \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) of the players as in (9.2) with the tight inequalities in \(\bar{P}\) and \(\bar{Q}\) . Let \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) with \(v\) as best-response payoff to \(x\) , let \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) with \(u\) as best-response payoff to \(y\) , and \(1 \leq  i \leq  m\) and \(1 \leq  j \leq  n\) . Then, in agreement with Definition 9.1,

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，我们可以将表示参与者纯策略 \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) 的标签(如 (9.2) 中所示)与 \(\bar{P}\) 和 \(\bar{Q}\) 中的紧不等式相对应。设 \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) ，其中 \(v\) 是对 \(x\) 的最优响应收益；设 \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) ，其中 \(u\) 是对 \(y\) 的最优响应收益，且 \(1 \leq  i \leq  m\) 和 \(1 \leq  j \leq  n\) 。那么，根据定义 9.1，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
x\text{ has label }i \Leftrightarrow  {x}_{i} = 0\text{ , }
\]

\[
x\text{ has label }m + j\; \Leftrightarrow  \;{\left( {B}^{\top }x\right) }_{j} = v\text{ , } \tag{9.23}
\]

\[
y\text{ has label }i\; \Leftrightarrow  \;{\left( Ay\right) }_{i} = u\text{ , }
\]

\[
y\text{ has label }m + j\; \Leftrightarrow  \;{y}_{j} = 0\text{ . }
\]

We can therefore rephrase Theorem 9.2 as follows.

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，我们可以将定理 9.2 重新表述如下。
\end{tcolorbox}

Corollary 9.8. Let \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) and \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) . Then(x, y)is an equilibrium of(A, B) with equilibrium payoffs \(u\) and \(v\) to players \(I\) and \({II}\) if and only if(x, y)is completely labeled.

\begin{tcolorbox}
推论 9.8。设 \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) 和 \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) 。那么，(x, y) 是 (A, B) 的一个均衡，参与者 \(I\) 和 \({II}\) 的均衡收益分别为 \(u\) 和 \(v\) ，当且仅当 (x, y) 是完全标记的。
\end{tcolorbox}

In Definition 9.1, labels are defined in terms of the best-response regions \(Y\left( i\right)\) and \(X\left( j\right)\) in (9.3), and the zero faces of \(X\) and \(Y\) in (9.5). The best-response regions are polytopes, for example as in (9.14). While the best-response regions are convenient to draw in low dimension (in particular as subsets of a triangle), the definition as faces of the best-response polyhedra \(\bar{P}\) and \(\bar{Q}\) requires only a single tight inequality per label, by adding one more dimension for the payoff \(v\) or \(u\) to the other player.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在定义 9.1 中，标签是根据 (9.3) 中的最优响应区域 \(Y\left( i\right)\) 和 \(X\left( j\right)\) 以及 (9.5) 中 \(X\) 和 \(Y\) 的零面来定义的。最优响应区域是有界多面体，例如 (9.14) 中的情况。虽然最优响应区域在低维度(特别是作为三角形的子集)中便于绘制，但将其定义为最优响应多面体 \(\bar{P}\) 和 \(\bar{Q}\) 的面时，每个标签只需要一个紧不等式，只需为另一个参与者的收益 \(v\) 或 \(u\) 增加一个维度。
\end{tcolorbox}

We now simplify the best-response polyhedra further by eliminating these payoff variables, and replacing the mixed strategies \(x\) and \(y\) by arbitrary nonnegative vectors. Let

\begin{tcolorbox}
现在，我们通过消除这些收益变量，并将混合策略 \(x\) 和 \(y\) 替换为任意非负向量，进一步简化最优响应多面体。设
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
P = \left\{  {x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{m} \mid  x \geq  \mathbf{0},{B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}}\right\}  , \tag{9.24}
\]

\[
Q = \left\{  {y \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n} \mid  {Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1},\;y \geq  \mathbf{0}}\right\}  .
\]

For the game (9.1), \(P\) is defined by the inequalities \({x}_{1} \geq  0,{x}_{2} \geq  0,{x}_{3} \geq  0\) , and

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于博弈 (9.1)， \(P\) 由不等式 \({x}_{1} \geq  0,{x}_{2} \geq  0,{x}_{3} \geq  0\) 定义，并且
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
2{x}_{1}\; + 4{x}_{3} \leq  1
\]

\[
{x}_{2} + {x}_{3} \leq  1
\]

so that \(P\) is the intersection of the "wedges" \({x}_{3} \leq  \frac{1}{4} - \frac{1}{2}{x}_{1}\) and \({x}_{3} \leq  1 - {x}_{2}\) shown on the left in Figure 9.17. The constraints for \(Q\) are \({y}_{1} \geq  0,{y}_{2} \geq  0\) , and

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此， \(P\) 是图 9.17 左侧所示的“楔形” \({x}_{3} \leq  \frac{1}{4} - \frac{1}{2}{x}_{1}\) 和 \({x}_{3} \leq  1 - {x}_{2}\) 的交集。 \(Q\) 的约束条件是 \({y}_{1} \geq  0,{y}_{2} \geq  0\) ，并且
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
2{y}_{1}\; \leq  1
\]

\[
{y}_{1} + 2{y}_{2} \leq  1 \tag{9.25}
\]

\[
3{y}_{2} \leq  1
\]

which translate to \({y}_{1} \leq  \frac{1}{2},{y}_{2} \leq  \frac{1}{2} - \frac{1}{2}{y}_{1},{y}_{2} \leq  \frac{1}{3}\) , and define a polygon in \({\mathbb{R}}^{2}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这转化为 \({y}_{1} \leq  \frac{1}{2},{y}_{2} \leq  \frac{1}{2} - \frac{1}{2}{y}_{1},{y}_{2} \leq  \frac{1}{3}\) ，并在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{2}\) 中定义了一个多边形。
\end{tcolorbox}

In general, we want \(P\) and \(Q\) to be polytopes, which is equivalent to \(v > 0\) and \(u > 0\) for any \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) and \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) , according to the following lemma.

\begin{tcolorbox}
一般来说，我们希望 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 是有界多面体，根据以下引理，这等价于对于任何 \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) 和 \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) 有 \(v > 0\) 和 \(u > 0\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 9.9. Consider an \(m \times  n\) bimatrix game(A, B). Then \(P\) in (9.24) is a polytope if and only if the best-response payoff to any \(x\) in \(X\) is always positive, and \(Q\) in (9.24) is a polytope if and only if the best-response payoff to any \(y\) in \(Y\) is always positive.

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 9.9。考虑一个 \(m \times  n\) 双矩阵博弈 (A, B)。那么，(9.24) 中的 \(P\) 是有界多面体，当且仅当对 \(X\) 中任何 \(x\) 的最优响应收益总是正的；(9.24) 中的 \(Q\) 是有界多面体，当且仅当对 \(Y\) 中任何 \(y\) 的最优响应收益总是正的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. We prove the statement for \(Q\) ; the proof for \(P\) is analogous. The best-response payoff to any mixed strategy \(y\) is the maximum entry of \({Ay}\) , so this is not always positive if and only if \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{0}\) for some \(y \in  Y\) . For such a \(y\) we have \(y \geq  0,y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) , and \({y\alpha } \in  Q\) for any \(\alpha  \geq  0\) , which shows that \(Q\) is not bounded. Conversely, suppose the best-response payoff \(u\) to any \(y\) is always positive. Because

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。我们针对 \(Q\) 来证明该命题；针对 \(P\) 的证明是类似的。对任何混合策略 \(y\) 的最优反应收益是 \({Ay}\) 中的最大元素，因此，当且仅当对于某个 \(y \in  Y\) 有 \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{0}\) 时，它并非总是正的。对于这样的 \(y\) ，我们有 \(y \geq  0,y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) ，并且对于任何 \(\alpha  \geq  0\) 有 \({y\alpha } \in  Q\) ，这表明 \(Q\) 是无界的。反之，假设对任何 \(y\) 的最优反应收益 \(u\) 总是正的。因为
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_259_340_209_1254_531_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.17 The polytopes \(P\) and \(Q\) for the example (9.12).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.17 示例 (9.12) 中的有界多面体(polytope) \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\(Y\) is compact and \(\bar{Q}\) is closed, the minimum \({u}^{\prime }\) of \(\{ u \mid  \left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\}\) exists, \({u}^{\prime } > 0\) , and \(u \geq  {u}^{\prime }\) for all(y, u)in \(\bar{Q}\) . Then the map

\begin{tcolorbox}
由于 \(Y\) 是紧致的且 \(\bar{Q}\) 是闭集， \(\{ u \mid  \left( {y,u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\}\) 的最小值 \({u}^{\prime }\) 存在， \({u}^{\prime } > 0\) ，并且对于 \(\bar{Q}\) 中的所有 (y, u) 有 \(u \geq  {u}^{\prime }\) 。那么映射
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\bar{Q} \rightarrow  Q - \{ \mathbf{0}\} ,\;\left( {y,u}\right)  \mapsto  y\frac{1}{u} \tag{9.26}
\]

is a bijection with inverse \(z \mapsto  \left( {z\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z},\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z}}\right)\) for \(z \in  Q - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) . Here, \(\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z} \geq  {u}^{\prime }\) and thus \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }z \leq  \frac{1}{{u}^{\prime }}\) , where \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }z = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{j = 1}}^{n}\left| {z}_{j}\right|\) because \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) , which proves that \(Q\) is bounded and therefore a polytope.

\begin{tcolorbox}
是一个双射，其逆映射为对于 \(z \in  Q - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) 的 \(z \mapsto  \left( {z\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z},\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z}}\right)\) 。这里， \(\frac{1}{{1}^{\top }z} \geq  {u}^{\prime }\) 且因此 \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }z \leq  \frac{1}{{u}^{\prime }}\) ，其中 \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }z = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{j = 1}}^{n}\left| {z}_{j}\right|\) 是因为 \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) ，这证明了 \(Q\) 是有界的，从而是一个有界多面体(polytope)。
\end{tcolorbox}

As a sufficient condition that \(v > 0\) and \(u > 0\) hold for any(x, v)in \(\bar{P}\) and(y, u) in \(\bar{Q}\) , we assume that

\begin{tcolorbox}
作为对于 \(\bar{P}\) 中的任何 (x, v) 和 \(\bar{Q}\) 中的任何 (y, u) 使 \(v > 0\) 和 \(u > 0\) 成立的一个充分条件，我们假设
\end{tcolorbox}

\(A\) and \({B}^{\top }\) are nonnegative and have no zero column

\begin{tcolorbox}
\(A\) 和 \({B}^{\top }\) 是非负的且没有零列
\end{tcolorbox}

(9.27)

(because then \({B}^{\top }x\) and \({Ay}\) are nonnegative and nonzero for any \(x \in  X\) and \(y \in  Y\) ). We could simply assume \(A > 0\) and \(B > 0\) , but it is useful to admit zero entries in a payoff matrix, like in our examples. Note that condition (9.27) is not necessary for positive best-response payoffs (which is still the case, for example, if the lower left entry of \(A\) in (9.1) is negative, as Figure 9.1 shows; see also Exercise 9.5). By adding a suitable positive constant to all payoffs of a player, which preserves the preferences of that player (and where the original payoff is recovered by simply substracting the constant), we can assume (9.27) without loss of generality.

\begin{tcolorbox}
(因为这样对于任何 \(x \in  X\) 和 \(y \in  Y\) ， \({B}^{\top }x\) 和 \({Ay}\) 是非负且非零的)。我们可以简单地假设 \(A > 0\) 和 \(B > 0\) ，但允许收益矩阵中有零元素是有用的，就像我们的示例中那样。注意，条件 (9.27) 对于正的最优反应收益并非必要条件(例如，如图 9.1 所示，如果 (9.1) 中 \(A\) 的左下角元素为负，情况仍然如此；另见练习 9.5)。通过给一个参与者的所有收益加上一个合适的正常数，这会保持该参与者的偏好(并且通过简单地减去这个常数就可以恢复原始收益)，我们可以不失一般性地假设 (9.27)。
\end{tcolorbox}

With positive best-response payoffs, the polytope \(P\) (apart from its vertex0) is obtained from \(\bar{P}\) by dividing each inequality \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{m}{b}_{ij}{x}_{i} \leq  v\) by \(v\) , which gives \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{m}{b}_{ij}\left( {{x}_{i}/v}\right)  \leq  1\) , and then treating \({x}_{i}/v\) as a new variable that is again called \({x}_{i}\) in \(P\) . Similarly, \(Q - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) is obtained from \(\bar{Q}\) by dividing each inequality in \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}u\) by \(u\) . In effect, we have normalized the expected payoffs to be 1, and dropped the conditions \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x = 1\) and \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }y = 1\) . Conversely, nonzero vectors \(x \in  P\) and \(y \in  Q\) are multiplied by \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) and \(u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }y}\) to turn them into probability vectors. The scaling factors \(v\) and \(u\) are the expected payoffs to the other player.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在最佳响应效用为正的情况下，有界多面体 \(P\) (除了其顶点 0)是通过将 \(\bar{P}\) 中的每个不等式 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{m}{b}_{ij}{x}_{i} \leq  v\) 除以 \(v\) 得到的，这会得到 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{m}{b}_{ij}\left( {{x}_{i}/v}\right)  \leq  1\) ，然后将 \({x}_{i}/v\) 视为一个新变量，在 \(P\) 中再次称为 \({x}_{i}\) 。类似地， \(Q - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) 是通过将 \(\bar{Q}\) 中 \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}u\) 的每个不等式除以 \(u\) 得到的。实际上，我们已将期望效用归一化为 1，并去掉了条件 \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x = 1\) 和 \({\mathbf{1}}^{\top }y = 1\) 。相反，非零向量 \(x \in  P\) 和 \(y \in  Q\) 分别乘以 \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) 和 \(u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }y}\) 以将它们转换为概率向量。缩放因子 \(v\) 和 \(u\) 是另一个参与者的期望效用。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_260_200_255_1260_713_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.18 The projective transformation in (9.26), shown on the left for a single component \({y}_{j}\) of \(y\) , on the right for \(\bar{Q}\) as in Figure 9.1 and \(Q\) in (9.25).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.18 展示了 (9.26) 中的射影变换，左侧展示了 \(y\) 的单个分量 \({y}_{j}\) 的情况，右侧展示了如图 9.1 中的 \(\bar{Q}\) 以及 (9.25) 中的 \(Q\) 的情况。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 9.18 shows a geometric interpretation of this division by the expected payoff, that is, the bijection (9.26), as a so-called "projective transformation". The left diagram shows the pair \(\left( {{y}_{j},u}\right)\) as part of(y, u)in \(\bar{Q}\) for any component \({y}_{j}\) of \(y\) . The line that connects this pair to(0,0)contains the point \(\left( {{y}_{j}/u,1}\right)\) . Hence, \(\left( {Q-\{ \mathbf{0}\} }\right)  \times  \{ 1\}\) is the intersection of the lines that connect any(y, u)in \(\bar{Q}\) with (0,0)in \({\mathbb{R}}^{n} \times  \mathbb{R}\) with the "horizontal" hyperplane \({\mathbb{R}}^{n} \times  \{ 1\}\) . The vertex0of \(Q\) does not arise as such a projection, but corresponds to \(\bar{Q}\) "at infinity".

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.18 展示了这种除以期望效用操作的几何解释，即双射 (9.26)，也就是所谓的“射影变换”。左图展示了对于 \(y\) 的任何分量 \({y}_{j}\) ， \(\left( {{y}_{j},u}\right)\) 作为 \(\bar{Q}\) 中 (y, u) 的一部分。连接该对与 (0, 0) 的直线包含点 \(\left( {{y}_{j}/u,1}\right)\) 。因此， \(\left( {Q-\{ \mathbf{0}\} }\right)  \times  \{ 1\}\) 是连接 \(\bar{Q}\) 中任何 (y, u) 与 \({\mathbb{R}}^{n} \times  \mathbb{R}\) 中 (0, 0) 的直线与“水平”超平面 \({\mathbb{R}}^{n} \times  \{ 1\}\) 的交点。 \(Q\) 的顶点 0 并非这样的投影产生的，而是对应于 \(\bar{Q}\) “在无穷远处”。
\end{tcolorbox}

The maps \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \mapsto  x\frac{1}{v}\) from \(\bar{P}\) to \(P\) and \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \mapsto  y\frac{1}{u}\) from \(\bar{Q}\) to \(Q\) preserve inequalities and when they are tight. Hence, we can label the inequalities in \(P\) and \(Q\) with the players’ pure strategies \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) , which is why we have written them in the order \(x \geq  \mathbf{0},{B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) and \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}v,y \geq  \mathbf{0}\) in (9.24). Consequently, we obtain one more time the characterization of equilibria as completely labeled pairs of points, this time in \(P \times  Q - \{ \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right) \}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
从 \(\bar{P}\) 到 \(P\) 的映射 \(\left( {x,v}\right)  \mapsto  x\frac{1}{v}\) 以及从 \(\bar{Q}\) 到 \(Q\) 的映射 \(\left( {y,u}\right)  \mapsto  y\frac{1}{u}\) 保持不等式及其紧性。因此，我们可以用参与者的纯策略 \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) 为 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 中的不等式添加标签，这就是为什么我们在 (9.24) 中按照 \(x \geq  \mathbf{0},{B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}v\) 和 \({Ay} \leq  \mathbf{1}v,y \geq  \mathbf{0}\) 的顺序书写它们。因此，我们再次得到了将均衡刻画为完全标记的点对的结果，这次是在 \(P \times  Q - \{ \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right) \}\) 中。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 9.10. Let(A, B)be an \(m \times  n\) bimatrix game so that (9.27) holds, and consider \(P\) and \(Q\) in (9.24) with their \(m + n\) inequalities labeled \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) , so that any \(x \in  P\) and \(y \in  Q\) have the labels of the tight inequalities. Then \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) is an equilibrium of(A, B) with equilibrium payoffs \(u\) and \(v\) to players \(I\) and \({II}\) if and only if \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \in  P \times  Q - \{ \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right) \}\) and(x, y)is completely labeled, \(x = \bar{x}\frac{1}{v},y = \bar{y}\frac{1}{u},u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }y}\) , and \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题9.10。设(A, B)为一个双矩阵博弈(bimatrix game)，使得(9.27)式成立，并考虑(9.24)式中的 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) ，它们的紧不等式(tight inequality)标记为 \(1,\ldots ,m + n\) ，从而任意的 \(x \in  P\) 和 \(y \in  Q\) 具有紧不等式的标签(label)。那么 \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) 是(A, B)的一个均衡(equilibrium)，玩家 \(I\) 和 \({II}\) 的均衡收益分别为 \(u\) 和 \(v\) ，当且仅当 \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \in  P \times  Q - \{ \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right) \}\) 且(x, y)是完全标记的(completely labeled)， \(x = \bar{x}\frac{1}{v},y = \bar{y}\frac{1}{u},u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }y}\) ，以及 \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Condition (9.27) implies \(u > 0\) and \(v > 0\) for all \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) and \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) , so that the maps \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \mapsto  x = \bar{x}\frac{1}{v} \in  P\) and \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \mapsto  y = \bar{y}\frac{1}{u} \in  Q\) are well defined, and they preserve inequalities and when these inequalities are tight, so that the labels of \(\bar{x}\) are the labels of \(x\) and the labels of \(\bar{y}\) are the labels of \(y\) . Hence, if \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) is an equilibrium, then \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) and therefore(x, y)is completely labeled by Corollary 9.8.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。条件(9.27)意味着对于所有的 \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) 和 \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) ，有 \(u > 0\) 和 \(v > 0\) ，因此映射 \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \mapsto  x = \bar{x}\frac{1}{v} \in  P\) 和 \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \mapsto  y = \bar{y}\frac{1}{u} \in  Q\) 是良定义的，并且它们保持不等式关系，当这些不等式是紧不等式时， \(\bar{x}\) 的标签就是 \(x\) 的标签， \(\bar{y}\) 的标签就是 \(y\) 的标签。因此，如果 \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) 是一个均衡，那么根据推论9.8， \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) 且因此(x, y)是完全标记的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Conversely, suppose \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \in  P \times  Q\) is completely labeled and \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \neq  \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right)\) . If \(x = \mathbf{0}\) then \(y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) , so that \({y}_{j} \neq  0\) for some \(j \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) and \(y\) does not have label \(m + j\) ; this means that(x, y)is not completely labeled because \(x\) has only the labels \(1,\ldots ,m\) , a contradiction. Hence, \(x \neq  \mathbf{0}\) , and similarly \(y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) . By the same reasoning, \(x\) has some label \(m + j\) , which by (9.23) means that at least one inequality in \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}\) is tight, so that \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) is the best-response payoff to \(\bar{x} = {xv}\) for \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) . Similarly, \(y\) in \(P\) has some label \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,m\}\) , which means \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i} = 1\) , so that \(u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\mathrm{\;T}}y}\) is the best-response payoff to \(\bar{y} = {yu}\) for \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) . This proves the claim.

\begin{tcolorbox}
反之，假设 \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \in  P \times  Q\) 是完全标记的且 \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \neq  \left( {\mathbf{0},\mathbf{0}}\right)\) 。如果 \(x = \mathbf{0}\) ，那么 \(y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) ，使得对于某个 \(j \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) 和 \(y\) ， \({y}_{j} \neq  0\) 没有标签 \(m + j\) ；这意味着(x, y)不是完全标记的，因为 \(x\) 只有标签 \(1,\ldots ,m\) ，这是一个矛盾。因此， \(x \neq  \mathbf{0}\) ，并且类似地有 \(y \neq  \mathbf{0}\) 。通过同样的推理， \(x\) 有某个标签 \(m + j\) ，根据(9.23)式，这意味着 \({B}^{\top }x \leq  \mathbf{1}\) 中至少有一个不等式是紧不等式，从而 \(v = \frac{1}{{1}^{\top }x}\) 是 \(\left( {\bar{x},v}\right)  \in  \bar{P}\) 对 \(\bar{x} = {xv}\) 的最优反应收益。类似地， \(P\) 中的 \(y\) 有某个标签 \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,m\}\) ，这意味着 \({\left( Ay\right) }_{i} = 1\) ，从而 \(u = \frac{1}{{1}^{\mathrm{\;T}}y}\) 是 \(\left( {\bar{y},u}\right)  \in  \bar{Q}\) 对 \(\bar{y} = {yu}\) 的最优反应收益。这就证明了该命题。
\end{tcolorbox}

The last paragraph in the preceding proof shows that we do not need to worry about the possibilities \({B}^{\top }x < \mathbf{1}\) or \({Ay} < \mathbf{1}\) in \(P\) or \(Q\) (that is, no tight inequalities) when considering completely labeled pairs(x, y)in \(P \times  Q\) . There is one obvious exception to this, namely the pair(0,0)in \(P \times  Q\) , which takes the role of the artificial equilibrium for the Lemke-Howson algorithm in a natural way; it does not have to be added like in \(\widetilde{X} \times  \widetilde{Y}\) . For our example (9.1), Figure 9.19 shows the Lemke-Howson paths on \(P \times  Q\) for missing label 2. They traverse the almost completely labeled vertex pairs of \(P\) and \(Q\) , which we identify by their sets of labels exactly as in (9.7) and (9.8).

\begin{tcolorbox}
上述证明的最后一段表明，当考虑 \(P \times  Q\) 中的完全标记对 (x, y) 时，我们无需担心 \(P\) 或 \(Q\) 中出现 \({B}^{\top }x < \mathbf{1}\) 或 \({Ay} < \mathbf{1}\) 的情况(即不存在紧不等式)。有一个明显的例外，即 \(P \times  Q\) 中的对 (0, 0)，它自然地充当了莱姆基 - 豪森算法的人工均衡点；不像在 \(\widetilde{X} \times  \widetilde{Y}\) 中那样需要额外添加。对于我们的示例 (9.1)，图 9.19 展示了 \(P \times  Q\) 上缺失标签 2 的莱姆基 - 豪森路径。它们遍历了 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 的几乎完全标记的顶点对，我们通过它们的标签集来精确识别这些顶点对，就像在 (9.7) 和 (9.8) 中那样。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_261_338_1222_1253_375_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 9.19 The Lemke-Howson paths from Figure 9.5 for missing label 2 on the polytopes \(P\) and \(Q\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 9.19 图 9.5 中在多面体 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 上缺失标签 2 的莱姆基 - 豪森路径。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{9.7 Complementary Pivoting}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{9.7 互补换基法}
\end{tcolorbox}

We now describe how the Lemke-Howson algorithm works algebraically and in any dimension. As always, we consider an \(m \times  n\) bimatrix game(A, B). Let \(C\) be the \(d \times  d\) matrix defined by

\begin{tcolorbox}
现在我们从代数角度描述莱姆基 - 豪森算法在任意维度下的工作原理。和往常一样，我们考虑一个 \(m \times  n\) 双矩阵博弈 (A, B)。设 \(C\) 是由下式定义的 \(d \times  d\) 矩阵
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
d = m + n,\;C = \left( \begin{matrix} 0 & A \\  {B}^{\top } & 0 \end{matrix}\right) . \tag{9.28}
\]

In agreement with (9.27) we assume, without loss of generality, that \(C\) is nonnegative and has no zero column. Then \(S = P \times  Q\) is a polytope, which can be written as

\begin{tcolorbox}
与 (9.27) 一致，不失一般性，我们假设 \(C\) 是非负的且没有零列。那么 \(S = P \times  Q\) 是一个有界多面体，可以写成
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
S = \left\{  {z \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d} \mid  z \geq  \mathbf{0},{Cz} \leq  \mathbf{1}}\right\}   \tag{9.29}
\]

where \(z \in  S = P \times  Q\) means

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中 \(z \in  S = P \times  Q\) 表示
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
z = \left( {x,y}\right) ,\;{z}_{i} = {x}_{i}\;\left( {1 \leq  i \leq  m}\right) ,\;{z}_{m + j} = {y}_{j}\;\left( {1 \leq  j \leq  n}\right) . \tag{9.30}
\]

We label both the \(d\) inequalities \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) and the \(d\) inequalities \({Cz} \leq  \mathbf{1}\) in (9.29) with labels \(1,\ldots ,d\) . As usual, any \(z\) in \(S\) gets the labels of the tight inequalities. The \(d\) labels correspond to the players’ pure strategies as in (9.2) and (9.23). An equilibrium \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) of(A, B)then corresponds to a completely labeled point \(z = \left( {x,y}\right)\) of \(S - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) (that is, \(z\) has all labels \(1,\ldots ,d\) ), via the normalizations \(\bar{x} = x\frac{1}{{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x}\) and \(\bar{y} = y\frac{1}{{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }y}\) in Proposition 9.10.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们用标签 \(1,\ldots ,d\) 标记 (9.29) 中的 \(d\) 个不等式 \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) 和 \(d\) 个不等式 \({Cz} \leq  \mathbf{1}\) 。和往常一样， \(S\) 中的任何 \(z\) 都获得紧不等式的标签。 \(d\) 个标签对应于 (9.2) 和 (9.23) 中玩家的纯策略。通过命题 9.10 中的归一化 \(\bar{x} = x\frac{1}{{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x}\) 和 \(\bar{y} = y\frac{1}{{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }y}\) ，(A, B) 的一个均衡 \(\left( {\bar{x},\bar{y}}\right)\) 对应于 \(S - \{ \mathbf{0}\}\) 的一个完全标记点 \(z = \left( {x,y}\right)\) (即 \(z\) 拥有所有标签 \(1,\ldots ,d\) )。
\end{tcolorbox}

For an algebraic treatment, we write the inequalities \({Cz} \leq  \mathbf{1}\) in (9.29) with nonnegative "slack variables" \(w \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) as the equality and nonnegativity constraints \({Cz} + w = \mathbf{1},w \geq  \mathbf{0}\) . Then \(z \in  S\) has label \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) if and only if \({z}_{i} = 0\) or \({w}_{i} = 0\) , which can be written as \({z}_{i}{w}_{i} = 0\) . If this holds for all \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) , then the vectors \(z\) and \(w\) are called \(\mathit{c}{omplementary}\) . Then the problem of finding a completely labeled point \(z\) of \(S\) means to find \(z\) and \(w\) in \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) so that

\begin{tcolorbox}
为了进行代数处理，我们用非负的“松弛变量” \(w \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 将 (9.29) 中的不等式 \({Cz} \leq  \mathbf{1}\) 写成等式和非负性约束 \({Cz} + w = \mathbf{1},w \geq  \mathbf{0}\) 。那么 \(z \in  S\) 具有标签 \(i \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) 当且仅当 \({z}_{i} = 0\) 或 \({w}_{i} = 0\) ，这可以写成 \({z}_{i}{w}_{i} = 0\) 。如果对于所有的 \(i = 1,\ldots ,d\) 都成立，那么向量 \(z\) 和 \(w\) 被称为 \(\mathit{c}{omplementary}\) 。那么，在 \(S\) 中找到一个完全标记点 \(z\) 的问题意味着在 \({\mathbb{R}}^{d}\) 中找到 \(z\) 和 \(w\) ，使得
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{Cz} + w = \mathbf{1},\;z \geq  \mathbf{0},\;w \geq  \mathbf{0},\;{z}_{i}{w}_{i} = 0\;\left( {1 \leq  i \leq  d}\right) . \tag{9.31}
\]

In summary, if \(z \in  S\) then \(w\) is defined by \(w = \mathbf{1} - {Cz}\) , we have \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) and \(w \geq  \mathbf{0}\) , and \(z\) is completely labeled if and only if \(z\) and \(w\) are complementary.

\begin{tcolorbox}
总之，如果 \(z \in  S\) ，那么 \(w\) 由 \(w = \mathbf{1} - {Cz}\) 定义，我们有 \(z \geq  \mathbf{0}\) 和 \(w \geq  \mathbf{0}\) ，并且当且仅当 \(z\) 和 \(w\) 互补时， \(z\) 是完全标记的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Recall that \(z\) has label \(i\) if \({z}_{i} = 0\) or \({w}_{i} = 0\) . A missing label therefore means some \(\ell  \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) so that \({z}_{\ell } > 0\) and \({w}_{\ell } > 0\) are allowed to hold. If with this exception all other conditions in (9.31) hold, then \(z\) and \(w\) are called almost complementary, which means that \(z\) is an almost completely labeled point of \(S\) , that is, \(z\) has all labels except possibly \(\ell\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
回顾一下，如果 \({z}_{i} = 0\) 或 \({w}_{i} = 0\) ，则 \(z\) 有标签 \(i\) 。因此，缺失标签意味着存在某个 \(\ell  \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) ，使得 \({z}_{\ell } > 0\) 和 \({w}_{\ell } > 0\) 可以成立。如果除了这个例外，(9.31) 中的所有其他条件都成立，那么 \(z\) 和 \(w\) 被称为几乎互补，这意味着 \(z\) 是 \(S\) 的一个几乎完全标记的点，即 \(z\) 拥有除可能的 \(\ell\) 之外的所有标签。
\end{tcolorbox}

The Lemke-Howson algorithm starts with the trivial solution \(z = \mathbf{0},w = \mathbf{1}\) to (9.31), which defines the artificial equilibrium. For our example (9.1), the system \(w = 1 - {Cz}\) states

\begin{tcolorbox}
莱姆基 - 豪森算法从 (9.31) 的平凡解 \(z = \mathbf{0},w = \mathbf{1}\) 开始，该解定义了人工均衡。对于我们的例子 (9.1)，系统 \(w = 1 - {Cz}\) 表述为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{w}_{1} = 1\; - 2{z}_{4}
\]

\[
{w}_{2} = 1\; - \;{z}_{4} - 2{z}_{5}
\]

\[
{w}_{3} = 1\; - 3{z}_{5} \tag{9.32}
\]

\[
{w}_{4} = 1 - 2{z}_{1}\; - 4{z}_{3}
\]

\[
{w}_{5} = 1\; - {z}_{2} - {z}_{3}.
\]

This is called a dictionary, which means that certain variables, here \({w}_{1},\ldots ,{w}_{5}\) , are expressed in dependence of the others, here \({z}_{1},\ldots ,{z}_{5}\) . The dependent variables on the left are called basic variables and the independent variables on the right are called nonbasic variables. The corresponding basic solution is obtained by setting all nonbasic variables to zero, so that the basic variables are equal to the constants in the dictionary. If these constants are all nonnegative, then the basic solution is called feasible, which is the case in (9.32) where the basic solution is \(z = \mathbf{0},w = \mathbf{1}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这被称为字典，这意味着某些变量，这里是 \({w}_{1},\ldots ,{w}_{5}\) ，表示为依赖于其他变量，这里是 \({z}_{1},\ldots ,{z}_{5}\) 。左边的依赖变量称为基变量，右边的独立变量称为非基变量。通过将所有非基变量设为零来得到相应的基解，这样基变量就等于字典中的常数。如果这些常数都是非负的，那么该基解被称为可行解，在 (9.32) 中就是这种情况，其中基解是 \(z = \mathbf{0},w = \mathbf{1}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

The algorithm proceeds by the operation of pivoting that exchanges a nonbasic variable with a basic variable in such a way that the new dictionary defines the same linear relationship between its variables, and so that the corresponding basic solution remains feasible. In geometric terms, each basic feasible solution defines a vertex of the polytope \(S\) , and pivoting means moving along an edge of \(S\) from one vertex to an adjacent vertex, as in Figure 9.19, as we will show.

\begin{tcolorbox}
该算法通过换基操作进行，该操作以这样一种方式交换一个非基变量和一个基变量:新的字典定义了其变量之间相同的线性关系，并且相应的基解仍然是可行的。从几何角度来看，每个基本可行解定义了有界多面体 \(S\) 的一个顶点，换基操作意味着沿着 \(S\) 的一条边从一个顶点移动到相邻的顶点，如图 9.19 所示，我们将进行说明。
\end{tcolorbox}

A fixed missing label \(\ell  \in  \{ 1,\ldots ,d\}\) is chosen, here \(\ell  = 2\) , which determines the entering variable \({z}_{\ell }\) . In the current basic solution, all nonbasic variables are set to zero, but now the entering variable, which in (9.32) is \({z}_{2}\) , is allowed to assume positive values.
