我们描述如何找到图11.1中讨价还价集 \(S\) 的讨价还价解(U, V)。威胁点 \(\left( {{u}_{0},{v}_{0}}\right)\) 为(1,1)。帕累托前沿由两条线段组成:第一条线段连接(1,3.5)和(2,3)，第二条线段连接(2,3)和(4,1)，其中后者是从(2,3)延伸到(5,0)的更长线段的一部分(第一条线段也是连接(4,0)和(2,3)的更长线段的一部分，但这里不需要用到)。帕累托前沿上一点(u, v)的纳什积 \(\left( {u - {u}_{0}}\right) \left( {v - {v}_{0}}\right)\) 是威胁点 \(\left( {{u}_{0},{v}_{0}}\right)\) 和点(u, v)之间矩形的面积大小。在这种情况下，图中显示第二条线段以这种方式形成的矩形更大。第二条线段上的点形式为 \(\left( {1 - p}\right) \left( {2,3}\right)  + p\left( {5,0}\right)\) ，其中 \(0 \leq  p \leq  1\) ，即 \(\left( {2 + {3p},3 - {3p}}\right)\) 。因为 \(\left( {{u}_{0},{v}_{0}}\right)  = \left( {1,1}\right)\) ，所以得到的纳什积为 \(\left( {1 + {3p}}\right) \left( {2 - {3p}}\right)\) 或 \(2 + {3p} - 9{p}^{2}\) 。该表达式在 \(p\) 上的唯一最大值在 \(p = \frac{1}{6}\) 时取得，因为这是其导数 \(3 - {18p}\) 的零点，且二阶导数为负，所以这是一个最大值。因此，点(U, V)为(2.5,2.5)。(一般来说，这样的最大值可能在 \(p < 0\) 或 \(p > 1\) 时出现，这意味着线段左端点或右端点分别对应 \(p = 0\) 或 \(p = 1\) 时，能得到纳什积的最大值。然后必须检查相邻线段是否可能有更大的纳什积，这可能出现在角点处。) \(p\) 的这个值允许将纳什讨价还价解表示为双矩阵博弈中对应单元格的收益对的凸组合，即通过一个彩票，以概率 \(1 - p = \frac{5}{6}\) 选择收益对为(2,3)的(T, l)，以概率 \(p = \frac{1}{6}\) 选择收益对为(5,0)的(B, r)。双方玩家事先已同意接受这个彩票的结果(尽管以概率 \(\frac{1}{6}\) 出现的收益对(5,0)会使玩家II的收益为零，这比她在威胁点获得的 \({v}_{0} = 1\) 要少；然而，她从彩票中获得的期望效用2.5高于 \({v}_{0}\) )。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.5 Geometry of the Bargaining Solution}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.5 讨价还价解的几何性质}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this section, we give a geometric characterization of the bargaining solution. This characterization helps finding the bargaining solution quickly, and is needed later in Section 11.11. We first state an easy lemma.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本节中，我们给出讨价还价解的几何特征。这一特征有助于快速找到讨价还价解，并且在11.11节中会用到。我们首先陈述一个简单的引理。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 11.4. Consider a triangle \(T\) with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right) ,\left( {0,b}\right)\) with \(a,b > 0\) . Then the rectangle of maximal area contained in \(T\) with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {U,0}\right) ,\left( {U,V}\right)\) and(0, V) is given by \(U = a/2\) and \(V = b/2\) . Furthermore, if \(S \subseteq  T\) and \(\left( {U,V}\right)  \in  S\) , then(U, V)is also the point in \(S\) that maximizes the product \({UV}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理11.4。考虑一个顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right) ,\left( {0,b}\right)\) 且满足 \(a,b > 0\) 的三角形 \(T\) 。那么包含在 \(T\) 中，顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {U,0}\right) ,\left( {U,V}\right)\) 和(0, V)的最大面积矩形由 \(U = a/2\) 和 \(V = b/2\) 确定。此外，如果 \(S \subseteq  T\) 且 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  \in  S\) ，那么(U, V)也是 \(S\) 中使乘积 \({UV}\) 最大的点。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_319_397_1276_437_551_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.4 Illustration of Lemma 11.4. The product \({UV}\) , which is the area of the gray rectangle inscribed in the triangle \(T\) , is maximal for \(U = a/2\) and \(V = b/2\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.4 引理11.4的图示。乘积 \({UV}\) 是内接于三角形 \(T\) 的灰色矩形的面积，当 \(U = a/2\) 和 \(V = b/2\) 时该面积最大。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. The product \({UV}\) is the area of the rectangle inscribed in \(T\) as shown in Figure 11.4. The maximum value of \({uv}\) for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  T\) clearly results when(u, v)is on the line that joins(b,0)and(a,0), shown as a dashed line in Figure 11.4, that is, when \(v = b - \frac{b}{a}u\) . The derivative of the function \(u \mapsto  u \cdot  \left( {b - \frac{b}{a}u}\right)\) is \(b - 2\frac{b}{a}u\) , which is zero when \(u = a/2\) ; this is a maximum of the function because its second derivative is negative. Hence, \({UV}\) is maximal for \(U = a/2\) and \(V = b/2\) as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。乘积 \({UV}\) 是如图11.4所示内接于 \(T\) 的矩形的面积。对于 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  T\) ， \({uv}\) 的最大值显然在(u, v)位于连接(b,0)和(a,0)的直线上时取得，该直线在图11.4中用虚线表示，即当 \(v = b - \frac{b}{a}u\) 时。函数 \(u \mapsto  u \cdot  \left( {b - \frac{b}{a}u}\right)\) 的导数为 \(b - 2\frac{b}{a}u\) ，当 \(u = a/2\) 时其值为零；这是该函数的最大值，因为其二阶导数为负。因此，如所声称的，当 \(U = a/2\) 和 \(V = b/2\) 时 \({UV}\) 最大。
\end{tcolorbox}

If \(S \subseteq  T\) , then the maximum of \({uv}\) for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) is clearly at most the maximum of \({uv}\) for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  T\) , and therefore attained for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  = \left( {U,V}\right)\) if \(\left( {U,V}\right)  \in  S\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果 \(S \subseteq  T\) ，那么对于 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) ， \({uv}\) 的最大值显然至多是对于 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  T\) 时 \({uv}\) 的最大值，因此如果 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  \in  S\) ，则在 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  = \left( {U,V}\right)\) 时取得。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following proposition gives a useful condition for finding the bargaining solution geometrically. The bargaining set is assumed to be convex as per axiom (c), to have threat point(0,0), and to have a Pareto-frontier of the form \(\left( {u,f\left( u\right) }\right)\) for a decreasing function \(f\) where, for definiteness, \(0 \leq  u \leq  1\) ; any other right endpoint of the interval for \(u\) is also possible.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下命题给出了一个从几何角度寻找讨价还价解(bargaining solution)的有用条件。根据公理(c)，假设讨价还价集是凸集，威胁点(threat point)为(0,0)，并且其帕累托前沿(Pareto - frontier)的形式为 \(\left( {u,f\left( u\right) }\right)\) ，其中 \(f\) 是一个递减函数，为明确起见， \(0 \leq  u \leq  1\) ； \(u\) 区间的任何其他右端点也是可能的。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 11.5. Suppose that the Pareto-frontier of a bargaining set \(S\) with threat point (0,0)is given by \(\{ \left( {u,f\left( u\right) }\right)  \mid  0 \leq  u \leq  1\}\) for a decreasing and continuous function \(f\) with \(f\left( 0\right)  > 0\) and \(f\left( 1\right)  = 0\) . Then the bargaining solution(U, V)is the unique point \(\left( {U,f\left( U\right) }\right)\) where the bargaining set has a tangent line with slope \(- f\left( U\right) /U\) . If \(f\) is differentiable, then this slope is the derivative \({f}^{\prime }\left( U\right)\) of \(f\) at \(U\) , that is, \({f}^{\prime }\left( U\right)  =  - f\left( U\right) /U\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题11.5。假设威胁点为(0,0)的讨价还价集 \(S\) 的帕累托前沿由 \(\{ \left( {u,f\left( u\right) }\right)  \mid  0 \leq  u \leq  1\}\) 给出，其中 \(f\) 是一个递减且连续的函数，满足 \(f\left( 0\right)  > 0\) 和 \(f\left( 1\right)  = 0\) 。那么讨价还价解(bargaining solution)(U, V)是讨价还价集有一条斜率为 \(- f\left( U\right) /U\) 的切线的唯一一点 \(\left( {U,f\left( U\right) }\right)\) 。如果 \(f\) 可微，那么该斜率是 \(f\) 在 \(U\) 处的导数 \({f}^{\prime }\left( U\right)\) ，即 \({f}^{\prime }\left( U\right)  =  - f\left( U\right) /U\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.4\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_320_194_865_565_741_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.5 Illustration of Proposition 11.5 and its proof. The dashed line is the tangent to the hyperbola \(\{ \left( {u,v}\right)  \mid  {uv} = c = {UV}\}\) at the point (U, V), which is also a tangent to the bargaining set \(S\) at(U, V). The endpoints(a,0)and(0, b)of this tangent fulfill \(a = {2U}\) and \(b = {2V}\) with angles \(\alpha\) and \(\beta\) as shown.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.5 命题11.5及其证明的图示。虚线是双曲线 \(\{ \left( {u,v}\right)  \mid  {uv} = c = {UV}\}\) 在点 (U, V) 处的切线，该切线也是讨价还价集 \(S\) 在点 (U, V) 处的切线。此切线的端点 (a,0) 和 (0, b) 满足 \(a = {2U}\) 和 \(b = {2V}\) ，夹角分别为 \(\alpha\) 和 \(\beta\) ，如图所示。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let(U, V)be the bargaining solution for the bargaining set \(S\) . It is on the Pareto-frontier, so \(V = f\left( U\right)\) . Let \(c = {UV}\) and consider the hyperbola \(\{ \left( {u,v}\right)  \mid  {uv} = c\}\) , which intersects \(S\) in the unique point(U, V)by Theorem 11.3. Because(U, V)maximizes the Nash product, \(c\) is the maximal value of \(c = {uv}\) for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) . The function \(u \mapsto  c/u\) is differentiable with derivative \(- c/{u}^{2}\) , which for \(u = U\) is equal to \(- V/U\) . Consider the line through(U, V)with slope \(- V/U\) , which is the tangent to the hyperbola at(U, V), shown as a dashed line in Figure 11.5. This line intersects the \(u\) -axis at the point \(\left( {a,0}\right)  = \left( {{2U},0}\right)\) and the \(v\) -axis at \(\left( {0,b}\right)  = \left( {0,{2V}}\right)\) , and defines a triangle \(T\) with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) , and (0, b). Figure 11.5 corresponds to Figure 11.3(b), and if we re-scale the axes by replacing \(u\) with \(u/U\) and \(v\) with \(v/V\) then we obtain Figure 11.3(d) where \(T\) is the triangle with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {2,0}\right)\) , and(0,2). With the help of(11.1)we showed \(S \subseteq  T\) , where the assumption \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {1,1}\right)\) was not used, so this applies also to Figure 11.5, without re-scaling the axes. Hence, the dashed line is also a tangent to the set \(S\) , as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 (U, V) 是讨价还价集 \(S\) 的讨价还价解。它位于帕累托前沿上，因此 \(V = f\left( U\right)\) 。设 \(c = {UV}\) 并考虑双曲线 \(\{ \left( {u,v}\right)  \mid  {uv} = c\}\) ，根据定理11.3，该双曲线与 \(S\) 仅在点 (U, V) 处相交。因为 (U, V) 使纳什积最大化，所以 \(c\) 是 \(c = {uv}\) 在 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) 条件下的最大值。函数 \(u \mapsto  c/u\) 可微，其导数为 \(- c/{u}^{2}\) ，当 \(u = U\) 时，该导数等于 \(- V/U\) 。考虑过点 (U, V) 且斜率为 \(- V/U\) 的直线，此直线是双曲线在点 (U, V) 处的切线，如图11.5中的虚线所示。该直线与 \(u\) 轴相交于点 \(\left( {a,0}\right)  = \left( {{2U},0}\right)\) ，与 \(v\) 轴相交于点 \(\left( {0,b}\right)  = \left( {0,{2V}}\right)\) ，并定义了一个顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) 和 (0, b) 的三角形 \(T\) 。图11.5对应于图11.3(b)，如果我们通过将 \(u\) 替换为 \(u/U\) 以及将 \(v\) 替换为 \(v/V\) 来重新缩放坐标轴，那么我们将得到图11.3(d)，其中 \(T\) 是顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {2,0}\right)\) 和 (0,2) 的三角形。借助 (11.1) 我们证明了 \(S \subseteq  T\) ，其中未使用假设 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {1,1}\right)\) ，因此这也适用于图11.5，无需重新缩放坐标轴。因此，虚线也是集合 \(S\) 的切线，正如所声称的那样。
\end{tcolorbox}

If the function \(f\) is not differentiable, then there may be more than one tangent to the set \(S\) at a point. In that case it remains to prove that the described construction of(U, V)is unique. Suppose that a tangent of \(S\) touches \(S\) at the point(U, V)and has the downward slope \(- V/U\) , and intersects the \(u\) -axis at(a,0)and the \(v\) -axis at (0, b)as in Figure 11.5 (where we now ignore the hyperbola). The slope \(- V/U\) of the tangent implies that \(a = {2U}\) and \(b = {2V}\) . Being a tangent to the set \(S\) means that \(S\) is a subset of the triangle \(T\) with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) , and(0, b). By Lemma 11.4, \({UV}\) is the maximum value of \({uv}\) for \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) . This shows that(U, V)is unique.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果函数 \(f\) 不可微，那么在某一点处集合 \(S\) 可能存在多条切线。在这种情况下，仍需证明所描述的 (U, V) 的构造是唯一的。假设 \(S\) 的一条切线在点 (U, V) 处与 \(S\) 相切，且斜率为向下的 \(- V/U\) ，并与 \(u\) 轴相交于 (a,0)，与 \(v\) 轴相交于 (0, b)，如图11.5所示(现在我们忽略双曲线)。切线的斜率 \(- V/U\) 意味着 \(a = {2U}\) 和 \(b = {2V}\) 。作为集合 \(S\) 的切线意味着 \(S\) 是顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) 和 (0, b) 的三角形 \(T\) 的子集。根据引理11.4， \({UV}\) 是 \({uv}\) 在 \(\left( {u,v}\right)  \in  S\) 条件下的最大值。这表明 (U, V) 是唯一的。
\end{tcolorbox}

If the function \(f\) is differentiable, then the tangent to the set \(S\) is unique at every point, and we can argue directly as follows. The bargaining solution maximizes the Nash product \(u \cdot  f\left( u\right)\) on the Pareto-frontier. This requires the derivative with respect to \(u\) to be zero, that is, \(f\left( u\right)  + u \cdot  {f}^{\prime }\left( u\right)  = 0\) or \({f}^{\prime }\left( u\right)  =  - f\left( u\right) /u\) , so \(U\) has to solve this equation, as claimed.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果函数 \(f\) 可微，那么集合 \(S\) 在每一点处的切线都是唯一的，我们可以直接进行如下论证。讨价还价解(bargaining solution)在帕累托前沿上使纳什积 \(u \cdot  f\left( u\right)\) 最大化。这要求关于 \(u\) 的导数为零，即 \(f\left( u\right)  + u \cdot  {f}^{\prime }\left( u\right)  = 0\) 或 \({f}^{\prime }\left( u\right)  =  - f\left( u\right) /u\) ，因此 \(U\) 必须满足这个方程，正如所声称的那样。
\end{tcolorbox}

In Figure 11.5, the point(U, V)is the midpoint of the long side of the right-angled triangle with vertices \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) , and(0, b). The line from(0,0)to(U, V) divides that triangle into two isosceles triangles. The first triangle has apex (U, V)and equal (mirrored) angles \(\alpha\) at its vertices(0,0)and(a,0). These angles correspond to the slopes \(V/U\) and \(- V/U\) , equal except for their sign, of the two lines that connect these vertices to(U, V). The second triangle has apex(U, V)and equal (mirrored) angles \(\beta\) at its vertices(0,0)and(0, b).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在图 11.5 中，点 (U, V) 是直角三角形长边的中点，该直角三角形的顶点为 \(\left( {0,0}\right) ,\left( {a,0}\right)\) 和 (0, b)。从 (0, 0) 到 (U, V) 的直线将该三角形分成两个等腰三角形。第一个三角形的顶点为 (U, V)，在其顶点 (0, 0) 和 (a, 0) 处有相等(镜像)的角 \(\alpha\) 。这些角对应于连接这些顶点与 (U, V) 的两条直线的斜率 \(V/U\) 和 \(- V/U\) ，除了符号外，这两个斜率相等。第二个三角形的顶点为 (U, V)，在其顶点 (0, 0) 和 (0, b) 处有相等(镜像)的角 \(\beta\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Figure 11.6 shows bargaining sets \(S\) with a Pareto-frontier given by line segments, as it arises when \(S\) is derived from a bimatrix game as in Figure 11.1 (which with the threat point shifted to(0,0)defines the set shown in Figure 11.6(b)). Then the Nash bargaining solution is found easily with the help of Lemma 11.4: Find a tangent to the bargaining set \(S\) with endpoints(a,0)and(0, b)so that the midpoint(U, V)of that tangent belongs to \(S\) (Proposition 11.5 asserts that this tangent exists). Because the boundary of \(S\) consists of line segments, the tangent at an interior point of the line segment has the same slope as that line segment. Only finitely many slopes need to be checked. In Figure 11.6(a), the middle line segment contains the midpoint(U, V)of the corresponding tangent.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 11.6 展示了讨价还价集 \(S\) ，其帕累托前沿由线段(line segments)给出，当 \(S\) 从如图 11.1 所示的双矩阵博弈(bimatrix game)中推导得出时就会出现这种情况(将威胁点(threat point)移至 (0, 0) 后定义了图 11.6(b) 中所示的集合)。然后，借助引理 11.4 可以轻松找到纳什讨价还价解:找到与端点为 (a, 0) 和 (0, b) 的讨价还价集 \(S\) 相切的切线，使得该切线的中点 (U, V) 属于 \(S\) (命题 11.5 断言这条切线存在)。因为 \(S\) 的边界由线段组成，所以线段内部点处的切线与该线段具有相同的斜率。只需检查有限多个斜率。在图 11.6(a) 中，中间的线段包含相应切线的中点 (U, V)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The case of a Pareto-frontier with only two line segments is particularly easy. In Figure 11.6(b), the right line segment contains the midpoint(U, V)of the corresponding tangent. That tangent and the line segment have the same right endpoint(a,0), which implies \(U = \frac{a}{2}\) . Similarly, in Figure 11.6(c), the top line segment contains the midpoint(U, V)of the corresponding tangent. That tangent and the line segment have the same left endpoint(0, b), which implies \(V = \frac{b}{2}\) . In Figure 11.6(d), neither line segment defines a tangent whose midpoint belongs to \(S\) , because the right line segment is too steep and the top line segment too shallow. Then the vertex(U, V)of the bargaining set \(S\) is the Nash bargaining solution; this can be verified by considering the dashed line through that vertex with slope \(- V/U\) , which is the negative of the slope \(V/U\) of the line from(0,0)to(U, V), with angle \(\alpha\) with the \(u\) -axis. That line should be a tangent to \(S\) , as it is here.

\begin{tcolorbox}
帕累托前沿仅由两条线段组成的情况特别简单。在图 11.6(b) 中，右侧的线段包含相应切线的中点 (U, V)。该切线和线段具有相同的右端点 (a, 0)，这意味着 \(U = \frac{a}{2}\) 。类似地，在图 11.6(c) 中，顶部的线段包含相应切线的中点 (U, V)。该切线和线段具有相同的左端点 (0, b)，这意味着 \(V = \frac{b}{2}\) 。在图 11.6(d) 中，没有一条线段能定义出其中点属于 \(S\) 的切线，因为右侧的线段太陡，而顶部的线段太平缓。那么讨价还价集 \(S\) 的顶点 (U, V) 就是纳什讨价还价解；这可以通过考虑过该顶点且斜率为 \(- V/U\) 的虚线来验证，该斜率是从 (0, 0) 到 (U, V) 的直线斜率 \(V/U\) 的负值，与 \(u\) 轴的夹角为 \(\alpha\) 。这条线应该是 \(S\) 的切线，就像这里的情况一样。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_322_196_206_1256_1018_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.6 Various bargaining sets \(S\) with a piecewiese linear Pareto-frontier. By Proposition 11.5, the Nash bargaining solution(U, V)is the midpoint of the tangent to \(S\) (dashed line) intersected with the positive quadrant, with endpoints(a,0) and(0, b). In (d) the point(U, V)is a vertex of \(S\) , where there are many tangents to \(S\) through that point. One of these tangents has the same angle \(\alpha\) with the \(u\) -axis as the upwards line from(0,0)to(U, V).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 11.6 展示了具有分段线性帕累托前沿的各种讨价还价集 \(S\) 。根据命题 11.5，纳什讨价还价解 (U, V) 是与 \(S\) 相切的切线(虚线)与正象限相交部分的中点，切线的端点为 (a, 0) 和 (0, b)。在 (d) 中，点 (U, V) 是 \(S\) 的一个顶点，过该点有许多与 \(S\) 相切的切线。其中一条切线与 \(u\) 轴的夹角 \(\alpha\) 与从 (0, 0) 向上到 (U, V) 的直线的夹角相同。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.6 Splitting a Unit Pie}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.6 分割一个单位馅饼}
\end{tcolorbox}

In the remainder of this chapter, we consider a bargaining situation where player I and player II have to agree to split a "pie" into an amount \(x\) for player I and \(y\) for player II. The total amount to be split is normalized to be one unit, so this is called

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本章的其余部分，我们考虑一个讨价还价的情形，其中参与者I和参与者II必须就如何将一个“馅饼”分割达成一致，分给参与者I的数量为 \(x\) ，分给参与者II的数量为 \(y\) 。待分割的总量被规范化为一个单位，因此这被称为
\end{tcolorbox}

"a unit pie". The possible splits(x, y)have to fulfill \(x \geq  0,y \geq  0\) , and \(x + y \leq  1\) . If the two players cannot agree, they both receive zero, which defines the threat point(0,0). Splits(x, y)so that \(x + y < 1\) are not Pareto-optimal, but we admit such splits in order to obtain a convex set.

\begin{tcolorbox}
“单位馅饼”。可能的分割方案 (x, y) 必须满足 \(x \geq  0,y \geq  0\) 以及 \(x + y \leq  1\) 。如果两个参与者无法达成一致，他们都将得到零，这就定义了威胁点 (0,0) 。满足 \(x + y < 1\) 的分割方案 (x, y) 不是帕累托最优的，但为了得到一个凸集，我们允许这样的分割方案存在。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_323_343_432_1241_492_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.7 Bargaining over a unit pie, with bargaining set \(S\) as defined in (11.2). In (a), the utility functions are \(u\left( x\right)  = x\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) , with bargaining solution \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) . In (b), they are \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) , with bargaining solution \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {1/\sqrt{3},\frac{2}{3}}\right)  \approx  \left( {{0.577},{0.667}}\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.7 关于单位馅饼的讨价还价，讨价还价集 \(S\) 如 (11.2) 中所定义。在 (a) 中，效用函数为 \(u\left( x\right)  = x\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) ，讨价还价解为 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) 。在 (b) 中，它们是 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) ，讨价还价解为 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {1/\sqrt{3},\frac{2}{3}}\right)  \approx  \left( {{0.577},{0.667}}\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

If player I gets utility \(x\) and player II gets utility \(y\) , then the bargaining set is the triangle of all pairs(x, y)with \(x \geq  0,y \geq  0\) and \(x + y \leq  1\) , shown in Figure 11.7(a). The split(x, y)is Pareto-optimal if \(x + y = 1\) , so the Pareto-frontier is given by the splits(x,1 - x), shown as the bold line in the diagram. Because the threat point is(0,0), the Nash product is \(x\left( {1 - x}\right)\) , which is maximized for \(x = \frac{1}{2}\) . The Nash bargaining solution \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) results also from the symmetry axiom in Definition 11.2(g).

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果参与者I获得效用 \(x\) ，参与者II获得效用 \(y\) ，那么讨价还价集就是所有满足 \(x \geq  0,y \geq  0\) 和 \(x + y \leq  1\) 的数对 (x, y) 所构成的三角形，如图11.7(a) 所示。如果 \(x + y = 1\) ，则分割方案 (x, y) 是帕累托最优的，因此帕累托前沿由分割方案 (x,1 - x) 给出，在图中用粗线表示。因为威胁点是 (0,0) ，所以纳什积为 \(x\left( {1 - x}\right)\) ，当 \(x = \frac{1}{2}\) 时该纳什积达到最大值。纳什讨价还价解 \(\left( {U,V}\right)  = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2}}\right)\) 也可由定义11.2(g) 中的对称性公理得出。
\end{tcolorbox}

More generally, we consider the split of a unit pie where the players have utility functions \(u\) and \(v\) that are not the identity function. We assume that the utility functions are \(u : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) for player \(\mathrm{I}\) and \(v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) for player \(\mathrm{{II}}\) , which are normalized so that \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) and \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . These utility functions are assumed to be increasing, concave (see (5.46) and Figure 5.5), and continuous (it can be shown that concavity implies continuity except at endpoints of the domain of the function). The bargaining set of resulting utility pairs to the two players is given by

\begin{tcolorbox}
更一般地，我们考虑单位馅饼的分割问题，其中参与者的效用函数 \(u\) 和 \(v\) 不是恒等函数。我们假设参与者 \(\mathrm{I}\) 的效用函数为 \(u : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) ，参与者 \(\mathrm{{II}}\) 的效用函数为 \(v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) ，并且这些效用函数经过了规范化处理，使得 \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) 和 \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。假设这些效用函数是递增的、凹的(见 (5.46) 和图5.5)且连续的(可以证明，除了函数定义域的端点外，凹性意味着连续性)。两个参与者所得到的效用对的讨价还价集由
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
S = \{ \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)  \mid  x \geq  0,y \geq  0,x + y \leq  1\} . \tag{11.2}
\]

The following proposition asserts that \(S\) fulfills the axioms in Definition 11.1.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下命题断言 \(S\) 满足定义11.1中的公理。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 11.6. Let \(u,v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) be increasing, concave, and continuous utility functions of player \(I\) and \({II}\) , respectively, with \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) and \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . Then the bargaining set \(S\) defined (11.2) has threat point(0,0)and is compact and convex. Moreover, \(S\) is downward closed, that is,

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题11.6。设 \(u,v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) 分别为参与者 \(I\) 和 \({II}\) 的递增、凹且连续的效用函数(utility function)，其中 \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) 且 \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。那么，由(11.2)定义的议价集 \(S\) 的威胁点(threat point)为(0,0)，并且是紧致且凸的。此外， \(S\) 是向下封闭的，即
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\left( {\bar{u},\bar{v}}\right)  \in  S,\;0 \leq  {u}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{u},\;0 \leq  {v}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{v}\; \Rightarrow  \;\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  \in  S. \tag{11.3}
\]

Proof. We first show (11.3). Let \(0 \leq  {u}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{u}\) and \(0 \leq  {v}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{v}\) with \(\left( {\bar{u},\bar{v}}\right)  \in  S\) , that is, \(\bar{u} = u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) and \(\bar{v} = u\left( \bar{y}\right)\) for some \(\bar{x} \geq  0\) and \(\bar{y} \geq  0\) with \(\bar{x} + \bar{y} \leq  1\) . Because \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0 \leq  {u}^{\prime } \leq  u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) and \(u\) is continuous, we have \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = {u}^{\prime }\) for some \({x}^{\prime } \in  \left\lbrack  {0,\bar{x}}\right\rbrack\) by the intermediate value theorem, and similarly \(v\left( {y}^{\prime }\right)  = {y}^{\prime }\) for some \({y}^{\prime } \in  \left\lbrack  {0,\bar{y}}\right\rbrack\) , which implies \({x}^{\prime } + {y}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{x} + \bar{y} \leq  1\) and thus \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  \in  S\) , which shows (11.3).

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。我们首先证明(11.3)。设 \(0 \leq  {u}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{u}\) 且 \(0 \leq  {v}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{v}\) ，其中 \(\left( {\bar{u},\bar{v}}\right)  \in  S\) ，即对于某些满足 \(\bar{x} + \bar{y} \leq  1\) 的 \(\bar{x} \geq  0\) 和 \(\bar{y} \geq  0\) ，有 \(\bar{u} = u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) 且 \(\bar{v} = u\left( \bar{y}\right)\) 。因为 \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0 \leq  {u}^{\prime } \leq  u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) 且 \(u\) 是连续的，根据介值定理，对于某些 \({x}^{\prime } \in  \left\lbrack  {0,\bar{x}}\right\rbrack\) 有 \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = {u}^{\prime }\) ，类似地，对于某些 \({y}^{\prime } \in  \left\lbrack  {0,\bar{y}}\right\rbrack\) 有 \(v\left( {y}^{\prime }\right)  = {y}^{\prime }\) ，这意味着 \({x}^{\prime } + {y}^{\prime } \leq  \bar{x} + \bar{y} \leq  1\) ，从而 \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  \in  S\) ，这就证明了(11.3)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The set \(S\) is the image of a compact set under the continuous function \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \mapsto\)  \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)\) and therefore is also compact. To show that \(S\) is convex, consider a convex combination \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  = \left( {1 - \lambda }\right) \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)  + \lambda \left( {u\left( \widetilde{x}\right) ,v\left( \widetilde{y}\right) }\right)\) of two points in \(S\) , where \(\lambda  \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) . Then \({u}^{\prime } \leq  u\left( {\left( {1 - \lambda }\right) x + \lambda \widetilde{x}}\right)  = \bar{u}\) and \({v}^{\prime } \leq  v\left( {\left( {1 - \lambda }\right) y + \lambda \widetilde{y}}\right)  = \bar{v}\) because \(u\) and \(v\) are concave functions, where clearly \(\left( {\bar{u},\bar{v}}\right)  \in  S\) . Moreover, \({u}^{\prime } \geq  0\) and \({v}^{\prime } \geq  0\) . Hence,(11.3) implies \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  \in  S\) , which shows that \(S\) is convex.

\begin{tcolorbox}
集合 \(S\) 是紧集(compact set)在连续函数 \(\left( {x,y}\right)  \mapsto\)  \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)\) 下的像，因此它也是紧集。为了证明 \(S\) 是凸集，考虑 \(S\) 中两点的凸组合(convex combination) \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  = \left( {1 - \lambda }\right) \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)  + \lambda \left( {u\left( \widetilde{x}\right) ,v\left( \widetilde{y}\right) }\right)\) ，其中 \(\lambda  \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 。那么 \({u}^{\prime } \leq  u\left( {\left( {1 - \lambda }\right) x + \lambda \widetilde{x}}\right)  = \bar{u}\) 且 \({v}^{\prime } \leq  v\left( {\left( {1 - \lambda }\right) y + \lambda \widetilde{y}}\right)  = \bar{v}\) ，因为 \(u\) 和 \(v\) 是凹函数(concave function)，显然 \(\left( {\bar{u},\bar{v}}\right)  \in  S\) 。此外， \({u}^{\prime } \geq  0\) 且 \({v}^{\prime } \geq  0\) 。因此，(11.3) 式意味着 \(\left( {{u}^{\prime },{v}^{\prime }}\right)  \in  S\) ，这表明 \(S\) 是凸集。
\end{tcolorbox}

For \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) , the set \(S\) is shown in Figure 11.7(b). The Pareto-frontier is given by the points \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) for \(0 \leq  x \leq  1\) . Because \(u = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v = 1 - x = 1 - {u}^{2}\) , these are pairs \(\left( {u,1 - {u}^{2}}\right)\) , so \(v\) is easy to draw as the function \(1 - {u}^{2}\) of \(u\) . In general, one may think of traversing the points \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) on the Pareto-frontier when changing the parameter \(x\) , from the upper endpoint(0,1) of the frontier when \(x = 0\) , to its right endpoint(1,0)when \(x = 1\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) ，集合 \(S\) 如图 11.7(b) 所示。帕累托前沿(Pareto-frontier)由满足 \(0 \leq  x \leq  1\) 的点 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 给出。因为 \(u = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v = 1 - x = 1 - {u}^{2}\) ，这些是成对的 \(\left( {u,1 - {u}^{2}}\right)\) ，所以将 \(v\) 画成 \(u\) 的函数 \(1 - {u}^{2}\) 很容易。一般来说，可以想象当改变参数 \(x\) 时，遍历帕累托前沿上的点 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) ，从 \(x = 0\) 时前沿的上端点 (0,1)，到 \(x = 1\) 时前沿的右端点 (1,0)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The Nash bargaining solution(U, V)is found by maximizing the Nash product \(u\left( x\right) v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) on the Pareto-frontier. In Figure 11.7(b), the Nash product is \(\sqrt{x}\left( {1 - x}\right)\) or \({x}^{1/2} - {x}^{3/2}\) with derivative \(\frac{1}{2}{x}^{-1/2} - \frac{3}{2}{x}^{1/2}\) or \(\frac{1}{2}{x}^{-1/2}\left( {1 - {3x}}\right)\) , which is zero when \(x = \frac{1}{3}\) , with a negative second derivative, so this is a maximum. Hence, the pie is split into \(\frac{1}{3}\) for player I and \(\frac{2}{3}\) for player II. The corresponding pair(U, V)of utilities is \(\left( {1/\sqrt{3},\frac{2}{3}}\right)\) or about(0.577,0.667). For a similar calculation with different utility functions see Exercise 11.4.

\begin{tcolorbox}
纳什讨价还价解(Nash bargaining solution)(U, V) 是通过在帕累托前沿上最大化纳什积 \(u\left( x\right) v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) 得到的。在图 11.7(b) 中，纳什积为 \(\sqrt{x}\left( {1 - x}\right)\) 或 \({x}^{1/2} - {x}^{3/2}\) ，其导数为 \(\frac{1}{2}{x}^{-1/2} - \frac{3}{2}{x}^{1/2}\) 或 \(\frac{1}{2}{x}^{-1/2}\left( {1 - {3x}}\right)\) ，当 \(x = \frac{1}{3}\) 时导数为零，且二阶导数为负，所以这是一个最大值。因此，馅饼被分给参与者 I \(\frac{1}{3}\) ，分给参与者 II \(\frac{2}{3}\) 。相应的效用对 (U, V) 为 \(\left( {1/\sqrt{3},\frac{2}{3}}\right)\) ，约为 (0.577,0.667)。关于使用不同效用函数(utility function)的类似计算，见练习 11.4。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.7 The Ultimatum Game}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.7 最后通牒博弈(Ultimatum game)}
\end{tcolorbox}

Assume that two players have to split a unit pie, as described in the previous section. In the following, we will develop the "alternating offers" bargaining game applied to this situation. This is a non-cooperative game that models how players may interact in a bargaining situation. The solution to this non-cooperative game, in its most elaborate version of "stationary strategies" (see Section 11.10), will approximate the Nash bargaining solution. The model justifies the Nash solution via a different approach, which is not axiomatic, but instead uses the concept of subgame-perfect equilibria in game trees.

\begin{tcolorbox}
假设如前一节所述，两名参与者必须分割一个单位的馅饼。接下来，我们将构建适用于这种情况的“交替出价”讨价还价博弈。这是一个非合作博弈，用于模拟参与者在讨价还价情境中可能的互动方式。这个非合作博弈在其最详尽的“平稳策略”版本(见第11.10节)下的解，将逼近纳什讨价还价解。该模型通过一种不同的方法来证明纳什解的合理性，这种方法不是公理化的，而是使用了博弈树中的子博弈完美均衡概念。
\end{tcolorbox}

The model is that the pie is split according to the suggestion of one of the players. Suppose player I suggests splitting the pie into \(x\) for player I and \(1 - x\) for player II, so that the players receive utility \(u\left( x\right)\) and \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) , respectively. The amount \(x\) proposed by player I is also called his demand because that is the share of the pie that he receives in the proposed split.

\begin{tcolorbox}
该模型是，馅饼根据其中一名参与者的提议进行分割。假设参与者I提议将馅饼分割为参与者I得到 \(x\) ，参与者II得到 \(1 - x\) ，这样参与者分别获得效用 \(u\left( x\right)\) 和 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) 。参与者I提出的数量 \(x\) 也被称为他的需求，因为这是他在提议的分割方案中所获得的馅饼份额。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.6\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_325_517_493_887_496_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.8 Discrete version of the Ultimatum game. The black and white arrows denote the two subgame-perfect equilibria, which are the same except for player II’s response to the full demand \(x = 1\) , and player I’s best response of \(x = {.99}\) or \(x = 1\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.8 最后通牒博弈的离散版本。黑白箭头表示两个子博弈完美均衡，除了参与者II对全额需求 \(x = 1\) 的回应，以及参与者I对 \(x = {.99}\) 或 \(x = 1\) 的最优反应外，这两个均衡是相同的。
\end{tcolorbox}

In the most basic form, this model is called the Ultimatum game, where player II can either accept the split or reject it. If player II accepts, the payoff pair is \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) , and if she rejects, it is(0,0), in which case neither player receives anything. Figure 11.8 shows a discretized version of this game where the possible demand \(x\) is a multiple of 0.01 . Hence, player I has 101 possible actions for \(x \in  \left\{  {\left. \frac{i}{100}\right| \;i = 0,1,\ldots ,{100}}\right\}\) , and for each proposed \(x\) player II can either choose \(A\) (accept) or \(R\) (reject). Player II therefore has \({2}^{101}\) pure strategies, given by the different combinations of \(A\) and \(R\) for each possible \(x\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在最基本的形式下，这个模型被称为最后通牒博弈，在这个博弈中，参与者II可以接受或拒绝分割方案。如果参与者II接受，支付对为 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) ；如果她拒绝，支付对为(0,0)，在这种情况下，两名参与者都得不到任何东西。图11.8展示了这个博弈的离散版本，其中可能的需求 \(x\) 是0.01的倍数。因此，参与者I对于 \(x \in  \left\{  {\left. \frac{i}{100}\right| \;i = 0,1,\ldots ,{100}}\right\}\) 有101种可能的行动，并且对于每个提议的 \(x\) ，参与者II可以选择 \(A\) (接受)或 \(R\) (拒绝)。因此，参与者II有 \({2}^{101}\) 种纯策略，这些策略由每个可能的 \(x\) 对应的 \(A\) 和 \(R\) 的不同组合给出。
\end{tcolorbox}

The game is shown in Figure 11.8, and we look for a subgame-perfect equilibrium (SPE) of the game, that is, because the game has perfect information, we apply backward induction. Whenever \(1 - x > 0\) , the utility \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) to player II is positive, because otherwise

\begin{tcolorbox}
该博弈如图11.8所示，我们要寻找该博弈的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)，也就是说，因为该博弈具有完美信息，我们应用逆向归纳法。只要 \(1 - x > 0\) ，参与者II的效用 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) 就是正的，否则
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
0 = v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = v\left( {x \cdot  0 + \left( {1 - x}\right)  \cdot  1}\right)  < 1 - x = x \cdot  v\left( 0\right)  + \left( {1 - x}\right)  \cdot  v\left( 1\right) ,
\]

which contradicts concavity of \(v\) (and is also seen graphically). Hence, the SPE condition implies that player II accepts any positive amount \(1 - x\) offered by player I. These choices, determined by backward induction, are shown as arrows in Figure 11.8, and they are unique except when \(x = 1\) where player I demands the whole pie. Then player II is indifferent between accepting and rejecting because she will get nothing in either case. Consequently, in terms of pure strategies, both \({AA}\cdots {AA}\) and \({AA}\cdots {AR}\) are SPE strategies of player II. Here, the first 100 \({A}^{\prime }\) s denote acceptance for each \(x = 0,{0.01},\ldots ,{0.99}\) , and the last \(A\) or \(R\) is the choice when \(x = 1\) , shown by a white or black arrow, respectively, in Figure 11.8. Given this strategy of player II, player I's best response is to maximize his payoff, which he does as shown by the corresponding white or black arrow for player I. If player II accepts the demand \(x = 1\) , then player I demands \(x = 1\) , and the pair \(\left( {1,{AA}\cdots {AA}}\right)\) is an SPE, and if player II rejects the demand \(x = 1\) , then player I demands \(x = {0.99}\) (because for \(x = 1\) he would get nothing), and the resulting SPE is \(\left( {{0.99},{AA}\cdots {AR}}\right)\) . These are two subgame-perfect equilibria in pure strategies. If \(u\left( {0.99}\right)  < 1\) , they are also unique; if \(u\left( {0.99}\right)  = 1\) then the demand \(x = {.99}\) is also a best response by player I to the strategy \({AA}\cdots {AA}\) of player II that accepts every demand.

\begin{tcolorbox}
这与 \(v\) 的凹性相矛盾(从图上也能看出)。因此，子博弈完美均衡(SPE)条件意味着玩家 II 会接受玩家 I 提供的任何正数量 \(1 - x\) 。这些通过逆向归纳法确定的选择在图 11.8 中用箭头表示，并且除了 \(x = 1\) (即玩家 I 要求获得整个“馅饼”)的情况外，这些选择是唯一的。此时，玩家 II 在接受和拒绝之间无差异，因为在这两种情况下她都得不到任何东西。因此，就纯策略而言， \({AA}\cdots {AA}\) 和 \({AA}\cdots {AR}\) 都是玩家 II 的子博弈完美均衡策略。这里，前 100 个 \({A}^{\prime }\) 表示对每个 \(x = 0,{0.01},\ldots ,{0.99}\) 的接受，最后一个 \(A\) 或 \(R\) 是当 \(x = 1\) 时的选择，分别在图 11.8 中用白色或黑色箭头表示。给定玩家 II 的这个策略，玩家 I 的最优反应是最大化他的收益，这通过玩家 I 对应的白色或黑色箭头来表示。如果玩家 II 接受要求 \(x = 1\) ，那么玩家 I 要求 \(x = 1\) ，并且组合 \(\left( {1,{AA}\cdots {AA}}\right)\) 是一个子博弈完美均衡；如果玩家 II 拒绝要求 \(x = 1\) ，那么玩家 I 要求 \(x = {0.99}\) (因为对于 \(x = 1\) 他将得不到任何东西)，结果得到的子博弈完美均衡是 \(\left( {{0.99},{AA}\cdots {AR}}\right)\) 。这些是纯策略中的两个子博弈完美均衡。如果 \(u\left( {0.99}\right)  < 1\) ，它们也是唯一的；如果 \(u\left( {0.99}\right)  = 1\) ，那么要求 \(x = {.99}\) 也是玩家 I 对玩家 II 接受所有要求的策略 \({AA}\cdots {AA}\) 的最优反应。
\end{tcolorbox}

In essence, player II receives virtually nothing in the Ultimatum game because of the backward induction assumption. This does not reflect people's behavior in real bargaining situations of this kind, as confirmed in laboratory experiments where people play the Ultimatum game. Typically, such an experiment is conducted where player I states, unknown to player II, his demand \(x\) , and player II declares simultaneously, unknown to player I, her own "reserve demand" \(z\) ; the two players may even be matched anonymously from a group of many subjects that take the respective roles of players I and II. Whenever \(1 - x \geq  z\) , that is, the offer to player II is at least as large as her reserve demand, the two players get \(x\) and \(1 - x\) , otherwise nothing. (So player II may declare a small reserve demand like \(z = {0.01}\) but still receive 0.4 because player I’s demand is \(x = {0.6}\) ; both can be regarded as reasonable choices, but they are not mutual best responses.) In such experiments, player II often makes positive reserve demands like \(z = {0.4}\) , and player I makes cautious demands like \(x = {0.5}\) , which contradict the SPE assumption. A better description of these experiments may therefore be equilibria that are not subgame-perfect, with "threats" by player II to reject offers \(1 - x\) that are too low. Nevertheless, we assume SPE because they allow definite conclusions, and because the model will be refined, and made more realistic, by allowing rejections to be followed by "counter-demands". (Exercise 11.3 asks you to find all equilibria of the discrete Ultimatum game.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
本质上，由于逆向归纳法假设，在最后通牒博弈中玩家 II 实际上得不到任何东西。这并不反映人们在这类实际讨价还价情况中的行为，正如在人们进行最后通牒博弈的实验室实验中所证实的那样。通常，进行这样的实验:玩家 I 在玩家 II 不知情的情况下声明他的要求 \(x\) ，玩家 II 在玩家 I 不知情的情况下同时声明她自己的“保留要求” \(z\) ；这两个玩家甚至可以从众多分别扮演玩家 I 和玩家 II 角色的受试者群体中匿名配对。只要 \(1 - x \geq  z\) ，即给玩家 II 的提议至少和她的保留要求一样大，两个玩家就分别得到 \(x\) 和 \(1 - x\) ，否则什么都得不到。(所以玩家 II 可能声明一个小的保留要求，比如 \(z = {0.01}\) ，但仍然能得到 0.4，因为玩家 I 的要求是 \(x = {0.6}\) ；这两者都可以被视为合理的选择，但它们不是相互的最优反应。)在这样的实验中，玩家 II 经常提出像 \(z = {0.4}\) 这样的正保留要求，玩家 I 提出像 \(x = {0.5}\) 这样谨慎的要求，这与子博弈完美均衡假设相矛盾。因此，对这些实验更好的描述可能是非子博弈完美的均衡，其中玩家 II“威胁”拒绝过低的提议 \(1 - x\) 。然而，我们假设子博弈完美均衡，因为它们能得出明确的结论，并且因为通过允许拒绝后有“反要求”，模型将得到改进并变得更现实。(练习 11.3 要求你找出离散最后通牒博弈的所有均衡。)
\end{tcolorbox}

The described two SPE of the discrete Ultimatum game are found whenever the unit pie can be split into \(M + 1\) possible splits(x,1 - x)for \(x = \frac{i}{M}\) , for \(i = 0,1,\ldots ,M - 1,M\) , like \(M = {100}\) above. Of her \({2}^{M + 1}\) pure strategies, player II can play only two in an SPE, namely always choosing \(A\) whenever \(x < 1\) , and choosing either \(A\) or \(R\) in response to \(x = 1\) . The respective demand by player \(\mathrm{I}\) is \(x = 1\) or \(x = 1 - \frac{1}{M}\) . With a very fine discretization where \(M\) becomes very large, these two SPE are nearly identical, with player I demanding all (or nearly all) of the pie, and player II receiving almost nothing.

\begin{tcolorbox}
每当单位馅饼可以被分割成 \(M + 1\) 种可能的分配方式 (x, 1 - x)，其中 \(x = \frac{i}{M}\) ，对于 \(i = 0,1,\ldots ,M - 1,M\) ，就像上面的 \(M = {100}\) 一样，就可以找到离散最后通牒博弈所描述的两种子博弈完美均衡(SPE)。在她的 \({2}^{M + 1}\) 种纯策略中，玩家 II 在子博弈完美均衡中只能采用两种策略，即每当 \(x < 1\) 时总是选择 \(A\) ，以及针对 \(x = 1\) 选择 \(A\) 或 \(R\) 。玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 相应的要求是 \(x = 1\) 或 \(x = 1 - \frac{1}{M}\) 。当离散化非常精细，即 \(M\) 变得非常大时，这两种子博弈完美均衡几乎相同，玩家 I 要求得到全部(或几乎全部)馅饼，而玩家 II 几乎一无所获。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.4\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_327_392_210_524_474_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.9 The Continuous Ultimatum game. Player I makes any demand \(x \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) , which player II either accepts (A) or rejects(R). Only one decision point of player II is shown.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 11.9 连续最后通牒博弈。玩家 I 提出任何要求 \(x \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) ，玩家 II 可以选择接受(A)或拒绝(R)。这里只展示了玩家 II 的一个决策点。
\end{tcolorbox}

In the Continuous Ultimatum game, the possible demand \(x\) by player \(\mathrm{I}\) is any number in the interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) , which defines an infinite number of strategies for player I. A strategy of player II is then given by a function \(f : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \{ A,R\}\) , where \(f\left( x\right)  = A\) means that player II accepts the demand \(x\) , and \(f\left( x\right)  = R\) means that player II rejects it. (Equivalently, a strategy of player II is an arbitrary subset of \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) that consists exactly of those demands \(x\) that she accepts.) This infinite game is indicated in Figure 11.9. The infinitely many choices \(x\) are indicated by the triangle, whose baseline represents the interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) . Every point of that baseline has a separate decision point for player II where she can decide between \(A\) and \(R\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在连续最后通牒博弈中，玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 可能提出的要求 \(x\) 是区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 内的任意数字，这为玩家 I 定义了无限种策略。玩家 II 的一种策略由一个函数 \(f : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \{ A,R\}\) 给出，其中 \(f\left( x\right)  = A\) 表示玩家 II 接受要求 \(x\) ， \(f\left( x\right)  = R\) 表示玩家 II 拒绝该要求。(等价地，玩家 II 的一种策略是 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 的任意一个子集，该子集恰好由她接受的那些要求 \(x\) 组成。)这个无限博弈如图 11.9 所示。无限多种选择 \(x\) 由三角形表示，其底边代表区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 。底边的每个点都对应玩家 II 的一个单独决策点，她可以在 \(A\) 和 \(R\) 之间做出选择。
\end{tcolorbox}

We want to show that the Continuous Ultimatum game has a unique SPE. This requires an additional assumption, namely that the utility function \(u\) of player \(\mathrm{I}\) is strictly increasing. This is the case if \({x}^{\prime } = 1\) in the following lemma.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们要证明连续最后通牒博弈有唯一的子博弈完美均衡。这需要一个额外的假设，即玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 的效用函数 \(u\) 是严格递增的。如果满足下面引理中的 \({x}^{\prime } = 1\) ，就会出现这种情况。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 11.7. Let \(u : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) be an increasing, concave, and continuous function with \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0\) and \(u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . Then \(u\) is strictly increasing on an interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,{x}^{\prime }}\right\rbrack\) , where \(u\left( x\right)  = 1\) for all \(x \in  \left\lbrack  {{x}^{\prime },1}\right\rbrack\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 11.7。设 \(u : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) 是一个递增、凹且连续的函数，且满足 \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0\) 和 \(u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。那么 \(u\) 在区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,{x}^{\prime }}\right\rbrack\) 上是严格递增的，其中对于所有的 \(x \in  \left\lbrack  {{x}^{\prime },1}\right\rbrack\) 有 \(u\left( x\right)  = 1\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. The set \(I = \{ x \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \mid  u\left( x\right)  = 1\}\) is not empty (it contains 1) and closed because \(u\) is continuous. Let \({x}^{\prime }\) be the smallest element of \(I\) , with \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . Then \(I = \left\lbrack  {{x}^{\prime },1}\right\rbrack\) because \({x}^{\prime } \leq  x \leq  1\) implies \(1 = u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  \leq  u\left( x\right)  \leq  u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . We have \({x}^{\prime } > 0\) because \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0 < 1\) . To see that \(u\) is strictly increasing on the interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,{x}^{\prime }}\right\rbrack\) , suppose there were \(\bar{x}\) and \(\widehat{x}\) in that interval with \(\bar{x} < \widehat{x}\) but \(u\left( \bar{x}\right)  = u\left( \widehat{x}\right)  < u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = 1\) . Then it is easy to see (a drawing will help) that \(u\left( \widehat{x}\right)\) is below the line that connects \(u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) and \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)\) , which contradicts the concavity of \(u\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。集合 \(I = \{ x \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \mid  u\left( x\right)  = 1\}\) 非空(它包含 1)且是闭集，因为 \(u\) 是连续的。设 \({x}^{\prime }\) 为 \(I\) 中的最小元素，且满足 \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。那么 \(I = \left\lbrack  {{x}^{\prime },1}\right\rbrack\) ，因为 \({x}^{\prime } \leq  x \leq  1\) 意味着 \(1 = u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  \leq  u\left( x\right)  \leq  u\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。我们有 \({x}^{\prime } > 0\) ，因为 \(u\left( 0\right)  = 0 < 1\) 。为了说明 \(u\) 在区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,{x}^{\prime }}\right\rbrack\) 上严格递增，假设在该区间内存在 \(\bar{x}\) 和 \(\widehat{x}\) ，满足 \(\bar{x} < \widehat{x}\) 但 \(u\left( \bar{x}\right)  = u\left( \widehat{x}\right)  < u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)  = 1\) 。那么很容易看出(画个图会有帮助) \(u\left( \widehat{x}\right)\) 位于连接 \(u\left( \bar{x}\right)\) 和 \(u\left( {x}^{\prime }\right)\) 的直线下方，这与 \(u\) 的凹性相矛盾。
\end{tcolorbox}

If \({x}^{\prime } < 1\) in Lemma 11.7, then player \(\mathrm{I}\) is perfectly satisifed by receiving only \({x}^{\prime }\) , which is less than a full share of the pie. Then any demand \(x\) with \({x}^{\prime } \leq  x < 1\) is accepted by player II because she receives \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  > 0\) , and \(x\) is a possible strategy of player I in an SPE. In that case, we do not get a unique SPE. We therefore require that \(u\) is strictly increasing, or equivalently, by Lemma 11.7, that \(u\left( x\right)  = 1\) implies \(x = 1\) . Hence, we assume that the utility function \(u\) of player \(\mathrm{I}\) , and similarly the utility function \(v\) of player II, is strictly increasing.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果引理 11.7 中的 \({x}^{\prime } < 1\) 成立，那么玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 仅获得 \({x}^{\prime }\) 就会完全满意，而 \({x}^{\prime }\) 小于整个“馅饼”的份额。那么任何满足 \({x}^{\prime } \leq  x < 1\) 的需求 \(x\) 都会被玩家 II 接受，因为她能得到 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  > 0\) ，并且 \(x\) 是玩家 I 在子博弈完美均衡(SPE)中的一个可能策略。在这种情况下，我们无法得到唯一的子博弈完美均衡。因此，我们要求 \(u\) 严格递增，或者等价地，根据引理 11.7， \(u\left( x\right)  = 1\) 意味着 \(x = 1\) 。因此，我们假设玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 的效用函数 \(u\) ，以及类似地玩家 II 的效用函数 \(v\) ，都是严格递增的。
\end{tcolorbox}

The following proposition states that the only SPE of the Continuous Ultimatum game is where player I demands the whole pie, with \(x = 1\) , and where player II accepts any demand, including the demand \(x = 1\) on the equilibrium path where she is indifferent between accepting and rejecting. The reasoning is more subtle than the SPE just being a "limit" of the discretized Ultimatum game.

\begin{tcolorbox}
以下命题表明，连续最后通牒博弈(Continuous Ultimatum game)的唯一子博弈完美均衡是玩家 I 要求整个“馅饼”，即 \(x = 1\) ，并且玩家 II 接受任何需求，包括在均衡路径(equilibrium path)上的需求 \(x = 1\) ，在该均衡路径上她对接受和拒绝无差异。其推理比子博弈完美均衡仅仅是离散化最后通牒博弈(Ultimatum game)的“极限”更为微妙。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proposition 11.8. Let \(u,v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) be strictly increasing, concave, and continuous utility functions of player \(I\) and \({II}\) , respectively, with \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) and \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) . Then the Continuous Ultimatum game has the unique SPE where the demand \(x\) of player I is \(x = 1\) and player II always chooses \(A\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
命题 11.8。设 \(u,v : \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack   \rightarrow  \mathbb{R}\) 分别是玩家 \(I\) 和 \({II}\) 的严格递增、凹且连续的效用函数，且满足 \(u\left( 0\right)  = v\left( 0\right)  = 0\) 和 \(u\left( 1\right)  = v\left( 1\right)  = 1\) 。那么连续最后通牒博弈(Continuous Ultimatum game)有唯一的子博弈完美均衡，其中玩家 I 的需求 \(x\) 为 \(x = 1\) ，并且玩家 II 总是选择 \(A\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. The described strategies define an SPE. To show uniqueness, first observe that player II has to accept whenever \(x < 1\) because then she receives a positive payoff \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) . Suppose there is an SPE where player I’s demand is \(x\) so that \(x < 1\) . Because \(u\) is strictly increasing, player I would get more by demanding a little more, but still less than 1, for example \(\frac{x + 1}{2}\) , which player II still accepts. Hence, \(x = 1\) is the only strategy by player I in an SPE. On the equilibrium path, player II is indifferent, and can choose either \(A\) or \(R\) in response to \(x = 1\) , and in fact could randomize between \(A\) and \(R\) . Suppose that \(R\) is played with any positive probability \(\varepsilon  > 0\) , giving player I expected payoff \(\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right) u\left( 1\right)  + {\varepsilon u}\left( 0\right)\) , which is \(1 - \varepsilon\) . But then player I’s best response to that strategy of player II would not be \(x = 1\) . Instead, player I could improve his payoff, for example by demanding \(1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2}\) because then player II would accept for sure and player I receives \(u\left( {1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2}}\right)  \geq  1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2} > 1 - \varepsilon\) . However, no demand less than 1 is possible in an SPE. Hence, if player II does accept the demand \(x = 1\) with certainty, then this reaction of player II does not define an SPE, so the described SPE is the only SPE.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。所描述的策略定义了一个子博弈完美均衡(SPE)。为了证明其唯一性，首先观察到，只要 \(x < 1\) ，玩家 II 就必须接受，因为此时她能获得正收益 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) 。假设存在一个子博弈完美均衡，其中玩家 I 的要求是 \(x\) ，使得 \(x < 1\) 。由于 \(u\) 是严格递增的，玩家 I 通过多要求一点，但仍少于 1，例如 \(\frac{x + 1}{2}\) ，能获得更多收益，而玩家 II 仍然会接受。因此， \(x = 1\) 是玩家 I 在子博弈完美均衡中的唯一策略。在均衡路径上，玩家 II 无差异，可以选择以 \(A\) 或 \(R\) 来回应 \(x = 1\) ，实际上也可以在 \(A\) 和 \(R\) 之间随机选择。假设以正概率 \(\varepsilon  > 0\) 选择 \(R\) ，这使得玩家 I 的期望效用为 \(\left( {1 - \varepsilon }\right) u\left( 1\right)  + {\varepsilon u}\left( 0\right)\) ，即 \(1 - \varepsilon\) 。但这样一来，玩家 I 针对玩家 II 该策略的最优反应就不会是 \(x = 1\) 。相反，玩家 I 可以提高自己的收益，例如要求 \(1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2}\) ，因为此时玩家 II 肯定会接受，玩家 I 能获得 \(u\left( {1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2}}\right)  \geq  1 - \frac{\varepsilon }{2} > 1 - \varepsilon\) 。然而，在子博弈完美均衡中，要求少于 1 是不可能的。因此，如果玩家 II 确定会接受要求 \(x = 1\) ，那么玩家 II 的这种反应并不能定义一个子博弈完美均衡，所以所描述的子博弈完美均衡是唯一的子博弈完美均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

In summary, with demands that can be chosen continuously, the demand of a player in an SPE makes the other player indifferent between accepting and rejecting, which the other player nevertheless accepts with certainty. This will also be the guiding principle in SPE of more complicated games, which we study next.

\begin{tcolorbox}
总之，当要求可以连续选择时，在子博弈完美均衡中，一个玩家的要求会使另一个玩家在接受和拒绝之间无差异，但另一个玩家仍然会确定地接受。这也将是我们接下来要研究的更复杂博弈的子博弈完美均衡的指导原则。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.8 Alternating Offers Over Two Rounds}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.8 两轮交替报价}
\end{tcolorbox}

Next, we extend the bargaining model so that once a player has rejected the demand of the other player, she can make a counter-demand that, in turn, the other player can accept or reject. In order to find an SPE of this game by backward induction, these alternating offers have to end after some time. The simplest case is bargaining over two rounds, discussed in this section. In the first round, player I makes a demand \(x\) , which player II can accept or reject. In the latter case, she can make a counter-demand \(y\) that represents the share of the pie she claims for herself, so the pie is split into \(1 - y\) for player I and \(y\) for player II. If player I accepts that demand, he receives utility \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)\) and player II receives utility \(v\left( y\right)\) . If player \(\mathrm{I}\) rejects the final demand, both players receive zero.

\begin{tcolorbox}
接下来，我们扩展讨价还价模型，使得一旦一个玩家拒绝了另一个玩家的要求，她可以提出反要求，而另一个玩家又可以接受或拒绝该反要求。为了通过逆向归纳法找到这个博弈的子博弈完美均衡，这些交替报价必须在一段时间后结束。最简单的情况是两轮讨价还价，本节将对此进行讨论。在第一轮中，玩家 I 提出要求 \(x\) ，玩家 II 可以接受或拒绝。如果拒绝，她可以提出反要求 \(y\) ，这代表她为自己争取的份额，因此馅饼被分割为玩家 I 得到 \(1 - y\) ，玩家 II 得到 \(y\) 。如果玩家 I 接受该要求，他获得效用 \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)\) ，玩家 II 获得效用 \(v\left( y\right)\) 。如果玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 拒绝最终要求，两个玩家的收益都为零。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=1.0\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_329_325_340_1271_893_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.10 Two-round bargaining with demand \(x\) by player I in round one and counter-demand \(y\) by player II in round two. Left: A second round takes place with probability \(\delta\) , otherwise termination with payoffs(0,0). Right: Simplified, equivalent game with \(\delta\) as a discount factor applied to the second-round utility values.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图 11.10 两轮讨价还价，第一轮玩家 I 提出要求 \(x\) ，第二轮玩家 II 提出反要求 \(y\) 。左图:第二轮以概率 \(\delta\) 发生，否则以收益 (0, 0) 结束博弈。右图:简化的等价博弈，其中 \(\delta\) 作为贴现因子应用于第二轮的效用值。
\end{tcolorbox}

In this game, player II's demand in the final round is final. Hence, this subgame is the Ultimatum game with the roles of the players exchanged, where by Proposition 11.8 player II can demand the whole pie. Hence, there seems to be no incentive for her to accept anything offered to her in the first round. For that reason, the model has an additional feature shown in Figure 11.10. Namely, when player II rejects the first demand, there is a positive probability \(1 - \delta\) that bargaining terminates with no agreement, where we assume \(0 < \delta  < 1\) . This is the unsuccessful outcome, with payoff zero to both, given as the result of a chance move. The game proceeds to player II’s counter-demand only with probability \(\delta\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
在这个博弈中，玩家 II 在最后一轮的要求是最终要求。因此，这个子博弈是玩家角色互换的最后通牒博弈，根据命题 11.8，玩家 II 可以要求整个馅饼。因此，她似乎没有动力在第一轮接受提供给她的任何东西。出于这个原因，该模型有一个如图 11.10 所示的额外特征。即，当玩家 II 拒绝第一个要求时，有一个正概率 \(1 - \delta\) 使得讨价还价以未达成协议而结束，我们假设 \(0 < \delta  < 1\) 。这是不成功的结果，双方收益都为零，这是由一个随机事件决定的。博弈只有以概率 \(\delta\) 进入玩家 II 的反要求阶段。
\end{tcolorbox}

By computing expected values, the chance move can be eliminated from the game, which gives the game shown on the right in Figure 11.10. In that game, the pair \(\left( {u\left( {1 - y}\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)\) of utilities when agreement is reached in the second round is multiplied by \(\delta\) , which is a reduction of the payoffs because \(\delta  < 1\) . The usual interpretation of \(\delta\) is that of a discount factor, which expresses that later payoffs are worth less than earlier payoffs.

\begin{tcolorbox}
通过计算期望值，可以将博弈中的机会节点消除，从而得到图11.10右侧所示的博弈。在该博弈中，第二轮达成协议时的效用对 \(\left( {u\left( {1 - y}\right) ,v\left( y\right) }\right)\) 乘以 \(\delta\) ，这是对收益的一种折减，因为 \(\delta  < 1\) 。通常将 \(\delta\) 解释为贴现因子，它表示后期收益的价值低于前期收益。
\end{tcolorbox}

A discount factor \(\delta\) applied to future payoffs is a realistic assumption. In monetary terms, it can express lost interest payments (for money today as opposed to money in the future). More importantly, future payoffs are less secure because, for example, the buyer or seller in a deal may change her mind, or because of other unforeseen circumstances. This is modeled with the chance move in the left game in Figure 11.10. In addition, such a chance move justifies why both players should have the same discount factor. Alternatively, one may use different discount factors \({\delta }_{\mathrm{I}}\) and \({\delta }_{\mathrm{{II}}}\) for the two players, which give second-round payoffs \({\delta }_{\mathrm{I}}u\left( {1 - y}\right)\) and \({\delta }_{\mathrm{{II}}}v\left( y\right)\) . If these discount factors are different, a higher discount factor represents a more patient player whose future payoff differs less from the present payoff. However, the resulting game would be more complicated to analyze, and would not lead to a direct connection with the Nash bargaining solution. We therefore use only a single discount factor, as represented by the model where \(\delta\) is the probability that bargaining continues into the next round.

\begin{tcolorbox}
对未来收益应用贴现因子 \(\delta\) 是一个现实的假设。从货币角度来看，它可以表示损失的利息支付(今天的钱与未来的钱相比)。更重要的是，未来收益的安全性较低，例如，交易中的买方或卖方可能会改变主意，或者由于其他不可预见的情况。这在图11.10左侧博弈的机会节点中得到了体现。此外，这样的机会节点解释了为什么两个参与者应该使用相同的贴现因子。或者，也可以为两个参与者使用不同的贴现因子 \({\delta }_{\mathrm{I}}\) 和 \({\delta }_{\mathrm{{II}}}\) ，它们会产生第二轮收益 \({\delta }_{\mathrm{I}}u\left( {1 - y}\right)\) 和 \({\delta }_{\mathrm{{II}}}v\left( y\right)\) 。如果这些贴现因子不同，较高的贴现因子代表更有耐心的参与者，其未来收益与当前收益的差异较小。然而，由此产生的博弈分析起来会更复杂，并且不会与纳什讨价还价解建立直接联系。因此，我们仅使用一个贴现因子，如 \(\delta\) 是讨价还价进入下一轮的概率的模型所示。
\end{tcolorbox}

An SPE of the game is found as follows. We use backward induction and analyze the last round first. When player II makes her demand \(y\) to player \(\mathrm{I}\) , he can only accept or reject. This is the Ultimatum game in Proposition 11.8 (with exchanged players). Hence, player II demands the whole pie with \(y = 1\) , and player I accepts any offer made to him, in particular this demand \(y = 1\) (recall that player I’s strategy is a function of the demand \(y\) that he faces), and player I will get nothing. Here, it does not matter if the last stage represents the subgame that starts with player II’s demand \(y\) in the left or right game in Figure 11.10, because the payoffs in the latter are merely scaled with the positive scalar \(\delta\) . These subgames in the two games in Figure 11.10 are strategically equivalent and have the same subgame-perfect equilibria. With this assumption, if player II rejects player I's demand \(x\) in the first round and chooses \(R\) , then player I gets payoff zero, and player II gets \({\delta v}\left( 1\right)\) , which is \(\delta\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
该博弈的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)的求解如下。我们使用逆向归纳法，首先分析最后一轮。当参与者II向参与者 \(\mathrm{I}\) 提出需求 \(y\) 时，他只能接受或拒绝。这是命题11.8中的最后通牒博弈(参与者角色互换)。因此，参与者II以 \(y = 1\) 的方式要求得到整个“蛋糕”，参与者I会接受向他提出的任何提议，特别是这个需求 \(y = 1\) (回想一下，参与者I的策略是他所面临的需求 \(y\) 的函数)，并且参与者I将一无所获。在这里，最后阶段代表的是从参与者II在图11.10左侧或右侧博弈中提出需求 \(y\) 开始的子博弈并不重要，因为后者的收益只是用正标量 \(\delta\) 进行了缩放。图11.10中两个博弈的这些子博弈在策略上是等价的，并且具有相同的子博弈完美均衡。在这个假设下，如果参与者II在第一轮拒绝了参与者I的需求 \(x\) 并选择 \(R\) ，那么参与者I的收益为零，参与者II的收益为 \({\delta v}\left( 1\right)\) ，即 \(\delta\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

By backward induction, what should player I do in the first round? Player II's reaction is unique except when she is indifferent. This means that she will accept the proposed split if she is offered a utility \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) (now undiscounted, because this is the first round) that exceeds the amount \(\delta\) that she can expect to get by rejection; she is indifferent if \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) ; and she will reject the split if \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  < \delta\) . By the same reasoning as for Proposition 11.8, the demand \(x\) by player I in the SPE is chosen so that \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) , and player II accepts this on the equilibrium path. (If she did not accept, player I would offer her a little bit more and make her accept. However, the only SPE is where player I makes player II indifferent.)

\begin{tcolorbox}
通过逆向归纳法，参与者I在第一轮应该怎么做呢？除了参与者II无差异的情况外，她的反应是唯一的。这意味着，如果给她提供的效用 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)\) (现在未贴现，因为这是第一轮)超过了她通过拒绝所能期望得到的数量 \(\delta\) ，她将接受提议的分配方案；如果 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) ，她将无差异；如果 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  < \delta\) ，她将拒绝该分配方案。根据与命题11.8相同的推理，在子博弈完美均衡中，参与者I的需求 \(x\) 被选择为使得 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) ，并且参与者II在均衡路径上接受这一需求。(如果她不接受，参与者I会给她多一点，让她接受。然而，唯一的子博弈完美均衡是参与者I让参与者II处于无差异状态。)
\end{tcolorbox}

The resulting SPE is unique. Player I demands \(x\) so that \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) , which is accepted immediately by player II, so that the game terminates with player I receiving \(u\left( x\right)\) and player II receiving \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) . The full equilibrium strategies are (with this \(x\) ): Player II accepts any demand \({x}^{\prime }\) so that \(0 \leq  {x}^{\prime } \leq  x\) , and rejects any \({x}^{\prime } > x\) . Any counter-demand by player II in the second round is \(y = 1\) , and player I accepts any amount in the second round. The strategies have to specify the actions of the players in the second stage in order to perform the backward induction analysis.

\begin{tcolorbox}
由此产生的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)是唯一的。参与者I提出的要求为 \(x\) ，使得 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) ，该要求会被参与者II立即接受，因此博弈结束时参与者I获得 \(u\left( x\right)\) ，参与者II获得 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) 。完整的均衡策略(针对这个 \(x\) )为:参与者II接受任何满足 \(0 \leq  {x}^{\prime } \leq  x\) 的要求 \({x}^{\prime }\) ，并拒绝任何 \({x}^{\prime } > x\) 。参与者II在第二轮提出的任何反要求为 \(y = 1\) ，并且参与者I在第二轮接受任何数额。为了进行逆向归纳法分析，这些策略必须明确参与者在第二阶段的行动。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_331_342_390_477_491_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.11 Graphical solution of the two-round bargaining game in Figure 11.10, for \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) . The inner curve is the set of discounted payoff pairs for the second round.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.11 图11.10中两轮讨价还价博弈在 \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) 情况下的图形解法。内曲线是第二轮贴现收益对的集合。
\end{tcolorbox}

Player I’s demand \(x\) in the first round is easily found graphically as shown in Figure 11.11. This shows, as the outer curve, the Pareto-frontier of the bargaining set, here for the utility functions \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) used earlier. Recall that for \(0 \leq  x \leq  1\) , one obtains any point \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) on that Pareto-frontier. Multiplying any such pair of real numbers with the factor \(\delta\) gives a "shrunk" version of the Pareto-frontier, shown as the curve with its lower endpoint \(\left( {\delta ,0}\right)\) and upper endpoint \(\left( {0,\delta }\right)\) . This second curve is traversed when looking at the points \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) when \(y\) is changed from 0 to 1, which are the discounted payoffs after agreement in the second round. In the subgame given by the second round, player I can only accept or reject, so this Ultimatum game has the upper endpoint \(\left( {0,\delta }\right)\) of the curve, denoted by \(A\) in Figure 11.11, as its payoff pair. Player I’s consideration in round one is to find a point \(B\) on the curve of first-round payoffs so that player II is indifferent between accepting and rejecting (where she will accept in the SPE). So this point \(B\) has the same vertical coordinate \(\delta\) as \(A\) , that is, \(B\) is of the form \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,\delta }\right)\) . As shown by the arrow, \(B\) is found by moving horizontally from point \(A\) until hitting the outer curve. In the example, \(x\) is the solution to the equation \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) , which is simply \(x = 1 - \delta\) because \(v\) is the identity function. The resulting utility \(u\left( x\right)\) to player \(\mathrm{I}\) is \(\sqrt{1 - \delta }\) . Figure 11.11 shows this for \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) , where \(u\left( x\right)  = \frac{1}{2}\) and \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \frac{3}{4}\) , that is, \(B = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{3}{4}}\right)\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
如图11.11所示，通过图形很容易找到参与者I在第一轮提出的要求 \(x\) 。图中，外曲线表示讨价还价集的帕累托前沿，这里使用的是前面提到的效用函数 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) 。回想一下，对于 \(0 \leq  x \leq  1\) ，可以在该帕累托前沿上得到任意点 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 。将任意这样的实数对乘以因子 \(\delta\) ，就得到了帕累托前沿的“缩小版”，如图中下端点为 \(\left( {\delta ,0}\right)\) 、上端点为 \(\left( {0,\delta }\right)\) 的曲线所示。当 \(y\) 从0变化到1时，观察点 \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) 就会遍历这条第二条曲线，这些点是第二轮达成协议后的贴现收益。在由第二轮构成的子博弈中，参与者I只能选择接受或拒绝，因此这个最后通牒博弈的收益对是曲线的上端点 \(\left( {0,\delta }\right)\) ，在图11.11中用 \(A\) 表示。参与者I在第一轮的考虑是在第一轮收益曲线上找到一个点 \(B\) ，使得参与者II在接受和拒绝之间无差异(在子博弈完美均衡中她会选择接受)。因此，这个点 \(B\) 与 \(A\) 具有相同的纵坐标 \(\delta\) ，即 \(B\) 的形式为 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,\delta }\right)\) 。如图中箭头所示，从点 \(A\) 水平移动直到与外曲线相交，就找到了 \(B\) 。在这个例子中， \(x\) 是方程 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \delta\) 的解，由于 \(v\) 是恒等函数，所以该解就是 \(x = 1 - \delta\) 。参与者 \(\mathrm{I}\) 由此获得的效用 \(u\left( x\right)\) 为 \(\sqrt{1 - \delta }\) 。图11.11展示了在 \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) 情况下的这种情况，其中 \(u\left( x\right)  = \frac{1}{2}\) 且 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \frac{3}{4}\) ，即 \(B = \left( {\frac{1}{2},\frac{3}{4}}\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.9 Alternating Offers Over Several Rounds}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.9 多轮交替出价}
\end{tcolorbox}

The bargaining game with three rounds of alternating offers is shown in Figure 11.12. Player I makes a demand \(x\) in the first round, which can be accepted or rejected by player II. If she rejects, she can make a counter-demand \(y\) , which in turn player I can accept or reject. If player I accepts, both players' payoffs are discounted, giving the expected payoff pair \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) . If player I rejects, then he can make in the third and final round a counter-counter-demand \(s\) , which if accepted gives the pair of twice-discounted payoffs \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) . If player II rejects the final demand \(s\) , both players get zero. These expected payoffs result because any rejection independently incurs a risk that, with probability \(1 - \delta\) , the game terminates with no agreement and payoff pair(0,0), and continues with probability \(\delta\) into the next round. Figure 11.12 shows directly the discounted payoffs and not the chance moves between the bargaining rounds, which would have to be included in a detailed model like the left game in Figure 11.10.

\begin{tcolorbox}
三轮交替报价的讨价还价博弈如图11.12所示。参与者I在第一轮提出一个要求 \(x\) ，参与者II可以接受或拒绝。如果她拒绝，她可以提出一个反要求 \(y\) ，而参与者I又可以接受或拒绝这个反要求。如果参与者I接受，两个参与者的收益都会被折现，得到期望效用对 \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) 。如果参与者I拒绝，那么他可以在第三轮也是最后一轮提出一个再反要求 \(s\) ，如果这个再反要求被接受，就得到经过两次折现的收益对 \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) 。如果参与者II拒绝最终要求 \(s\) ，两个参与者的收益都为零。这些期望效用之所以会出现，是因为任何一次拒绝都会独立地带来一种风险，即以概率 \(1 - \delta\) ，博弈会以未达成协议而结束，收益对为(0,0)，并以概率 \(\delta\) 进入下一轮。图11.12直接展示了折现后的收益，而没有展示讨价还价轮次之间的随机事件，在像图11.10左侧博弈那样的详细模型中，这些随机事件是必须包含在内的。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.6\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_332_192_208_808_1192_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.12 Bargaining over three rounds.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.12 三轮讨价还价。
\end{tcolorbox}

The SPE of the three-round game is found by backward induction. The third and final round is an Ultimatum game where player I demands \(s = 1\) , which is accepted by player II. The set of twice discounted payoffs \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) is the inner curve on the left in Figure 11.13. Player I’s demand \(s = 1\) gives the payoff pair \(\left( {{\delta }^{2},0}\right)\) , shown as point \(A\) in the figure. In the previous round, player II maximizes her payoff \({\delta v}\left( y\right)\) by making player I indifferent between accepting and rejecting.

\begin{tcolorbox}
三轮博弈的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)可以通过逆向归纳法找到。第三轮也是最后一轮是一个最后通牒博弈，参与者I提出要求 \(s = 1\) ，参与者II接受这个要求。经过两次折现的收益集 \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) 是图11.13左侧的内曲线。参与者I的要求 \(s = 1\) 给出了收益对 \(\left( {{\delta }^{2},0}\right)\) ，在图中表示为点 \(A\) 。在上一轮，参与者II通过让参与者I在接受和拒绝之间无差异来最大化她的收益 \({\delta v}\left( y\right)\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.9\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_333_338_206_1244_562_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.13 Graphical solution of the bargaining game over three rounds (left) and four rounds (right).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.13 三轮(左)和四轮(右)讨价还价博弈的图形解法。
\end{tcolorbox}

Hence, \(y\) is the solution to the equation \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}\) . This is point \(B\) in the figure, which is the point on the curve of second-round payoff pairs \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) with the same horizontal coordinate as \(A\) . With \(y\) determined like that, player \({\mathrm{I}}^{\prime }\mathrm{s}\) demand \(x\) in the first round is the solution to the equation \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) because this makes player II indifferent between accepting and rejecting in the first round. The corresponding point \(C = \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) on the set of first-round payoff pairs has the same vertical coordinate as \(B\) . On the equilibrium path, player I demands \(x\) in the first round, which is immediately accepted by player II. The complete equilibrium strategies are as before, where a player accepts any demand up to and including the demand in the SPE, and otherwise rejects and makes the described counter- or counter-counter-demand in the next round.

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此， \(y\) 是方程 \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}\) 的解。这在图中是点 \(B\) ，它是第二轮收益对曲线 \(\left( {{\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right) ,{\delta v}\left( y\right) }\right)\) 上与 \(A\) 具有相同横坐标的点。在这样确定了 \(y\) 之后，参与者 \({\mathrm{I}}^{\prime }\mathrm{s}\) 在第一轮的要求 \(x\) 是方程 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) 的解，因为这使得参与者II在第一轮接受和拒绝之间无差异。第一轮收益对集合上对应的点 \(C = \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 与 \(B\) 具有相同的纵坐标。在均衡路径上，参与者I在第一轮提出要求 \(x\) ，参与者II立即接受这个要求。完整的均衡策略和之前一样，即参与者会接受直至并包括子博弈完美均衡中的要求在内的任何要求，否则就拒绝并在下一轮提出上述的反要求或再反要求。
\end{tcolorbox}

In our example with utility functions \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) , the SPE of the game with three rounds is found as follows (according to the left picture in Figure 11.13). The vertical arrow from point \(A\) to point \(B\) gives the equation \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}\) or \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)  = \sqrt{1 - y} = \delta\) , that is, \(y = 1 - {\delta }^{2}\) . The horizontal arrow from \(B\) to \(C\) represents the equation \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) , that is, \(1 - x = \delta \left( {1 - {\delta }^{2}}\right)  = \delta  - {\delta }^{3}\) , which has the solution \(x = 1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3}\) . This is player I’s demand in the first round in the SPE; his payoff is \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3}}\) . For \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) , as in Figure 11.13, we have \(y = \frac{7}{16}\) and \(x = \frac{43}{64}\) with \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{43}/8\) and \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \frac{21}{64}\) . These are the coordinates of point \(C\) , approximately(0.82,0.33).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在我们具有效用函数 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) 的例子中，根据图11.13中的左图，该三轮博弈的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)求解如下。从点 \(A\) 到点 \(B\) 的垂直箭头给出方程 \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}\) 或 \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)  = \sqrt{1 - y} = \delta\) ，即 \(y = 1 - {\delta }^{2}\) 。从 \(B\) 到 \(C\) 的水平箭头表示方程 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) ，即 \(1 - x = \delta \left( {1 - {\delta }^{2}}\right)  = \delta  - {\delta }^{3}\) ，其解为 \(x = 1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3}\) 。这是子博弈完美均衡中玩家I在第一轮的需求；他的收益是 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3}}\) 。对于 \(\delta  = \frac{3}{4}\) ，如图11.13所示，我们有 \(y = \frac{7}{16}\) 和 \(x = \frac{43}{64}\) ，其中 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{43}/8\) 且 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = \frac{21}{64}\) 。这些是点 \(C\) 的坐标，约为(0.82, 0.33)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The game with four bargaining rounds has the same structure as the game with three rounds, except that if player II rejects player I’s demand \(s\) in round three, she can make a final demand \(t\) of her own in the fourth and final round, which player I can only accept or reject. If player I accepts, the players receive the three-times discounted payoffs \(\left( {{\delta }^{3}u\left( {1 - t}\right) ,{\delta }^{3}v\left( t\right) }\right)\) . The corresponding SPE is solved graphically as shown on the right in Figure 11.13. The last round is an Ultimatum game where player II can demand the whole pie with \(t = 1\) , which determines the payoff pair \(\left( {0,{\delta }^{3}}\right)\) , which is point \(A\) in the figure. In the previous round, the third round of the game, player \(\mathrm{I}\) demands \(s\) so that player \(\mathrm{{II}}\) is indifferent between accepting and rejecting, which gives point \(B\) , which is the pair of discounted payoffs \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) so that \({\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = {\delta }^{3}\) . This determines \(s\) . In the round before that, player II makes player I indifferent between accepting and rejecting with the demand \(y\) so that \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right)\) , shown as point \(C\) . This equation determines \(y\) . In the first round, player I demands \(x\) so as to make player II indifferent, according to \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) , which defines point \(D = \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) . This is also the equilibrium outcome because that demand \(x\) is accepted by player II.

\begin{tcolorbox}
四轮讨价还价博弈与三轮博弈结构相同，不同之处在于，如果玩家II在第三轮拒绝了玩家I的需求 \(s\) ，她可以在第四轮(即最后一轮)提出自己的最终需求 \(t\) ，玩家I只能接受或拒绝。如果玩家I接受，玩家将获得三倍贴现后的收益 \(\left( {{\delta }^{3}u\left( {1 - t}\right) ,{\delta }^{3}v\left( t\right) }\right)\) 。相应的子博弈完美均衡如图11.13右侧所示通过图形方式求解。最后一轮是一个最后通牒博弈(Ultimatum game)，玩家II可以以 \(t = 1\) 要求得到整个“馅饼”，这决定了收益对 \(\left( {0,{\delta }^{3}}\right)\) ，即图中的点 \(A\) 。在前一轮，即博弈的第三轮，玩家 \(\mathrm{I}\) 要求 \(s\) ，使得玩家 \(\mathrm{{II}}\) 在接受和拒绝之间无差异，这给出点 \(B\) ，即贴现收益对 \(\left( {{\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right) ,{\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right) }\right)\) ，使得 \({\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = {\delta }^{3}\) 。这决定了 \(s\) 。再前一轮，玩家II以需求 \(y\) 使玩家I在接受和拒绝之间无差异，使得 \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right)\) ，如图中点 \(C\) 所示。该方程决定了 \(y\) 。在第一轮，玩家I根据 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) 要求 \(x\) 以使玩家II无差异，这定义了点 \(D = \left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 。这也是均衡结果，因为该需求 \(x\) 会被玩家II接受。
\end{tcolorbox}

For \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) and \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) , the right picture in Figure 11.13 gives the following SPE. The arrow from \(A\) to \(B\) gives the equation \({\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = {\delta }^{3}\) or \(v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = \delta\) , which determines player I’s demand \(s = 1 - \delta\) in round three. The arrow from \(B\) to \(C\) gives the equation \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right)\) or \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta u}\left( s\right)\) , that is, \(\sqrt{1 - y} = \delta \sqrt{1 - \delta }\) or equivalently \(1 - y = {\delta }^{2}\left( {1 - \delta }\right)  = {\delta }^{2} - {\delta }^{3}\) , which has the solution \(y = 1 - {\delta }^{2} + {\delta }^{3}\) that determines player II’s demand \(y\) in the second round. Finally, the arrow from \(C\) to \(D\) gives the equation \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) or \(1 - x = \delta \left( {1 - {\delta }^{2} + {\delta }^{3}}\right)\) , which gives player I’s demand \(x\) in the first round as \(x = 1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3} - {\delta }^{4}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于 \(u\left( x\right)  = \sqrt{x}\) 和 \(v\left( y\right)  = y\) ，图11.13中的右图给出了以下子博弈完美均衡(SPE)。从 \(A\) 到 \(B\) 的箭头给出方程 \({\delta }^{2}v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = {\delta }^{3}\) 或 \(v\left( {1 - s}\right)  = \delta\) ，该方程确定了玩家I在第三轮的需求 \(s = 1 - \delta\) 。从 \(B\) 到 \(C\) 的箭头给出方程 \({\delta u}\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta }^{2}u\left( s\right)\) 或 \(u\left( {1 - y}\right)  = {\delta u}\left( s\right)\) ，即 \(\sqrt{1 - y} = \delta \sqrt{1 - \delta }\) 或等价地 \(1 - y = {\delta }^{2}\left( {1 - \delta }\right)  = {\delta }^{2} - {\delta }^{3}\) ，其解为 \(y = 1 - {\delta }^{2} + {\delta }^{3}\) ，该解确定了玩家II在第二轮的需求 \(y\) 。最后，从 \(C\) 到 \(D\) 的箭头给出方程 \(v\left( {1 - x}\right)  = {\delta v}\left( y\right)\) 或 \(1 - x = \delta \left( {1 - {\delta }^{2} + {\delta }^{3}}\right)\) ，该方程得出玩家I在第一轮的需求 \(x\) 为 \(x = 1 - \delta  + {\delta }^{3} - {\delta }^{4}\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Note that in the game of bargaining over four rounds, the arrow from \(A\) to \(B\) defines the same equation as in the two-round game in Figure 11.11; essentially, the fourth round in the four-round game describes the same situation, and gives the same picture, as the second round in the two-round game, except that all payoffs are shrunk by the factor \({\delta }^{2}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
注意，在四轮讨价还价博弈中，从 \(A\) 到 \(B\) 的箭头所定义的方程与图11.11中的两轮博弈相同；本质上，四轮博弈的第四轮所描述的情况与两轮博弈的第二轮相同，且图形也相同，只是所有的收益都缩小了 \({\delta }^{2}\) 倍。
\end{tcolorbox}

The bargaining game with alternating offers can be defined for any number of rounds. In each odd-numbered round (the first, third, fifth round, etc.), player I makes a demand, which can be accepted or rejected by player II. After rejection, the game progresses with probability \(\delta\) into the next round, and otherwise terminates with payoffs(0,0). Player II can make a demand in each even-numbered round. If the total number of rounds is even, then player II can make the last demand, which is the whole pie, which is advantageous for player II. If the total number of rounds is odd, then player I can make the last demand, and in turn demand the whole pie for himself.

\begin{tcolorbox}
交替出价的讨价还价博弈可以定义为任意轮数。在每一个奇数轮(第一轮、第三轮、第五轮等)，玩家I提出一个需求，玩家II可以接受或拒绝。拒绝后，博弈以概率 \(\delta\) 进入下一轮，否则以收益(0,0)结束。玩家II可以在每一个偶数轮提出需求。如果总轮数为偶数，那么玩家II可以提出最后一个需求，即整个“馅饼”，这对玩家II有利。如果总轮数为奇数，那么玩家I可以提出最后一个需求，进而为自己要求整个“馅饼”。
\end{tcolorbox}

The graphical solutions in Figures 11.11 and 11.13 can be extended to any number of rounds, with payoffs in the \(k\) th round given by \(\left( {{\delta }^{k - 1}u\left( z\right) ,{\delta }^{k - 1}v\left( {1 - z}\right) }\right)\) for some \(z \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) . These payoff pairs define a curve that is the original Pareto-frontier of the bargaining set shrunk by the factor \({\delta }^{k - 1}\) . The examples for a total number of two, three, or four rounds show that the resulting SPE defines a point \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) . This is the pair of payoffs to the two players because they agree in round one.

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.11和图11.13中的图形解法可以扩展到任意轮数，第 \(k\) 轮的收益由 \(\left( {{\delta }^{k - 1}u\left( z\right) ,{\delta }^{k - 1}v\left( {1 - z}\right) }\right)\) 给出，其中 \(z \in  \left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 为某个值。这些收益对定义了一条曲线，该曲线是讨价还价集的原始帕累托前沿缩小了 \({\delta }^{k - 1}\) 倍后的曲线。两轮、三轮或四轮的例子表明，得到的子博弈完美均衡(SPE)定义了一个点 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 。这是因为两个玩家在第一轮就达成了一致，所以这是两个玩家的收益对。
\end{tcolorbox}

In general, if the total number of rounds is odd, player I is always better off than if the total number of rounds is even, which favours player II who can make the last demand. However, with an increasing total number of rounds, the resulting points \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) move towards each other. We should expect that with a very large number of rounds, it matters less and less who can make the last demand (because the future discounted payoffs from which the backward induction starts are very small), and expect some convergence. However, we will not study the "limit" of these finite games, but instead consider a new concept, a game with an infinite number of rounds.

\begin{tcolorbox}
一般来说，如果总轮数为奇数，玩家I的情况总是比总轮数为偶数时更好，因为总轮数为偶数有利于能提出最后需求的玩家II。然而，随着总轮数的增加，所得的点 \(\left( {u\left( x\right) ,v\left( {1 - x}\right) }\right)\) 会相互靠近。我们应该预期，当轮数非常多时，谁能提出最后需求就变得越来越不重要了(因为逆向归纳法所依据的未来贴现期望效用非常小)，并且会出现某种收敛。不过，我们不会研究这些有限博弈的“极限”，而是考虑一个新概念，即具有无限轮数的博弈。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{11.10 Stationary Strategies}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{11.10 平稳策略}
\end{tcolorbox}

We now analyze the bargaining game with alternating offers with an infinite number of rounds, that is, the game goes on forever. Formally, this is a game \(\Gamma\) with perfect information represented by an infinite tree. It can be defined recursively as shown in Figure 11.14. In the first and second round, player I and player II each make a demand \(x\) and \(y\) , respectively, from the interval \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) , which the other player can accept or reject. After rejection, a chance move terminates the game with probability \(1 - \delta\) where both players receive payoff zero. With probability \(\delta\) , the game continues into the next round where the player who has just rejected the offer can make her counter-demand. With the beginning of the third round, this is again player I, so that this defines the same game \(\Gamma\) that we started with in round one. Correspondingly, \(\Gamma\) is simply appended as the beginning of the subgame that starts after the second chance move that follows player I's rejection of player II's counter-demand \(y\) . (Note that infinitely many copies of \(\Gamma\) are substituted at each node that results from any \(x\) followed by any \(y\) .)

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们现在分析具有无限轮数的交替报价讨价还价博弈，也就是说，这个博弈会永远进行下去。形式上，这是一个由无限树表示的具有完美信息的博弈 \(\Gamma\) 。它可以如图11.14所示进行递归定义。在第一轮和第二轮，玩家I和玩家II分别从区间 \(\left\lbrack  {0,1}\right\rbrack\) 中提出需求 \(x\) 和 \(y\) ，另一名玩家可以接受或拒绝。拒绝后，有一个随机事件会以概率 \(1 - \delta\) 终止博弈，此时两名玩家的收益均为零。以概率 \(\delta\) ，博弈会进入下一轮，此时刚刚拒绝报价的玩家可以提出反需求。从第三轮开始，轮到玩家I，这样就定义了与第一轮开始时相同的博弈 \(\Gamma\) 。相应地， \(\Gamma\) 只是作为子博弈的起始部分被添加进来，该子博弈从玩家I拒绝玩家II的反需求 \(y\) 之后的第二次随机事件开始。(注意，在任何 \(x\) 之后接着任何 \(y\) 所产生的每个节点上，都会代入无限多个 \(\Gamma\) 的副本。)
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.4\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_335_330_1127_589_1022_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

Figure 11.14 The bargaining game \(\Gamma\) with an infinite number of rounds, which repeats itself after any demand \(x\) of player I in round one and any demand \(y\) of player II in round two after each player has rejected the other's demand. The next round is reached with probability \(\delta\) each time, and otherwise terminates with payoffs(0,0).

\begin{tcolorbox}
图11.14 具有无限轮数的讨价还价博弈 \(\Gamma\) ，在第一轮玩家I提出任何需求 \(x\) 以及第二轮玩家II提出任何需求 \(y\) 且双方都拒绝了对方的需求之后，该博弈会自我重复。每次以概率 \(\delta\) 进入下一轮，否则以收益(0,0)终止。
\end{tcolorbox}
