\({t}_{i}\) 属于 \({S}_{i}\) ，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{{s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}}}{u}_{i}\left( {{s}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right) z\left( {{s}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right)  \geq  \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{{s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}}}{u}_{i}\left( {{t}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right) z\left( {{s}_{i},{s}_{-i}}\right)  \tag{12.10}
\]

which imply (12.9) by summation over all \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
通过对所有 \({s}_{i} \in  {S}_{i}\) 求和，这意味着(12.9)式成立。
\end{tcolorbox}

Coarse correlated equilibria are considered further in Exercises 12.3 and 12.2.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在练习12.3和12.2中进一步探讨了粗相关均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{12.5 Existence of a Correlated Equilibrium}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{12.5 相关均衡的存在性}
\end{tcolorbox}

In this section, we prove the existence of a correlated equilibrium in an \(N\) -player game without assuming the existence of a Nash equilibrium (which relies on Brouwer's fixed-point theorem), using only the minimax Theorem 8.4.

\begin{tcolorbox}
在本节中，我们仅使用极小极大定理(minimax theorem)8.4，在不假设纳什均衡(Nash equilibrium)存在(纳什均衡的存在依赖于布劳威尔不动点定理)的情况下，证明一个 \(N\) 人博弈中相关均衡的存在性。
\end{tcolorbox}

As a warm-up, and because we will use it in the existence proof of a correlated equilibrium, we consider the concepts of a Markov chain \(Y\) on a finite set \(T\) and a stationary distribution for \(Y\) . Recall that1is the vector with all components equal to 1 . If \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) , then we write \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) as \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n},x \geq  \mathbf{0},{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x = 1\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
作为热身，并且因为我们将在相关均衡存在性的证明中使用它，我们考虑有限集 \(T\) 上的马尔可夫链(Markov chain) \(Y\) 和平稳分布(stationary distribution)的概念。回想一下，1 是所有分量都等于1的向量。如果 \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) ，那么我们将 \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 写作 \(x \in  {\mathbb{R}}^{n},x \geq  \mathbf{0},{\mathbf{1}}^{\top }x = 1\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

Definition 12.8. Let \(n \geq  1\) and \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) . A Markov chain on \(T\) is an \(n \times  n\) matrix \(Y\) so that \(Y \geq  0\) and \({Y1} = \mathbf{1}\) . A stationary distribution for a Markov chain \(Y\) on \(T\) is \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) so that \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定义12.8。设 \(n \geq  1\) 和 \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) 。 \(T\) 上的马尔可夫链是一个 \(n \times  n\) 矩阵 \(Y\) ，使得 \(Y \geq  0\) 且 \({Y1} = \mathbf{1}\) 。 \(T\) 上的马尔可夫链 \(Y\) 的平稳分布是 \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) ，使得 \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

With \(T\) seen as a set of states, a Markov chain \(Y\) on \(T\) specifies probabilistic state transitions. From a state chosen as a row of \(Y\) , the next state is reached according to the distribution defined by that row. If the rows are chosen according to a stationary distribution \(x\) on \(T\) , then the condition \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) means that every state has the same probability before and after the state transitions defined by \(Y\) . An example of a Markov chain \(Y\) and its stationary distribution \(x\) (see also Exercise 12.5) is

\begin{tcolorbox}
将 \(T\) 视为一组状态， \(T\) 上的马尔可夫链 \(Y\) 指定了概率性的状态转移。从 \(Y\) 的某一行所选择的状态开始，下一个状态根据该行所定义的分布来确定。如果根据 \(T\) 上的平稳分布 \(x\) 选择行，那么条件 \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) 意味着在 \(Y\) 所定义的状态转移前后，每个状态的概率相同。一个马尔可夫链 \(Y\) 及其平稳分布 \(x\) 的例子(另见练习12.5)是
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
Y = \left( \begin{array}{ll} {0.2} & {0.8} \\  {0.5} & {0.5} \end{array}\right) ,\;x = \left( \begin{matrix} \frac{5}{13} \\  \frac{8}{13} \end{matrix}\right) .
\]

Theorem 12.9. Every Markov chain has a stationary distribution.

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理12.9。每个马尔可夫链都有一个平稳分布。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Let \(Y\) be a Markov chain on \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) and \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) . Because \({x}^{\top }Y\mathbf{1} =\)  \({x}^{\top }\mathbf{1} = 1\) , the map \({x}^{\top } \mapsto  {x}^{\top }Y\) is a continuous function \(\Delta \left( T\right)  \rightarrow  \Delta \left( T\right)\) , which has a fixed point by Brouwer's fixed-point theorem. This fixed point is a stationary distribution for \(Y\) . However, we do not use the fixed-point theorem but instead the minimax Theorem 8.4 for the \(n \times  n\) zero-sum game with payoff matrix \(I - Y\) to the row player, were \(I\) is the \(n \times  n\) identity matrix.

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。设 \(Y\) 是 \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) 和 \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 上的一个马尔可夫链(Markov chain)。因为 \({x}^{\top }Y\mathbf{1} =\)  \({x}^{\top }\mathbf{1} = 1\) ，映射 \({x}^{\top } \mapsto  {x}^{\top }Y\) 是一个连续函数 \(\Delta \left( T\right)  \rightarrow  \Delta \left( T\right)\) ，根据布劳威尔不动点定理，它有一个不动点。这个不动点是 \(Y\) 的平稳分布(stationary distribution)。然而，我们不使用不动点定理，而是使用极小极大定理(minimax theorem)8.4 来处理这个具有支付矩阵 \(I - Y\) 的零和博弈(zero-sum game)，其中 \(I\) 是 \(n \times  n\) 单位矩阵(identity matrix)。
\end{tcolorbox}

We prove that the game with matrix \(I - Y\) has value zero. Let \(s \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) be a mixed strategy of the minimizing column player in this game. Taking \(s = \mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n}\) shows \(\left( {I - Y}\right) s = \mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n} - Y\mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n} = \mathbf{0}\) , so by playing \(s\) the column player pays at most zero in each row, and therefore the value of the game is at most zero.

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们证明具有矩阵 \(I - Y\) 的博弈值为零。设 \(s \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 是该博弈中最小化的列玩家的混合策略(mixed strategy)。取 \(s = \mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n}\) 表明 \(\left( {I - Y}\right) s = \mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n} - Y\mathbf{1}\frac{1}{n} = \mathbf{0}\) ，因此通过采用 \(s\) ，列玩家在每一行的支付最多为零，所以该博弈的值最多为零。
\end{tcolorbox}

If the value of the game \(I - Y\) is negative, then the column player has a mixed strategy \(s\) so that \(\left( {I - Y}\right) s < \mathbf{0}\) , that is, \(s < {Ys}\) . But this cannot be the case: Because \(Y\mathbf{1} = \mathbf{1}\) , every row \({Y}_{a}\) of \(Y\) for \(a \in  T\) is a probability distribution on \(T\) , and \({Y}_{a}s\) is a weighted average of the components \({s}_{b}\) of \(s\) , where \(s < {Ys}\) would mean \({s}_{a} < {Y}_{a}s\) for all \(a \in  T\) . This certainly fails for the largest component \({s}_{a}\) of \(s\) (as proved in (6.15), for example). Hence, the value of the game is indeed zero.

\begin{tcolorbox}
如果博弈 \(I - Y\) 的值为负，那么列玩家有一个混合策略 \(s\) 使得 \(\left( {I - Y}\right) s < \mathbf{0}\) ，即 \(s < {Ys}\) 。但这不可能成立:因为 \(Y\mathbf{1} = \mathbf{1}\) ，对于 \(a \in  T\) ， \(Y\) 的每一行 \({Y}_{a}\) 是 \(T\) 上的一个概率分布，并且 \({Y}_{a}s\) 是 \(s\) 的分量 \({s}_{b}\) 的加权平均值，其中 \(s < {Ys}\) 意味着对于所有 \(a \in  T\) 都有 \({s}_{a} < {Y}_{a}s\) 。对于 \(s\) 的最大分量 \({s}_{a}\) 来说，这肯定不成立(例如，如 (6.15) 中所证明的)。因此，该博弈的值确实为零。
\end{tcolorbox}

Therefore, the row player has a max-min strategy \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) so that \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)  \geq  {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) . If the row vector \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)\) has some positive component, then \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right) \mathbf{1} > 0\) , which contradicts \(\left( {I - Y}\right) \mathbf{1} = \mathbf{0}\) . Hence, \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)  = {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) , which is equivalent to \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) , that is, \(x\) is a stationary distribution for \(Y\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
因此，行玩家有一个极大极小策略(max-min strategy) \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 使得 \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)  \geq  {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) 。如果行向量 \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)\) 有某个正分量，那么 \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right) \mathbf{1} > 0\) ，这与 \(\left( {I - Y}\right) \mathbf{1} = \mathbf{0}\) 矛盾。因此， \({x}^{\top }\left( {I - Y}\right)  = {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) ，这等价于 \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) ，即 \(x\) 是 \(Y\) 的平稳分布。
\end{tcolorbox}

The next lemma provides a key step in the proof that a finite game has a correlated equilibrium. It states that if each row of a nonnegative square matrix has a sum of at most 1, then increasing the diagonal element in that row so that the sum equals 1 as in (12.13) creates a Markov chain whose stationary distribution fulfills the equation (12.12) that we need subsequently (this works because the diagonal elements in this equation cancel out).

\begin{tcolorbox}
下一个引理为证明有限博弈存在相关均衡(correlated equilibrium)提供了关键步骤。它表明，如果一个非负方阵的每一行的和至多为 1，那么像 (12.13) 那样增加该行的对角元素使得和等于 1，就会得到一个马尔可夫链，其平稳分布满足我们后续所需的方程 (12.12)(这是可行的，因为该方程中的对角元素会相互抵消)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Lemma 12.10. Let \(n \geq  1\) and \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) . Let \(y\left( {a,b}\right)  \geq  0\) for \(a,b \in  T\) so that

\begin{tcolorbox}
引理 12.10。设 \(n \geq  1\) 和 \(T = \{ 1,\ldots ,n\}\) 。设 \(y\left( {a,b}\right)  \geq  0\) 对于 \(a,b \in  T\) 使得
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\forall a \in  T : \;\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  T}}y\left( {a,b}\right)  \leq  1. \tag{12.11}
\]

Then there exists \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) so that

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么存在 \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 使得
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\forall c \in  T : \;x\left( c\right) \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  T}}y\left( {c,b}\right)  = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  T}}x\left( a\right) y\left( {a,c}\right) . \tag{12.12}
\]

Define the \(n \times  n\) matrix \(Y\) with entries \({Y}_{ab}\) by

\begin{tcolorbox}
通过以下方式定义具有元素 \({Y}_{ab}\) 的 \(n \times  n\) 矩阵 \(Y\)
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{Y}_{ab} = \left\{  \begin{array}{ll} y\left( {a,b}\right) & \text{ if }a \neq  b, \\  1 - \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  T,c \neq  a}}y\left( {a,c}\right) & \text{ if }a = b. \end{array}\right.  \tag{12.13}
\]

Then \(Y\) is a Markov chain on \(T\) , and \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) fulfills (12.12) if and only if \(x\) is a stationary distribution for \(Y\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么 \(Y\) 是 \(T\) 上的一个马尔可夫链(Markov chain)，并且当且仅当 \(x\) 是 \(Y\) 的平稳分布(stationary distribution)时， \(x \in  \Delta \left( T\right)\) 满足 (12.12)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. Clearly,(12.11) implies \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  T,c \neq  a}}y\left( {a,c}\right)  \leq  1\) and therefore \({Y}_{aa} \geq  0\) in (12.13), and thus \({Y}_{ab} \geq  0\) for all \(a,b \in  T\) . By (12.13),

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明:显然，(12.11) 意味着 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  T,c \neq  a}}y\left( {a,c}\right)  \leq  1\) ，因此在 (12.13) 中意味着 \({Y}_{aa} \geq  0\) ，从而对于所有的 \(a,b \in  T\) 都有 \({Y}_{ab} \geq  0\) 。根据 (12.13)，
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\forall a \in  T : \;\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  T}}{Y}_{ab} = 1, \tag{12.14}
\]

that is, \(Y \geq  0\) and \(Y\mathbf{1} = \mathbf{1}\) , so \(Y\) is a Markov chain on \(T\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
即 \(Y \geq  0\) 且 \(Y\mathbf{1} = \mathbf{1}\) ，所以 \(Y\) 是 \(T\) 上的一个马尔可夫链(Markov chain)。
\end{tcolorbox}

Equation (12.12) holds irrespective of the values \(y\left( {c,c}\right)\) for \(c \in  T\) , because the term \(x\left( c\right) y\left( {c,c}\right)\) on both sides of the equation cancels out. We replace \(y\left( {c,c}\right)\) by \({Y}_{cc}\) as defined in (12.13), which does not affect the validity of (12.12). Then the numbers \(y\left( {a,b}\right)\) are just the entries \({Y}_{ab}\) of \(Y\) , and \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  T}}y\left( {c,b}\right)  = 1\) by (12.14), so that (12.12) is equivalent to \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) , that is, \(x\) is a stationary distribution for \(Y\) . By Theorem 12.9, such a distribution exists.

\begin{tcolorbox}
方程 (12.12) 成立与否与 \(c \in  T\) 对应的 \(y\left( {c,c}\right)\) 的值无关，因为方程两边的项 \(x\left( c\right) y\left( {c,c}\right)\) 相互抵消。我们用 (12.13) 中定义的 \({Y}_{cc}\) 替换 \(y\left( {c,c}\right)\) ，这并不影响 (12.12) 的有效性。那么数字 \(y\left( {a,b}\right)\) 恰好是 \(Y\) 的元素 \({Y}_{ab}\) ，并且根据 (12.14) 有 \(\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  T}}y\left( {c,b}\right)  = 1\) ，所以 (12.12) 等价于 \({x}^{\top } = {x}^{\top }Y\) ，即 \(x\) 是 \(Y\) 的平稳分布(stationary distribution)。根据定理 12.9，这样的分布存在。
\end{tcolorbox}

Consider an \(N\) -player game \(G\) in strategic form as in Definition 12.3. We show the existence of a correlated equilibrium for \(G\) with help of an auxiliary zero-sum game derived from \(G\) that we call the deviation game. The deviation game has a row player COR (the "correlator") and a column player DEV (the "deviator"). The set of pure strategies of COR is the set \(S\) of pure strategy profiles of \(G\) . The set \(D\) of pure strategies of DEV is defined as

\begin{tcolorbox}
考虑定义 12.3 中策略形式(strategic form)的 \(N\) 人博弈 \(G\) 。我们借助从 \(G\) 导出的一个辅助零和博弈(zero - sum game)来证明 \(G\) 存在相关均衡(correlated equilibrium)，我们将这个辅助博弈称为偏离博弈。偏离博弈有一个行玩家 COR(“相关者”)和一个列玩家 DEV(“偏离者”)。COR 的纯策略集是 \(G\) 的纯策略组合集 \(S\) 。DEV 的纯策略集 \(D\) 定义为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
D = \mathop{\bigcup }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{N}\left( {\{ i\}  \times  {S}_{i} \times  {S}_{i}}\right)  \tag{12.15}
\]

where a pure strategy \(\left( {i,a,b}\right)  \in  D\) means that DEV selects a player \(i\) and two pure strategies \(a\) and \(b\) of player \(i\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
其中纯策略 \(\left( {i,a,b}\right)  \in  D\) 表示 DEV 选择一个玩家 \(i\) 以及玩家 \(i\) 的两个纯策略 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 。
\end{tcolorbox}

The payoffs to the row player COR in the deviation game are given in an \(\left| S\right|  \times  \left| D\right|\) matrix \(A\) with the entries

\begin{tcolorbox}
偏离博弈中行玩家 COR 的收益由一个 \(\left| S\right|  \times  \left| D\right|\) 矩阵 \(A\) 给出，其元素为
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
A\left( {s,\left( {i,a,b}\right) }\right)  = \left\{  \begin{array}{ll} {u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right) & \text{ if }{s}_{i} = a, \\  0 & \text{ if }{s}_{i} \neq  a. \end{array}\right.  \tag{12.16}
\]

The interpretation is that a mixed strategy of COR is considered as a correlation device, which is altered by the strategy(i, a, b)chosen by DEV as follows: In the strategy profile \(s\) chosen by \(\mathrm{{COR}}\) , if \({s}_{i} = a\) (that is, the strategy \({s}_{i}\) in the profile \(s\) recommended to player \(i\) matches \(a\) ), then player \(i\) deviates from this recommendation \(a\) and instead plays \(b\) . In the deviation game, the payoff gain for player \(i\) when he deviates this way is paid by COR to DEV (if player \(i\) is worse off by deviating, then COR receives the difference as his payoff).

\begin{tcolorbox}
其解释是，COR 的混合策略(mixed strategy)被视为一种相关机制(correlation device)，它会被 DEV 选择的策略 (i, a, b) 按如下方式改变:在 \(\mathrm{{COR}}\) 选择的策略组合 \(s\) 中，如果 \({s}_{i} = a\) (即，在组合 \(s\) 中推荐给玩家 \(i\) 的策略 \({s}_{i}\) 与 \(a\) 匹配)，那么玩家 \(i\) 偏离这个推荐策略 \(a\) 而选择 \(b\) 。在偏离博弈中，玩家 \(i\) 以这种方式偏离时的收益增益由 COR 支付给 DEV(如果玩家 \(i\) 偏离后情况变差，那么 COR 将获得差值作为其收益)。
\end{tcolorbox}

The value of the deviation game is at most zero by letting DEV play any pure strategy of the form(i, a, a)(that is, no player in \(G\) ever deviates). In that case, according to (12.16), the payoff in row \(s\) of \(A\) is zero for every \(s \in  S\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
通过让 DEV 采用任何形式为 (i, a, a) 的纯策略(即， \(G\) 中没有玩家偏离)，偏离博弈的值至多为零。在这种情况下，根据 (12.16)，对于每个 \(s \in  S\) ， \(A\) 的第 \(s\) 行的收益为零。
\end{tcolorbox}

The value of the deviation game equals zero if and only if the row player COR has a mixed strategy \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) so that

\begin{tcolorbox}
当且仅当行玩家 COR 有一个混合策略(mixed strategy) \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) 使得时，偏离博弈的值等于零
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{z}^{\top }A \geq  {0}^{\top }\text{ . } \tag{12.17}
\]

Then every column(i, a, b)of the game corresponds to exactly one of the incentive constraints (12.8) with \(\left( {i,{s}_{i},{t}_{i}}\right)  = \left( {i,a,b}\right)\) . Hence, such an optimal mixed strategy \(z\) of COR defines a correlated equilibrium of \(G\) . Therefore, \(G\) has a correlated equilibrium if and only if the deviation game has value zero. This is the case, as stated in the following theorem. It has a nice intuition that we explain afterwards.

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么，该博弈的每一列 (i, a, b) 都恰好对应一个带有 \(\left( {i,{s}_{i},{t}_{i}}\right)  = \left( {i,a,b}\right)\) 的激励约束 (12.8)。因此，COR 的这种最优混合策略 \(z\) 定义了 \(G\) 的一个相关均衡(correlated equilibrium)。所以，当且仅当偏离博弈(deviation game)的值为零时， \(G\) 存在一个相关均衡。如下述定理所述，情况确实如此。我们随后会解释其中一个很好理解的直觉。
\end{tcolorbox}

Theorem 12.11. Consider an N-player game G in strategic form as in Definition 12.3. Then the deviation game between COR and DEV with the matrix \(A\) of payoffs in (12.16) to the row player COR has value zero. Any max-min strategy of COR is a correlated equilibrium of \(G\) , which shows that \(G\) has at last one correlated equilibrium.

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理 12.11。考虑定义 12.3 中策略形式(strategic form)的 N 人博弈 G。那么，COR 和 DEV 之间的偏离博弈，其支付矩阵 \(A\) 如 (12.16) 所示，行玩家 COR 的博弈值为零。COR 的任何极大极小策略(max - min strategy)都是 \(G\) 的一个相关均衡，这表明 \(G\) 至少有一个相关均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

Proof. The value of the deviation game is at most zero. If its value is less than zero, then the column player DEV has a mixed strategy \(y \in  \Delta \left( D\right)\) so that \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) , which implies that \({z}^{\top }{Ay} < 0\) for every response \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) of COR. We show that this is not the case, by finding, as a function of \(y\) , a mixed strategy \(x\) of COR so that \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) . The distribution \(x\) on \(S\) will be a product distribution given by a profile of \(N\) mixed strategies \({x}_{i} \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) for each player \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) , that is, \(x\left( s\right)  = \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{x}_{i}\left( {s}_{i}\right)\) . We write \(x\left( s\right)  = {x}_{i}\left( {s}_{i}\right) {x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)\) with \({x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)  = \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{k = 1,k \neq  i}}^{n}{x}_{k}\left( {s}_{k}\right)\) . It turns out that \(x\) can be chosen solely as a function of \(y\) , independently of the players’ payoffs in the original game \(G\) . For such a product distribution \(x\) , we have

\begin{tcolorbox}
证明。偏离博弈的值至多为零。如果其值小于零，那么列玩家 DEV 有一个混合策略 \(y \in  \Delta \left( D\right)\) ，使得 \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) ，这意味着对于 COR 的每一个响应 \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) 都有 \({z}^{\top }{Ay} < 0\) 。我们通过找到一个作为 \(y\) 的函数的 COR 的混合策略 \(x\) ，使得 \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) ，来证明情况并非如此。 \(S\) 上的分布 \(x\) 将是一个由每个玩家 \(i = 1,\ldots ,N\) 的 \(N\) 混合策略 \({x}_{i} \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) 的组合所给出的乘积分布，即 \(x\left( s\right)  = \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{n}{x}_{i}\left( {s}_{i}\right)\) 。我们写成 \(x\left( s\right)  = {x}_{i}\left( {s}_{i}\right) {x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)\) ，其中 \({x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right)  = \mathop{\prod }\limits_{{k = 1,k \neq  i}}^{n}{x}_{k}\left( {s}_{k}\right)\) 。结果表明， \(x\) 可以仅作为 \(y\) 的函数来选择，而与原始博弈 \(G\) 中玩家的支付无关。对于这样的乘积分布 \(x\) ，我们有
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
{x}^{\top }{Ay} = \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{\left( {i,a,b}\right)  \in  D}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{s \in  S}}x\left( s\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) A\left( {s,\left( {i,a,b}\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{\left( {i,a,b}\right)  \in  D}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{{s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}}}x\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) \left( {{u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{N}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{{s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) {x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) \left( {{u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{i = 1}}^{N}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{{s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}}}{x}_{-i}\left( {s}_{-i}\right) \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) \left( {{u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right) }\right) . \tag{12.18}
\]

For player \(i\) and \({s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}\) , we arrange the last double sum according to the payoffs \({u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)\) for \(c \in  {S}_{i}\) :

\begin{tcolorbox}
对于玩家 \(i\) 和 \({s}_{-i} \in  {S}_{-i}\) ，我们根据 \(c \in  {S}_{i}\) 的支付 \({u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)\) 来排列最后一个双重求和:
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) \left( {{u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right) }\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) {u}_{i}\left( {a,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,b}\right) {u}_{i}\left( {b,{s}_{-i}}\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( c\right) y\left( {i,c,b}\right) {u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)  - \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}\mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,c}\right) {u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)
\]

\[
= \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{c \in  {S}_{i}}}{u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right) \left( {{x}_{i}\left( c\right) \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{b \in  {S}_{i}}}y\left( {i,c,b}\right)  - \mathop{\sum }\limits_{{a \in  {S}_{i}}}{x}_{i}\left( a\right) y\left( {i,a,c}\right) }\right) . \tag{12.19}
\]

We now invoke Lemma 12.10 with \(T = {S}_{i}\) and \(y\left( {a,b}\right)  = y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) : The numbers \(y\left( {a,b}\right)\) are the mixed strategy probabilities \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) of DEV, which implies (12.11). Hence, there are probabilities \(x\left( c\right)  = {x}_{i}\left( c\right)  \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) so that (12.12) holds, that is, the difference of the sums in (12.19) is zero for all \(c \in  {S}_{i}\) . Therefore, for any payoffs \({u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)\) , the entire sum in (12.19) is zero, and therefore \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) in (12.18).

\begin{tcolorbox}
我们现在对 \(T = {S}_{i}\) 和 \(y\left( {a,b}\right)  = y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) 应用引理 12.10:数字 \(y\left( {a,b}\right)\) 是 DEV 的混合策略概率 \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) ，这意味着 (12.11)。因此，存在概率 \(x\left( c\right)  = {x}_{i}\left( c\right)  \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) 使得 (12.12) 成立，即 (12.19) 中求和的差值对于所有 \(c \in  {S}_{i}\) 都为零。因此，对于任何支付 \({u}_{i}\left( {c,{s}_{-i}}\right)\) ，(12.19) 中的整个求和都为零，因此 (12.18) 中的 \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) 也为零。
\end{tcolorbox}

This shows that the column player DEV does not have a mixed strategy \(y\) with \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) . Therefore, as claimed, the deviation game has value zero. Any max-min strategy \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) of the row player COR fulfills \({z}^{\top }A \geq  {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) and defines a correlated equilibrium of the original game \(G\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
这表明列玩家DEV没有满足 \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) 的混合策略 \(y\) 。因此，如所声称的，偏离博弈的值为零。行玩家COR的任何极大极小策略 \(z \in  \Delta \left( S\right)\) 都满足 \({z}^{\top }A \geq  {\mathbf{0}}^{\top }\) ，并定义了原始博弈 \(G\) 的一个相关均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

The proof of Theorem 12.11 has the following intuition. Similarly to the proof of Theorem 12.9, it uses the minimax Theorem 8.4 by showing that the column player cannot simultaneously make all payoff rows negative. Consider any mixed strategy \(y\) of the column player DEV in the deviation game, and some player \(i\) in the original game \(G\) . The pure strategies \(a,b \in  {S}_{i}\) of player \(i\) are seen as states of a Markov chain, and the probabilities \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) define transition probabilities from state \(a\) to state \(b\) . For each \(a\) , the sum \({p}_{a}\) of these probabilities \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) over all \(b \neq  a\) is usually less than 1 . Hence, the complementary probability \(1 - {p}_{a}\) can be considered as the probability that player \(i\) does not deviate from his recommendation to play \(a\) . This interpretation agrees with the entries of the matrix \(A\) in (12.16) and with the definition of the deviation game (which in effect says that if DEV does not choose \(\left( {i,{s}_{i},{t}_{i}}\right)\) for the strategy \({s}_{i}\) in \(s\) chosen by COR, then player \(i\) does not deviate from \({s}_{i}\) ). With \({Y}_{aa} = 1 - {p}_{a}\) and \({Y}_{ab} = y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) , this defines the Markov chain \(Y\) in Lemma 12.10. Let \(x\) be a stationary distribution for \(Y\) , which defines a mixed strategy \({x}_{i}\) for player \(i\) . Crucially, this stationary distribution neutralizes the Markov chain. In other words, the "deviation plan" \(y\) by DEV is countered, independently for each player \(i\) , by a mixed strategy \({x}_{i}\) so that there is no observable difference, in terms of probabilities, between all players playing according to the profile \(x = \left( {{x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{N}}\right)\) before or after applying the deviations imposed by \(y\) . Hence, the gain for deviating is zero, expressed by the equation \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) , and hence it is not possible that \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) .

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理12.11的证明有如下直观解释。与定理12.9的证明类似，它运用了极小极大定理(定理8.4)，通过表明列玩家无法同时使所有收益行都为负。考虑偏离博弈中列玩家DEV的任何混合策略 \(y\) ，以及原始博弈 \(G\) 中的某个玩家 \(i\) 。玩家 \(i\) 的纯策略 \(a,b \in  {S}_{i}\) 被视为马尔可夫链(Markov chain)的状态，概率 \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) 定义了从状态 \(a\) 到状态 \(b\) 的转移概率。对于每个 \(a\) ，这些概率 \(y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) 在所有 \(b \neq  a\) 上的和 \({p}_{a}\) 通常小于1。因此，互补概率 \(1 - {p}_{a}\) 可以被视为玩家 \(i\) 不偏离其被建议采用的策略 \(a\) 的概率。这种解释与(12.16)中矩阵 \(A\) 的元素以及偏离博弈的定义一致(实际上，这意味着如果DEV没有为COR在 \(s\) 中选择的策略 \({s}_{i}\) 选择 \(\left( {i,{s}_{i},{t}_{i}}\right)\) ，那么玩家 \(i\) 不会偏离 \({s}_{i}\) )。结合 \({Y}_{aa} = 1 - {p}_{a}\) 和 \({Y}_{ab} = y\left( {i,a,b}\right)\) ，这就定义了引理12.10中的马尔可夫链 \(Y\) 。设 \(x\) 是 \(Y\) 的平稳分布(stationary distribution)，它为玩家 \(i\) 定义了一个混合策略 \({x}_{i}\) 。至关重要的是，这个平稳分布使马尔可夫链达到平衡。换句话说，DEV的“偏离计划” \(y\) 会被每个玩家 \(i\) 各自的混合策略 \({x}_{i}\) 所抵消，以至于在应用 \(y\) 所施加的偏离前后，从概率角度来看，所有玩家按照策略组合 \(x = \left( {{x}_{1},\ldots ,{x}_{N}}\right)\) 进行博弈没有可观测到的差异。因此，偏离的收益为零，由方程 \({x}^{\top }{Ay} = 0\) 表示，所以不可能出现 \({Ay} < \mathbf{0}\) 的情况。
\end{tcolorbox}

The "neutralizing behavior" \(x\) is chosen as a function of \(y\) , independently of the payoffs in \(G\) . Moreover, \(x\) does not represent an optimal behavior of COR in the deviation game (otherwise, it would be a Nash equilibrium of \(G\) by Proposition 12.4, with an existence proof by the minimax theorem, which would be too good to be true). In fact, for the optimal strategy \(y\) of COR that never asks for any deviation, the Markov chain on each state set \({S}_{i}\) is trivial and has every \({x}_{i} \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) as a stationary distribution.

\begin{tcolorbox}
“中和行为” \(x\) 是作为 \(y\) 的函数来选择的，与 \(G\) 中的收益无关。此外， \(x\) 并不代表COR在偏离博弈中的最优行为(否则，根据命题12.4，它将是 \(G\) 的一个纳什均衡(Nash equilibrium)，并且可以通过极小极大定理证明其存在性，这就好得令人难以置信了)。事实上，对于COR从不要求任何偏离的最优策略 \(y\) ，每个状态集 \({S}_{i}\) 上的马尔可夫链是平凡的，并且每个 \({x}_{i} \in  \Delta \left( {S}_{i}\right)\) 都是一个平稳分布。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{12.6 Further Reading}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{12.6 进一步阅读}
\end{tcolorbox}

Correlated equilibrium was introduced by Aumann (1974). We have described its canonical form where the correlation device directly generates strategy profiles with the strategies in them as private recommendations to the players, rather than using a device that sends arbitrary messages that are interpreted by the players. The canonical form suffices because only the players' actions matter (Aumann, 1987). As argued by Aumann (1987), correlated equilibrium is the expression of "Bayesian rationality" with a "common prior" about the state of the world, where this prior is in effect the correlation device. In contrast, playing Nash equilibrium requires much stronger assumptions about commonly accepted norms of behavior; see Aumann and Brandenburger (1995) and Aumann and Dreze (2008).

\begin{tcolorbox}
相关均衡(correlated equilibrium)由奥曼(Aumann，1974)提出。我们已经描述了它的标准形式，在这种形式中，相关机制(correlation device)直接生成策略组合，并将其中的策略作为私人建议提供给参与者，而不是使用发送任意消息、由参与者自行解读的机制。标准形式就足够了，因为只有参与者的行动才是重要的(奥曼，1987)。正如奥曼(1987)所论证的，相关均衡是“贝叶斯理性”(Bayesian rationality)在对世界状态有“共同先验”情况下的表达，而这个先验实际上就是相关机制。相比之下，达成纳什均衡(Nash equilibrium)需要对普遍接受的行为规范做出更强的假设；参见奥曼和布兰登伯格(Aumann and Brandenburger，1995)以及奥曼和德雷兹(Aumann and Dreze，2008)的研究。
\end{tcolorbox}

Games similar to the modified Chicken game in Figure 12.1 have been described by Aumann (1974, p. 72) and Myerson (1991, p. 250). Nau, Gomez Canovas, and Hansen (2004) prove that Nash equilibria lie on the relative boundary of the polytope of correlated equilibria, and show a picture similar to Figure 12.3.

\begin{tcolorbox}
与图12.1中修改后的胆小鬼博弈(Chicken game)类似的博弈，已由奥曼(1974，第72页)和迈尔森(Myerson，1991，第250页)进行过描述。瑙(Nau)、戈麦斯·卡诺瓦斯(Gomez Canovas)和汉森(Hansen，2004)证明，纳什均衡位于相关均衡有界多面体(polytope)的相对边界上，并展示了一幅类似于图12.3的图。
\end{tcolorbox}

The term "coarse correlated equilibrium" is due to Young (2004). The game in Figure 12.4 is taken from Moulin and Vial (1978, p. 205), who introduced the concept and called it the "simple extension" of a correlated equilibrium.

\begin{tcolorbox}
“粗相关均衡”(coarse correlated equilibrium)这一术语由扬(Young，2004)提出。图12.4中的博弈取自穆林和维亚尔(Moulin and Vial，1978，第205页)，他们引入了这一概念，并将其称为相关均衡的“简单扩展”。
\end{tcolorbox}

The existence proof of Theorem 12.11 is due to Hart and Schmeidler (1989) and, very similarly and independently, Nau and McCardle (1990). Lemma 12.10 with its construction of the Markov chain \(Y\) from \(y\) by increasing the diagonal elements is better than scaling the rows of \(y\) , which would require a case distinction for all-zero rows, and an, easily overlooked, scaling of the stationary distribution \(x\) . A polynomial-time algorithm for computing a correlated equilibrium based on this existence proof, even for a large class of compactly specified games where the strategic form is exponentially large, is described in Papadimitriou and Roughgarden (2008). The computational complexity of Nash and correlated equilibria is discussed by Gilboa and Zemel (1989). In general, correlated equilibria can be found by linear programming and are computationally more tractable than Nash equilibria and fixed-point problems.

\begin{tcolorbox}
定理12.11的存在性证明归功于哈特和施梅德勒(Hart and Schmeidler，1989)，以及非常相似且独立完成证明的瑙和麦卡德尔(Nau and McCardle，1990)。引理12.10通过增加对角元素从 \(Y\) 构造马尔可夫链(Markov chain) \(y\) ，这比缩放 \(y\) 的行要好，因为缩放行需要对全零行进行情况区分，并且容易忽略对平稳分布(stationary distribution) \(x\) 的缩放。帕帕迪米特里欧和拉夫加登(Papadimitriou and Roughgarden，2008)描述了一种基于此存在性证明来计算相关均衡的多项式时间算法，即使对于一类策略形式呈指数级大的紧凑指定博弈也是如此。吉尔博阿和泽梅尔(Gilboa and Zemel，1989)讨论了纳什均衡和相关均衡的计算复杂性。一般来说，相关均衡可以通过线性规划(linear programming)找到，并且在计算上比纳什均衡和不动点问题更容易处理。
\end{tcolorbox}

Correlated equilibria are important because they appear as limiting behavior of players who learn their strategies in repeated plays of the game. The limit distribution on strategy profiles is thereby given by how often they are played in these repeated interactions. For zero-sum games, fictitious play, where players use their best response against the current history, converges to a Nash equilibrium (Robinson,1951). For non-zero-sum games, however, this fails already for \(3 \times  3\) games, even if the game has a unique equilibrium, such as the game in Exercise 12.2, as shown by Shapley (1963).

\begin{tcolorbox}
相关均衡很重要，因为它们表现为参与者在重复博弈中学习策略时的极限行为。策略组合上的极限分布由此由它们在这些重复交互中被采用的频率决定。对于零和博弈(zero-sum game)，虚构博弈(fictitious play)(即参与者根据当前历史使用最优反应(best response))会收敛到一个纳什均衡(罗宾逊(Robinson)，1951)。然而，对于非零和博弈，即使博弈有唯一的均衡，如练习12.2中的博弈，这种收敛也会失败，正如沙普利(Shapley，1963)所证明的。
\end{tcolorbox}

In learning based on regret-matching, a player checks for any two of his strategies whether or not he should have played one instead of the other, and adapts his behavior accordingly. Hart and Mas-Colell (2000) introduced this learning procedure and showed that it approaches the set of correlated equilibria. It has its origin in the proof of Theorem 12.11, with the idea of applying ficticious play to the auxiliary zero-sum game (Hart and Mas-Colell, 2000, p. 1142). For a survey of learning in games see Young (2004).

\begin{tcolorbox}
在基于后悔匹配(regret-matching)的学习中，参与者会检查他的任意两个策略，判断自己是否应该选择其中一个而不是另一个，并相应地调整自己的行为。哈特和马斯 - 科莱尔(Hart and Mas-Colell，2000)引入了这种学习过程，并证明它会趋近于相关均衡集。它源于定理12.11的证明，其思路是将虚构博弈应用于辅助零和博弈(哈特和马斯 - 科莱尔，2000，第1142页)。关于博弈学习的综述可参见扬(Young，2004)的研究。
\end{tcolorbox}

\section*{12.7 Exercises for Chapter 12}

\begin{tcolorbox}
\section*{12.7 第12章练习}
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 12.1. Find the Nash and correlated equilibria of the following zero-sum game (with payoffs to the row player):

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习12.1. 找出以下零和博弈(行参与者的收益)的纳什均衡和相关均衡:
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\adjustbox{max width=\textwidth}{
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
II I & \(l\) & \(\gamma\) \\
\cline{1-3}
\(T\) & 4 & 2 \\
\cline{1-3}
\(B\) & 0 & 3 \\
\cline{1-3}
\hline
\end{tabular}
}
\end{center}

\begin{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\adjustbox{max width=\textwidth}{
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
二 一 & \(l\) & \(\gamma\) \\
\cline{1-3}
\(T\) & 4 & 2 \\
\cline{1-3}
\(B\) & 0 & 3 \\
\cline{1-3}
\hline
\end{tabular}
}
\end{center}

\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 12.2. Consider the following variant of the Rock-Paper-Scissors game where two equal strategies tie with payoff 0 for both players, but two unequal strategies give payoff 1 to the winner and -2 to the loser.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习12.2。考虑以下石头剪刀布游戏的变体:当两个玩家选择相同策略时，双方收益均为0；当两个玩家选择不同策略时，获胜者收益为1，失败者收益为 -2。
\end{tcolorbox}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[max width=0.3\textwidth]{images/bo_d2e5cmbef24c73b03tn0_361_722_372_486_489_0.jpg}
\end{center}
\hspace*{3em} 

(a) Find a Nash equilibrium of this game, and its payoff to the two players. Show that when this Nash equilibrium is considered as a correlated equilibrium, all incentive constraints (12.4) and (12.5) are tight (that is, hold as equalities). This fact may suffice to indicate that the Nash and correlated equilibrium is unique; for a different proof see von Stengel and Zamir (2010, Remark 13).

\begin{tcolorbox}
(a) 找出该游戏的一个纳什均衡(Nash equilibrium)，并计算两个玩家在此均衡下的收益。证明当把这个纳什均衡视为相关均衡(correlated equilibrium)时，所有激励约束(12.4)和(12.5)都是紧的(即取等号)。这一事实可能足以表明该纳什均衡和相关均衡是唯一的；另一种证明方法见冯·施滕格尔和扎米尔(2010，注13)。
\end{tcolorbox}

(b) Find a coarse correlated equilibrium of this game that has higher expected payoff to the players than the Nash equilibrium in (a).

\begin{tcolorbox}
(b) 找出该游戏的一个粗相关均衡(coarse correlated equilibrium)，使得玩家在此均衡下的期望效用(expected payoff)高于 (a) 中的纳什均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 12.3. For the game in Figure 12.4, the coarse correlated equilibrium \(z\) on the right has only two probabilities \(a = {z}_{32}\) for the strategy pair(B, M)and \(b = {z}_{23}\) for the strategy pair(M, B)that are positive; all other components \({z}_{ij}\) are zero. Find all possible values of \(a\) and \(b = 1 - a\) so that the correlation devices \(z\) that are defined in this way define a coarse correlated equilibrium of the game.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习12.3。对于图12.4中的游戏，右侧的粗相关均衡 \(z\) 仅对策略组合 (B, M) 赋予正概率 \(a = {z}_{32}\) ，对策略组合 (M, B) 赋予正概率 \(b = {z}_{23}\) ，其他分量 \({z}_{ij}\) 均为零。找出所有可能的 \(a\) 和 \(b = 1 - a\) 的值，使得以这种方式定义的相关机制 \(z\) 构成该游戏的一个粗相关均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 12.4. Show that in an \(N\) -player game where every player has two strategies, every coarse correlated equilibrium is a correlated equilibrium.

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习12.4。证明在一个有 \(N\) 个玩家且每个玩家有两种策略的游戏中，每个粗相关均衡都是相关均衡。
\end{tcolorbox}

Exercise 12.5. Show that if \(Y\) is a Markov chain on two states, then the off-diagonal elements of \(Y\) , in their columns, are proportional to the probabilities of a stationary distribution \(x\) of \(Y\) . That is, if

\begin{tcolorbox}
练习12.5。证明如果 \(Y\) 是一个两状态的马尔可夫链(Markov chain)，那么 \(Y\) 的非对角元素在其所在列中与 \(Y\) 的平稳分布(stationary distribution) \(x\) 的概率成比例。即，如果
\end{tcolorbox}

\[
Y = \left( \begin{array}{ll} a & b \\  c & d \end{array}\right)
\]

then \(\left( \begin{array}{ll} c & b \end{array}\right)  = \left( {c + b}\right) {x}^{\top }\) . Exactly when is \(x\) unique? Argue carefully.

\begin{tcolorbox}
那么 \(\left( \begin{array}{ll} c & b \end{array}\right)  = \left( {c + b}\right) {x}^{\top }\) 。 \(x\) 何时是唯一的？请给出详细论证。
\end{tcolorbox}
